title: Change My View? The Dynamics of Persuasion and Polarization in Online Discourse
summary: Philosophical accounts of persuasion often assume that shared evidence and rational argumentation should lead to a convergence of views between peers, yet everyday discourse often suggests otherwise. In this study, we use large language models to analyze a corpus of debates on Reddit's r/ChangeMyView, where belief revision is publicly signaled. Large language models were asked, halfway through each discussion, to forecast whether such an acknowledgement would arise; their probabilistic estimates serve as a conversational baseline. Each reply was then coded, through a hybrid machine-assisted procedure, for ten familiar rhetorical strategies -- concession, empathy, logical challenge, credibility appeals, and so forth. Adding these strategic features markedly improves predictive power and yields a consistent pattern: moves that express concession or empathetic alignment substantially increase the prospect of belief change, whereas frontal refutation, credibility attacks, and topic deflection diminish it. The findings indicate that effective public reasoning depends as much on relational framing as on evidential content, and they invite a refinement of normative accounts of rational dialogue.

AI.tldr: 本研究使用大语言模型分析Reddit的r/ChangeMyView辩论语料，发现修辞策略（尤其是让步和共情）对观点改变有显著预测作用，而正面反驳和可信度攻击则降低改变概率，表明公共推理的有效性高度依赖于关系框架而非仅凭证据内容。
AI.motivation: 哲学论述通常假设共享证据和理性论证应导致观点趋同，但日常话语常常与此相悖。本研究旨在通过大规模实证分析，揭示实际辩论中哪些修辞策略真正促进了信念改变，填补规范理论与现实对话行为之间的空白。
AI.method: 研究使用大语言模型对Reddit的r/ChangeMyView子论坛中的辩论语料进行分析：在每场讨论进行到一半时，LLM被要求预测用户是否会公开承认观点修正（作为对话基线）；随后通过混合机器辅助编码方法，对每条回复标注十种修辞策略（让步、共情、逻辑挑战、可信度诉求等），并利用这些策略特征改进预测模型。
AI.result: 加入修辞策略特征后，模型预测能力显著提升。结果显示，表达让步或共情对齐的回帖显著增加了观点改变的可能性，而正面反驳、可信度攻击和话题偏离则降低了这一可能性。不同策略对信念修正具有方向一致且统计显著的影响。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，有效的公共推理不仅依赖于证据内容，同样取决于关系框架（relational framing）的构建。这一发现邀请我们对理性对话的规范性理论进行修正，将社会情感维度纳入理性交流的核心考量。

title: jina-embeddings-v5-omni: Text-Geometry-Preserving Multimodal Embeddings via Frozen-Tower Composition
summary: In this work, we introduce frozen-encoder model composition, a novel approach to multimodal embedding models. We build on the VLM-style architecture, in which non-text encoders are adapted to produce input for a language model, which in turn generates embeddings for all varieties of input. We present the result: the jina-embeddings-v5-omni suite, a pair of models that encode text, image, audio, and video input into a single semantic embedding space. Our method is to extend the two Jina Embeddings v5 Text models to support additional media by adding encoders for images and audio. The backbone text embedding models and the added non-text media encoders remain frozen. We only trained the connecting components, representing 0.35% of the total weights of the joint model. Training is therefore much more efficient than full-parameter retraining. Additionally, the language model remains effectively unaltered, producing exactly the same embeddings for text inputs as the Jina Embeddings v5 Text models. Our evaluations show that this approach produces results that are competitive with the state-of-the-art, yielding nearly equal performance to larger multimodal embedding models.

AI.tldr: 提出冻结编码器模型组合方法，仅训练连接组件（占0.35%权重）将Jina文本嵌入模型扩展为支持文本、图像、音频和视频的多模态嵌入模型，在保持文本嵌入不变的同时达到与更大模型竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有全参数重训练的多模态嵌入模型计算成本高昂，且通常需要从头训练或大幅调整语言模型参数，导致文本嵌入行为发生变化，影响原有文本检索能力；本文旨在以极低训练成本将已有高性能文本嵌入模型扩展为多模态嵌入模型，同时保持纯文本嵌入能力不变。
AI.method: 基于VLM架构，将Jina Embeddings v5 Text模型作为冻结骨干网络，额外添加冻结的图像和音频编码器，仅训练连接组件（将非文本编码器输出映射到语言模型输入空间），连接组件仅占联合模型总权重的0.35%，语言模型和其他编码器在训练过程中均保持冻结状态。
AI.result: 该方法在图像、音频、视频等多模态嵌入任务上取得了与更大规模多模态嵌入模型竞争的性能，同时文本输入的嵌入结果与原始Jina Embeddings v5 Text模型完全一致，未发生任何退化。
AI.conclusion: 冻结编码器模型组合是一种高效且有效的多模态嵌入模型构建范式，通过极小规模参数训练即可实现多模态语义对齐，为多模态嵌入模型的轻量化构建和已有文本嵌入模型的扩展提供了可行方向。

title: AIPO: : Learning to Reason from Active Interaction
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities, largely stimulated by Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). However, existing RL algorithms face a fundamental limitation: their exploration remains largely constrained by the inherent capability boundary of the policy model. Although recent methods introduce external expert demonstrations to extend this boundary, they typically rely on complete trajectory-level guidance, which is sample-inefficient, information-sparse, and may confine exploration to a static guidance space. Inspired by the potential of multi-agent systems, we propose $\textbf{AIPO}$, an enhanced reinforcement learning framework that improves LLM reasoning through active multi-agent interaction during exploration. Specifically, AIPO enables the policy model to proactively consult three functional collaborative agents, $\textit{Verify Agent}$, $\textit{Knowledge Agent}$, and $\textit{Reasoning Agent}$, when encountering reasoning bottlenecks, thereby receiving fine-grained and targeted guidance to actively expand its capability boundary during training. We further introduce a tailored importance sampling coefficient together with a clipping strategy to mitigate the off-policy bias and gradient vanishing issues that arise when learning from agent-provided feedback. After training, the policy model performs reasoning independently without relying on collaborative agents. Extensive experiments on diverse reasoning benchmarks, including AIME, MATH500, GPQA-Diamond, and LiveCodeBench, show that AIPO consistently improves reasoning performance, generalizes robustly across different policy models and RLVR algorithms, and effectively expands the reasoning capability boundary of the policy model.

AI.tldr: 提出AIPO框架，通过主动多智能体交互在强化学习训练中为LLM提供细粒度引导，显著扩展推理能力边界，在多个推理基准上持续提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）算法受限于策略模型自身能力边界，探索空间有限；而引入外部专家示范的方法依赖完整的轨迹级引导，样本效率低、信息稀疏，且可能将探索限制在静态引导空间内。
AI.method: 提出AIPO框架，使策略模型在训练中遇到推理瓶颈时可主动咨询三个协作智能体（验证智能体、知识智能体、推理智能体），获得细粒度和针对性的引导以主动扩展能力边界；引入重要性采样系数与裁剪策略，缓解从智能体反馈学习时的离策略偏差和梯度消失问题；推理时模型独立运行，无需依赖协作智能体。
AI.result: 在AIME、MATH500、GPQA-Diamond和LiveCodeBench等多个多样化推理基准上的实验表明，AIPO一致提升了推理性能，在不同策略模型和RLVR算法上均展现出鲁棒的泛化能力，并有效扩展了策略模型的推理能力边界。
AI.conclusion: AIPO通过主动多智能体交互有效突破了现有RLVR算法中策略模型的能力边界限制，提供了样本高效的细粒度引导机制，为提升LLM推理能力开辟了新的范式。

title: Effective Explanations Support Planning Under Uncertainty
summary: Explaining how to get from A to B can be challenging. It requires mentally simulating what the listener will do based on what they are told. To capture this process, we propose a computational model that converts utterances into action plans: a large language model translates an explanation into program-like guidance (a policy prior and value map), and a planning agent executes it under partial observability. We score explanations by the efficiency and reliability of the resulting paths, penalizing replanning. Across four preregistered experiments, we collect a corpus of 1,200 explanations over 24 maps, elicit helpfulness judgments, measure baseline navigation, and test behavior with explanations of differing quality. Higher-scored explanations are judged more helpful and improve navigation: participants with explanations outperform those without, and high-scoring explanations help more than low-scoring ones. Together, these results show procedural explanation as utility-guided communication shaped by how language can be grounded into action under uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个将自然语言解释转换为行动规划的计算模型，通过LLM将解释转化为策略先验和值图，再由规划代理在部分可观测条件下执行，并基于路径效率和可靠性对解释质量进行评分，实验验证了该评分与人类有用性判断及导航表现的一致性。
AI.motivation: 解释如何从A到B的过程具有挑战性，因为需要心理模拟听者基于所听到的内容会如何行动。现有研究缺乏一个能够量化解释质量并将其与实际行动结果联系起来的计算框架，因此本文旨在解决如何将语言解释系统地转化为可执行的行动计划并评估其效用这一问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个将解释转化为行动规划的计算模型：首先利用大型语言模型将自然语言解释翻译为类似于程序化的指导信号，包括策略先验和值图；然后由一个规划代理在部分可观测条件下执行这些指导信号，生成实际的导航路径。同时，模型通过惩罚重规划的方式，根据生成路径的效率和可靠性对原始解释进行评分，从而量化解释的帮助程度。
AI.result: 在四项预注册实验中，研究者在24张地图上收集了1,200个解释数据，收集了人类对解释有用性的判断，测量了基线导航表现，并测试了不同质量解释对导航行为的影响。结果表明，评分越高的解释被认为越有帮助，并且确实改善了导航表现：获得解释的参与者优于没有解释的参与者，而高质量解释相比低质量解释带来了更大的导航性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果共同表明，程序性解释是一种以效用为导向的沟通形式，其质量取决于语言如何在不确定性条件下被接地到实际行动中。该研究为理解语言在规划与决策中的功能性角色提供了计算框架，并启示了在智能体交互中如何生成更有效的解释。

title: Where Reliability Lives in Vision-Language Models: A Mechanistic Study of Attention, Hidden States, and Causal Circuits
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables. Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Multimodal Reasoning. Code and probe-training pipelines: https://github.com/itsloganmann/VLM-Reliability-Probe
summary: A pervasive intuition holds that vision-language models (VLMs) are most trustworthy when their attention maps look sharp: concentrated attention on the queried region should imply a confident, calibrated answer. We test this Attention-Confidence Assumption directly. We instrument three open-weight VLM families (LLaVA-1.5, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL; 3-7B parameters) with a unified mechanistic pipeline -- the VLM Reliability Probe (VRP) -- that compares attention structure, generation dynamics, and hidden-state geometry against a single correctness label. Three results emerge. (i) Attention structure is a near-zero predictor of correctness (R_pb(C_k,y)=0.001, 95% CI [-0.034,0.036]; R_pb(H_s,y)=-0.012, [-0.047,0.024] on a pooled n=3,090 split), even though attention remains causally necessary for feature extraction (top-30% patch masking drops accuracy by 8.2-11.3 pp, p<0.001). (ii) Reliability becomes legible later in the computation: a single hidden-state linear probe reaches AUROC>0.95 on POPE for two of three families, and self-consistency at K=10 is the strongest behavioral predictor we measure at 10x inference cost (R_pb=0.43). (iii) Causal neuron-level ablations expose a sharp architectural split with direct monitor-design implications: late-fusion LLaVA concentrates reliability in a fragile late bottleneck (-8.3 pp object-identification accuracy after top-5 probe-neuron ablation), whereas early-fusion PaliGemma and Qwen2-VL distribute it widely and absorb destruction of ~50% of their peak-layer hidden dimension with <=1 pp degradation. The takeaway is narrow but consequential: in 3-7B VLMs, reliability is read more reliably off hidden-state geometry, layer-wise margin formation, and sparse late-layer circuits than off attention-map sharpness.

AI.tldr: 本文通过统一机制分析框架VRP，系统检验了视觉语言模型中注意力锐度与可靠性之间的关联，发现注意力结构对正确性预测能力接近零（R_pb≈0.001），而隐状态几何、层间边际和稀疏后层电路才是更可靠的可靠性信号。
AI.motivation: 现有直觉认为VLM的注意力图越锐利、越集中于查询区域，模型越可信且校准越好，即Attention-Confidence假设尚未得到系统性验证，因此需要直接检验该假设的正确性以及探索更可靠的可靠性表征。
AI.method: 作者设计统一机制分析管道VRP，在LLaVA-1.5、PaliGemma、Qwen2-VL三个开源VLM家族（3-7B参数）上，系统比较注意力结构、生成动态、隐状态几何与正确性标签之间的关系，并采用因果神经元消融分析不同融合架构下的可靠性分布。
AI.result: 注意力结构预测正确性能力极弱（R_pb(C_k,y)=0.001, 95% CI [-0.034,0.036]），尽管注意力对特征提取因果必需（移除top-30%面片使准确率下降8.2-11.3 pp, p<0.001）；隐状态线性探针在POPE上AUROC>0.95；自一致性K=10时R_pb=0.43；因果消融显示LLaVA的可靠性集中于脆弱晚期瓶颈（消融top-5神经元使目标识别准确率下降8.3 pp），而PaliGemma/Qwen2-VL分布广泛（移除~50%隐层维度仅下降≤1 pp）。
AI.conclusion: 在3-7B规模VLM中，模型可靠性的可读信号主要来自隐状态几何、层间边际形成和稀疏后层电路，而非注意力图锐度，这一发现对设计可解释性监控工具具有直接指导意义。

title: VLADriver-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Vision-Language-Action Models for Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving, yet their reliance on implicit parametric knowledge limits generalization in long-tail scenarios. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a solution by accessing external expert priors, standard visual retrieval suffers from high latency and semantic ambiguity. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{VLADriver-RAG}, a framework that grounds planning in explicit, structure-aware historical knowledge. Specifically, we abstract sensory inputs into spatiotemporal semantic graphs via a \textit{Visual-to-Scenario} mechanism, effectively filtering visual noise. To ensure retrieval relevance, we employ a \textit{Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model} that utilizes Graph-DTW metric alignment to prioritize intrinsic topological consistency over superficial visual similarity. These retrieved priors are then fused within a query-based VLA backbone to synthesize precise, disentangled trajectories. Extensive experiments on the Bench2Drive benchmark establish a new state-of-the-art, achieving a Driving Score of 89.12.

AI.tldr: VLADriver-RAG是一种面向端到端自动驾驶的检索增强生成框架，通过将感官输入抽象为时空语义图并利用Graph-DTW度量对齐进行场景对齐检索，在Bench2Drive基准上以89.12的驾驶分数取得新最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在端到端自动驾驶中依赖隐式参数化知识，在长尾场景下泛化能力有限；尽管检索增强生成（RAG）可通过外部专家先验缓解该问题，但标准视觉检索存在高延迟和语义模糊性两大挑战。
AI.method: 提出VLADriver-RAG框架，通过Visual-to-Scenario机制将感官输入抽象为时空语义图以过滤视觉噪声；设计Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model，利用Graph-DTW度量对齐优先保持拓扑一致性而非表层视觉相似性来确保检索相关性；最后将检索到的先验与基于查询的VLA骨干网络融合，生成精确且解耦的轨迹。
AI.result: 在Bench2Drive基准上进行的大量实验取得了新的最优结果，驾驶得分达到89.12，验证了结构感知历史知识对规划过程的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明将显式、结构感知的历史知识通过场景对齐检索机制融入VLA模型，能够有效提升自动驾驶在长尾场景下的泛化能力和规划性能，为检索增强型端到端自动驾驶提供了新的技术路径。

title: Do Agents Need to Plan Step-by-Step? Rethinking Planning Horizon in Data-Centric Tool Calling
summary: Explicit planning is a critical capability for LLM-based agents solving complex data-centric tasks, which require precise tool calling over external data sources. Existing strategies fall into two paradigms based on planning horizon: (1) full-horizon (FH), which generates a complete plan before execution, and (2) single-step horizon (SH), which interleaves each action (tool call) with incremental reasoning and observation. While step-by-step execution is a common default under the assumption that eager execution monitoring is necessary for adaptability, we revisit this assumption for well-defined data-centric tasks. Our controlled empirical study isolates planning horizon as the key architectural feature and systematically analyzes the effects of topological complexity and tool robustness on both paradigms. Our experiments across Knowledge Base Question Answering and Multi-hop QA show that FH planning with lazy replanning achieves accuracy parity with SH across varying depths, breadths, and robustness levels, while using 2-3x fewer tokens. These findings suggest that for well-defined data-centric tasks, eager step-wise monitoring is often unnecessary, and full-horizon planning with on-demand replanning can offer a more efficient default.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对照实验系统研究了全视野规划与单步规划两种范式在基于LLM的智能体处理明确定义的数据密集型任务时的表现，发现全视野规划结合惰性重规划在达到相同准确率的同时，可减少2-3倍的token消耗，挑战了单步执行作为默认范式的普遍假设。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的智能体在解决复杂数据密集型任务时存在两种规划范式——全视野规划和单步规划，其中单步规划因假设需要即时执行监控以适应环境变化而成为普遍默认选择。本文旨在重新审视这一假设，研究在明确定义的数据密集型任务中，规划视野作为关键架构特征对任务性能的影响，以及拓扑复杂度和工具鲁棒性对两种范式的系统影响。
AI.method: 本文采用受控实证研究方法，将规划视野作为关键架构特征进行隔离，系统性地分析了拓扑复杂度和工具鲁棒性对全视野规划和单步规划两种范式的影响。全视野规划在执行前生成完整计划，单步规划则将每个动作（工具调用）与增量推理和观察交替进行。实验在知识库问答和多跳问答两个数据密集型任务上进行。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在不同深度、宽度和鲁棒性水平下，全视野规划结合惰性重规划在准确率上与单步规划持平，同时token消耗减少2-3倍。
AI.conclusion: 对于明确定义的数据密集型任务，急切的单步监控通常是不必要的，全视野规划配合按需重规划可以提供更高效的默认方案。这一发现挑战了单步执行作为LLM智能体默认范式的普遍假设。

title: Auto-Rubric as Reward: From Implicit Preferences to Explicit Multimodal Generative Criteria
summary: Aligning multimodal generative models with human preferences demands reward signals that respect the compositional, multi-dimensional structure of human judgment. Prevailing RLHF approaches reduce this structure to scalar or pairwise labels, collapsing nuanced preferences into opaque parametric proxies and exposing vulnerabilities to reward hacking. While recent Rubrics-as-Reward (RaR) methods attempt to recover this structure through explicit criteria, generating rubrics that are simultaneously reliable, scalable, and data-efficient remains an open problem. We introduce Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR), a framework that reframes reward modeling from implicit weight optimization to explicit, criteria-based decomposition. Before any pairwise comparison, ARR externalizes a VLM's internalized preference knowledge as prompt-specific rubrics, translating holistic intent into independently verifiable quality dimensions. This conversion of implicit preference structure into inspectable, interpretable constraints substantially suppresses evaluation biases including positional bias, enabling both zero-shot deployment and few-shot conditioning on minimal supervision. To extend these gains into generative training, we propose Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO), which distills ARR's structured multi-dimensional evaluation into a robust binary reward, replacing opaque scalar regression with rubric-conditioned preference decisions that stabilize policy gradients. On text-to-image generation and image editing benchmarks, ARR-RPO outperforms pairwise reward models and VLM judges, demonstrating that explicitly externalizing implicit preference knowledge into structured rubrics achieves more reliable, data-efficient multimodal alignment, revealing that the bottleneck is the absence of a factorized interface, not a deficit of knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR)框架，将多模态生成模型对齐中的隐式偏好知识外化为显式、可解释的评分准则，并配合Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO)将结构化多维评估蒸馏为鲁棒的二元奖励信号，在文本到图像生成和图像编辑任务中超越了传统成对奖励模型和VLM裁判，实现了更可靠、数据高效的多模态对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF方法将人类偏好的组合式、多维结构简化为标量或成对标签，导致偏好信号被压缩成不透明的参数化代理，易受奖励攻击；而Rubrics-as-Reward方法虽尝试通过显式准则恢复偏好结构，但生成既可靠、可扩展又数据高效的评分准则仍是一个开放问题。
AI.method: ARR框架在对齐前先外化VLM内化的偏好知识为提示特定的评分准则，将整体意图转化为独立可验证的质量维度，从而抑制位置偏差等评估偏见，支持零样本部署和小样本条件化；RPO将ARR的结构化多维评估蒸馏为鲁棒的二元奖励，用基于准则的偏好决策替代不透明的标量回归，稳定策略梯度。
AI.result: 在文本到图像生成和图像编辑基准上，ARR-RPO优于成对奖励模型和VLM裁判，表明将隐式偏好知识显式外化为结构化准则能够实现更可靠、数据高效的多模态对齐。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现多模态对齐的瓶颈并非偏好知识的缺乏，而是缺乏一个可分解的接口来外化这些知识；通过将隐式偏好结构转化为可检查、可解释的约束，可以获得更强的评估可靠性和训练稳定性。

title: VT-Bench: A Unified Benchmark for Visual-Tabular Multi-Modal Learning
summary:
Multi-model learning has attracted great attention in visual-text tasks. However, visual-tabular data, which plays a pivotal role in high-stakes domains like healthcare and industry, remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce \textit{VT-Bench}, the first unified benchmark for standardizing vision-tabular discriminative prediction and generative reasoning tasks. VT-Bench aggregates 14 datasets across 9 domains (medical-centric, while covering pets, media, and transportation) with over 756K samples. We evaluate 23 representative models, including unimodal experts, specialized visual-tabular models, general-purpose vision-language models (VLMs), and tool-augmented methods, highlighting substantial challenges of visual-tabular learning. We believe VT-Bench will stimulate the community to build more powerful multi-modal vision-tabular foundation models.
  Benchmark: https://github.com/Ziyi-Jia990/VT-Bench

AI.tldr: 本文提出VT-Bench，首个面向视觉-表格数据（visual-tabular）的统一基准，涵盖14个数据集、9个领域及75.6万样本，系统评估了23种代表性模型，揭示了现有方法在该多模态学习任务上的显著不足，旨在推动视觉-表格基础模型的发展。
AI.motivation: 多模态学习在视觉-文本任务中取得了显著进展，但视觉-表格数据（visual-tabular data）在高风险领域如医疗和工业中至关重要，却缺乏统一的标准化基准，导致该方向研究不足且难以系统评估模型能力。
AI.method: 构建了VT-Bench统一基准，聚合来自9个领域（以医疗为中心，涵盖宠物、媒体、交通等）的14个数据集，共计超过75.6万样本，并设计包括判别性预测和生成性推理两类任务；在此基础上评估了23种代表性模型，涵盖单模态专家模型、专用视觉-表格模型、通用视觉语言模型（VLM）以及工具增强方法。
AI.result: 通过对23种模型的系统评估，发现现有方法在视觉-表格学习任务上面临显著挑战，无论是专用模型还是通用VLM均表现不足，揭示了该领域当前方法的性能瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: VT-Bench为视觉-表格多模态学习提供了首个标准化评测平台，其实验结果清晰地表明了现有模型在该任务上的局限性，有望激励社区构建更强大的视觉-表格多模态基础模型。

title: NARRA-Gym for Evaluating Interactive Narrative Agents
summary: Interactive narrative tasks require LLMs to sustain a coherent, evolving story while adapting to a user over multiple turns. However, suitable benchmarks for this setting are limited: existing evaluations often focus on static prompts, isolated story generations, or post-hoc ratings, and therefore miss whether models can jointly manage story generation, long-context state and pacing, character simulation, empathic personalization, and story-grounded artifacts. We introduce NARRA-Gym, an executable evaluation environment that turns a sparse emotional seed into a complete interactive story episode and logs the full model-in-the-loop trajectory, including story construction, memory updates, planning, pacing interventions, and optional artifact synthesis. We evaluate nine frontier LLMs using a controlled LLM-as-judge sweep over eight benchmark personas and a human evaluation in which participants rate customized model outputs. Our results show substantial variation across models, personas, and evaluation dimensions: models that produce fluent stories can still fail on robustness, user experience, or resistance-sensitive personalization. These findings suggest that interactive narrative offers a useful benchmark for evaluating long-horizon, user-adaptive LLM behavior beyond isolated story quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NARRA-Gym，一个面向交互式叙事任务的执行评估环境，用于系统评测大语言模型在长程故事生成、记忆管理、角色模拟与个性化适配等多维度能力，实验表明现有前沿模型在该任务上表现差异显著，交互式叙事可作为评测LLM长程用户适应性行为的重要基准。
AI.motivation: 现有评测基准多聚焦于静态提示、孤立故事生成或事后评分，无法有效评估LLM在交互式叙事任务中是否能够同时管理故事生成、长上下文状态与节奏控制、角色模拟、共情个性化以及故事相关的物件的生成与维护，因此缺乏一个能够全面捕捉多轮交互中模型行为演变的评测框架。
AI.method: NARRA-Gym将稀疏的情感种子转化为完整的交互式故事剧集，并记录完整的模型参与轨迹，包括故事构建、记忆更新、规划、节奏干预以及可选的物件合成；采用受控的LLM-as-judge对八个基准人物角色进行系统评分，并结合人类评估对定制化模型输出进行评分。
AI.result: 在九个前沿LLM上的评测结果显示，模型在不同人物角色和评估维度上存在显著差异；能够生成流畅故事的模型在鲁棒性、用户体验或对敏感话题的个性化适配方面仍可能表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现表明，交互式叙事为评估长程、用户自适应的LLM行为提供了一个超越孤立故事质量的有用基准。

title: On Distinguishing Capability Elicitation from Capability Creation in Post-Training: A Free-Energy Perspective
summary: Debates about large language model post-training often treat supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as imitation and reinforcement learning (RL) as discovery. But this distinction is too coarse. What matters is whether a training procedure increases the probability of behaviors the pretrained model could already produce, or whether it changes what the model can practically reach. We argue that post-training research should distinguish between capability elicitation and capability creation. We make this distinction operational by introducing the notion of accessible support: the set of behaviors that a model can practically produce under finite budgets. Post-training that reweights behaviors within this support is capability elicitation; whereas changing the support itself corresponds to capability creation. We develop this argument through a free-energy view of post-training. SFT and RL can both be seen as reweighting a pretrained reference distribution, only with different external signals. Demonstration signals define low-energy behavior for SFT, and reward signals define low-energy behavior for RL. When the update remains close to the base model, the main effect is local reweighting, not capability creation. Within this framework, the central question is no longer whether post-training is framed as SFT or RL, but whether it reweights behaviors already within reach, or instead expands the model's reachable behavioral space through search, interaction, tool use, or the incorporation of new information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将大语言模型后训练区分为"能力激发"与"能力创造"两类操作，通过"可达支持集"概念形式化这一区分，并基于自由能视角统一解释监督微调与强化学习：二者均是对预训练参考分布的重加权，区别仅在于外部信号类型，核心问题在于是否扩展模型的实际可达行为空间。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常将监督微调视为模仿、强化学习视为发现，但这种粗粒度区分未能准确刻画后训练的本质作用。本文旨在澄清后训练过程是否只是重加权模型原本就能产生的行为，还是真正改变了模型实际可达的行为能力，从而弥合"SFT vs RL"这一过于简化的二元框架。
AI.method: 本文引入"可达支持集"概念，将其定义为模型在有限计算预算下实际能够产生的行为集合，并以此将后训练操作分为两类：在该支持集内重加权行为属于能力激发，改变支持集本身则属于能力创造。论文进一步通过自由能视角统一建模后训练过程，将SFT和RL均视为对预训练参考分布的重加权，其中演示信号定义SFT的低能行为，奖励信号定义RL的低能行为；当更新幅度接近基模型时，主要效果是局部重加权而非能力创造。
AI.result: 论文提出核心结论：后训练的关键区分不在于采用SFT还是RL框架，而在于操作是否扩展了模型的可达行为空间。SFT和RL在保持与基模型接近时都只产生局部重加权效果，而真正的能力创造需要通过搜索、交互、工具使用或引入新信息等手段来扩大模型的实际可达行为集合。该框架为理解不同后训练策略的本质差异提供了统一的理论视角。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心启示是：后训练研究的核心问题应从"用SFT还是RL"转向"是否在扩展模型的可达行为空间"。研究者应更关注那些能够实质性地进行能力创造的方法（如搜索、交互、工具使用），而非仅仅在已有行为空间内进行重加权。这一分析框架为设计更有效的后训练策略提供了理论基础和分类指导。

title: HY-Himmel Technical Report: Hierarchical Interleaved Multi-stream Motion Encoding for Long Video Understanding
summary: Long-video understanding with multimodal language models suffers from three compounding bottlenecks: heavy decode cost to obtain dense RGB frames, quadratic token growth with frame count, and weak motion perception under sparse keyframe sampling. We present HY-Himmel, a hierarchical video-language framework that allocates semantic and motion capacity separately. A small set of sparse anchor I-frames is routed to the expensive host ViT to ground object identity and scene layout, while the far denser inter-frame intervals are encoded by a lightweight compressed-domain tri-stream adapter that distils motion evidence from motion-vector maps, residual maps, and I-frame context into aligned motion tokens. These tokens are injected into the LLM via a differentiable placeholder mechanism after a dedicated Stage-1 contrastive alignment that places the motion representation in a geometry compatible with the frozen visual backbone. On Video-MME, HY-Himmel surpasses the dense 32-frame baseline by +2.3 pp (61.2 to 63.5%) while using 3.6x fewer context tokens. Extensive ablations over stream composition, motion encoder family, fusion mode, alignment objective, anchor count, LoRA rank, and video duration confirm that the full tri-stream is necessary and sufficient for the observed gains.

AI.tldr: HY-Himmel 提出一种分层视频-语言框架，通过将少量稀疏锚帧送入昂贵的 ViT 处理语义，而密集间隔帧的轻量压缩域三流适配器提取运动标记，在 Video-MME 上以 3.6 倍更少的上下文令牌超越密集 32 帧基线 2.3 个百分点。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解中多模态语言模型面临三个叠加瓶颈：密集 RGB 帧的解码成本高昂、随着帧数增长令牌数量呈二次膨胀、以及稀疏关键帧采样下运动感知能力薄弱，亟需一种能同时高效处理语义与运动信息的方法。
AI.method: HY-Himmel 采用分层框架，将少量稀疏锚点 I 帧送入昂贵的宿主 ViT 以获取对象身份和场景布局；密集帧间隔则由轻量级压缩域三流适配器编码，该适配器从运动矢量图、残差图和 I 帧上下文中提取运动证据并对齐为运动令牌；通过 Stage-1 对比对齐使运动表示与冻结视觉骨干的几何兼容，并利用可微分占位符机制将运动令牌注入 LLM。
AI.result: 在 Video-MME 基准上，HY-Himmel 以 3.6 倍更少的上下文令牌超越密集 32 帧基线，准确率从 61.2% 提升至 63.5%（+2.3 个百分点）；消融实验验证了三流结构、运动编码器族、融合方式、对齐目标、锚帧数量、LoRA 秩和视频时长等因素的必要性与充分性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明将语义与运动容量分离的分层设计能有效破解长视频理解中的解码成本、令牌膨胀与运动感知三大瓶颈，全三流结构是实现性能提升的必要且充分组件。

title: Source or It Didn't Happen: A Multi-Agent Framework for Citation Hallucination Detection
summary: Large language models are increasingly used in scientific writing, yet they can fabricate citation-shaped references that appear plausible but fail bibliographic verification. Existing detectors often reduce verification to binary found/not-found decisions and rely on brittle parsing or incomplete retrieval, offering little field-level signal to auditors. We reframe citation hallucination detection as taxonomy-aligned field-level adjudication and introduce a 12-code taxonomy spanning Real, Potential, and Hallucinated citations. Based on this taxonomy, we build CiteTracer, a cascading multi-agent detector that extracts structured citations from PDF and BibTeX, retrieves evidence through cache lookup, URL fetch, scholar connectors, and web search, applies deterministic field matching, and routes ambiguous cases to class-specialist judgers. We release a benchmark of 2,450 synthetic citations built from real seeds with controlled LLM mutations, paired with 957 real-world fabricated citations drawn from ICLR 2026 and an anonymous conference desk-rejected submissions. CiteTracer reaches 97.1% accuracy on the synthetic benchmark, with class-level F1 scores of 97.0, 95.8, and 98.5 for Real, Potential, and Hallucinated, respectively, and detects 97.1% of fabrications on the real-world set without abstaining. Code: https://github.com/aaFrostnova/CiteTracer.

AI.tldr: CiteTracer 提出了一种基于12类标注体系的级联多智能体检测框架，将引用幻觉检测重构为面向领域的分类任务，在合成基准上达到97.1%准确率，并在真实伪造引用中检测出97.1%的伪造案例。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型引用幻觉检测方法通常将验证简化为二元（找到/未找到）判定，依赖脆弱的解析或不完整的检索，无法为审计人员提供细粒度的领域级信号，亟需一种能够进行领域级分类的鲁棒检测框架。
AI.method: CiteTracer 构建了一个涵盖真实、潜在和伪造三类共12种代码的引用标注体系，采用级联多智能体架构：首先从PDF和BibTeX中提取结构化引用，然后通过缓存查找、URL获取、学术搜索和网络搜索检索证据，应用确定性字段匹配，并将模糊案例路由至类别专家判断器进行最终裁决。
AI.result: 在包含2,450条合成引用（基于真实种子经LLM突变构建）和957条真实伪造引用（取自ICLR 2026及匿名会议拒稿）的基准测试中，CiteTracer在合成集上达到97.1%准确率，真实、潜在、伪造三类的F1分数分别为97.0、95.8和98.5，并在真实集上检测出97.1%的伪造引用且无弃权案例。
AI.conclusion: CiteTracer 通过多级分类和级联多智能体检索验证，显著提升了引用幻觉检测的精度和粒度，为学术诚信审计提供了可落地的自动化工具，其开源代码为后续研究建立了标准化基准。

title: MemQ: Integrating Q-Learning into Self-Evolving Memory Agents over Provenance DAGs
comment: 22 pages, 11 figures (containing 43 individual image panels total)
summary: Episodic memory allows LLM agents to accumulate and retrieve experience, but current methods treat each memory independently, i.e., evaluating retrieval quality in isolation without accounting for the dependency chains through which memories enable the creation of future memories. We introduce MemQ, which applies TD($λ$) eligibility traces to memory Q-values, propagating credit backward through a provenance DAG that records which memories were retrieved when each new memory was created. Credit weight decays as $(γλ)^d$ with DAG depth $d$, replacing temporal distance with structural proximity. We formalize the setting as an Exogenous-Context MDP, whose factored transition decouples the exogenous task stream from the endogenous memory store. Across six benchmarks, spanning OS interaction, function calling, code generation, multimodal reasoning, embodied reasoning, and expert-level QA, MemQ achieves the highest success rate on all six in generalization evaluation and runtime learning, with gains largest on multi-step tasks that produce deep and relevant provenance chains (up to +5.7~pp) and smallest on single-step classification (+0.77~pp) where single-step updates already suffice. We further study how $γ$ and $λ$ interact with the EC-MDP structure, providing principled guidance for parameter selection and future research. Code will be available soon.

AI.tldr: MemQ引入TD(λ)资格迹，通过记忆来源的有向无环图（DAG）反向传播信用，将结构距离替代时序距离来更新记忆Q值，在六个基准上均取得最优性能，尤其擅长多步依赖任务。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体中的 episodic memory 方法将每条记忆视为独立片段，孤立地评估检索质量，忽略了记忆之间通过依赖链相互关联的本质——一条记忆的创建往往依赖于之前被检索到的其他记忆，这种依赖性未被纳入信用分配机制。
AI.method: MemQ 将TD(λ)资格迹引入记忆Q值更新，通过记录记忆创建时被检索到的历史记忆构成一个 provenance DAG（来源有向无环图），并沿该图反向传播信用；信用权重按 (γλ)^d 随DAG深度d衰减，用结构邻近性替代传统的时序距离。此外，该研究将问题形式化为 Exogenous-Context MDP（EC-MDP），其分解式转移将外生任务流与内生记忆存储解耦。
AI.result: 在涵盖操作系统交互、函数调用、代码生成、多模态推理、具身推理和专家级QA的六个基准上，MemQ在泛化评估和运行时学习中均取得最高成功率，其中多步依赖任务的增益最大（最高+5.7个百分点），而单步分类任务增益最小（+0.77个百分点），表明该方法对深层相关依赖链尤为有效。
AI.conclusion: MemQ验证了在记忆系统中利用结构依赖关系进行信用分配的有效性，揭示了γ和λ参数与EC-MDP结构之间的交互机制，并为参数选择提供了原则性指导，为未来将记忆信用分配与结构化任务流结合的研究奠定了基础。

title: WATCH: Wide-Area Archaeological Site Tracking for Change Detection
summary: Monitoring archaeological sites at scale is vital for protecting cultural heritage, yet pinpointing when disturbances occur remains difficult because visual cues are subtle and ground-truth data are sparse. We introduce WATCH, a framework for month-level change-event localization over PlanetScope satellite mosaics (2017-2024, 4.7 m/px) that supports three complementary scoring approaches: (i) Temporal Embedding Distance (TED), a training-free method that scores month-to-month deviations from a local temporal reference; (ii) Self-Supervised Change Detection (SSCD), an ensemble of reconstruction, forecasting, and latent-novelty signals; and (iii) a Weakly Supervised (WS) temporal localization model trained with sparse event-month labels. We benchmark WATCH on 1,943 archaeological sites in Afghanistan using embeddings from six foundation models (CLIP, GeoRSCLIP, SatMAE, Prithvi-EO-2.0, DINOv3, and Satlas-Pretrain) alongside a handcrafted spectral and texture baseline, and assess cross-regional generalization on sites in Syria, Turkey, Pakistan, and Egypt. The unsupervised approaches (TED, SSCD) consistently outperform the weakly supervised alternative. TED with SatMAE achieves the highest exact-month recall (55% at m=0), while TED with GeoRSCLIP, CLIP, or Satlas-Pretrain reaches 92.5% within a three-month tolerance (m=3). Handcrafted features remain competitive for exact-month detection under weak supervision. Our directional margin analysis reveals systematic temporal biases: SSCD paired with GeoRSCLIP or Prithvi-EO-2.0 exhibits the strongest early-warning profile, detecting anomalies before the recorded event, while TED favors confirmation-oriented detection after a change has materialized. These results show that satellite imagery combined with foundation-model embeddings enables scalable, decision-relevant heritage monitoring. Code: https://github.com/microsoft/WATCH

AI.tldr: 提出WATCH框架，利用PlanetScope卫星影像和基础模型嵌入，通过无监督（TED、SSCD）和弱监督方法实现月度级文物遗址变化事件定位，无监督方法表现更优，TED+SatMAE达55%精确月召回率，TED+GeoRSCLIP/CLIP/Satlas-Pretrain在三个月容差内达92.5%召回率。
AI.motivation: 大规模文物遗址监测对文化遗产保护至关重要，但扰动发生的时间点难以精确定位，主要挑战在于视觉变化线索细微且真实标注数据稀疏，现有方法难以在月度尺度上准确检测变化事件。
AI.method: 提出WATCH框架，基于2017-2024年4.7米/像素的PlanetScope卫星镶嵌影像，支持三种互补评分方法：(i) 时间嵌入距离(TED)，一种免训练方法，通过计算月度与局部时间参考的偏离程度来评分；(ii) 自监督变化检测(SSCD)，集成重建、预测和潜在新颖性三个信号；(iii) 弱监督(WS)时间定位模型，使用稀疏的事件月度标签训练。使用六种基础模型(CLIP、GeoRSCLIP、SatMAE、Prithvi-EO-2.0、DINOv3、Satlas-Pretrain)的嵌入及手工特征作为输入，并设计了方向性边际分析来检测时间偏差。
AI.result: 在阿富汗1,943个遗址上的基准测试中，无监督方法(TED、SSCD)一致优于弱监督方法。TED+SatMAE在精确月度检测上达到最高召回率(55%, m=0)；TED+GeoRSCLIP、CLIP或Satlas-Pretrain在三个月容差内达到92.5%召回率(m=3)。手工特征在弱监督下对精确月度检测仍具有竞争力。方向性边际分析显示：SSCD+GeoRSCLIP或Prithvi-EO-2.0具有最强预警特征，在记录事件前即检测到异常；TED则倾向于事件发生后进行确认性检测。
AI.conclusion: 卫星影像结合基础模型嵌入能够实现可扩展、对决策有价值的文化遗产监测。无监督方法在变化事件定位中优于弱监督方法，不同方法表现出系统性的时间偏差——SSCD偏向早期预警而TED偏向事后确认，这为实际应用中选择合适方法提供了指导。

title: AgentCollabBench: Diagnosing When Good Agents Make Bad Collaborators
summary: Multi-agent systems achieve state-of-the-art outcomes through peer collaboration. However, when an agent in the pipeline silently drops a constraint, the system's final output may look correct even though the reasoning chain was quietly corrupted, and existing outcome-based evaluations are blind to such multi-hop process failures. To make these vulnerabilities measurable before deployment, we introduce AgentCollabBench, a diagnostic benchmark of 900 human-validated tasks spanning software engineering, DevOps, and data engineering. Each task isolates one of four behavioral risks: instruction decay (does a constraint survive peer pressure?), false-belief contagion (does a falsehood spread through consensus?), context leakage (does information bleed between tasks?), and tracer durability (does marked data reach the final agent?). Evaluating four modern LLMs (GPT 4.1 mini, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite, Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B, and Llama 3.1 8B Instruct), we expose model-specific vulnerability profiles invisible to outcome-only evaluation; Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B, for example, leads on tracer durability and instruction stability, while GPT 4.1 mini leads on leakage containment and false-belief resistance. Beyond per-model differences, communication topology emerges as a primary risk factor that explains 7-40% of the variance in multi-hop information survival. The effect traces to a synthesis bottleneck specific to converging-DAG nodes: an agent weighing competing parent inputs discards constraints carried by a minority branch, a bottleneck structurally absent from linear chains. AgentCollabBench demonstrates that suboptimal topology can silently erase the safeguards of highly capable models, arguing that multi-agent reliability is fundamentally a structural problem and that scaling model intelligence alone is no substitute for architecture.

AI.tldr: 提出 AgentCollabBench，一个包含 900 个经人工验证任务的诊断基准，用于量化多智能体系统中指令衰减、假信念传染、上下文泄露和追踪耐久性四种流程风险；实验表明通信拓扑是比模型能力更关键的风险因素，收敛 DAG 结构中的合成瓶颈会系统性丢弃少数分支的约束，证明多智能体可靠性本质上是一个结构问题。
AI.motivation: 现有面向多智能体系统的评估仅关注最终输出结果的正确性，但当链路中的某个智能体静默丢弃约束时，推理链已被悄然污染而最终输出仍可能看似正确；这种对多跳过程故障的盲区使得部署前无法量化此类漏洞，亟需一种能够诊断中间过程行为风险的基准。
AI.method: 设计了 AgentCollabBench，包含 900 个经人工验证的任务，覆盖软件工程、DevOps 和数据工程领域，每个任务隔离四种行为风险之一：指令衰减（约束是否在同伴压力下幸存）、假信念传染（错误是否通过共识扩散）、上下文泄漏（信息是否在任务间串扰）、追踪耐久性（标记数据是否到达最终智能体）。对 GPT 4.1 mini、Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite、Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B 和 Llama 3.1 8B Instruct 四个模型进行评估。
AI.result: 不同模型展现出结果导向评估无法感知的特异性脆弱性画像：Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B 在追踪耐久性和指令稳定性上领先，GPT 4.1 mini 在泄漏抑制和假信念抵抗上领先。通信拓扑被识别为预测多跳信息存活率的主要风险因素，解释 7-40% 的方差，其影响可追溯至收敛 DAG 节点特有的合成瓶颈——权衡多个父节点输入的智能体会丢弃少数分支携带的约束。
AI.conclusion: 次优拓扑可以静默抹去高能力模型的安全防护机制，说明多智能体系统的可靠性本质上是结构性问题，单纯提升模型智能无法替代架构层面的谨慎设计。

title: SkillLens: Adaptive Multi-Granularity Skill Reuse for Cost-Efficient LLM Agents
summary: Skill libraries have become a practical way for LLM agents to reuse procedural experience across tasks. However, existing systems typically treat skills as flat, single-resolution prompt blocks. This creates a tension between relevance and cost: injecting coarse skills can introduce irrelevant or misleading context, while rewriting entire skills is expensive and often unnecessary. We propose SkillLens, a hierarchical skill-evolution framework that organizes skills into a four-layer graph of policies, strategies, procedures, and primitives, and retrieves them at mixed granularity. Given a task, SkillLens first retrieves semantically relevant skill seeds, expands them through degree-corrected random walk over the skill graph, and then uses a verifier to decide whether each visited unit should be accepted, decomposed, rewritten, or skipped. This enables the agent to reuse compatible subskills directly while adapting only locally mismatched components. To improve the system over time, SkillLens further refines multi-granularity skills and verifier in order to improve its routing decisions. We provide theoretical analysis showing that mixed-granularity adaptation incurs sublinear cost under sparse mismatch assumptions and that the evolutionary update rule monotonically improves the validation objective until a local optimum. Across MuLocbench and ALFWorld, SkillLens consistently improves over strong skill-based baselines, achieving up to a 6.31 percentage-point Acc@1 gain for bug localization and raising agent success rate from 45.00% to 51.31%.

AI.tldr: SkillLens提出了一种分层技能进化框架，通过四层技能图谱（策略、策略、程序、基元）和混合粒度检索机制，结合随机游走扩展与验证器路由决策，在稀疏不匹配假设下实现次线性适配成本，并在MuLocbench和ALFWorld上显著提升技能复用效率与任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理技能库通常将技能视为扁平的单一分辨率提示块，导致注入粗粒度技能时引入无关或误导性上下文，而重写整个技能则成本高昂且往往不必要，缺乏在相关性与开销之间的权衡机制。
AI.method: SkillLens构建了包含策略、策略、程序和基元的四层分层技能图谱，首先通过语义检索获取相关技能种子，然后利用度校正随机游走在技能图上扩展候选节点，最后使用验证器对每个访问单元决定接受、分解、重写或跳过，从而实现兼容子技能的复用与局部不匹配组件的自适应修改；系统还通过演化更新机制持续优化多粒度技能与验证器以改进路由决策。
AI.result: 在MuLocbench和ALFWorld上，SkillLens持续超越强基线方法，在缺陷定位任务上实现了最高6.31个百分点的Acc@1增益，并将ALFWorld中智能体任务成功率从45.00%提升至51.31%。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析表明混合粒度适配在稀疏不匹配假设下具有次线性代价，且演化更新规则能单调提升验证目标直至局部最优，验证了分层技能进化框架在降低冗余、提升适应性方面的可行性与有效性。

title: Advanced Tumor Segmentation in PET/CT Imaging: A Training Strategy Study with nnU-Net for AutoPET III
summary: Tumor segmentation in whole-body PET/CT imaging is crucial for precise disease evaluation and treatment planning. However, it remains challenging due to variability in lesion size, contrast, and anatomical distribution. Relying on manual segmentation makes the process time-consuming and prone to intra- and inter-observer variability. This work presents a whole-body tumor segmentation method developed for the AutoPET III challenge, where the goal is to build models that generalize across tracers and multi-center data. We employ the nnU-Net framework with a ResNet-based encoder as our baseline and systematically investigate the impact of training strategies, including intensity normalization, batch dice optimization, and data augmentation using CraveMix. Our experiments show that these strategies significantly influence model performance, particularly in reducing false positives and improving robustness to lesion variability. The best-performing configuration achieves a Dice score of up to 0.80 on the preliminary test phase, and our method ranked third in the AutoPET III challenge. The code is publicly available here.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于nnU-Net框架结合ResNet编码器的全身PET/CT肿瘤分割方法，通过系统优化强度归一化、批处理Dice损失和CraveMix数据增强等训练策略，在AutoPET III挑战赛中取得第三名，初步测试Dice评分达0.80。
AI.motivation: 全身PET/CT成像中的肿瘤分割对精准疾病评估和治疗规划至关重要，但病灶在大小、对比度和解剖分布上的高度变异性以及手动分割耗时长、观察者间差异大等问题使得该项任务极具挑战性。
AI.method: 采用nnU-Net框架配合ResNet编码器作为基线模型，系统研究了强度归一化、批处理Dice优化（batch dice optimization）以及基于CraveMix的数据增强等训练策略对分割性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的训练策略能显著提升模型性能，尤其在减少假阳性和增强对病灶变异鲁棒性方面表现突出；最佳配置在初步测试阶段取得了高达0.80的Dice分数，并在AutoPET III挑战赛中排名第三。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了训练策略（如归一化方式、损失函数优化和数据增强）对全身PET/CT肿瘤分割性能的关键影响，展示了在跨示踪剂和多中心数据场景下提升模型泛化能力的有效途径。

title: AgentForesight: Online Auditing for Early Failure Prediction in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems are increasingly deployed on long-horizon tasks, but a single decisive error is often accepted by downstream agents and cascades into trajectory-level failure. Existing work frames this as \emph{post-hoc failure attribution}, diagnosing the responsible agent and step after the trajectory has ended. However, this paradigm forfeits any opportunity to intervene while trajectory is still unfolding. In this work, we introduce AgentForesight, a framework that reframes this problem as online auditing: at each step of an unfolding trajectory, an auditor observes only the current prefix and must either continue the run or alarm at the earliest decisive error, without access to future steps. To this end, we curate AFTraj-2K, a corpus of agentic trajectories across Coding, Math, and Agentic domains, in which safe trajectories are retained under a strict curation pipeline and unsafe trajectories are annotated at the step of their decisive error via consensus among multiple LLM judges. Built on that, we develop AgentForesight-7B, a compact online auditor trained with a coarse-to-fine reinforcement learning recipe that first equips it with a risk-anticipation prior at the failure boundary on adjacent safe/unsafe prefix pairs, then sharpens this prior into precise step-level localization under a three-axis reward jointly targeting the what, where, and who of an audit verdict. Across AFTraj-2K and an external Who\&When benchmark, AgentForesight-7B outperforms leading proprietary models, including GPT-4.1 and DeepSeek-V4-Pro, achieving up to +19.9% performance gain and 3$\times$ lower step localization error, opening the loop from post-hoc failures detection to enabling deployment-time intervention. Project page: https://zbox1005.github.io/agent-foresight/

AI.tldr: 提出AgentForesight框架，将多智能体系统中的事后失败归因重构为在线审计问题，通过AFTraj-2K数据集和粗到细强化学习训练的AgentForesight-7B模型，在轨迹展开时实时检测最早决定性错误，在多项基准上超越GPT-4.1和DeepSeek-V4-Pro，实现了高达+19.9%的性能提升和3倍更低的步骤定位误差。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统在长周期任务中，单个决定性错误常被下游智能体接受并级联放大导致轨迹级失败，而现有工作仅进行事后失败归因（在轨迹结束后诊断责任智能体和步骤），这种范式在轨迹展开过程中没有任何干预机会，缺乏在线审计能力以在错误发生的第一时间进行告警和干预。
AI.method: 提出AgentForesight框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) AFTraj-2K数据集，涵盖编程、数学和智能体领域，通过严格管道保留安全轨迹，并由多个LLM法官共识标注不安全轨迹的决定性错误步骤；(2) AgentForesight-7B模型，一个紧凑的在线审计器；(3) 粗到细强化学习训练配方，先通过在失败边界处的相邻安全/不安全前缀对赋予模型风险预期先验，再在三轴奖励（什么、哪里、谁）下将先验锐化为精确的步骤级定位。
AI.result: 在AFTraj-2K和外部Who&When基准上，AgentForesight-7B超越包括GPT-4.1和DeepSeek-V4-Pro在内的领先专有模型，实现了最高+19.9%的性能增益，步骤定位误差降低3倍。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将多智能体系统的失败检测从事后归因范式转变为在线审计范式，通过精心构建的数据集和高效的训练方法，使小型开源模型在在线错误检测能力上超越大型专有模型，为部署时干预打开了可能性，弥合了事后失败检测与部署时干预之间的鸿沟。

title: CoCoDA: Co-evolving Compositional DAG for Tool-Augmented Agents
summary: Tool-augmented language models can extend small language models with external executable skills, but scaling the tool library creates a coupled challenge: the library must evolve with the planner as new reusable subroutines emerge, while retrieval from the growing library must remain within a fixed context budget. Existing tool-use and skill-library methods typically treat tools as flat or text-indexed memories, causing prompt cost to grow with library size and obscuring the typed, compositional structure of executable code. We propose CoCoDA, a framework that co-evolves the planner and tool library through a single code-native structure: a compositional code DAG. Nodes are primitive or composite tools, edges encode invocation dependencies, and each node stores a typed signature, description, pre/post-condition specification, and worked examples. At inference time, Typed DAG Retrieval prunes candidates by symbolic signature unification, ranks survivors by descriptions, filters them by behavioral specifications, and disambiguates with examples, keeping expensive context materialization on progressively smaller candidate sets. At training time, successful trajectories are folded into validated composite tools, while the planner is updated with a DAG-induced reward that credits composites by their primitive expansion size. We provide theoretical results showing retrieval cost reduction, sublinear retrieval time, compositional advantage under the shaped reward, monotone co-evolution under conservative updates, and DAG well-formedness. Across mathematical reasoning, tabular analysis, and code task benchmarks, CoCoDA enables an 8B student to match or exceed a 32B teacher on GSM8K and MATH and consistently improves over strong tool-use and library-learning baselines.

AI.tldr: CoCoDA 提出了一种通过组合式代码 DAG 协同进化规划器与工具库的框架，利用类型化 DAG 检索实现子线性推理成本，并以 8B 模型匹配或超越 32B 模型的数学推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强语言模型在扩展工具库时面临耦合挑战：工具库必须随规划器更新而演化，同时检索必须在固定上下文预算内完成；现有方法将工具视为扁平或文本索引记忆，导致提示成本随库规模线性增长，且无法表达可执行代码的类型化组合结构。
AI.method: CoCoDA 提出单一代码原生结构——组合式代码 DAG，其中节点为原始或复合工具，边编码调用依赖，每个节点存储类型签名、描述、前置/后置条件说明及工作示例。推理时通过类型化 DAG 检索执行四阶段候选剪枝（符号签名统一、描述排序、行为规范过滤、示例消歧），逐步缩小需要昂贵上下文实例化的候选集。训练时将成功轨迹折叠为已验证复合工具，并通过 DAG 诱导奖励（按复合工具的原始展开大小计分）更新规划器。
AI.result: 在数学推理、表格分析和代码任务基准上，CoCoDA 使 8B 学生模型在 GSM8K 和 MATH 上匹配或超越 32B 教师模型，并持续优于强工具使用和库学习方法。理论结果表明检索成本降低、子线性检索时间、成形奖励下的组合优势、保守更新下的单调协同进化以及 DAG 良构性。
AI.conclusion: CoCoDA 证明了通过类型化代码 DAG 实现规划器与工具库协同进化的有效性，为小模型通过结构化工具库扩展能力提供了可行路径，其组合式设计在保证检索效率的同时提升了推理性能。

title: KARMA-MV: A Benchmark for Causal Question Answering on Music Videos
summary: While significant progress has been made in Video Question Answering and cross-modal understanding, causal reasoning about how visual dynamics drive musical structure in music videos remains under-explored. We introduce KARMA-MV, a large-scale multiple-choice QA dataset derived from 2,682 YouTube music videos, designed to test models' ability to integrate temporal audio-visual cues and reason about visual-to-musical influence across reasoning, prediction, and counterfactual questions. Unlike traditional datasets requiring manual annotation, KARMA-MV leverages LLM reasoning for scalable generation and validation, yielding 37,737 MCQs. We propose a causal knowledge graph (CKG) approach that augments vision-language models (VLMs) with structured retrieval of cross-modal dependencies. Experiments on state-of-the-art VLMs and LLMs show consistent gains from CKG grounding -- especially for smaller models -- establishing the value of explicit causal structure for music-video reasoning. KARMA-MV provides a new benchmark for advancing causal audio-visual understanding beyond correlation.

AI.tldr: KARMA-MV是一个基于YouTube音乐视频的大规模多项选择问答数据集，包含37,737道题目，旨在评测模型在时序视听融合与视觉-音乐因果推理方面的能力；结合提出的因果知识图谱方法，能够显著提升视觉-语言模型在音乐视频推理任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答与跨模态理解研究虽已取得显著进展，但音乐视频中视觉动态如何驱动音乐结构的因果推理机制尚未被充分探索，现有数据集也多依赖人工标注且缺乏对因果关系的针对性评测。
AI.method: 从2,682个YouTube音乐视频出发，利用大语言模型的推理能力实现可扩展的题目生成与验证，构建了包含推理、预测和反事实三类问题的37,737道多项选择题数据集KARMA-MV；同时提出因果知识图谱方法，通过结构化检索跨模态依赖关系来增强视觉-语言模型。
AI.result: 在多个当前最优的视觉-语言模型与大型语言模型上的实验表明，因果知识图谱的引入能够持续提升模型性能，对参数量较小的模型提升尤为显著，验证了显式因果结构在音乐视频推理任务中的价值。
AI.conclusion: KARMA-MV为超越相关性分析的因果性视听理解提供了新的基准，展示了显式因果建模在复杂跨模态推理中的关键作用，为推动更深层的跨模态因果推理研究奠定了基础。

title: Breaking the Impasse: Dual-Scale Evolutionary Policy Training for Social Language Agents
comment: Accepted to the ACL 2026 Main Conference
summary: While Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has proven effective for closed-ended tasks, extending it to open-ended social language games via self-play reveals a critical issue: evolution impasse. Due to the vast strategy space, language agents frequently converge to homogenized behaviors, leading to deterministic match outcomes that eliminate the gradient signals necessary for policy evolution. To tackle this issue, we propose Dual-scale Evolutionary Policy Training (DEPT) for social language games. DEPT introduces a time-scaled evolutionary perception mechanism that detects impasse by quantifying dual-scale value baseline divergence alongside match entropy. Upon perceiving the collapse, it then activates asymmetric advantage reshaping to dynamically modulate the optimization landscape for intervention. Thus, our method effectively restores gradient signals and enforces sustained strategic exploration. Extensive experiments on multiple social language games demonstrate that DEPT outperforms strong baselines, avoiding policy degeneration and driving the continuous evolution of social language agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEPT框架，通过双尺度价值基线散度检测与匹配熵量化来感知社会语言博弈中的演化停滞，并利用非对称优势重塑动态调节优化景观以恢复梯度信号，从而避免策略同质化并驱动语言智能体的持续演化。
AI.motivation: 将基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）扩展到开放式的社会语言博弈时，由于策略空间极其庞大，语言智能体会趋向同质化行为，导致博弈结果确定化，从而消除策略演化所需的梯度信号，引发演化停滞（evolution impasse）问题。
AI.method: 提出双尺度演化策略训练（DEPT），包含两个核心机制：一是时间尺度演化感知机制，通过量化双尺度价值基线散度与匹配熵来检测演化停滞；二是非对称优势重塑机制，在检测到崩溃后动态调整优化景观以进行干预，从而恢复梯度信号并强制维持策略的持续探索。
AI.result: 在多个社会语言博弈任务上的大量实验表明，DEPT在避免策略退化和驱动社会语言智能体持续演化方面显著优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DEPT有效解决了开放场景下RLVR自博弈训练中的演化停滞问题，为语言智能体在复杂社会交互任务中的持续策略演化提供了一种可行的干预与调节框架。

title: The Attacker in the Mirror: Breaking Self-Consistency in Safety via Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play
summary: Self-play red team is an established approach to improving AI safety in which different instances of the same model play attacker and defender roles in a zero-sum game, i.e., where the attacker tries to jailbreak the defender; if self-play converges to a Nash equilibrium, the model is guaranteed to respond safely within the settings of the game. Although the parameter sharing enforced by the use of the same model for the two roles improves stability and performance, it introduces fundamental theoretical and architectural limitations. We show that the set of Nash equilibria that can be reached corresponds to a broad class of behaviours that includes trivial always refuse strategies and oracle-like defenders, thus limiting practical applicability. We then show that when attacker and defender share and update the same base model, the dynamics collapse to self-consistency, so that attacks do not enforce adversarial pressure on the defender. In response, we propose Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play, which trains distinct role-specific LoRA adapters on top of a frozen base model, thereby maintaining stable optimisation while preserving adversarial pressure through explicit role separation. In relation to standard self-play, we show up to 100x greater parameter efficiency than finetuning and consistent improvements in safety compared to self-play fine-tuned models. We evaluate on Qwen2.5-{3B, 7B,14B}-IT models across widely used safety benchmarks, showing improved robustness without loss of reasoning ability. Cross-play experiments further show that our attacker and defender models are superior to self-play in terms of adversarial defence and safety.

AI.tldr: 提出锚定双策略自博弈（Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play），通过在冻结基模型上训练独立的角色特定LoRA适配器，解决传统自博弈中参数共享导致的攻击者-防御者动力学坍缩问题，在保持参数高效的同时显著提升安全鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统自博弈红队方法中，攻击者和防御者共享并更新同一基模型参数，这虽有助于稳定性和性能，但引入了理论和架构上的根本限制：可达的纳什均衡集合包含诸如始终拒绝等平凡行为，且当双方共享同一模型时，动力学坍缩为自一致性（self-consistency），攻击无法对防御者施加真正的对抗压力，从而限制了方法的实际适用性和安全性提升效果。
AI.method: 提出Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play方法，在冻结的基模型之上，为攻击者和防御者角色分别训练独立的LoRA适配器，通过显式的角色分离（explicit role separation）在保持优化稳定性的同时维持对抗压力，避免参数共享带来的动力学坍缩，并且相较于全参数微调实现了最高100倍的参数效率提升。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-{3B,7B,14B}-IT模型上的安全基准评测表明，该方法持续优于传统自博弈微调模型的安全表现，且不损失推理能力；跨博弈（cross-play）实验进一步验证了所提出的攻击者和防御者模型在对抗防御和安全性方面均超越自博弈方法。
AI.conclusion: 参数共享会导致自博弈动力学坍缩为自一致性，而通过LoRA解耦角色策略可以在冻结基模型上实现稳定的对抗训练，既保持参数高效又有效提升安全性，为红队自博弈提供了理论上有据可循且实践上有效的改进方向。

title: Text-Guided Multi-Scale Frequency Representation Adaptation
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods introduce a small number of training parameters, enabling pre-trained models to adapt rapidly to new data distributions. While these methods have shown promising results, they exhibit notable limitations. First, most existing methods operate in the signal space domain, which results in substantial information redundancy. Second, most existing methods utilize fixed prompts or adaptation layers, failing to fully account for the multi-scale characteristics of signals. To address these challenges, we propose the Multi-Scale Frequency Adapter (FreqAdapter), which integrates textual information and performs multi-scale fine-tuning of signals in the frequency domain. Additionally, we introduce a multi-scale adaptation strategy to optimize receptive fields across different frequency ranges, further enhancing the model's representational capacity. Extensive experiments on multimodal models, including CLIP and LLaVA, demonstrate that FreqAdapter significantly improves both performance and efficiency. FreqAdapter improves performance with minimal cost and fast convergence within one epoch. Code is available at https://github.com/Kelvin-ywc/FreqAdapter.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FreqAdapter，一种多尺度频率适配器，通过将信号转换到频域并进行多尺度微调，解决了现有参数高效微调方法中信息冗余大、未能充分利用信号多尺度特性的问题，在CLIP和LLaVA等多模态模型上实现了性能与效率的显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法存在两个主要局限：一是大多数方法在信号空间域操作，导致严重的信息冗余；二是使用固定提示或固定适配层，未能充分考虑信号的多尺度特性。这些不足限制了微调方法的表达能力和效率。
AI.method: FreqAdapter将信号转换到频域进行处理，融合文本信息，并采用多尺度适配策略来优化不同频率范围内的感受野，从而增强模型表达能力。该方法通过频域变换和多尺度微调机制，在引入极少额外参数的情况下实现对预训练模型的有效适配。
AI.result: 在CLIP和LLaVA等多模态模型上的大量实验表明，FreqAdapter在显著提升性能的同时保持极低成本，并且能够在一个epoch内快速收敛。
AI.conclusion: FreqAdapter证明了在频域进行多尺度参数高效微调的有效性，为预训练模型的适配提供了一种更高效、表达能力更强的新思路，对多模态模型的快速适应和部署具有重要实用价值。

title: Training with Harnesses: On-Policy Harness Self-Distillation for Complex Reasoning
summary: Inference-time harnesses substantially improve large language models on complex reasoning tasks. However, the intrinsic capabilities of the underlying model remain unchanged by the addition of these external workflows. To bridge this gap, we introduce \emph{On-Policy Harness Self-Distillation} (OPHSD), which employs the harness-augmented current model as a teacher for self-distillation, thereby introducing extra supervisory signals from the harness beyond training data. OPHSD internalizes task-specific harness capabilities into the student model, yielding robust generalizability and strong standalone performance across diverse reasoning tasks. Evaluated across draft--verify harness for text classification and plan--solve for mathematical reasoning tasks, OPHSD consistently outperforms strong baselines (e.g., +10.83\% over OPSD on HMMT25). Our analysis further indicates that reattaching the harness during inference yields no additional benefits and can even degrade performance, suggesting that complex harnesses need not always be permanent fixtures; instead, they can serve as temporary training scaffolds whose benefits are permanently fed back into the base model. Our code and training data are available at https://github.com/zzy1127/OPHSD-On-Policy-Harness-Self-Distillation.

AI.tldr: 提出On-Policy Harness Self-Distillation (OPHSD)方法，通过将推理时增强工作流作为教师进行自蒸馏，将增强能力内化到基础模型中，使复杂推理任务上的独立模型性能显著提升，同时发现推理时重新附加工作流不再带来额外收益甚至可能损害性能。
AI.motivation: 推理时增强工作流（如draft-verify、plan-solve）虽能提升大语言模型在复杂推理任务上的表现，但底层模型的固有能力并未因这些外部工作流而改变，即模型本身并未真正习得工作流所提供的能力增益。
AI.method: 提出On-Policy Harness Self-Distillation (OPHSD)框架，将当前模型与推理时工作流（harness）结合作为教师，对未使用工作流的学生模型进行自蒸馏，从而将工作流提供的额外监督信号（超越原始训练数据）内化至学生模型中。
AI.result: 在文本分类的draft-verify工作流和数学推理的plan-solve工作流上，OPHSD均持续优于强基线方法，例如在HMMT25基准上相比OPSD提升10.83%。分析表明，蒸馏后将工作流重新附加到模型上进行推理不再带来额外收益，甚至可能降低性能。
AI.conclusion: 复杂推理工作流不一定是模型的永久固定组件，而可以作为临时的训练脚手架，其收益通过OPHSD蒸馏方式永久性地反馈回基础模型中，从而使模型在无外部工作流辅助时仍具备强大的独立推理能力。

title: Behavioral Determinants of Deployed AI Agents in Social Networks: A Multi-Factor Study of Personality, Model, and Guardrail Specification
summary: Autonomous AI agents are increasingly deployed in open social environments, yet the relationship between their configuration specifications and their emergent social behavior remains poorly understood. We present a controlled, multi-factor empirical study in which thirteen OpenClaw agents are deployed on Moltbook -- a Reddit-like social network built for AI agents -- across three systematically varied independent variables: (1) personality specification via SOUL.md, (2) underlying LLM model backbone, and (3) operational rules and memory configuration via AGENTS.md. A default control agent provides a behavioral baseline. Over a one-week observation window spanning approximately 400 autonomous sessions per agent, we collect behavioral, linguistic, and social metrics to assess how configuration layers predict emergent social behavior. We find that personality specification is the dominant behavioral lever, producing a massive spread in response length across agents, while model backbone and operational rules drive more moderate but still meaningful effects on rhetorical style and topic engagement breadth. Our findings contribute empirical evidence to the emerging literature on deployed multi-agent social systems and offer practical guidance for designing agents intended for collaborative or monitoring tasks in real social environments.

AI.tldr: 通过系统控制实验，研究人格规范、LLM模型基座和操作规则三个配置层对AI智能体在社交网络中涌现行为的影响，发现人格规范是行为变化的主导因素，而模型基座和操作规则对修辞风格和话题广度有中等程度影响。
AI.motivation: 自主AI智能体正越来越多地被部署在开放社交环境中，但其配置规范（如人格设定、模型基座、操作规则）与涌现的社会行为之间的关系尚不明确，缺乏系统的实证研究来理解各配置层的因果影响。
AI.method: 在类Reddit社交网络Moltbook上部署13个OpenClaw智能体，系统性地变化三个自变量：（1）通过SOUL.md指定人格规范，（2）底层LLM模型基座，（3）通过AGENTS.md指定操作规则与记忆配置，并以默认智能体作为行为基线，在一周内收集约400次自主会话每智能体的行为、语言和社交指标数据。
AI.result: 人格规范是主导行为杠杆，导致不同智能体间响应长度的巨大差异；模型基座和操作规则对修辞风格和话题参与广度产生中等但显著的影响。
AI.conclusion: 研究为多智能体社会系统的实证研究提供了定量证据，并为设计用于真实社交环境中的协作或监控任务的智能体提供了实用指导。

title: Sparsity Hurts: Simple Linear Adapter Can Boost Generalized Category Discovery
summary: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) seeks to identify novel categories from unlabeled data while retaining the classification ability of seen categories. Prior GCD methods commonly leverage transferable representations from pre-trained models, adapting to downstream datasets via partial fine-tuning (updating only the final ViT block) and visual prompt tuning (appending learnable vectors to inputs). However, conventional partial fine-tuning offers limited flexibility, as it fails to adapt the entire model; meanwhile, visual prompt tuning is prone to overfitting, due to its sensitivity to initialization and inherently constrained capacity. To address these limitations, we propose LAGCD, a simple yet effective GCD approach that embeds a residual linear adapter into each ViT block. From the perspective of feature sparsity, we systematically show that non-linearity in conventional adapters impairs performance, whereas our linear adapter enhances it by enabling more flexible model capacity. We further introduce an auxiliary distribution alignment loss to mitigate the negative impact of biased predictions between seen and novel categories. Extensive experiments on both generic and fine-grained datasets confirm that LAGCD consistently improves performance over many sophisticated baselines. The source code is available at https://github.com/yebo0216best/LAGCD

AI.tldr: 提出LAGCD方法，通过在ViT每个块中嵌入残差线性适配器并结合辅助分布对齐损失，有效解决了广义类别发现任务中传统部分微调灵活性不足和视觉提示调优易过拟合的问题，在多个数据集上取得一致性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有GCD方法依赖预训练模型的可迁移表示，通过部分微调（仅更新最终ViT块）或视觉提示调优（向输入添加可学习向量）来适应下游数据集，但部分微调灵活性有限无法适配整个模型，视觉提示调优则因对初始化敏感且容量固有受限而容易过拟合，亟需一种既能灵活适配模型又避免过拟合的高效微调方法。
AI.method: 提出LAGCD方法，核心创新包括：(1) 在每个ViT块中嵌入残差线性适配器（Linear Adapter），以替代传统非线性适配器，从特征稀疏性角度证明线性适配器通过提供更灵活的模型容量来提升性能；(2) 引入辅助分布对齐损失（auxiliary distribution alignment loss），用于缓解已见类别与新颖类别之间预测偏差带来的负面影响。
AI.result: 在通用数据集和细粒度数据集上的大量实验表明，LAGCD方法相较于众多复杂的基线方法在性能上取得了一致的提升。
AI.conclusion: 残差线性适配器相比非线性适配器在GCD任务中更具优势，且通过分布对齐损失有效缓解了类别预测偏差问题，为通用类别发现提供了一种简单而有效的解决方案。

title: Fitting Is Not Enough: Smoothness in Extremely Quantized LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance but incur high deployment costs, motivating extremely low-bit but lossy quantization. Existing quantization algorithms mainly focus on improving the numerical accuracy of forward computation to eliminate performance degradation. In this paper, we show that extremely quantized LLMs suffer from systematic smoothness degradation beyond numerical precision loss. Through a smoothness proxy, we observe that such degradation becomes increasingly severe as the quantization bit-width decreases. Furthermore, based on sequence neighborhood modeling, we find that quantized models exhibit a rapid reduction of effective token candidates within the prediction neighborhood, which directly leads to a sparser decoding tree and degraded generation quality. To validate it, we introduce a simple smoothness-preserving principle in both post-training quantization and quantization-aware training, and demonstrate that preserving smoothness brings additional gains beyond numerical accuracy. The core goal of this paper is to highlight smoothness preservation as an important design consideration for future extreme quantization methods. Code is available at https://github.com/xuyuzhuang11/FINE.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示极低比特量化下的大语言模型不仅面临数值精度损失，更遭受系统性平滑度退化，并通过引入平滑度保持原则验证了在量化过程中保持平滑度能带来超越数值精度的性能提升，提出平滑度保持应成为未来极端量化方法的重要设计考量。
AI.motivation: 现有低比特量化算法主要聚焦于提升前向计算的数值精度以消除性能退化，但本文发现极低比特量化下的大语言模型除了数值精度损失外，还存在系统性的平滑度退化问题，该问题随量化比特数降低而加剧，且被现有方法所忽视。
AI.method: 本文通过构建平滑度代理（smoothness proxy）来量化评估量化模型的平滑度退化程度，并基于序列邻域建模（sequence neighborhood modeling）发现量化模型在预测邻域内有效token候选数量急剧减少，导致解码树稀疏化。在此基础上，提出在训练后量化和量化感知训练中引入简单的平滑度保持原则。
AI.result: 实验表明，随着量化比特宽度的降低，大语言模型的平滑度退化愈发严重，表现为预测邻域内有效token候选数量的快速减少和解码树稀疏化；引入平滑度保持原则后，在同等数值精度的条件下能够带来额外的性能提升，验证了平滑度保持超越数值精度的增益。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心贡献在于揭示平滑度退化是极低比特量化中独立于数值精度损失的关键问题，并论证了平滑度保持应作为未来极端量化算法设计的重要考量因素，为后续量化研究提供了新的视角和设计方向。

title: Latent Personality Alignment: Improving Harmlessness Without Mentioning Harms
comment: published at Trustworthy AI Workshop, ICLR 2026
summary: Current adversarial robustness methods for large language models require extensive datasets of harmful prompts (thousands to hundreds of thousands of examples), yet remain vulnerable to novel attack vectors and distributional shifts. We propose Latent Personality Alignment (LPA), a sample-efficient defense that achieves robustness by training models on abstract personality traits rather than specific harmful behaviors. Using fewer than 100 trait statements and latent adversarial training, LPA achieves comparable attack success rates to methods trained on 150k+ examples, while maintaining superior utility. Critically, LPA generalizes better to unseen attack distributions, reducing misclassification rates by 2.6x compared to baseline across six harm benchmarks -- without ever seeing harmful examples during training. Our results demonstrate that personality-based alignment offers a principled approach to building robust defenses with minimal cost.

AI.tldr: 提出潜在人格对齐（LPA）方法，利用少于100条人格特质语句和潜在对抗训练，在未见任何有害样本的情况下，以极低样本成本实现与基于150k+示例训练的防御方法相当的鲁棒性，并在跨分布泛化上取得2.6倍的误分类率降低。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型对抗鲁棒性方法依赖大量有害提示样本（数千至数十万条），但仍难以应对未见过的攻击向量和分布偏移，存在样本效率低下且泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出潜在人格对齐（LPA）方法，核心思想是将对齐目标从针对具体有害行为的训练转向对抽象人格特质的建模，使用少于100条特质陈述进行训练，并结合潜在对抗训练技术来提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在攻击成功率上与基于150k+示例训练的防御方法相当，同时保持了更优的实用性；在六个有害性基准测试上，针对未见过的攻击分布，误分类率相比基线降低2.6倍，且整个训练过程从未使用任何有害示例。
AI.conclusion: 基于人格特质的对齐方法为构建鲁棒且低成本的防御提供了原则性路径，证明了抽象对齐目标在样本效率和泛化能力上的显著优势。

title: A Robust Out-of-Distribution Detection Framework via Synergistic Smoothing
summary: Reliable out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a critical requirement for the safe deployment of machine learning systems. Despite recent progress, state-of-the-art OOD detectors are highly susceptible to adversarial attacks, which undermines their trustworthiness in automated systems. To address this vulnerability, we apply median smoothing to baseline OOD detection scores, balancing clean and adversarial accuracies. Our key insight is that the noisy samples generated for median smoothing can be repurposed to quantify the local instability of the base score. We observe that OOD samples exhibit higher instability under perturbation. Based on this, we propose ROSS, a novel and robust post-hoc OOD detector that leverages the instability of baseline scores to further distinguish between in-distribution (ID) and OOD samples. ROSS achieves symmetric robustness, performing strongly against both score-minimising and score-maximising attacks, unlike prior work. This symmetric defence leads to state-of-the-art robustness, outperforming prior methods by up to 40 AUROC points. We demonstrate ROSS's effectiveness on extensive experiments across CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet. Code is available at: https://github.com/Abdu-Hekal/ROSS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROSS，一种基于中值平滑的鲁棒后验OOD检测器，通过利用OOD样本在扰动下具有更高局部不稳定的性质，在对抗攻击下实现了对称鲁棒性，在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet上AUROC最高提升40个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有最先进的OOD检测器在对抗攻击下高度脆弱，严重影响了机器学习系统在自动化部署中的可信赖性；同时，以往方法无法同时防御分数最小化和分数最大化两类攻击，缺乏对称鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将中值平滑应用于基线OOD检测分数以平衡干净样本与对抗样本的准确率，并重新利用中值平滑过程中产生的噪声样本来量化基线分数的局部不稳定性；基于OOD样本在扰动下具有更高不稳定性的观察，提出ROSS（Robust OOD detector with Symmetric Smoothing）作为后验OOD检测器。
AI.result: ROSS在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet上的大量实验中实现了最先进的鲁棒性，在对抗攻击下AUROC比此前方法最高提升40个百分点，且同时有效防御分数最小化和分数最大化攻击。
AI.conclusion: 利用样本局部不稳定性的差异可以有效增强OOD检测的对抗鲁棒性，ROSS提供了对称的防御机制，为安全关键的机器学习系统提供了更可靠的OOD检测方案。

title: FragileFlow: Spectral Control of Correct-but-Fragile Predictions for Foundation Model Robustness
summary: Robust adaptation of LLMs and VLMs is often evaluated by average accuracy or average consistency under perturbations. However, these averages can hide a structured failure mode: a prediction may remain correct while probability mass already flows from particular true classes toward systematic wrong competitors near the decision boundary. In this paper, we formalize this phenomenon as margin-aware error flow and introduce FragileFlow, a plug-in regularizer that uses a calibrated margin buffer to identify correct-but-fragile predictions and organize their off-class probability mass into a class-wise vulnerable-risk matrix. Theoretically, we provide the first PAC-Bayes upper bound for this margin-aware error-flow object, showing how empirical spectral control yields a conservative route to deterministic worst-class robustness under a stability condition. Experiments on multiple-choice LLM benchmarks and few-shot CLIP adaptation show that FragileFlow consistently improves the proposed theory-facing risk measures over matched baselines, yields perturbed worst-class accuracy gains in most settings, and preserves clean accuracy across comparisons.

AI.tldr: 提出FragileFlow，一种基于边际感知误差流的正则化方法，通过校准边际缓冲区识别正确但脆弱的预测并组织概率质量，理论上给出了首个PAC-Bayes上界，实验表明其能提升最差类别鲁棒性并保持干净准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM和VLM的鲁棒性评估通常依赖平均准确率或平均一致性，但这些平均指标会掩盖一种结构化的失效模式：预测结果虽然正确，但概率质量已从真实类别向决策边界附近的系统性错误竞争者转移，现有方法无法有效识别并纠正此类脆弱预测。
AI.method: 形式化了边际感知误差流（margin-aware error flow）现象，并提出FragileFlow插件式正则化器，利用校准的边际缓冲区识别正确但脆弱的预测，将其非目标类概率组织成类别级脆弱风险矩阵；从理论上给出了该误差流对象的首个PAC-Bayes上界，证明了在稳定性条件下经验谱控制能实现确定性的最差类别鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多选LLM基准测试和few-shot CLIP适应任务上，FragileFlow在面向理论的风险度量上持续优于匹配基线，在多数设置下提升了扰动后的最差类别准确率，且在对比实验中保持了干净准确率不受损。
AI.conclusion: FragileFlow提供了一种高效且理论上有保障的方法来应对平均评估指标掩盖的结构化脆弱性问题，展示了边际感知概率管理在提升模型最差类别鲁棒性方面的有效性，为鲁棒适应提供了一条保守但确定性的技术路径。

title: Results and Retrospective Analysis of the CODS 2025 AssetOpsBench Challenge
summary: Competition retrospectives are useful when they explain what a leaderboard measured, how hidden evaluation changed conclusions, and which design patterns were rewarded. We revisit the CODS 2025 \assetopslive{} challenge, a privacy-aware Codabench competition on industrial multi-agent orchestration built on \assetops{}. We combine final rank sheets, a 300-submission server log, 149-team registrations, best-submission exports, the organizer winners report, the companion \assetopslive{} system paper, and verified planning-track source trees. Five results stand out. First, the public planning leaderboard saturates at 72.73\%, and richer prompts do not improve that peak. Second, hidden evaluation changes the story: public and private scores correlate moderately in planning ($r{=}0.69$) but negatively in execution ($r{=}{-}0.13$), with several 45.45\% public execution systems reaching 63.64\% on the hidden set. Third, the \tmatch{} term is numerically almost inert in the official composite -- combined on a 0--1 scale with 0--100 percentage scores, it contributes at most 0.05 points per track, and rescaling would swap the top two teams. Fourth, the competition is operationally account-based but substantively team-based: 149 registered teams reduce to 24 with non-zero public scores and 11 fully ranked, while 52.3\% of deduplicated registrations list multiple usernames. Fifth, successful execution methods mostly improve guardrails -- response selection, contamination cleanup, fallback, and context control -- rather than novel agent architectures. These findings identify which behaviors the evaluation rewarded, and motivate scale-aware composites, skill-level diagnostics, and versioned artifact release.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过对CODS 2025 AssetOps Live挑战赛的多维度事后分析，揭示了排行榜测量偏差、隐藏评估与公开分数的不一致性，以及成功方法主要依赖防护栏改进而非新颖架构等关键发现，并提出了规模感知复合指标和版本化工件发布等改进建议。
AI.motivation: 竞赛事后分析在解释排行榜实际测量内容、隐藏评估如何改变结论以及哪些设计模式受到奖励方面具有重要价值，然而现有分析往往缺乏对多源数据的系统性整合；本研究旨在通过对CODS 2025 AssetOps Live挑战赛的全面回顾，揭示工业级多智能体编排竞赛中评估体系的行为特征与潜在偏差。
AI.method: 研究通过整合最终排名表、包含300份提交的服务器日志、149支队伍注册数据、最佳提交导出文件、组织者获奖者报告、配套系统论文以及已验证的规划赛道源代码树等多源数据，采用相关性分析（Pearson相关系数）、复合评分拆解、注册去重与团队识别统计分析等方法，对竞赛的公开与隐藏评估一致性、评分项贡献度、参与者组织形式及成功技术方案模式进行了系统分析。
AI.result: 五项主要发现：（1）公共规划排行榜在72.73%处饱和，更丰富的提示无法提升该峰值；（2）隐藏评估显著改变结论：规划赛道公开与私密分数中度相关（r=0.69），执行赛道则呈负相关（r=-0.13），部分公开得分仅45.45%的执行系统在隐藏集上达到63.64%；（3）TMatch项在官方复合评分中几乎数值惰性，在0-1尺度与0-100百分制分数组合下最多贡献0.05分，重新缩放即可改变前两名排序；（4）竞赛操作上基于账户但实质上基于团队：149支注册队伍缩减为24支有非零公共分数、11支完全排名，52.3%的去重注册列出多个用户名；（5）成功执行方法主要改进防护栏（响应选择、污染清理、回退和上下文控制）而非新颖的智能体架构。
AI.conclusion: 本研究的洞察揭示了评估体系实际奖励的行为模式，并提出了三项关键改进方向：采用规模感知的复合评分指标以解决不同量纲分数组合问题、引入技能水平诊断以更精确评估系统能力、以及推行版本化工件发布以提高可复现性；这些发现对竞赛设计和AI系统评估具有重要指导意义。

title: Normalization Equivariance for Arbitrary Backbones, with Application to Image Denoising
summary: Normalization Equivariance (NE), equivariance to global contrast and brightness transforms, improves robustness to distribution shift in image-to-image prediction. Existing methods enforce this prior by constraining internal layers to NE-compatible families, limiting compatibility with standard components such as attention and LayerNorm, and adding runtime cost. We characterize the full NE function class: a function is NE if and only if it admits a normalize-process-denormalize factorization. This turns exact NE enforcement, for the ideal wrapper, from an internal architectural constraint into an input-output parameterization problem, allowing a parameter-free wrapper (WNE) to enforce NE around any backbone, including transformers. In a single-noise mismatch diagnostic for blind denoising, the wrapper improves CNN and transformer robustness with no measurable GPU overhead; architectural NE baselines incur up to a 1.6x slowdown.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了归一化等变（NE）函数类等价于“归一化-处理-反归一化”分解形式，据此提出一种参数无关的包装器WNE，可无需修改任何内部结构地将NE先验施加于任意骨干网络（包括Transformer），在盲去噪的单噪声失配诊断中实现零GPU开销的鲁棒性提升，而架构级NE方法则带来高达1.6倍的运行减速。
AI.motivation: 现有的强制归一化等变（NE）先验的方法通过约束网络内部层仅使用NE兼容的组件（如特定激活函数）来实现，这限制了与标准组件（如注意力机制和LayerNorm）的兼容性，并引入了额外的运行时开销，亟需一种既能严格施加NE先验又不牺牲架构灵活性和效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文首先从理论上完整刻画了NE函数类，证明一个函数是NE的当且仅当其可以表示为“归一化-处理-反归一化”（normalize-process-denormalize）的分解形式。基于这一等价性，作者将严格的NE强制从内部架构约束转化为输入-输出的参数化问题，提出了一种参数无关的包装器WNE（Wrapper for Normalization Equivariance），该包装器作为输入输出封装层即可将NE先验施加于任意骨干网络（包括CNN和Transformer），无需修改网络内部组件或引入额外可学习参数。
AI.result: 在单噪声失配诊断设置下的盲去噪任务中，WNE包装器使CNN和Transformer骨干网络的鲁棒性均得到提升，且GPU运行时开销为零（可忽略不计）；相比之下，现有的架构级NE基线方法最多会引入高达1.6倍的运行减速。
AI.conclusion: 对NE函数类的完整刻画表明，严格的归一化等变先验可以通过简单的包装器形式实现，而不必侵入骨干网络内部结构。这一发现为在任意现代架构（尤其是Transformer等含有注意力机制的模型）中无缝融入NE先验提供了理论基础和实用工具，有望在图像到图像预测任务中同时提升鲁棒性和计算效率。

title: LLM-Agnostic Semantic Representation Attack
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2509.19360
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly employ alignment techniques to prevent harmful outputs. Despite these safeguards, attackers can circumvent them by crafting adversarial prompts. Predominant token-level optimization methods primarily rely on optimizing for exact affirmative templates (e.g., ``\textit{Sure, here is...}''). However, these paradigms frequently encounter bottlenecks such as suboptimal convergence, compromised prompt naturalness, and poor cross-model generalization. To address these limitations, we propose Semantic Representation Attack (SRA), a novel LLM-agnostic paradigm that fundamentally reconceptualizes adversarial objectives from exact textual targeting to malicious semantic representations. Theoretically, we establish the semantic Coherence-Convergence Relationship and derive a Cross-Model Semantic Generalization bound, proving that maintaining semantic coherence guarantees both white-box semantic convergence and black-box transferability. Technically, we operationalize this framework via the Semantic Representation Heuristic Search (SRHS) algorithm, which preserves interpretability and structural coherence of the adversarial prompts during incremental discrete token chunk expansion. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our framework achieves a 99.71% average attack success rate across 26 open-source LLMs, with strong transferability and stealth.

AI.tldr: 提出语义表示攻击（SRA）范式，将对抗目标从精确文本匹配转向恶意语义表示，通过语义表示启发式搜索（SRHS）算法在保持可解释性和结构连贯性的同时生成对抗提示，在26个开源LLM上实现99.71%的平均攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于token级优化的对抗提示方法主要针对精确的肯定模板（如"Sure, here is..."）进行优化，存在收敛次优、提示自然性差以及跨模型泛化能力不足等瓶颈，亟需一种新的对抗范式来克服这些局限。
AI.method: 提出语义表示攻击（SRA），一种与LLM无关的对抗范式，将攻击目标从精确文本匹配重构为恶意语义表示；理论上建立了语义连贯性-收敛关系并推导了跨模型语义泛化界；技术上通过语义表示启发式搜索（SRHS）算法实现，在增量离散token块扩展过程中保持对抗提示的可解释性和结构连贯性。
AI.result: 在26个开源LLM上的广泛评估表明，该方法实现了99.71%的平均攻击成功率，并展现出强迁移性和隐蔽性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了语义层面的对抗攻击比传统token级优化更有效，理论保证的语义连贯性同时确保了白盒语义收敛和黑盒迁移能力，为LLM安全对齐的脆弱性评估提供了新视角。

title: Human-Inspired Memory Architecture for LLM Agents
summary: Current LLM agents lack principled mechanisms for managing persistent memory across long interaction horizons. We present a biologically-grounded memory architecture comprising six cognitive mechanisms: (1) sleep-phase consolidation, (2) interference-based forgetting, (3) engram maturation, (4) reconsolidation upon retrieval, (5) entity knowledge graphs, and (6) hybrid multi-cue retrieval. Each mechanism addresses a specific failure mode of naive memory accumulation. We introduce a synthetic calibration methodology that derives all pipeline thresholds without benchmark data exposure, eliminating a common source of evaluation leakage. We evaluate on two benchmarks. First, a VSCode issue-tracking dataset (13K issues, 120K events) where deduplication-based consolidation achieves 97.2% retention precision with 58% store reduction (+21.8 pp over baseline). Second, the LongMemEval personal-chat benchmark where we conduct the first streaming M-tier evaluation (475 sessions, ~540K unique turns). At a 200K-token context budget, our pipeline matches raw retrieval accuracy (70.1% vs. 71.2%, overlapping 95% CI) while exposing a tunable accuracy/store-size operating curve. At S-tier scale (50 sessions), dedup-based consolidation yields a +13.3 pp improvement in preference recall.

AI.tldr: 提出一种受生物学启发的六机制记忆架构，用于LLM智能体的持久记忆管理，通过合成校准方法避免数据泄露，在VSCode问题追踪和LongMemEval基准测试中显著提升了记忆保留精度与存储效率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在处理长时间跨度的交互时，缺乏原则性的持久记忆管理机制，导致朴素记忆累积容易出现遗忘、干扰和存储膨胀等问题，亟需更系统化的记忆架构来应对这些失败模式。
AI.method: 提出基于生物认知机制的六模块记忆架构，包括睡眠期记忆巩固、基于干扰的遗忘、记忆印迹成熟、检索触发的再巩固、实体知识图谱以及混合多线索检索，并引入一套合成校准方法，在不暴露于基准数据的情况下推导所有流水线阈值，消除评估泄漏风险。
AI.result: 在VSCode问题追踪数据集（13K问题、120K事件）上，去重巩固实现97.2%的保留精度与58%的存储缩减（较基线提升21.8个百分点）；在LongMemEval个人聊天基准的流式M-tier评估（475会话、~540K唯一轮次）中，以200K token上下文预算下，流水线匹配原始检索准确率（70.1% vs 71.2%，95%置信区间重叠），同时暴露可调的精度/存储大小操作曲线；在S-tier规模（50会话）下去重巩固在偏好召回上取得+13.3个百分点的提升。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，受生物启发的多机制记忆架构能够有效缓解LLM智能体在长程交互中的记忆问题，且合成校准方法避免了传统评估中的数据泄露风险，揭示了精度与存储效率之间存在可控的权衡曲线，为构建更具持久性和鲁棒性的智能体记忆系统提供了新方向。

title: A Breast Vision Pathology Foundation Model for Real-world Clinical Utility
summary: Pathology foundation models have shown strong retrospective performance, but whether such systems can support clinically relevant use remains unclear. This challenge is particularly important in breast cancer, where pathological assessment serves as the gold standard for diagnosis and guides treatment planning, surgical decision-making and risk stratification across pre-, intra- and post-operative stages. Here we present \textbf{BRAVE}, a breast-adaptive pathology foundation model developed and evaluated using a total resource of 101,638 breast whole-slide images from 32 sources across Asia, Europe and North America. We assessed BRAVE across 34 tasks in 82 cohorts spanning pre-operative biopsy, intra-operative frozen section and post-operative resection, using an evidence chain comprising retrospective benchmarking, clinically challenging scenarios, workflow-oriented clinical impact simulations, prospective observational validation with the thresholds locked in the retrospective cohorts and crossover pathologist-AI interaction studies. Across these settings, BRAVE supported practical roles in the clinical workflow, including safe exclusion of low-risk cases from routine review, AI-assisted second-review rescue of initially missed positives and prioritization of cases for further assessment. In prospective validation across three centres, BRAVE excluded 76.9% of negative biopsy cases (NPV 0.953) and 70.1% of negative frozen-section cases (NPV 0.973), and triaged 78.8% of post-operative subtyping cases as high-confidence clear-cut cases (NPV 1.000). In reader studies, AI assistance improved balanced accuracy from 88.5% to 95.1% (OR 3.14, P<0.001), with better efficiency, confidence and inter-rater agreement. BRAVE-derived scores also independently predicted disease-free survival (adjusted HR 4.79, P<0.001) and overall survival (adjusted HR 8.14, P<0.001).

AI.tldr: BRAVE是一个基于101,638张乳腺全切片图像构建的乳腺自适应病理基础模型，在34项任务和82个队列中经过回顾性基准测试、前瞻性验证和病理学家交互研究，证明了其在乳腺癌临床病理工作流中的实用价值，包括安全排除低风险病例、辅助二次阅片挽救漏诊以及预后风险分层。
AI.motivation: 病理基础模型在回顾性研究中表现优异，但其能否支持临床相关应用仍不明确，特别是在乳腺癌领域——病理评估是诊断金标准并指导术前、术中和术后各阶段的治疗决策，因此亟需系统评估此类模型在实际临床工作流中的可行性和有效性。
AI.method: 研究者利用来自亚欧北美32个来源的101,638张乳腺全切片图像开发了BRAVE模型，并在82个队列的34项任务中进行评估，评估体系包括回顾性基准测试、临床挑战场景、工作流导向的临床影响模拟、阈值锁定后的前瞻性观察验证以及病理学家交叉交互研究。
AI.result: 前瞻性验证中，BRAVE排除了76.9%的阴性活检病例（NPV 0.953）和70.1%的阴性冰冻切片病例（NPV 0.973），并对78.8%的术后亚型分型病例进行了高置信度分拣（NPV 1.000）；在阅片研究中，AI辅助将平衡准确率从88.5%提升至95.1%（OR 3.14, P<0.001），同时提高了效率、信心和阅片者间一致性；BRAVE评分还能独立预测无病生存期（调整HR 4.79, P<0.001）和总生存期（调整HR 8.14, P<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: BRAVE在从术前活检到术后切除的全流程临床病理工作流中展现了多种实用角色，包括安全排除低风险病例、辅助二次阅片挽救漏诊以及病例优先级排序，同时其评分具有独立的预后价值，表明乳腺自适应的病理基础模型能够在真实临床场景中有效支持决策。

title: Improving Lexical Difficulty Prediction with Context-Aligned Contrastive Learning and Ridge Ensembling
summary: Lexical difficulty prediction is a fundamental problem in language learning and readability assessment, requiring models to estimate word difficulty across different first-language (L1) backgrounds. However, existing approaches rely on regression-only training with scalar supervision, which does not explicitly structure the representation space, limiting their ability to capture cross-lingual alignment and ordinal difficulty. To mitigate these issues, we propose Context-Aligned Contrastive Regression, which integrates Ridge regression ensemble with two complementary objectives, i.e., Cross-View Context and Ordinal Soft Contrastive Learning. Experiments on three L1 datasets show that (i) contrastive objectives improve cross-lingual representation alignment while preserving language-specific nuances, (ii) the learned representations capture the ordinal structure of lexical difficulty, and (iii) the ensemble effectively mitigates systematic biases of individual models, leading to more stable performance across difficulty levels.

AI.tldr: 提出Context-Aligned Contrastive Regression框架，通过集成Ridge回归与两种对比学习目标（Cross-View Context和Ordinal Soft Contrastive Learning），在无需显式交叉语料的情况下提升跨L1词难度预测中的表征对齐与序结构捕获能力。
AI.motivation: 现有词难度预测方法仅依赖标量监督的回归训练，未对表征空间进行显式结构化，限制了模型捕获跨语言对齐与序数难度信息的能力，无法有效应对不同第一语言背景下的词难度估计问题。
AI.method: 提出Context-Aligned Contrastive Regression框架，融合Ridge回归集成与两个互补的对比学习目标：Cross-View Context负责对齐不同L1上下文表征，Ordinal Soft Contrastive Learning则通过软标签对比学习保持词难度的序数结构。
AI.result: 在三个L1数据集上的实验表明：对比学习目标能改善跨语言表征对齐同时保留语言特异性；所学表征有效捕获了词难度的序数结构；集成策略缓解了单一模型的系统性偏差，在不同难度层级上表现出更稳定的性能。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习与回归集成的结合为跨语言词难度预测提供了一种有效范式，证明显式结构化表征空间能够提升模型在多L1背景下的泛化能力与序数区分性。

title: Why Retrying Fails: Context Contamination in LLM Agent Pipelines
summary: When an LLM agent fails a multi-step tool-augmented task and retries, the failed attempt typically remains in its context window -- contaminating the next attempt and elevating the per-step error rate beyond the base level.
