This context-contaminated restart phenomenon is widely observed in practice yet entirely lacks formal treatment. We introduce the Context-Contaminated Restart Model (CCRM): a chain of T tool-call steps, each failing with base rate epsilon_0; after any failed attempt, the subsequent attempt operates in contaminated context with elevated error rate epsilon_1 > epsilon_0. Under this model we derive five main results. (R1) An exact closed-form formula for P(succeed in at most K attempts). (R2) A cascade-overhead theorem giving the additional attempts Delta K incurred by contamination versus the clean-restart baseline. (R3) An optimal budget-allocation theorem identifying the pipeline depth T* that maximises success probability for a fixed total budget B=KT; we prove the closed form T* = sqrt(B * log(1/(1-epsilon_1)) / log(1/(1-epsilon_0))), with K*=B/T*. (R4) An information-theoretic lower bound via Le Cam's method showing K_CCRM is tight up to O(1). (R5) A clean-restart dominance theorem quantifying the exact benefit of context-clearing before retry. We validate CCRM on real SWE-bench Verified data: the IID model overestimates pass@3 by 17.4 percentage points (98.6% vs. 81.2%), while CCRM fits with error less than 0.001, implying a cascade ratio of epsilon_1/epsilon_0 = 7.1. Monte Carlo experiments confirm all theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出上下文污染重启模型（CCRM），形式化描述了LLM智能体在多步工具增强任务中因失败上下文残留导致错误率升高的问题，推导了五个核心理论结果，并在SWE-bench Verified数据上验证了该模型的准确性，发现污染导致错误率上升7.1倍。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在执行多步工具增强任务失败并重试时，失败尝试会残留在其上下文窗口中，污染后续尝试，导致每步错误率高于基准水平。这种上下文污染重启现象在实践中广泛存在，但缺乏形式化的理论分析。
AI.method: 本文提出了上下文污染重启模型（CCRM），建模为一个T步工具调用链，每步以基准错误率epsilon_0失败；失败后的重试在污染上下文中执行，错误率升高为epsilon_1 > epsilon_0。基于此模型，推导了五个主要定理：成功概率的精确闭式公式、污染导致的额外重试次数上界、最优预算分配定理（给出最优管道深度T*的闭式解）、基于Le Cam方法的信息论下界，以及清洁重启优势定理。
AI.result: 在SWE-bench Verified真实数据上，独立同分布模型高估pass@3达17.4个百分点（98.6% vs 81.2%），而CCRM拟合误差小于0.001，推得污染级联比epsilon_1/epsilon_0=7.1。蒙特卡洛实验验证了所有理论预测。
AI.conclusion: CCRM精确刻画了上下文污染对LLM智能体重试性能的负面影响，理论结果揭示了污染带来的额外开销与最优资源分配策略，并量化了重试前清除上下文带来的确切收益，为设计更鲁棒的多步工具调用智能体提供了理论指导。

title: Resource-Aware Evolutionary Neural Architecture Search for Cardiac MRI Segmentation
summary: Cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) segmentation underpins quantitative assessment of ventricular structure and function, yet reliable delineation remains difficult due to low tissue contrast, fuzzy boundaries, and inter scan variability. We present CardiacNAS, an evolutionary neural architecture search (NAS) framework that couples a UNet like supernet with a cardiac aware search space spanning depth width, kernel size, filter size, attention, fusion, activation, dropout, and residual scaling. The search is explicitly resource aware, jointly optimizing dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and 95th percentile Hausdorff distance (HD95) versus model size and floating point operations (FLOPs) under fixed compute budgets. Candidate architectures are instantiated from the supernet, trained with proxy budgets, and evolved through crossover, mutation, and elitist selection. We evaluate on the ACDC dataset and compare against six state of the art methods, using qualitative comparisons, learning curve analyses, and design factor correlation studies. The resulting model attains 93.22% average DSC and 4.73 mm HD95 with 3.58M parameters and 14.56 GFLOPs, demonstrating a favorable accuracy efficiency trade off. Analyses indicate that searched attention and fusion choices, together with residual scaling, contribute to improved boundary fidelity and stability. CardiacNAS offers a principled, resource aware approach to deployable CMR segmentation with transparent reporting of architectural complexity and compute budgets.

AI.tldr: 提出CardiacNAS框架，通过进化神经架构搜索在UNet类超网络中联合优化DSC和HD95与模型大小及FLOPs，在ACDC数据集上以3.58M参数和14.56 GFLOPs达到93.22% DSC和4.73 mm HD95，实现了CMR分割中精度与效率的有利权衡。
AI.motivation: 心脏磁共振(CMR)分割在定量评估心室结构和功能中至关重要，但由于组织对比度低、边界模糊以及扫描间变异性大，可靠的分割仍然困难，现有方法在精度与计算资源消耗之间缺乏系统性的联合优化。
AI.method: 提出CardiacNAS框架，构建一个UNet类超网络并设计包含深度、宽度、卷积核大小、滤波器大小、注意力、融合、激活、丢弃率和残差缩放的心脏感知搜索空间；采用进化搜索策略，通过交叉、变异和精英选择迭代演化候选架构，搜索过程显式考虑资源约束，联合优化Dice相似系数(DSC)和95th百分位Hausdorff距离(HD95)与模型参数量和FLOPs。
AI.result: 在ACDC数据集上评估，所得模型以3.58M参数和14.56 GFLOPs达到93.22%平均DSC和4.73 mm HD95，相较于六种最先进方法展现了有利的精度-效率权衡；分析表明搜索得到的高斯注意力、融合选择及残差缩放有助于改善边界保真度和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: CardiacNAS提供了一种原则性的、资源感知的CMR分割方法，透明报告了架构复杂度和计算预算，通过进化搜索自动发现的高斯注意力与残差缩放等设计选择对提升边界分割质量贡献显著，为可部署的医学图像分割方案提供了新思路。

title: LLiMba: Sardinian on a Single GPU -- Adapting a 3B Language Model to a Vanishing Romance Language
summary: Sardinian, a Romance language with roughly one million speakers, has minimal presence in modern NLP. Commercial services do not support it, and current language models do not produce it reliably. We present LLiMba, a 3B parameter Sardinian-ready model adapted from Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct through continued pretraining (CPT) and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on a single 24 GB consumer GPU. The corpus contains 11.5 million tokens of Sardinian spanning LSC, Logudorese, and Campidanese, augmented with 2.4 million tokens of related Romance text as replay against register blurring. After CPT the model reaches a perplexity of 6.76 on held out Sardinian and outperforms the base across all six FLORES-200 directions. We compare five SFT configurations under matched conditions: full fine-tuning, LoRA r64, rsLoRA r128, rsLoRA r256, and DoRA r256. rsLoRA r256 wins on every direction into Sardinian, reaching 28.5 BLEU from English against 17.3 after CPT and 21.0 with full fine-tuning. The rank ablation places r128 between LoRA r64 and rsLoRA r256 on BLEU but reveals failure modes invisible to the metric, including leakage across scripts no other variant produces. LoRA r64 retains less factual content from SFT than configurations at higher rank and produces more confident fabrications, though all methods fabricate on content absent from training. DoRA r256 yields the smallest gap between training and evaluation but the worst factual accuracy. The findings indicate that adapter capacity matters more than the choice among LoRA variants for adapting a Romance pretrained base to a low resource Romance target, that stronger regularization is not uniformly beneficial, and that translation metrics smoothly order configurations whose qualitative behavior differs categorically. Perplexity comparisons across scripts must account for byte fallback tokenization, which deflates the metric for scripts other than Latin.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLiMba，一个基于Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct在单张24GB消费级GPU上通过持续预训练和监督微调得到的3B参数撒丁语模型，在FLORES-200翻译任务上BLEU从17.3提升至28.5，并揭示了适配器容量、正则化强度与翻译质量之间的复杂关系。
AI.motivation: 撒丁语拥有约一百万使用者，但在现代NLP中几乎不存在——商业服务不支持，现有语言模型也无法可靠生成该语言，亟需针对低资源罗曼语的适配方法。
AI.method: 基于Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct，构建了包含1150万撒丁语token（涵盖LSC、Logudorese和Campidanese三种变体）及240万相关罗曼语文本的语料库进行持续预训练，随后比较了全参数微调、LoRA r64、rsLoRA r128、rsLoRA r256和DoRA r256五种SFT配置。
AI.result: CPT后模型在保留撒丁语数据上困惑度达6.76，全面超越基础模型；rsLoRA r256在所有翻译方向上最优，英译撒丁语BLEU达28.5（CPT后17.3，全参数微调21.0）；秩消融实验发现r128在BLEU上介于LoRA r64和rsLoRA r256之间但存在跨脚本泄露等指标不可见的失效模式；LoRA r64保留事实内容最少且产生更自信的编造；DoRA r256训练-评估差距最小但事实准确率最差。
AI.conclusion: 适配器容量比LoRA变体选择对低资源罗曼语适配更重要，强正则化并非普遍有益，翻译指标可能平滑排序了定性行为截然不同的配置；跨脚本困惑度比较必须考虑字节回退分词导致的指标膨胀效应。

title: Generalization Bounds of Emergent Communications for Agentic AI Networking
comment: Accepted at IEEE ISIT Workshop, Guangzhou, China, June 2026
summary: The evolution of 6G networking toward agentic AI networking (AgentNet) systems requires a shift from traditional data pipelines to task-aware, agentic AI-native communication solutions. Emergent communication, a novel communication paradigm in which autonomous agents learn their own signaling protocols through interaction, is increasingly viewed as a promising solution to address the challenges posed by existing rigid, predefined protocol-based networking architecture. However, most existing emergent communication frameworks fail to account for physical networking constraints, such as bandwidth and computational complexity, and often lack a rigorous information-theoretical foundation. To address these challenges, this paper introduces a novel emergent communication framework that facilitates collaborative task-solving among heterogeneous agents through an information-theoretic lens. We propose a novel joint loss function that unifies the optimization of decision-making functions and the learning of communication signaling. Our proposed solution is grounded on the multi-agent and multi-task distributed information bottleneck (DIB) theory, which allows the quantification of the fundamental trade-off between task-relevant information representation and computational complexity. We further provide theoretical generalization bounds of the emergent communication protocol during decentralized inference across unseen environmental states. Experimental validation on a real-world hardware prototype confirms that our proposed framework significantly improves generalization performance, compared to the state-of-the-art solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息论的新型涌现通信框架，通过多智能体多任务分布式信息瓶颈（DIB）理论统一优化决策函数与通信信号学习，使得异构智能体能够在任务导向的6G AgentNet系统中实现高效协作，并在真实硬件原型上验证了其相较于现有方案更优的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有6G网络向智能体AI网络（AgentNet）演进过程中，传统通信架构依赖刚性预定义协议，无法适应任务感知的智能体原生通信需求；而现有的涌现通信框架大多忽略了物理网络约束（如带宽和计算复杂度），且缺乏严格的信息理论基础，难以在实际部署中实现高效协作。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于信息论视角的涌现通信框架，用于异构智能体间的协作任务求解；核心贡献包括：提出一种联合损失函数，统一优化决策函数与通信信号的学习；将该框架建立在多智能体多任务分布式信息瓶颈（DIB）理论之上，以量化任务相关信息表示与计算复杂度之间的根本权衡；并进一步推导了在跨未见环境状态下的去中心化推理过程中，涌现通信协议的理论泛化界。
AI.result: 在真实硬件原型上的实验验证表明，所提出的涌现通信框架相较于现有最先进方法，在泛化性能上取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为6G AgentNet场景下任务导向、协议可学习的智能体通信提供了具有信息论保障的理论基础与实用框架，揭示了在物理约束下通过分布式信息瓶颈理论联合优化决策与通信的可行性与有效性，为未来去中心化智能体网络的通信协议设计指明了方向。

title: TinySSL: Distilled Self-Supervised Pretraining for Sub-Megabyte MCU Models
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has transformed representation learning for large models, yet remains unexplored for microcontroller (MCU)-class models with fewer than 500K parameters. We identify three obstacles at this scale -- projection head dominance, representation bottleneck, and augmentation sensitivity -- and propose Capacity-Aware Distilled Self-Supervised Learning (CA-DSSL), a teacher-guided framework that overcomes them without labels or text supervision. CA-DSSL combines asymmetric distillation from a frozen DINO ViT-S/16 teacher, multi-scale feature distillation for spatial representations, and a progressive augmentation curriculum. On a MobileNetV2-0.35 backbone (396K parameters) pretrained on CIFAR-100, CA-DSSL reaches 62.7 0.5% linear-probe accuracy (3-seed mean) -- surpassing SimCLR-Tiny by 18 pp, matching SEED (61.7%) with 10 fewer projection parameters (426K vs. 3.15M), and reaching 94.0% of a supervised upper bound. Standard SSL methods (BYOL-Tiny, DINO-Tiny) collapse entirely at this scale. On Pascal VOC detection, CA-DSSL achieves 2.3 the mAP of random initialization and +3 pp over SEED, though SimCLR-Tiny matches CA-DSSL on detection mAP. The deployed backbone occupies 378 KB (INT8) with no inference overhead from pretraining. Preliminary ImageNet-100 experiments reveal that CA-DSSL's advantage is specific to small-data regimes; scaling to ImageNet-1K is discussed as future work.

AI.tldr: 提出容量感知蒸馏自监督学习（CA-DSSL），在MCU级模型（<500K参数）上首次实现有效的自监督预训练，通过非对称蒸馏、多尺度特征蒸馏和渐进式增强课程克服了小模型自监督学习中的投影头主导、表示瓶颈和增强敏感性问题，在CIFAR-100预训练的MobileNetV2-0.35上达到62.7%线性探针准确率，超越现有方法18个百分点。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习在大型模型中取得了巨大成功，但在参数少于500K的微控制器（MCU）级小模型上仍未得到探索。该研究识别出小模型自监督学习的三个关键障碍：投影头主导（投影头参数远多于骨干网络）、表示瓶颈（小模型容量不足以学习不变特征）和增强敏感性（小模型对数据增强不稳定），并旨在解决这些障碍以实现无标签、无文本监督的小模型预训练。
AI.method: 提出容量感知蒸馏自监督学习（CA-DSSL），一个教师引导框架。其核心包括：从冻结的DINO ViT-S/16教师进行非对称蒸馏，避免投影头主导问题；多尺度特征蒸馏用于学习空间表示，缓解表示瓶颈；以及渐进式增强课程，逐步增加增强强度以解决小模型的增强敏感性。整体框架无需标签或文本监督。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100上预训练的MobileNetV2-0.35骨干（396K参数）上，CA-DSSL达到62.7±0.5%线性探针准确率（3次随机种子平均），超越SimCLR-Tiny 18个百分点，以更少的投影参数（426K vs 3.15M）匹配SEED（61.7%），达到监督上界的94.0%。标准SSL方法（BYOL-Tiny、DINO-Tiny）在此规模下完全崩溃。在Pascal VOC检测任务上，CA-DSSL达到随机初始化2.3倍的mAP，超过SEED 3个百分点。部署骨干仅占378 KB（INT8），预训练无推断开销。ImageNet-100实验表明CA-DSSL的优势局限于小数据场景。
AI.conclusion: CA-DSSL首次证明自监督学习可以有效应用于MCU级小模型，克服了此前被认为不可逾越的规模障碍。该框架通过蒸馏策略和课程学习的设计，使得无监督预训练在资源极度受限的场景中可行。然而其优势在小数据条件下显著，扩展到ImageNet-1K等大规模数据仍需进一步研究，为低功耗边缘设备的自监督学习开辟了新方向。

title: GAMBIT: A Three-Mode Benchmark for Adversarial Robustness in Multi-Agent LLM Collectives
summary: In multi-agent systems (MAS), a single deceptive agent can nullify all gains of an agentic AI collective and evade deployed defenses. However, existing adversarial studies on MAS target only shallow tasks and do not consider adaptive adversaries, which evolve their strategies to evade the very detectors trained to catch them. To address that gap, we introduce GAMBIT, a benchmark with three evaluation modes and two independent scores for evaluating imposter detectors: the first two modes measure zero-shot detection under increasing distribution shift, and a third recalibration mode measures how quickly a detector adapts to novel attacks from just 20 labeled examples. The benchmark comes with a dataset of 27,804 labeled instances spanning 240 co-evolved imposter strategies. Our contributions are threefold: (1) Using chess as a substrate deep reasoning problem and Gemini 3.1 Pro for agents, we release GAMBIT and its dataset to evaluate imposter detectors under realistic constraints against a stealthy adaptive imposter; (2) We introduce an adaptive imposter agent based on an efficient evolutionary framework, generalizable beyond chess, that collapses collective task performance while remaining essentially undetectable (50.5% F1-score with a Gemini-based detector); (3) We show that zero-shot evaluation can be highly misleading for adaptive adversaries: two detectors with near-identical zero-shot scores differ by 8x on few-shot adaptation, while the meta-learned variant converges 20x faster, a gap only visible in the recalibration mode. Altogether, GAMBIT provides the first multi-agent benchmark where adversarial attacks and defenses co-evolve, with an imposter framework generalizable beyond our use case, and promising techniques for fast recalibration in a rapidly evolving adversarial system. Code and data: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/gambit.

AI.tldr: GAMBIT是一个面向多智能体系统中自适应欺骗性智能体的基准测试平台，包含27,804个标注样本、240种共进化策略和三种评估模式，揭示了零样本检测在自适应对手面前具有高度误导性，而小样本重校准能显著暴露检测器的真实性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现有关于多智能体系统(MAS)中对抗性攻击的研究仅针对浅层任务，未考虑能够演化自身策略以规避检测器的自适应对手(adaptive adversary)，导致防御评估缺乏现实性和可靠性。
AI.method: 以国际象棋为深度推理任务基底、Gemini 3.1 Pro为智能体，构建GAMBIT基准：包含三种评估模式（两种零样本检测和一种重校准模式）及两个独立评分；引入基于高效进化框架的自适应欺骗智能体，可泛化至国际象棋以外的场景；数据集包含27,804个标注样本和240种共进化欺骗策略。
AI.result: 自适应欺骗智能体可将集体任务性能完全瓦解，同时几乎不被检测（Gemini检测器F1仅50.5%）；两个零样本得分相近的检测器在小样本适应中性能相差8倍，元学习变体收敛速度快20倍，该差异仅在重校准模式下可见。
AI.conclusion: GAMBIT是首个支持对抗攻击与防御共进化的多智能体基准，零样本评估在自适应对手面前具有高度误导性，快速重校准技术对于应对快速演化的对抗系统至关重要，所提出的欺骗智能体框架具有良好的跨场景泛化能力。

title: MIND-Skill: Quality-Guaranteed Skill Generation via Multi-Agent Induction and Deduction
summary: Large language model (LLM) powered AI agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for autonomous problem-solving, yet they continue to struggle with complex, multi-step real-world tasks that demand domain-specific procedural knowledge. Reusable agent skills, which encapsulate successful problem-solving strategies, offer a natural remedy by enabling agents to build on prior experience. However, curating such skills has largely remained a manual endeavor, requiring human experts to distill rich domain knowledge into actionable guidelines. In this work, we present $\textbf{M}$ulti-agent $\textbf{IN}$duction and $\textbf{D}$eduction for $\textbf{Skill}$s ($\textbf{MIND-Skill}$), a framework that automatically induces generalizable skills from successful trajectories with robust quality guarantees. MIND-Skill consists of an induction agent which is tasked to abstract reusable skills from successful trajectories, and a deduction agent which aims to reconstruct trajectories by following the induced skills. To guarantee the quality of the generated skills, we introduce a reconstruction loss that compares input and reconstructed trajectories, an outcome loss that enforces the correctness of the reconstructed trajectories, and a rubric loss that assesses the documentation quality and regularizes the abstraction level of the generated skills according to predefined criteria. These textual losses are jointly optimized with TextGrad, and the resulting skills are evaluated on held-out tasks unseen during optimization. Experiments on AppWorld and BFCL-v3 show that MIND-Skill consistently outperforms concurrent skill generation methods.

AI.tldr: 提出MIND-Skill框架，通过多智能体归纳与演绎自动从成功轨迹中提取可复用技能，并引入文本损失联合优化，在AppWorld和BFCL-v3上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型驱动的AI代理在执行复杂多步真实世界任务时仍面临困难，而可复用的代理技能虽有潜力提升性能，但技能编辑长期依赖人工专家手动提炼领域知识，缺乏自动化、高质量的技能生成方法。
AI.method: MIND-Skill框架包含归纳智能体和演绎智能体：归纳智能体负责从成功轨迹中抽象出可复用的技能，演绎智能体则根据这些技能重建轨迹。提出三种文本损失函数——重建损失（比较输入与重建轨迹）、结果损失（确保重建轨迹正确性）和标准损失（评估文档质量并规范化技能抽象层级），通过TextGrad进行联合优化，最终在未见过的保留任务上评估技能质量。
AI.result: 在AppWorld和BFCL-v3两个基准上进行的实验表明，MIND-Skill在技能质量与下游任务性能上一致优于同期技能生成方法，验证了所提出的多智能体归纳-演绎框架及文本损失联合优化策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MIND-Skill展示了自动化高质量技能生成的可行路径，通过多智能体协作与可微文本优化实现了技能的可泛化性，为降低AI代理对人工领域知识的依赖、提升复杂任务解决能力提供了新思路。

title: When Language Overwrites Vision: Over-Alignment and Geometric Debiasing in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) increasingly power high-stakes applications, from medical imaging to autonomous systems, yet they routinely hallucinate, confidently describing content not present in the input. We investigate the root causes of these failure modes with a mechanistic analysis focusing on the decoder-based VLMs. We trace these failure modes to a geometric over-alignment: to bridge the modality gap required by attention mechanisms, decoder-based VLMs over-align visual embeddings with the text manifold, injecting a statistical linguistic bias that systematically overshadows fine-grained visual evidence. While prior work either aggressively closes this gap or suppresses hallucinations through expensive black-box decoding strategies, none addresses the underlying geometric cause. We provide the first quantitative characterization of this over-alignment, demonstrating that linguistic bias concentrates in the top principal components of a universal, dataset-agnostic text subspace. Building on this insight, we propose two complementary remedies: a training-free inference strategy and a bias-aware fine-tuning paradigm, both of which explicitly project out this subspace from visual representations. Our methods significantly reduce hallucinations across POPE, CHAIR, and AMBER benchmarks, and improve CLAIR scores on long-form captioning tasks, with the training-free variant adding no computational overhead over the base model.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机制分析发现，解码器型视觉-语言模型（VLM）的幻觉源于视觉嵌入与文本流形的几何过度对齐，导致统计语言偏置压倒细粒度视觉证据；据此提出无训练推理与偏置感知微调两种方法，通过显式投影消除文本子空间，在不增加计算开销的前提下显著降低幻觉。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLM）在高风险应用中频繁产生幻觉，即自信地描述输入中不存在的视觉内容。现有方法或激进缩小模态差距，或通过昂贵的黑盒解码策略抑制幻觉，但均未解决导致幻觉的底层几何成因。
AI.method: 论文首先对解码器型VLM进行机制分析，将幻觉归因于视觉嵌入与文本流形的几何过度对齐——这种为弥合注意力机制所需的模态差距而进行的对齐，引入了统计语言偏置，掩盖了细粒度视觉证据。作者首次定量刻画了这种过度对齐，证明语言偏置集中于一个通用、与数据集无关的文本子空间的前主成分上。据此提出两种互补方案：一种无训练推理策略和一种偏置感知微调方法，均通过显式从视觉表示中投影出该子空间来消除偏置。
AI.result: 所提方法在POPE、CHAIR和AMBER基准上显著减少了幻觉，并在长文描述任务中提升了CLAIR分数。其中无训练变体相比基模型不增加任何计算开销，验证了方法的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLM幻觉的几何根源——视觉-文本过度对齐，并证明通过显式消除通用文本子空间中的语言偏置即可有效缓解幻觉，为VLM的可信推理提供了轻量级、训练友好的解决方案。

title: Language-Conditioned Visual Grounding with CLIP Multilingual
summary: Multilingual vision-language models exhibit systematic performance gaps across languages, but the mechanism remains ambiguous: cross-language divergence could arise from the visual encoder, the text branch, or their interaction. We resolve this ambiguity through a dense multilingual CLIP probe in which the visual encoder is held identical across thirteen typologically diverse languages and only the XLM-RoBERTa text branch varies. We evaluate two CLIP architectures spanning a 7x visual-encoder scale gap (XLM-R base + ViT-B/32, ~87M visual parameters; XLM-R large + ViT-H/14, ~632M) on 11 concepts and 210 images, and quantify cross-language agreement via cluster-mask IoU, top-percentile IoU, and Spearman rank correlation against an English reference (n=2,310 paired observations per language). Three findings emerge. First, low-resource languages (Arabic, Basque, Luxembourgish) incur a structural penalty at both backbone scales (Wilcoxon HR>LR p<10^-300; cluster-mask IoU gap +0.114 at base, +0.143 at large), isolating the deficit to the text branch. Second, scaling the encoder 7x widens the gap for structural failure cases (Basque Δ=-0.056, Luxembourgish Δ=-0.076) while improving Arabic (Δ=+0.033), separating corpus-coverage from tokeniser-fertility failures. Third, peak similarity is preserved across languages (mean ratio 0.94 at large scale) while cluster-mask IoU drops sharply, identifying spatial misalignment, not signal collapse, as the dominant failure mode. At 3.4-3.9 Wh per 1,000 queries, dense-CLIP grounding is competitive with high-throughput inference budgets, positioning it as a practical substrate for energy-aware multilingual deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文通过密集多语言CLIP探针实验，将视觉编码器固定为相同、仅变化XLM-RoBERTa文本分支，系统性地将多语言视觉-语言模型中的性能差异定位到文本分支，并揭示低资源语言存在结构性惩罚、缩放编码器会加剧部分语言的失败模式、空间错位而非信号坍塌是主导失效机制。
AI.motivation: 多语言视觉-语言模型在不同语言间存在系统性性能差异，但其根本机制尚不明确——跨语言差异可能源于视觉编码器、文本分支或二者的交互作用，现有研究未能有效隔离并定位差异的根源。
AI.method: 本文设计密集多语言CLIP探针实验，将视觉编码器在十三种类型多样的语言中保持完全一致，仅变化XLM-RoBERTa文本分支；评估两种CLIP架构（XLM-R base + ViT-B/32约87M视觉参数与XLM-R large + ViT-H/14约632M视觉参数），覆盖11个概念和210张图像，采用聚类掩码IoU、最高百分位IoU和斯皮尔曼秩相关系数量化跨语言一致性。
AI.result: 低资源语言（阿拉伯语、巴斯克语、卢森堡语）在两种骨干规模下均承受结构性惩罚（Wilcoxon HR>LR p<10^-300；聚类掩码IoU差距在base规模为+0.114，large规模为+0.143），将缺陷隔离到文本分支；放大编码器7倍对巴斯克语（Δ=-0.056）和卢森堡语（Δ=-0.076）扩大了差距，而对阿拉伯语有所改善（Δ=+0.033），分离出语料库覆盖与分词器词表密度两类失败模式；峰值相似度在语言间保持良好（大规模下平均比率0.94），但聚类掩码IoU急剧下降，表明空间错位而非信号坍塌是主导失效模式。
AI.conclusion: 多语言CLIP的性能差距主要源于文本分支而非视觉编码器，空间错位是主要失效机制，且放大模型规模对低资源语言的影响具有异质性；密集CLIP探针在每1000次查询3.4-3.9 Wh的能耗下具有竞争力，可作为节能感知的多语言部署的实用基础。

title: Iterative Critique-and-Routing Controller for Multi-Agent Systems with Heterogeneous LLMs
summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems often rely on a controller to coordinate a pool of heterogeneous models, yet existing controllers are typically limited to one-shot routing: they select a model once and return its output directly. Such routing-only designs provide no mechanism to critique intermediate drafts or support iterative refinement. To address this limitation, we propose a critique-and-routing controller that casts multi-agent coordination as a sequential decision problem. At each turn, the controller evaluates the current draft, decides whether to stop or continue, and, if needed, selects the next agent for further refinement. We formulate this process as a finite-horizon Markov Decision Process (MDP) with explicit agent-utilization constraints, design a composite reward for controller decisions across turns, and optimize the controller via policy gradients under a Lagrangian-relaxed objective. Extensive experiments across multiple heterogeneous multi-agent systems and seven reasoning benchmarks show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and substantially narrows the gap to the strongest agent, while using it for fewer than 25% of total calls.

AI.tldr: 提出一种 critique-and-routing 控制器，将多智能体协调建模为顺序决策 MDP，通过策略梯度优化实现迭代式模型选择与草稿修正，在异构 LLM 系统中以少于 25% 的最强模型调用次数超越现有路由方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体 LLM 系统的控制器仅支持一次性路由（one-shot routing），选择模型后直接返回其输出，缺乏对中间草稿的评判与迭代精化机制，限制了协作效率与输出质量。
AI.method: 将多智能体协调建模为有限时域马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），控制器在每一轮评估当前草稿，决定是否停止或继续，并选择下一个智能体进行精化；设计带智能体使用约束的复合奖励函数，通过拉格朗日松弛目标下的策略梯度方法优化控制器决策策略。
AI.result: 在多个异构多智能体系统与七个推理基准上的实验表明，所提方法一致优于最先进的基线，显著缩小了与最强智能体之间的性能差距，同时其对最强智能体的调用次数低于总调用次数的 25%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了将路由与评判解耦并引入迭代精化机制能显著提升多智能体系统的协作效率，为在有限计算预算下更高效地利用异构模型提供了可行范式。

title: BenchHAR: Benchmarking Self-Supervised Learning for Generalizable Sensor-based Activity Recognition
summary: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) from wearable sensors supports broad healthcare and behavior science applications. However, data heterogeneity and the scarcity of labeled data limit its real-world generalization. Recent advances in self-supervised learning (SSL) in vision and language domains have shown strong capability for learning generalizable representations from unlabeled data. Yet, few studies have systematically compared the generalization performance of SSL methods or explored how to adapt them for generalizable HAR. To address these gaps, we present BenchHAR, a unified framework for evaluating the generalization capability of SSL methods for sensor-based HAR on unseen target distributions. BenchHAR curates a large-scale dataset (~258K samples) and evaluates eight representative SSL methods across 12 encoder-classifier architectures. Our results reveal that existing SSL methods struggle to achieve satisfactory generalization performance. We find that: (1) For HAR models, the hybrid paradigm (combining reconstruction and contrastive pretraining) achieves the best overall performance. The CNN encoder exhibits the strongest ability to learn generalizable representations, while more expressive classifier architectures further improve generalization. (2) For data scale, increasing the amount of pretraining data from downstream activity classes consistently improves generalization, while adding more labeled data yields limited gains. Interestingly, incorporating unlabeled data from non-downstream activity classes does not improve generalization. (3) Sensor data collected from custom-grade devices generalizes better than that from research-grade devices, and data from limb transfers more effectively to trunk positions. BenchHAR provides a unified benchmark and actionable insights for generalizable sensor-based HAR systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/saiketa/HAR-Bench.

AI.tldr: BenchHAR提出了一个统一框架，系统评估了八种自监督学习方法在可穿戴传感器人类活动识别（HAR）中的泛化性能，基于约25.8万样本的大规模数据集和12种编码器-分类器架构，揭示了现有SSL方法在跨域泛化方面的不足，并提供了混合预训练策略、CNN编码器、以及数据来源与部位迁移等方面的可操作见解。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在视觉和语言领域展现了从无标签数据中学习可泛化表示的强大能力，但少有研究系统比较SSL方法在可穿戴传感器HAR任务中的泛化性能，也缺乏如何将SSL适配到可泛化HAR的探索，数据异质性和标签稀缺进一步限制了模型在未见目标分布上的实际部署。
AI.method: BenchHAR构建了一个统一评估框架，包含约25.8万个样本的大规模传感器数据集，系统评估了八种代表性SSL方法（涵盖对比学习、重构学习及混合范式）与12种编码器-分类器架构组合，在未见目标分布上测试泛化能力，并设计了不同预训练数据规模、标签量、设备类型和传感器部位迁移等多维度实验。
AI.result: 现有SSL方法在HAR泛化任务上表现不足；混合预训练范式（结合重构与对比学习）取得最佳整体性能；CNN编码器学习可泛化表示的能力最强，更具表达力的分类器进一步提升泛化性；增加来自下游活动类别的预训练数据一致提升泛化性，而更多标签数据收益有限；非下游类别的无标签数据无助于泛化；定制级设备数据比研究级设备数据泛化更好，肢体部位数据向躯干部位迁移效果更优。
AI.conclusion: BenchHAR为可泛化传感器HAR系统提供了统一的基准测试和可操作见解，指明了混合预训练策略、CNN编码器架构、以及数据来源与部位选择对泛化性能的关键影响，为未来SSL在HAR领域的实际部署提供了重要指导方向。

title: LLM Agents Already Know When to Call Tools -- Even Without Reasoning
summary: Tool-augmented LLM agents tend to call tools indiscriminately, even when the model can answer directly. Each unnecessary call wastes API fees and latency, yet no existing benchmark systematically studies when a tool call is actually needed. We propose When2Tool, a benchmark of 18 environments (15 single-hop, 3 multi-hop) spanning three categories of tool necessity -- computational scale, knowledge boundaries, and execution reliability -- each with controlled difficulty levels that create a clear decision boundary between tool-necessary and tool-unnecessary tasks. We evaluate two families of training-free baselines: Prompt-only (varying the prompt to discourage unnecessary calls) and Reason-then-Act (requiring the model to reason about tool necessity before acting). Both provide limited control: Prompt-only suppresses necessary calls alongside unnecessary ones, and Reason-then-Act still incurs a disproportionate accuracy cost on hard tasks. To understand why these baselines fail, we probe the models' hidden states and find that tool necessity is linearly decodable from the pre-generation representation with AUROC 0.89--0.96 across six models, substantially exceeding the model's own verbalized reasoning. This reveals that models already know when tools are needed, but fail to act on this knowledge during generation. Building on this finding, we propose Probe&Prefill, which uses a lightweight linear probe to read the hidden-state signal and prefills the model's response with a steering sentence. Across all models tested, Probe&Prefill reduces tool calls by 48% with only 1.7% accuracy loss, while the best baseline at comparable accuracy only reduces 6% of tool calls, or achieves a similar tool call reduction but incurs a 5$\times$ higher accuracy loss. Our code is available at https://github.com/Trustworthy-ML-Lab/when2tool

AI.tldr: 提出When2Tool基准测试，用于评估工具增强型LLM在工具调用必要性上的判断能力，并揭示模型隐性表征优于显性推理的现象，进而提出Probe&Prefill方法，通过线性探针读取隐藏状态并预填充引导语句，在几乎不损失准确率的情况下减少48%的不必要工具调用。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强型LLM智能体会不加区分地调用工具，即使模型本身可以直接回答，每次不必要的调用都会浪费API费用和延迟，但目前缺乏系统性评估工具调用何时真正必要的基准测试和研究框架。
AI.method: 构建When2Tool基准测试，包含18个环境（15个单跳、3个多跳），覆盖计算规模、知识边界和执行可靠性三类工具必要性场景，并设置受控难度级别以明确区分工具必要与不必要的任务。评估了两类免训练基线（仅提示和先思考后行动），并提出Probe&Prefill方法，使用轻量级线性探针从预生成隐藏状态中解码工具必要性信号，并将引导语句预填充到模型响应中。
AI.result: 在六种模型上，工具必要性可从隐藏状态中以AUROC 0.89–0.96线性解码，远超模型自身显性推理能力。Probe&Prefill在所有测试模型上将工具调用减少48%，仅带来1.7%的准确率损失；相比之下，同等准确率的最佳基线仅减少6%的工具调用，而达到类似工具调用减少的基线则遭受5倍更高的准确率损失。
AI.conclusion: 模型在隐藏状态中已经知道何时需要工具，但在生成过程中未能利用这一知识，表明存在隐性知识与显性行为之间的鸿沟；通过轻量级干预利用这一信号可以有效平衡工具调用效率和任务准确率，为构建更经济高效的LLM智能体提供了新方向。

title: SkillMaster: Toward Autonomous Skill Mastery in LLM Agents
summary: Skills provide an effective mechanism for improving LLM agents on complex tasks, yet in existing agent frameworks, their creation, refinement, and selection are typically governed by external teachers, hand-designed rules, or auxiliary modules. As a result, skills remain external resources to be invoked, rather than capabilities that agents can develop, adapt, and internalize through experience. To endow LLM agents with autonomous skill mastery, we propose SkillMaster, a training framework that teaches agents to create new skills, refine existing skills, and select accumulated skills during task solving. This capability is achieved through three key designs. First, we train agents through trajectory-informed skill review, teaching agents to propose, update, or retain skills based on evidence from completed episodes. Second, each candidate skill edit is designed to be evaluated by its counterfactual utility on related probe tasks, providing a direct learning signal for training skill-editing decisions. Third, we introduce DualAdv-GRPO, which separately estimates advantages for task-solving actions and skill-editing decisions, stabilizing joint training across task solving and skill management. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop show that SkillMaster improves the overall success rate over state-of-the-art baselines by 8.8% and 9.3%, respectively, achieving the best performance among all compared methods. Further analysis reveals a marked shift in agent capability: agents trained with SkillMaster can identify skill failures, refine procedural knowledge from trajectory evidence, and transfer improvements to future tasks with limited skill-bank edits. Overall, SkillMaster moves LLM agents beyond mere skill use toward self-improving agents capable of developing, adapting, and applying their own skill repertoires.

AI.tldr: SkillMaster 提出了一种训练框架，使 LLM 智能体能够通过轨迹驱动的技能回顾、反事实效用评估和 DualAdv-GRPO 联合训练，自主地创建、精炼和选择技能，从而在 ALFWorld 和 WebShop 上分别实现 8.8% 和 9.3% 的成功率提升，推动智能体从技能使用者向自我改进者转变。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 智能体框架中，技能的创建、精炼和选择通常依赖外部教师、手工规则或辅助模块，技能仅作为被调用的外部资源，而非智能体可通过经验自主发展、适应和内化的能力，这限制了智能体在复杂任务中的自主进化能力。
AI.method: SkillMaster 包含三个核心设计：首先，通过轨迹驱动的技能回顾（trajectory-informed skill review）训练智能体基于已完成回合的证据提议、更新或保留技能；其次，每个候选技能编辑通过其在相关探针任务上的反事实效用进行评估，为技能编辑决策提供直接学习信号；最后，提出 DualAdv-GRPO 方法，分别估计任务求解动作和技能编辑决策的优势函数，以稳定任务求解与技能管理的联合训练。
AI.result: 在 ALFWorld 和 WebShop 基准上，SkillMaster 相较于最先进基线分别实现了 8.8% 和 9.3% 的总体成功率提升，在所有对比方法中达到最佳性能。进一步分析表明，训练后的智能体能够识别技能失败、从轨迹证据中精炼程序性知识，并通过有限的技能库编辑将改进迁移到未来任务中。
AI.conclusion: SkillMaster 使 LLM 智能体超越了单纯的技能使用，具备了自主开发、适应和应用自身技能库的能力，实现了从技能使用者到自我改进智能体的范式转变，为构建更具自主性的智能体系统提供了可行路径。

title: PaceVGGT: Pre-Alternating-Attention Token Pruning for Visual Geometry Transformers
summary:
Visual Geometry Transformer (VGGT) is a strong feed-forward model for multiple 3D tasks, but its Alternating-Attention (AA) stack scales quadratically in the total token count, making long clips expensive.
  Existing token-reduction accelerators operate inside AA, leaving the patch grid that enters AA uncompressed.
  We introduce PaceVGGT, a pre-AA token pruning framework that prunes DINO patch tokens before the first AA block of a frozen VGGT. PaceVGGT trains a lightweight Token Scorer that estimates per-token importance from DINO features. The scorer is first distilled against an AA-internal attention target from the unpruned backbone, then refined under downstream camera, depth, and point-map losses.
  A per-frame keep budget fixes the backbone-visible sequence length, while an importance-adaptive merge/prune assignment preserves residual content from high-saliency frames under a fixed total merge budget.
  A Feature-guided Restoration module reconstructs the dense spatial grid required by the prediction heads.
  On ScanNet-50 and 7-Scenes, PaceVGGT remains on the reconstruction quality--latency frontier while reducing inference latency.
  On ScanNet-50, it reduces latency by \(5.1\times\) over unmodified VGGT at \(N=300\) and \(1.47\times\) over LiteVGGT at \(N=1000\).
  These results identify pre-AA pruning as a viable acceleration route for frozen VGGT-style geometry transformers.

AI.tldr: PaceVGGT提出了一种在VGGT的交替注意力（AA）模块之前进行令牌剪枝的加速框架，通过轻量级令牌评分器从DINO特征中估计令牌重要性，在保持重建质量的同时显著降低推理延迟，在ScanNet-50上实现5.1倍加速。
AI.motivation: VGGT在多个三维任务上表现出色，但其交替注意力（AA）堆叠的计算复杂度随令牌总数呈二次方增长，导致处理长视频片段时计算开销过大；现有令牌缩减加速器作用于AA内部，未能压缩进入AA的图像块网格，无法从根本上减少AA的输入规模。
AI.method: PaceVGGT提出一种AA前的令牌剪枝框架，首先利用轻量级令牌评分器从DINO特征中估计每个令牌的重要性；评分器先以未剪枝骨干网络AA内部的注意力为目标进行蒸馏，再在下游相机、深度和点云损失的监督下进行微调；通过每帧保留预算固定骨干网络可见的序列长度，并采用重要性自适应的合并/剪枝分配策略在高显著性帧中保留残余内容；最后通过特征引导恢复模块重建预测头所需的稠密空间网格。
AI.result: 在ScanNet-50和7-Scenes基准上，PaceVGGT保持在重建质量-延迟前沿曲线上，同时显著降低了推理延迟；在ScanNet-50上，相比未修改的VGGT（N=300）延迟降低5.1倍，相比LiteVGGT（N=1000）延迟降低1.47倍。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果证明，AA前的令牌剪枝是加速冻结VGGT式几何变换网络的一条可行路径，能够在保持重建质量的同时实现显著的计算效率提升，为后续大规模三维场景理解中的高效推理提供了新方向。

title: DeltaRubric: Generative Multimodal Reward Modeling via Joint Planning and Verification
summary: Aligning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) requires reliable reward models, yet existing single-step evaluators can suffer from lazy judging, exploiting language priors over fine-grained visual verification. While rubric-based evaluation mitigates these biases in text-only settings, extending it to multimodal tasks is bottlenecked by the complexity of visual reasoning. The critical differences between responses often depend on instance-specific visual details. Robust evaluation requires dynamically synthesizing rubrics that isolate spatial and factual discrepancies. To address this, we introduce $\textbf{DeltaRubric}$, an approach that reformulates multimodal preference evaluation as a plan-and-execute process within a single MLLM. DeltaRubric operates in two steps: acting first as a $\textit{Disagreement Planner}$, the model generates a neutral, instance-specific verification checklist. Transitioning into a $\textit{Checklist Verifier}$, it executes these self-generated checks against the image and question to produce the final grounded judgment. We formulate DeltaRubric as a multi-role reinforcement learning problem, jointly optimizing planning and verification capabilities. Validated on Qwen3-VL 4B and 8B Instruct models, DeltaRubric achieves solid empirical gains. For instance, On VL-RewardBench, it improves base model overall accuracy by $\textbf{+22.6}$ (4B) and $\textbf{+18.8}$ (8B) points, largely outperforming standard no-rubric baselines. The results demonstrate that decomposing evaluation into structured, verifiable steps leads to more reliable and generalizable multimodal reward modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出DeltaRubric，将多模态偏好评估建模为MLLM内部的"规划-执行"两阶段过程：首先生成实例特定的中立验证清单，再执行清单检查以产生基于视觉的判决，通过多角色强化学习联合优化规划与验证能力，在VL-RewardBench上显著超越无清单基线。
AI.motivation: 现有单步多模态奖励模型存在"懒惰判断"问题，即利用语言先验而非细粒度视觉验证进行评估；基于清单的评估在纯文本场景有效，但因视觉推理复杂性难以直接扩展到多模态任务，关键在于响应间的关键差异往往依赖于实例特定的视觉细节。
AI.method: 提出DeltaRubric框架，将多模态偏好评估重构为同一MLLM内的"规划-执行"过程：首先作为分歧规划器生成中立且实例特定的验证清单，然后转为清单验证器，对图像和问题执行自生成的检查项以产生最终判决；该框架被形式化为多角色强化学习问题，联合优化规划与验证能力。
AI.result: 基于Qwen3-VL 4B和8B Instruct模型验证，在VL-RewardBench上，DeltaRubric相比无清单基线将总体准确率分别提升+22.6（4B）和+18.8（8B）个百分点，大幅超越标准无清单基线。
AI.conclusion: 将评估分解为结构化、可验证的步骤能够实现更可靠且更具泛化性的多模态奖励建模，为MLLM对齐中的奖励模型设计提供了新的范式。

title: AgentPSO: Evolving Agent Reasoning Skill via Multi-agent Particle Swarm Optimization
summary: Multi-agent reasoning has shown promise for improving the problem-solving ability of large language models by allowing multiple agents to explore diverse reasoning paths. However, most existing multi-agent methods rely on inference-time debate or aggregation, which can be vulnerable to incorrect peer influence and biased consensus. Moreover, the agents themselves remain static, as their underlying reasoning skills do not evolve across tasks. In this paper, we introduce AgentPSO, a particle-swarm-inspired framework for evolving multi-agent reasoning skills. AgentPSO treats each agent as a particle-like reasoner whose state is a natural-language skill and whose velocity is a semantic update direction, iteratively moving agents toward stronger skill states to improve both individual and collective reasoning performance. Across training iterations, each agent updates its skill by combining its previous velocity, personal-best skill, global-best skill, and a self-reflective direction derived from peer reasoning trajectories. This enables agents to learn reusable reasoning behaviors from both their own experiences and the strongest skills discovered by the population, without updating the parameters of the backbone language model. Experiments on mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks show that AgentPSO improves over static single-agent skills and test-time-only multi-agent reasoning baselines. The evolved skills further transfer across benchmarks and to another backbone model, suggesting that AgentPSO captures reusable reasoning procedures rather than merely optimizing benchmark-specific prompts. Code is open-sourced at https://github.com/HYUNMIN-HWANG/AgentPSO/.

AI.tldr: AgentPSO提出了一种基于粒子群优化的多智能体推理框架，将每个智能体视为具有自然语言技能状态的粒子，通过结合历史速度、个体最优、全局最优和自我反思方向迭代演化智能体的推理技能，无需更新LM参数即可提升个体与集体推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型多智能体推理方法主要依赖推理时的辩论或聚合，易受错误同伴影响和偏向性共识的干扰；同时智能体自身的推理技能在各任务间保持静态，无法随经验演化。AgentPSO旨在解决这些局限，使多智能体系统具备可跨任务迁移的、持续演化的推理能力。
AI.method: AgentPSO受粒子群优化启发，将每个智能体建模为一个粒子状推理器，其状态为自然语言技能向量，速度为语义更新方向。在每次迭代中，智能体结合自己的历史速度、个人最优技能、全局最优技能以及从同伴推理轨迹中提取的自我反思方向，更新自身技能状态；整个演化过程不更新骨干语言模型的参数，仅优化智能体的语言技能描述。
AI.result: 在数学推理和通用推理基准上，AgentPSO的性能优于基于静态单智能体技能的方法和仅测试时交互的多智能体推理基线。演化得到的技能具备跨基准和跨骨干模型（迁移到另一种LM架构）的迁移能力，表明AgentPSO学到的是可复用的推理过程而非仅适用于特定基准的提示优化。
AI.conclusion: AgentPSO证明了一种不依赖模型参数更新的多智能体技能演化机制是可行的，能够有效提升推理性能并捕获通用推理模式。该工作为多智能体系统的持续学习和技能迁移提供了新范式，其开源代码有助于后续研究评估与扩展。

title: Decoupling Endpoint and Semantic Transition Learning for Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval
summary: Zero-shot composed image retrieval (ZS-CIR) retrieves a target image from a reference image and a text modification without human-annotated CIR triplets. Projection-based ZS-CIR methods are attractive because they do not rely on LLMs at inference and remain lightweight, but they often underperform LLM-based approaches on complex semantic modifications. This gap reflects a semantic transition bottleneck in projection-based ZS-CIR: endpoint-level matching can let the edit text act as a target-side attribute cue rather than grounding it as a source-conditioned semantic transition. We further show that adding semantic transition supervision to the same text adapter creates an endpoint--transition conflict between endpoint alignment and semantic transition alignment. To address this conflict, DeCIR decouples endpoint and transition learning. It constructs paired forward/reverse edit tuples from image-caption pairs, trains separate low-rank text adapter branches for endpoint alignment and semantic transition alignment, and merges them with Low-Rank Directional Merge (LRDM) into one deployable adapter. Extensive experiments on CIRR, CIRCO, FashionIQ, and GeneCIS demonstrate that DeCIR consistently improves projection-based ZS-CIR without increasing inference complexity.

AI.tldr: DeCIR通过解耦端点和过渡学习，使用独立低秩文本适配器分支和低秩方向合并策略，在不增加推理复杂度的情况下显著提升了基于投影的零样本组合图像检索在复杂语义修改上的性能。
AI.motivation: 基于投影的零样本组合图像检索方法虽轻量且不依赖大语言模型，但在复杂语义修改上表现不如基于LLM的方法，原因在于存在语义过渡瓶颈：端点级匹配使编辑文本仅作为目标侧属性线索，而非源条件语义过渡；同时，在相同文本适配器上添加语义过渡监督会导致端点对齐与过渡对齐之间的冲突。
AI.method: DeCIR通过解耦端点学习和过渡学习来解决该冲突：从图像-文本对中构建配对的正向/反向编辑元组，训练独立的低秩文本适配器分支分别负责端点对齐和语义过渡对齐，并通过低秩方向合并（LRDM）将两个分支合并为单个可部署的适配器，从而在不增加推理复杂度的情况下实现两种对齐的融合。
AI.result: 在CIRR、CIRCO、FashionIQ和GeneCIS四个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，DeCIR在不增加推理复杂度的情况下，持续提升了基于投影的零样本组合图像检索性能。
AI.conclusion: DeCIR揭示了投影式ZS-CIR中端点-过渡冲突的存在，并提出解耦学习与低秩合并的有效解决方案，为轻量级零样本组合检索指明了结构性改进方向，且无需增加推理开销。

title: Mem-W: Latent Memory-Native GUI Agents
summary: GUI agents are beginning to operate the web, mobile, and desktop as interactive worlds, where successful control depends on carrying forward visual, procedural, and task-level evidence beyond the fleeting present screen. Yet most agents still treat memory as an external, human-readable artifact: histories are summarized, categorized, retrieved, and reinserted as text or structured records before being encoded again by the policy. This creates a mismatch between the representational form in which experience is stored and the latent embedding sequence over which modern GUI policies actually act. We introduce Mem-W, a series of latent-memory-native GUI agents that treat memory as part of the agent's continuous context rather than as an auxiliary symbolic scaffold. Mem-W weaves both historical trajectories (as experiential memory) and in-session segments (as working memory) into compact memory tokens through a shared trajectory-to-latent compressor. These tokens are woven with the current GUI observation and local context into one continuous embedding sequence, allowing the agent to read successes, failures, and unfinished progress through the same machine-native interface. Mem-W is trained with self-distillation and outcome-aware supervision to preserve decision-relevant state while filtering memory toward evidence that truly supports task success. Across four web and mobile navigation benchmarks, Mem-W consistently improves diverse backbones and memory-enhanced baselines, with gains of up to $+30.0$, suggesting that latent-context-native memory can serve as a scalable foundation for long-horizon GUI agency.

AI.tldr: Mem-W 提出了一种将记忆直接嵌入 GUI 智能体连续潜在上下文的方法，通过轨迹到潜在的压缩器将历史经验和工作记忆转化为紧凑的记忆令牌，并与当前观测融合为统一的嵌入序列，从而避免传统外部符号记忆的表征不匹配问题，在四个网页和移动导航基准上取得高达+30.0的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前 GUI 智能体将记忆视为外部的、人类可读的产物，以文本或结构化记录的形式进行总结、检索和重新编码，导致经验存储的表征形式与现代 GUI 策略实际使用的潜在嵌入序列之间存在表征不匹配，限制了智能体在长期交互中有效利用视觉、程序和任务级证据的能力。
AI.method: Mem-W 提出了一系列潜在记忆原生的 GUI 智能体，通过共享的轨迹到潜在压缩器将历史轨迹（经验记忆）和会话内片段（工作记忆）压缩为紧凑的记忆令牌，并将这些令牌与当前 GUI 观测和局部上下文编织成连续的嵌入序列，从而让智能体通过同一机器原生接口读取成功、失败和未完成的进展；训练采用自蒸馏和面向结果的监督，以保留决策相关状态并过滤有利于任务成功的记忆证据。
AI.result: 在四个网页和移动导航基准上，Mem-W 在多种骨干网络和记忆增强基线方法上均取得了一致的性能提升，增益最高达+30.0，表明潜在上下文原生记忆策略的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 潜在上下文原生的记忆可以作为长程 GUI 智能体的可扩展基础，通过消除外部符号记忆的中间环节，直接将经验融入智能体的连续表征空间，为构建更高效、更自然的长期交互 GUI 智能体提供了新的方向。

title: Done, But Not Sure: Disentangling World Completion from Self-Termination in Embodied Agents
summary: Standard embodied evaluations do not independently score whether an agent correctly commits to task completion at episode closure, a capacity we call terminal commitment. Behaviorally distinct failures--never completing the task, completing it but failing to stop, and reporting success without sufficient evidence--collapse into the same benchmark failure. We introduce VIGIL, an evaluation framework that makes terminal commitment independently measurable. Under VIGIL's default protocol, agents observe only egocentric RGB, receive no action-success signals, and must end each episode with a semantic report checked deterministically against hidden world state. This yields two separate scores: world-state completion (W) and benchmark success (B), where B additionally requires a correct terminal report. This decoupling makes four outcome categories distinguishable: missed execution, post-attainment drift, unsupported commitment, and verified success. Across 20 models on 1,000 frozen episodes, systems with comparable W differ by up to 19.7 pp in B: one model converts achieved states into correct reports, while another with near-identical execution drifts past the goal without closing. An action-feedback intervention further tests the separation: execution-oriented signals improve W broadly, yet commitment failures persist in models that do not already ground terminal reports in the achieved state. VIGIL provides a protocol that makes terminal commitment independently visible and scorable.

AI.tldr: VIGIL 是一个新的具身智能评估框架，通过要求智能体在回合结束时提交基于 egocentric RGB 的语义报告，将终端承诺（terminal commitment）从任务完成中解耦出来，从而独立测量智能体是否正确结束任务并报告结果，揭示出传统基准无法区分的四种失败模式。
AI.motivation: 标准具身评估无法独立衡量智能体在回合结束时是否正确承诺任务完成——即终端承诺（terminal commitment）能力。行为上截然不同的失败模式（从未完成任务、完成任务但未能停止、以及没有充分证据就报告成功）在现有基准中全部混同为同一类失败。
AI.method: 提出 VIGIL 评估框架，其默认协议下智能体仅使用 egocentric RGB 观测，不接收动作成功信号，必须在每个回合结束时提交语义报告，该报告通过确定性检查与隐藏的世界状态进行比对。由此产生两个独立分数：世界状态完成度（W）和基准成功度（B），其中 B 额外要求正确报告。这种解耦区分出四种结果类别：遗漏执行（missed execution）、后目标漂移（post-attainment drift）、无充分证据的承诺（unsupported commitment）和验证成功（verified success）。
AI.result: 在 1000 个冻结回合上对 20 个模型进行评估，发现具有相近 W 分数的系统在 B 分数上差异高达 19.7 个百分点：一个模型能将会达成的状态转化为正确报告，而另一个执行表现几乎相同的模型却漂过目标而未关闭。动作反馈干预进一步验证了这一分离性：执行导向的信号广泛提升了 W，但在那些尚未将终端报告锚定于已达成状态的模型中，承诺失败依然存在。
AI.conclusion: VIGIL 提供了一种使终端承诺变得独立可见且可评分的评估协议，揭示了传统基准掩盖的关键行为差异，为具身智能体的评估提供了更细粒度的分析维度。

title: NICE FACT: Diagnosing and Calibrating VLMs in Quantitative Reasoning for Kinematic Physics
summary: The ability to derive precise spatial and physical insights is a cornerstone of vision-language models (VLMs), yet their poor performances in related spatial intelligence tasks such as physical reasoning remain a fundamental barrier. The community critically lacks a scientific analysis revealing whether VLMs faithfully reach answers or plausibly make guesses. This work aims to provide a fundamental understanding of how VLMs perceive the physical world, and utilize physical laws, while assessing the reliability of model confidence. We propose NICE and FACT, a dual-diagnostic paradigm that explicitly decomposes quantitative reasoning for kinematic physics: FACT diagnoses visual fidelity, physical law comprehension, and temporal grounding. NICE studies our novel neighborhood-informed calibration method and novel metrics to evaluate and calibrate confidence reliability. Evaluated across 6 latest state-of-the-art VLMs, we uncover that models fail to identify visual preconditions or utilize necessary physical laws to reach answers. This work highlights and establishes a standardized diagnostic paradigm to guide the development of faithful, physically-grounded VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NICE和FACT双诊断范式，系统评估视觉语言模型在物理推理中的视觉保真度、物理法则理解和时间接地能力，揭示现有模型无法可靠识别视觉前提或运用物理定律得出答案，并引入邻域感知校准方法提升置信度可靠性。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在空间智能任务（如物理推理）中表现不佳，但社区缺乏对其是否真正理解物理世界还是仅凭猜测作答的系统性科学分析，亟需一种能够诊断模型推理忠实度和置信度可靠性的标准化评估范式。
AI.method: 提出NICE和FACT双诊断范式：FACT显式分解运动学物理的定量推理，分别诊断视觉保真度、物理法则理解和时间接地能力；NICE提出基于邻域信息的新校准方法及相关评估指标，用于评估和校准模型置信度的可靠性。
AI.result: 在6个最新SOTA视觉语言模型上的实验表明，当前VLMs无法可靠地识别视觉前置条件，也无法运用必要的物理定律来推导正确答案，暴露出模型在物理推理中的根本性缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了一种标准化的诊断范式，为开发忠实且具备物理基础理解的视觉语言模型提供了指导方向，强调了模型在物理推理中需要满足视觉保真度和物理定律运用的双重可靠性要求。

title: TAD: Temporal-Aware Trajectory Self-Distillation for Fast and Accurate Diffusion LLM
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer a promising paradigm for parallel text generation, but in practice they face an accuracy-parallelism trade-off, where increasing tokens per forward (TPF) often degrades generation quality. Existing acceleration methods often gain speed at the cost of accuracy. To address this limitation, we propose TAD, a Temporal-Aware trajectory self-Distillation framework. During data construction, we condition a teacher model on both the prompt and the ground-truth response to generate decoding trajectories, recording the intermediate masked states throughout the process. Based on how many decoding steps remain before each masked token is revealed, we partition masked positions into near and distant subsets. For near tokens, we train the student with a hard cross-entropy loss using the teacher trajectory tokens as labels, encouraging confident predictions for tokens that are about to be decoded. For distant tokens, we apply a soft KL divergence loss between the teacher and student token distributions, providing softer supervision and preserving future planning knowledge. This temporal-aware partition naturally gives rise to two deployment configurations: a Quality model that prioritizes accuracy and a Speed model that favors more aggressive acceleration. Experiments show that TAD consistently improves the accuracy-parallelism trade-off. On LLaDA, it raises average accuracy from 46.2\% to 51.6\% with the Quality model and average AUP from 46.2 to 257.1 with the Speed model. Our code is available at: https://github.com/BHmingyang/TAD

AI.tldr: 提出TAD（时序感知轨迹自蒸馏）框架，通过将解码轨迹中的掩码位置按剩余解码步数划分为近端和远端子集，并分别施加硬交叉熵损失和软KL散度损失，有效改善了扩散语言模型在并行文本生成中的精度-并行性权衡。
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLM）在并行文本生成中面临精度与并行性之间的权衡问题：每个前向过程生成的token数（TPF）增加时，生成质量会显著下降。现有加速方法通常以提高速度为代价换取精度损失，缺乏在保持生成质量的同时实现并行加速的有效手段。
AI.method: 提出时序感知轨迹自蒸馏（TAD）框架。在数据构建阶段，教师模型以提示和真实响应为条件生成解码轨迹，记录中间掩码状态；根据每个掩码token被揭示前剩余的解码步数，将掩码位置划分为近端子集和远端子集；对近端token使用教师轨迹token作为标签的硬交叉熵损失，鼓励对于即将解码的token做出自信预测；对远端token则使用教师与学生token分布之间的软KL散度损失，提供更柔和的监督以保留未来规划知识；该划分自然衍生出两种部署配置：优先精度的Quality模型和偏好激进加速的Speed模型。
AI.result: 在LLaDA模型上，Quality模型将平均准确率从46.2%提升至51.6%，Speed模型将平均AUP从46.2提升至257.1。实验结果表明TAD能够持续改善精度-并行性权衡曲线。
AI.conclusion: TAD框架通过时序感知的自蒸馏策略，在不牺牲推理速度的前提下显著提升了扩散语言模型的生成质量，并提供了按需切换精度与速度的灵活部署方案，为扩散式文本生成的实际应用开辟了新路径。

title: Value-Decomposed Reinforcement Learning Framework for Taxiway Routing with Hierarchical Conflict-Aware Observations
summary: Taxiway routing and on-surface conflict avoidance are coupled safety-critical decision problems in airport surface operations. Existing planning and optimization methods are often limited by online computational cost, while reinforcement learning methods may struggle to represent downstream traffic conflicts and balance multiple objectives. This paper presents Conflict-aware Taxiway Routing (CaTR), a reinforcement learning framework for real-time multi-aircraft taxiway routing. CaTR constructs a grid-based airport surface environment with action masking, introduces a hierarchical foresight traffic representation to encode current and downstream conflict-related traffic conditions, and adopts a value-decomposed reinforcement learning strategy to prioritize sparse but safety-critical objectives. Experiments are conducted on a realistic environment based on Changsha Huanghua International Airport under multiple traffic density levels. Results show that CaTR achieves better safety--efficiency trade-offs than representative planning, optimization, and reinforcement learning baselines while maintaining practical runtime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出冲突感知滑行路径规划（CaTR），一种基于强化学习的实时多航空器滑行路径规划框架。CaTR通过构建网格化机场表面环境、引入分层前瞻交通表征和值分解强化学习策略，在安全-效率权衡上优于传统规划、优化和强化学习基线方法，并保持实际可用运行时间。
AI.motivation: 现有滑行路径规划与优化方法受限于在线计算成本，而强化学习方法难以有效表征下游交通冲突信息及平衡多优化目标，导致安全关键决策与效率之间的权衡不足。
AI.method: CaTR构建基于网格的机场表面环境并采用动作掩码机制；提出分层前瞻交通表征以编码当前及下游冲突相关交通状态；采用值分解强化学习策略，优先优化稀疏但安全关键的奖励目标。
AI.result: 在基于长沙黄花国际机场真实场景的多交通密度级别实验中，CaTR在安全-效率权衡方面优于代表性规划、优化及强化学习基线方法，同时保持实际可用的运行时性能。
AI.conclusion: CaTR验证了结合分层前瞻交通表征与值分解强化学习可有效提升滑行路径规划中的冲突避免能力与多目标平衡性，为机场场面实时安全决策提供了可行方案。

title: CapCLIP: A Vision-Language Representation Alignment Approach for Wireless Capsule Endoscopy Analysis
summary: Wireless capsule endoscopy (WCE) enables non-invasive visual assessment of the small bowel, but its clinical utility is constrained by the large volume of frames generated per examination and the difficulty of recognising subtle abnormalities under highly variable imaging conditions. Existing learning-based approaches for WCE are predominantly vision-only, often confined to narrow pathology sets, and show limited transfer across datasets and centres. To address these limitations, this study introduces CapCLIP, a domain-specific vision-language representation learning framework for WCE. CapCLIP aligns capsule endoscopy frames with clinically grounded textual descriptions derived from standardised nomenclature and pathology-aware caption templates, thereby learning embeddings that are both semantically informed and transferable. The proposed framework is evaluated against relevant open-source vision and vision-language foundation models under strict zero-shot conditions using unseen WCE datasets. Evaluation covers three downstream tasks: K-nearest neighbour classification, CLIP-style image-text classification, and text-to-image retrieval. Across these settings, CapCLIP consistently outperforms the compared baselines, with particularly strong gains in zero-shot image-text classification and cross-modal retrieval on out-of-distribution datasets. The results indicate that language-guided representation learning can improve both generalisation and semantic interpretability in WCE analysis. These findings position CapCLIP as a step toward foundation models tailored to capsule endoscopy and support the use of language-grounded WCE analysis.

AI.tldr: CapCLIP是一个面向无线胶囊内镜的领域特定视觉-语言表征学习框架，通过将内镜图像与标准化临床文本描述对齐，在零样本设置下显著优于现有视觉及视觉-语言基础模型，提升了WCE分析的泛化能力和语义可解释性。
AI.motivation: 无线胶囊内镜（WCE）产生的海量帧数据以及高度变化的成像条件使得异常识别极具挑战；现有基于学习的方法多为纯视觉模型，病理覆盖范围狭窄且在跨数据集与跨中心的迁移中表现有限，缺乏可泛化的语义引导表征。
AI.method: CapCLIP采用视觉-语言表征学习框架，将胶囊内镜帧与基于标准化命名法和病理感知字幕模板生成的临床文本描述进行对齐，学习语义信息丰富且具有迁移能力的嵌入表示；评估采用严格零样本设置，涵盖K近邻分类、CLIP式图文分类和文本到图像检索三项下游任务。
AI.result: 在零样本图像-文本分类和跨模态检索任务中，CapCLIP在未见过的WCE数据集上持续且显著优于现有开源视觉及视觉-语言基础模型，尤其在分布外数据集上展现出强劲的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 语言引导的表征学习能够有效提升WCE分析的泛化能力与语义可解释性；CapCLIP是迈向专用于胶囊内镜的基础模型的重要一步，支持语言驱动的WCE分析范式。

title: TacoMAS: Test-Time Co-Evolution of Topology and Capability in LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) have emerged as a promising paradigm for solving complex tasks. Recent work has explored self-evolving MAS that automatically optimize agent capabilities or communication topologies. However, existing methods either learn a topology that remains fixed at inference time or adapt only the topology or capability during inference. We empirically and theoretically show that effective test-time evolution requires jointly adapting both axes, but on different time scales: capabilities should update rapidly to handle emerging subtasks, while the topology should evolve more slowly to preserve coordination stability. We then introduce TacoMAS, a test-time co-evolution framework for dynamic MAS. TacoMAS formulates MAS inference as a task of online graph adaptation, where nodes represent agents with role-specific capabilities and edges define their communication topology. During inference, a fast capability loop updates agent expertise using trajectory-level feedback, while a slow meta-LLM-driven topology loop performs agents' birth-death operations on MAS, including edge edit, agent addition, and agent removal. We further show that this fast-slow design drives MAS evolution toward a task-conditioned stable equilibrium. Experiments on four benchmarks demonstrate that TacoMAS outperforms nearly 20 multi-agent baselines, achieving an average improvement of 13.3% over the strongest baseline. The codes are released at https://github.com/chenxu2-gif/TacoMAS-MultiAgent.

AI.tldr: 提出了TacoMAS，一种测试时协同演化框架，在推理过程中通过快慢双循环分别更新智能体能力和通信拓扑，使得多智能体系统能够动态适应任务变化，在四个基准测试上平均超越最强基线13.3%。
AI.motivation: 现有自演化多智能体系统在推理时要么保持拓扑固定不变，要么仅单独调整拓扑或能力，缺乏在测试阶段同时对两者进行适应性演化的能力。本文从理论与实验上证明，有效的测试时演化需要联合调整能力与拓扑，且两者应在不同时间尺度上进行。
AI.method: TacoMAS将多智能体系统推理建模为在线图自适应问题：节点代表具有角色特定能力的智能体，边定义通信拓扑。框架包含一个快速能力循环，利用轨迹级反馈快速更新智能体专业技能；以及一个慢速元LLM驱动拓扑循环，执行智能体的出生-死亡操作（包括边编辑、智能体添加与删除），形成快-慢双环协同演化机制。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试上与近20种多智能体基线方法进行对比，TacoMAS全面超越所有基线，平均性能比最强基线提升13.3%。
AI.conclusion: 快-慢双循环设计能够将多智能体系统演化引导至任务条件下的稳定均衡态，表明测试时动态联合优化能力与拓扑是提升多智能体系统泛化性和适应性的有效范式。

title: EvoMAS: Learning Execution-Time Workflows for Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems have shown strong potential on complex tasks through agent specialization, tool use, and collaborative reasoning. However, most automated multi-agent system design methods still follow a one-shot paradigm: a workflow is optimized or selected before execution and then reused unchanged throughout the task. This static coordination strategy is ill-suited for long-horizon tasks whose subgoals, intermediate evidence, and information needs evolve over multiple execution stages. We propose EvoMAS, a framework for execution-time multi-agent workflow construction. EvoMAS formulates workflow construction as a meta-level sequential decision problem along a single task trajectory. At each stage, it constructs an explicit task state through a Planner-Evaluator-Updater pipeline and uses a learned Workflow Adapter to instantiate a stage-specific layered workflow from a fixed pool of candidate agents. The adapter is trained with policy gradients using sparse, verifiable terminal task success as the main supervision signal, while evaluator-based process reward is analyzed separately under very-hard sparse-reward settings. Experiments on GAIA, HLE, and DeepResearcher show that EvoMAS outperforms single-agent baselines and recent automated multi-agent workflow design methods. Our analyses further show that explicit task-state construction and learned workflow adaptation provide complementary benefits. Additional results indicate that process reward is most useful when terminal success is extremely sparse, and qualitative case studies illustrate that EvoMAS adapts agent coordination as the task state evolves.

AI.tldr: EvoMAS提出了一种执行时多智能体工作流构建框架，将工作流构造建模为沿任务轨迹的元级序贯决策问题，通过显式任务状态构建和可学习的工作流适配器动态调整智能体协作策略，在GAIA、HLE和DeepResearcher等基准上优于单智能体基线和现有的自动化多智能体工作流设计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统设计方法大多采用一次性（one-shot）范式，即工作流在执行前被优化或选定，然后在整个任务过程中保持不变；这种静态协调策略不适用于子目标、中间证据和信息需求随执行阶段动态演变的长时间跨度任务，亟需一种能够执行时自适应构建多智能体工作流的框架。
AI.method: EvoMAS将工作流构建形式化为沿单条任务轨迹的元级序贯决策问题；在每个阶段，通过Planner-Evaluator-Updater流水线构建显式的任务状态，并利用训练好的Workflow Adapter从固定候选智能体池中实例化一个阶段特定的分层工作流；该适配器使用策略梯度进行训练，以稀疏、可验证的终端任务成功作为主要监督信号，并在极稀疏奖励设置下单独分析基于评估器的过程奖励。
AI.result: 在GAIA、HLE和DeepResearcher基准上的实验表明，EvoMAS优于单智能体基线和现有的自动化多智能体工作流设计方法；分析显示，显式任务状态构建与可学习的工作流自适应提供了互补的收益；此外，过程奖励在终端成功信号极其稀疏时最为有用，定性案例研究展示了EvoMAS能够随任务状态演化动态调整智能体协调方式。
AI.conclusion: EvoMAS证明了执行时动态构建多智能体工作流相较于静态一次性设计的有效性，显式任务状态构建与可学习工作流适配的互补结合是提升长时间跨度任务性能的关键，而过程奖励在极稀疏奖励场景下具有显著价值，为自适应多智能体协作提供了新的范式。

title: ZAYA1-VL-8B Technical Report
summary: We present ZAYA1-VL-8B, a compact mixture-of-experts vision-language model built upon our in-house language model, ZAYA1-8B. Despite its compact size, ZAYA1-VL achieves performance competitive with leading base models such as Molmo2-4B and InternVL3.5-4B, while surpassing models including Qwen2.5-VL-3B, PLM-3B, and MolmoE-1B across a range of image understanding, reasoning, and counting benchmarks. The architecture incorporates two key innovations: (1) vision-specific LoRA adapters integrated into the LLM to increase modality-specific capacity without increasing the number of experts, and (2) bidirectional attention over image tokens within the LLM to enhance visual understanding. We detail the full training pipeline including data composition at each stage, sequence packing, and the attention masking scheme. The model comprises 9.2B total parameters, with 1.4B active parameters including the vision encoder, and is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/Zyphra/ZAYA1-VL.

AI.tldr: ZAYA1-VL-8B 是一个紧凑的混合专家视觉语言模型，基于自研语言模型 ZAYA1-8B 构建，总参数量 9.2B 但仅 1.4B 活跃参数，通过视觉专用 LoRA 适配器和图像 token 的双向注意力机制两项核心创新，在多项图像理解和推理基准上达到与 Molmo2-4B、InternVL3.5-4B 等领先模型竞争的水平，并超越 Qwen2.5-VL-3B、PLM-3B 和 MolmoE-1B 等模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型往往在模型规模与性能之间难以取得良好平衡，大尺寸模型推理成本高，而紧凑模型往往在理解与推理能力上存在明显不足；本研究旨在通过架构创新在保持紧凑模型规模的同时获得具有竞争力的视觉语言理解性能。
AI.method: 模型架构基于混合专家（MoE）框架，核心包含两项创新：一是在 LLM 中集成视觉专用的 LoRA 适配器，在不增加专家数量的前提下提升模态特定容量；二是在 LLM 内部对图像 token 采用双向注意力机制以增强视觉理解能力。训练流程详细描述了各阶段的数据组成、序列打包策略以及注意力掩码方案。
AI.result: ZAYA1-VL-8B 总参数量 9.2B，活跃参数仅 1.4B（含视觉编码器），在图像理解、推理和计数等多个基准测试上性能与 Molmo2-4B、InternVL3.5-4B 等领先基础模型相当，并超越 Qwen2.5-VL-3B、PLM-3B 和 MolmoE-1B 等模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过视觉专用 LoRA 适配器和图像 token 双向注意力等针对性架构设计，紧凑型 MoE 视觉语言模型可以在极低的活跃参数量下达到与更大规模模型竞争的性能水平，为高效视觉语言模型的实用化部署提供了可行方向。

title: Statistical Scouting Finds Debate-Safe but Not Debate-Useful Cases: A Matched-Ceiling Study of Open-Weight LLM Reasoning Protocols
summary:
When should a language model answer directly, sample and vote, or engage in multi-agent debate? Recent work shows voting often explains much of the gain attributed to debate, while selective-debate systems activate deliberation only on uncertain examples. We ask: under a matched ceiling on generated tokens (960 per example), how much per-example routing headroom exists, and how much is recoverable from cheap pre-deliberation signals?
  We evaluate greedy decoding, three-sample voting, and a two-agent critique-revise debate on MuSiQue and GSM8K using Llama 3.1 8B Instruct and Ministral 3 8B Instruct. On MuSiQue, an oracle selecting the correct protocol per example gains +14.0 and +13.7 pp over the best fixed one. The best fixed protocol is model- and dataset-dependent: each (model, dataset) cell has a different winner.
  This headroom is hard to recover from cheap ex-ante signals. A vote-entropy threshold is the only controller that directionally beats the best fixed protocol on both models (+1.3 and +1.7 pp), though individual paired-bootstrap CIs include zero. A joint analysis (meta-analysis +1.6 pp, p=0.125; Bayesian P(both>0)=0.59) is directionally consistent but not significant. Learned controllers (LR, GBT) do not outperform the threshold.
  The key finding is structural: vote entropy predicts where debate is safe, not where debate is needed. High entropy sharply reduces debate backfire, but 66% of debate-helpful examples (31/47) occur when voting is unanimous but wrong. A single-prompt self-critique probe on Llama flips the answer in 127/127 unanimous cases, yielding zero mutual information with the debate-helpful label; we cannot rule out a prompt-compliance artifact, but either interpretation disqualifies the probe as a router. Recovering the remaining headroom requires behavioral probes that avoid format-compliance confounds at the 8B scale.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在固定生成token预算下，语言模型回答策略（直接生成、投票、多智能体辩论）之间的路由空间有多大，以及能否通过廉价信号恢复该空间。关键发现是投票熵阈值能部分安全导向辩论，但大部分辩论有益的案例发生在投票一致但错误的情况下，廉价信号难以有效恢复路由空间。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明投票能解释辩论的大部分收益，而选择性辩论系统仅在不确定示例上激活深思。本文旨在探究在匹配的生成token上限约束下，每个示例的最佳策略路由空间有多大，以及能否通过廉价的预深思信号（如投票熵、学习型控制器）恢复该路由空间。
AI.method: 使用Llama 3.1 8B Instruct和Ministral 3 8B Instruct，在MuSiQue和GSM8K上对比贪婪解码、三样本投票和两智能体批评-修订辩论三种协议；构建oracle路由上界评估路由空间；使用投票熵阈值、逻辑回归和梯度提升树作为控制器尝试恢复路由。
AI.result: MuSiQue上oracle路由比最佳固定协议高+14.0和+13.7个百分点，最佳固定协议因模型和数据集而异。投票熵阈值是唯一方向性优于最佳固定协议的控制器（+1.3和+1.7 pp），但统计不显著。关键发现：66%的辩论有益示例发生在投票一致但错误时，单个提示自我批评探针在127/127的一致案例中翻转答案，但与辩论有益标签的互信息为零。
AI.conclusion: 投票熵的结构性角色是标识辩论安全区域而非辩论需要区域；高熵减少辩论反效果，但多数辩论有益案例发生在低熵（一致但错误）情形。廉价信号难以有效恢复路由空间，恢复剩余空间需要避免格式遵从混杂的行为探针。

title: Not All Turns Matter: Credit Assignment for Multi-Turn Jailbreaking
summary: Deploying LLMs in multi-turn dialogues facilitates jailbreak attacks that distribute harmful intent across seemingly benign turns. Recent training-based multi-turn jailbreak methods learn long-horizon attack strategies from interaction feedback, but often rely on coarse trajectory-level outcome signals that broadcast uniformly to every turn. However, we find that turn-level contributions in multi-turn jailbreaking are non-uniform, phase-dependent, and target-specific. Such coarse outcome supervision induces a credit assignment problem, leading to over-rewarding redundant turns in successful trajectories and under-crediting useful intermediate turns in failed ones. To address this, we propose TRACE, a turn-aware credit assignment framework for reinforcement learning (RL)-based multi-turn jailbreaking. For successful trajectories, TRACE estimates turn-level contributions via leave-one-turn-out semantic masking; for failed ones, TRACE assigns penalties based on prompt harmfulness and semantic relevance, with an additional local refusal-aware penalty. Furthermore, we reuse the attack-side credit signal for multi-turn defense alignment. Extensive experiments on open-source and closed-source targets show that TRACE achieves strong overall performance in effectiveness, transferability, and efficiency, yielding about a 25% relative improvement in attack success rate over the strongest RL baseline while also improving the safety-utility balance when reused for defense alignment.

AI.tldr: TRACE是一个基于强化学习的多轮对话越狱攻击框架，通过回合级信用分配机制解决轨迹级粗粒度奖励带来的信用分配问题，在攻击成功率上相比最强RL基线提升约25%，同时其信用信号可复用用于多轮防御对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有基于训练的多轮越狱方法依赖轨迹级的粗粒度结果信号对所有回合进行统一奖励，但多轮越狱中各回合的贡献是非均匀、阶段性且目标相关的，这种粗粒度监督导致信用分配问题：成功轨迹中冗余回合被过度奖励，失败轨迹中有用的中间回合被低估。
AI.method: 提出TRACE框架，一种面向回合级的信用分配强化学习方法。对于成功轨迹，通过留一回合语义遮罩估计各回合贡献；对于失败轨迹，基于提示有害性和语义相关性分配惩罚，并额外引入局部拒绝感知惩罚。同时将攻击侧的信用信号复用于多轮防御对齐。
AI.result: 在开源和闭源目标上的大量实验表明，TRACE在有效性、可迁移性和效率方面均表现优异，相对于最强RL基线，攻击成功率提升约25%；当信用信号复用于防御对齐时，还能改善安全性与有用性的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 回合级信用分配能够有效解决多轮越狱中的信用分配问题，提升攻击效率和成功率；攻击侧的信用信号可作为有价值的辅助信息用于防御对齐，实现安全性与有用性的更好权衡。

title: Enhancing Consistency Models for Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction
summary: Diffusion models for multi-agent trajectory prediction are limited by iterative denoising, which causes inference latency that hinders their use in time-critical settings like autonomous driving. Fast-sampling variants using DDIM and informed initial noise distributions partially alleviate this issue, but they either fail to achieve true single-step generation or are constrained by the chosen noise distribution. Consistency Models (CMs) offer high-quality one-step generation by mapping noise directly to data, but are difficult to train from scratch . We propose ECTraj, an enhanced CM pipeline with improved training and conditional generation for trajectory prediction. Our framework extends the student-teacher consistency training scheme: the student produces standard outputs, while the teacher explicitly fuses its predictions with parts of the ground truth to give stronger supervision. We also exploit CMs' direct denoising for top-K multi-shot generation during training. Combining conditional generation with this enhanced consistency objective yields faster inference and improved prediction accuracy, establishing competitive new benchmarks on the large-scale Argoverse 2 dataset.

AI.tldr: ECTraj提出了一种增强的一致性模型（CM）训练框架，通过改进的师生一致性训练和条件生成策略，实现多智能体轨迹预测的单步高质量生成，在Argoverse 2数据集上取得了竞争性的新基准。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在多智能体轨迹预测中因迭代去噪导致推理延迟，难以用于自动驾驶等实时场景；现有快速采样变体（如DDIM）无法实现真正的单步生成，而一致性模型（CM）虽能实现单步生成但难以从头训练。
AI.method: ECTraj扩展了师生一致性训练框架：学生模型生成标准输出，教师模型则将自身预测与真实轨迹的部分信息显式融合以提供更强监督；同时利用CM的直接去噪特性在训练过程中进行Top-K多样本生成，将条件生成与增强的一致性目标结合。
AI.result: 在大型Argoverse 2数据集上的实验表明，ECTraj在实现更快推理速度的同时提升了预测精度，建立了竞争性的新基准。
AI.conclusion: 将增强的一致性训练目标与条件生成相结合，能够有效解决扩散模型在轨迹预测中的推理延迟问题，实现单步高质量生成，为时间敏感型自动驾驶场景提供了可行的解决方案。

title: cantnlp@DravidianLangTech 2026: organic domain adaptation improves multi-class hope speech detection in Tulu
comment: Accepted to Sixth Workshop on Speech, Vision, and Language Technologies for Dravidian Languages (DravidianLangTech-2026)
summary: This paper presents our systems and results for the Hope Speech Detection in Code-Mixed Tulu Language shared task at the Sixth Workshop on Speech, Vision, and Language Technologies for Dravidian Languages (DravidianLangTech-2026). We trained an XLM-RoBERTa-based text classification system for detecting hope speech in code-mixed Tulu social media comments. We compared this organically adapted hope speech detection model with our baseline model. On the development set, the organically adapted model outperformed the baseline system. While our submitted systems performed more modestly on the official test set, these results suggest that further adapting XLM-RoBERTa on organically collected Tulu social media text containing code-mixed and mixed-script variation can improve hope speech detection in code-mixed Tulu.

AI.tldr: 本文针对代码混合图卢语中的希望言论检测任务，基于XLM-RoBERTa构建文本分类系统，通过在有机收集的混合语料上进一步自适应微调，在开发集上优于基线模型，表明领域自适应预训练对低资源代码混合语言情感检测的有效性。
AI.motivation: 代码混合图卢语是一种低资源语言，社交媒评论中常出现代码混合与混合文字变体，现有希望言论检测模型在该场景下表现有限，缺乏针对该语言特色的领域自适应方法。
AI.method: 基于XLM-RoBERTa的文本分类模型，采用两种训练策略：基线模型直接微调，以及有机自适应模型——先在有机收集的包含代码混合与混合文字变体的图卢语社交媒体文本上进一步预训练，再在目标任务上微调。
AI.result: 在开发集上，有机自适应模型优于基线模型；在官方测试集上，提交系统的表现较为一般，但仍显示出领域自适应策略的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 进一步在有机收集的代码混合与混合文字图卢语社交媒体文本上自适应XLM-RoBERTa能够提升希望言论检测性能，表明领域自适应预训练对低资源代码混合语言情感检测任务具有积极意义。

title: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall: Can VLM Agents Tell Who They Are at All?
summary: In the animal kingdom, mirror self-recognition is a canonical probe of higher-order cognition, emerging only in some species. We ask whether an analogous functional capability emerges in embodied vision-language model (VLM) agents: can they recognize themselves in a mirror? We introduce a controlled 3D benchmark where a first-person VLM agent must infer a hidden body attribute from its reflection and select the matching target, while avoiding self-other misattribution. To separate mirror-grounded self-identification from shortcuts, we test mirror removal, misleading cues, and occluded reflections. We also evaluate the decision process through mirror seeking, temporal ordering, self-attribution, and reasoning-action consistency. Our experiments show that mirror-based self-identification emerges mainly in stronger VLMs. These models can use reflected evidence for action, whereas weaker models often inspect the mirror but fail to extract self-relevant information or misattribute their reflection. Language-vision conflict further shows that self-referential language alone is not evidence of grounded self-identification. Overall, mirror-based evaluation provides a diagnostic for whether embodied self-grounding is causally rooted in perception and action rather than priors, prompt compliance, or confabulation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个受动物镜像自我认知启发的3D基准测试，用于评估具身视觉-语言模型（VLM）代理是否具备基于镜像的自我识别能力，实验表明更强的VLM能够从镜像中提取自我相关信息并指导行动，而弱模型则存在误归因或无法利用反射信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 受动物界中镜像自我识别作为高阶认知经典探针的启发，本文旨在探究具身视觉-语言模型（VLM）代理是否具备类似的功能能力——即能否在镜像中识别自身，从而弥补现有研究中缺乏对具身智能体自我感知与自我归因能力系统评估的空白。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个受控3D基准环境，要求第一人称VLM代理通过自身镜像推断隐藏的身体属性并选择匹配目标，同时避免自我-他人误归因；为排除捷径，设置了镜像移除、误导性线索和遮挡反射等对照实验，并通过镜像寻求、时间顺序、自我归因和推理-行动一致性来评估决策过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于镜像的自我识别能力主要出现在更强的VLM中，这些模型能够利用反射证据指导行动；而较弱的VLM虽会观察镜子，却未能提取自我相关信息或存在误归因；语言-视觉冲突进一步证实，自我指涉语言本身并不构成具身自我识别的充分证据。
AI.conclusion: 镜像自我识别评估提供了一种诊断手段，用于判断具身自我归因是否真正根植于感知与行动因果链中，而非依赖于先验知识、提示遵从或虚假生成，揭示出自回归语言先验与具身视觉-动作耦合之间的关键差异。

title: PromptDx: Differentiable Prompt Tuning for Multimodal In-Context Alzheimer's Diagnosis
summary: Deep learning models in medical imaging typically operate as parametric memory, diagnosing patients by recalling fixed knowledge learned during training. This contrasts sharply with clinical practice, where physicians employ analogical reasoning to diagnose new cases by referencing similar records from past exemplars. While In-Context Learning (ICL) frameworks such as Tabular Prior-Fitted Networks (TabPFN) offer a promising diagnosis-by-reference paradigm, they are designed with tabular-specific inductive priors and rely on non-differentiable preprocessing pipelines, leading to manifold mismatch and gradient fracture when applied to heterogeneous multimodal data. To address these limitations, we propose PromptDx, a novel diagnosis-by-reference framework that leverages a pre-trained TabPFN as an ICL engine while enabling seamless integration with multimodal representations. Our core contribution is a Differentiable Prompt Tuning (DPT) mechanism that aligns a Masked Multimodal Modeling module with the pre-trained ICL engine. By training a lightweight adapter as a differentiable surrogate for the engine's non-differentiable preprocessors, we enable an end-to-end optimization of multimodal prompts within the ICL paradigm. We validate our method on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset using 3D MRI and tabular biomarkers. Experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms traditional parametric baselines. Notably, our method achieves superior performance using only 1% context samples compared to 30% in standard ICL, demonstrating exceptional manifold condensation ability. We further validate the generalizability of our DPT framework across six tabular datasets with diverse scales. Overall, our method offers a more data-efficient and clinically aligned paradigm for Alzheimer's Disease diagnosis.

AI.tldr: PromptDx 提出了一种基于 TabPFN 的诊断-参考框架，通过可微提示调优（DPT）机制对齐多模态表示，在 ADNI 数据集上仅用 1% 的上下文样本即可超越传统参数化方法，实现了更数据高效且符合临床推理范式的阿尔茨海默病诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习医学影像模型采用参数化记忆范式，与临床医生基于类比推理的诊断方式存在本质差异。尽管 TabPFN 等上下文学习（ICL）框架提供了诊断-参考的新范式，但其固有的表格归纳偏置和非可微预处理流程导致在处理异质多模态数据时出现流形失配和梯度断裂问题，亟需一种能无缝集成多模态表示的 ICL 诊断框架。
AI.method: 本文提出 PromptDx 框架，核心是可微提示调优（DPT）机制：利用预训练的 TabPFN 作为 ICL 引擎，通过轻量级适配器作为引擎非可微预处理器的可微分替代，实现端到端优化；同时结合掩码多模态建模模块，将多模态表示对齐到 ICL 引擎中，从而在 ICL 范式下实现多模态提示的联合优化。
AI.result: 在 ADNI 数据集（3D MRI 和表格生物标志物）上的实验表明，PromptDx 优于传统参数化基线方法；仅使用 1% 的上下文样本即可达到标准 ICL 方法需要 30% 样本时的性能，展现出卓越的流形压缩能力。此外，在六个不同规模的表格数据集上验证了 DPT 框架的泛化性。
AI.conclusion: PromptDx 提供了一种更数据高效且更符合临床实践的阿尔茨海默病诊断范式，弥合了参数化记忆与类比推理之间的鸿沟，为多模态医学影像的 ICL 应用提供了新方向。

title: Pseudo-Deliberation in Language Models: When Reasoning Fails to Align Values and Actions
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are often evaluated based on their stated values, yet these do not reliably translate into their actions, a discrepancy termed "value-action gap." In this work, we argue that this gap persists even under explicit reasoning, revealing a deeper failure mode we call "Pseudo-Deliberation": the appearance of principled reasoning without corresponding behavioral alignment. To study this systematically, we introduce VALDI, a framework for measuring alignment between stated values and generated dialogue. VALDI includes 4,941 human-centered scenarios across five domains, three tasks that elicit value articulation, reasoning, and action, and five metrics for quantifying value adherence. Across both proprietary and open-source LLMs, we observe consistent misalignment between expressed values and downstream dialogues. To investigate intervention strategies, we propose VIVALDI, a multi-agent value auditor that intervenes at different stages of generation.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大型语言模型中价值观与行为之间存在的"价值-行动差距"，提出"伪 deliberative 推理"这一深层失败模式，并设计了VALDI框架来量化价值观对齐，以及VIVALDI多智能体审计系统进行干预。
AI.motivation: 现有评估LLM价值观的方法往往仅关注模型陈述的价值观，但模型实际生成对话中的行为与其宣称的价值观之间存在系统性偏差，这种"价值-行动差距"即使在显式推理条件下依然存在，论文将其定义为"伪 deliberative 推理"——即表面上有原则的推理而行为上并未对齐的深层失败模式。
AI.method: 论文提出VALDI（价值观对齐测量框架），包含4,941个人类中心场景，覆盖五个领域；设计了三类任务分别用于引发价值观表达、推理过程和实际行动；并定义了五个量化指标用于衡量价值观一致性。同时提出VIVALDI，一个多智能体价值观审计系统，可在生成的不同阶段进行干预。
AI.result: 在多个闭源和开源LLM上的实验表明，模型在表达的价值观与实际生成对话之间存在持续且一致的错位现象，验证了"伪 deliberative 推理"的普遍存在。
AI.conclusion: 本工作系统性地定义并量化了LLM中的价值-行动差距，揭示了仅靠显式推理无法解决的对齐问题，为后续价值观对齐研究提供了标准化的评估框架和干预策略。

title: When Agents Overtrust Environmental Evidence: An Extensible Agentic Framework for Benchmarking Evidence-Grounding Defects in LLM Agents
summary:
Large language model agents increasingly operate through environment-facing scaffolds that expose files, web pages, APIs, and logs. These observations influence tool use, state tracking, and action sequencing, yet their reliability and authority are often uncertain. Environmental grounding is therefore a systems-level problem involving context admission, evidence provenance, freshness checking, verification policy, action gating, and model reasoning. Existing agent benchmarks mainly evaluate task capability or specific attacks such as prompt injection and memory poisoning, but they under-specify a fundamental reliability question: whether agents remain grounded in the true environment state when observations are stale, incorrect, or malicious.
  We introduce EnvTrustBench, an agentic framework for benchmarking this failure mode. We define an evidence-grounding defect (EGD) as a behavioral failure in which an agent treats an environment-facing claim as sufficient evidence for action without resolving it against available current evidence, leading to a task-incorrect false path under the true environment state. Given a task scenario, EnvTrustBench generates the workspace, environment, agent-facing objective, and validation oracle, executes the evaluated agent, records its action-observation trajectory and final state, and applies the oracle to produce a verdict.
  Using 6 LLM backbones and 5 widely used scaffolds, we evaluate 55 generated cases across 11 task scenarios, with each scenario expanded through five feedback-guided generation iterations. Results show that EGDs consistently emerge across operational workflows, highlighting environmental grounding as a core agent reliability problem with important security implications.

AI.tldr: EnvTrustBench 是一个用于评估大语言模型智能体在环境观测陈旧、错误或恶意时是否仍能保持环境接地性的基准框架，实验表明证据接地缺陷在多种工作流中普遍存在，揭示了环境接地性是智能体可靠性的核心问题。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准主要评估任务执行能力或特定攻击（如提示注入、记忆投毒），但忽略了一个根本性可靠问题：当观测信息过时、错误或被篡改时，智能体是否仍能基于真实环境状态保持接地。智能体面临的环境观测在可靠性上往往不确定，但缺乏系统性的基准来评估这种故障模式。
AI.method: 提出 EnvTrustBench 框架，定义证据接地缺陷（EGD）为智能体将环境面声明视为充分证据而不对照当前可用证据进行核实、导致在真实环境下走向错误路径的行为失败。框架为给定任务场景生成工作空间、环境、智能体目标和验证预言机，执行智能体并记录动作-观测轨迹与最终状态，由预言机给出判定。使用 6 种 LLM 骨干和 5 种广泛使用的脚手架，在 11 个任务场景上生成 55 个测试案例，每个场景通过 5 轮反馈引导生成迭代扩展。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，证据接地缺陷（EGD）在不同操作流程中一致出现，所有受测的 LLM 骨干和脚手架组合均未能完全避免此类故障，说明环境接地性是跨模型和架构的普遍可靠性问题。
AI.conclusion: 环境接地性应被视作智能体系统的核心可靠性问题，而非仅是安全攻击的特例；证据接地缺陷具有重要的安全含义，现有智能体系统在面对不可靠环境观测时缺乏有效的验证与门控机制，需要系统级的上下文准入、证据溯源、新鲜度检查、验证策略和动作门控等设计来加以解决。

title: Beyond Toy Benchmarks: A Systematic Evaluation of OOD Detection Methods For Plant Pathology Classification
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential for reliable deployment of deep learning systems, yet the majority of existing methods are evaluated on small, visually homogeneous benchmarks. In this work, we study six OOD detection methods spanning post-hoc scoring, auxiliary objectives, energy-based models, and constrained optimization on the Plant Pathology 2021 dataset, a fine-grained task with natural distribution shifts. Energy-based fine-tuning performs best across OOD settings, improving detection over the softmax baseline while preserving in-distribution accuracy. Analysis shows these gains stem from both a restructuring of the embedding space alongside calibration of the scoring function. We further document practical training instabilities that arise when scaling constrained optimization methods to moderate-sized datasets, findings that are largely absent from existing literature. Our results demonstrate that principled OOD detection is achievable on real-world domain-specific data and that benchmark evaluations alone may not capture the challenges that emerge in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文在Plant Pathology 2021细粒度数据集上系统评估了六种OOD检测方法，发现基于能量的微调在检测性能和分布内精度保持上均优于softmax基线，并揭示了约束优化方法在中等规模数据集上的训练不稳定性等实践挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法大多在小规模、视觉同质的数据集上评估，缺乏在真实世界细粒度任务及自然分布偏移场景下的系统研究，因此该工作旨在填补这一评估空白并探索OOD检测在领域特定数据上的实际可行性。
AI.method: 研究人员选择了六种代表性OOD检测方法，涵盖后处理评分、辅助目标、基于能量的模型和约束优化四类范式，并在Plant Pathology 2021细粒度分类数据集上进行实验，系统比较各方法在自然分布偏移下的检测表现。
AI.result: 基于能量的微调在所有OOD设置下表现最佳，相比softmax基线显著提升了检测性能，同时保持了分布内精度；分析表明其增益来源于嵌入空间重构与评分函数校准的共同作用。此外，约束优化方法在扩展到中等规模数据集时出现了训练不稳定性，此类现象在已有文献中鲜有报道。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明在真实世界领域特定数据上可以实现有效的OOD检测，同时揭示了仅依赖标准基准评估可能无法捕捉实际部署中的关键挑战，为OOD检测方法的实践应用提供了重要经验与警示。

title: Team-Based Self-Play With Dual Adaptive Weighting for Fine-Tuning LLMs
