summary: While recent self-training approaches have reduced reliance on human-labeled data for aligning LLMs, they still face critical limitations: (i) sensitivity to synthetic data quality, leading to instability and bias amplification in iterative training; (ii) ineffective optimization due to a diminishing gap between positive and negative responses over successive training iterations. In this paper, we propose Team-based self-Play with dual Adaptive Weighting (TPAW), a novel self-play algorithm designed to improve alignment in a fully self-supervised setting. TPAW adopts a team-based framework in which the current policy model both collaborates with and competes against historical checkpoints, promoting more stable and efficient optimization. To further enhance learning, we design two adaptive weighting mechanisms: (i) a response reweighting scheme that adjusts the importance of target responses, and (ii) a player weighting strategy that dynamically modulates each team member's contribution during training. Initialized from a SFT model, TPAW iteratively refines alignment without requiring additional human supervision. Experimental results demonstrate that TPAW consistently outperforms existing baselines across various base models and LLM benchmarks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/lab-klc/TPAW.

AI.tldr: TPAW提出了一种基于团队自博弈与双重自适应加权的全自监督对齐算法，通过让当前策略模型与历史检查点既协作又竞争，并引入响应重加权和玩家加权机制，在无需人工标注的条件下持续提升LLM对齐性能，显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督对齐方法存在两大关键局限：(i)对合成数据质量高度敏感，导致迭代训练中不稳定和偏差放大；(ii)正负响应之间的差距随训练轮次递减，造成优化效率低下。本文旨在不依赖人工标注的情况下解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出TPAW（Team-based self-Play with dual Adaptive Weighting），一种基于团队自博弈的自监督对齐算法。核心框架让当前策略模型与历史检查点形成团队，在协作与竞争中交替优化；并设计了两类自适应加权机制：响应重加权用于调整目标响应的重要性，玩家加权用于动态调节各团队成员在训练中的贡献。算法从SFT模型初始化，迭代自提升。
AI.result: 在多种基础模型和LLM基准上的实验结果表明，TPAW在无需额外人工监督的条件下，持续且一致地优于现有自监督对齐基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TPAW通过团队自博弈与双重自适应加权，有效缓解了自监督对齐中数据敏感性和优化退化问题，为全自监督的LLM对齐提供了一种稳定且高效的解决范式，且代码已公开。

title: OPT-BENCH: Evaluating the Iterative Self-Optimization of LLM Agents in Large-Scale Search Spaces
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in reasoning and tool use. However, the fundamental cognitive faculties essential for problem solving, including perception, reasoning, and memory, remain the stable core of intelligence. Unlike memorizing specific patterns, humans succeed in novel environments by applying these intrinsic faculties to adapt and optimize. Yet, whether LLMs possess this essential capacity, namely the ability to continuously refine solutions in response to dynamic environmental feedback, remains underexplored. To address this challenge, we introduce OPT-BENCH, a benchmark for evaluating self-improvement capabilities in large-scale search spaces. By combining 20 machine learning tasks with 10 classic NP-hard problems, OPT-BENCH provides a rigorous setting to assess whether agents can adapt through intrinsic self-reflection rather than rote tool application. We further propose OPT-Agent, a framework that emulates human-like cognitive adaptation. It operates through a general perception, memory, and reasoning loop, iteratively refining solutions based on environmental feedback. Through extensive experiments on 19 LLMs from 7 model families, including reasoning models, general models, and open-source models ranging from 3B to 235B parameters, we demonstrate that stronger models are more effective at leveraging feedback signals for self-improvement. However, this upper-bound adaptability remains fundamentally constrained by the models' base capacity, and even the most advanced LLMs still fall short of human expert performance.

AI.tldr: 提出OPT-BENCH基准测试（含20个ML任务和10个NP-hard问题）和OPT-Agent框架，系统评估LLMs在动态环境中通过自我反思与反馈信号持续改进解决方案的能力，实验发现更强模型在自我改进上更有效，但所有模型均受基础能力限制且未达到人类专家水平。
AI.motivation: 现有研究关注LLMs的推理与工具使用能力，但对其是否具备人类那样的核心认知能力——即通过感知、推理和记忆等内在智能，根据动态环境反馈持续优化和改进解决方案的能力——尚未得到系统探索。
AI.method: 构建OPT-BENCH基准（20个机器学习任务+10个经典NP-hard问题）评估大规模搜索空间中的自我改进能力，并提出OPT-Agent框架模拟人类认知适应，通过感知-记忆-推理循环迭代地基于环境反馈优化解决方案。
AI.result: 在7个模型家族的19个LLM（3B-235B参数）上进行大量实验，结果表明更强模型更善于利用反馈信号进行自我改进，但这种能力的上限受限于模型基础能力，且即使最先进的LLM仍不及人类专家水平。
AI.conclusion: LLMs具备一定程度的基于反馈的自我改进能力，且该能力与模型规模和能力正相关，但存在根本性上限约束；当前LLM在动态环境中的适应性认知仍显著弱于人类，提示未来需在基础认知架构上取得突破。

title: IPAD-CLIP: Teaching CLIP to Detect Image Local Perceptual Artifacts
summary: Current image quality assessment methods are heavily biased towards global distortions (e.g., noise, blur), neglecting local perceptual artifacts such as ghosting, lens flare, and moire effects. Although significant progress has been made in artifact removal, the fundamental problem of automatic artifact detection remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we formalize the Image Perceptual Artifact Detection (IPAD) task to address this gap. We contribute a benchmark dataset comprising 3,520 artifact images, including 520 real-captured and 3,000 synthetic samples, each paired with pixel-level masks across three representative artifact categories. The core challenge of IPAD lies in the localized, subtle, and semantically weak nature of these artifacts, which makes them prone to missed detection. To overcome this, we introduce IPAD-CLIP, a novel framework built upon CLIP that enhances artifact discrimination in both textual and visual spaces while preserving generalization capabilities. Our key insight is that local artifacts often exhibit strong correlations with specific semantic contexts. Accordingly, we learn artifact-aware text embeddings to explicitly model the object-artifact relationships, resulting in enhanced representations that clear differentiate between clean and artifact prompts. These text embeddings are then used as anchors to shift the visual encoder's attention from high-level semantics to subtle, low-level artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IPAD-CLIP offers a resource-efficient adaptation of CLIP for detection, significantly outperforming advanced image anomaly detection and manipulation detection methods on our benchmark. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study addressing multi-class local perceptual artifact detection in terms of both dataset and model.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化定义了图像感知伪影检测（IPAD）任务，构建了包含3,520张图像（含真实与合成样本）的基准数据集，并提出IPAD-CLIP框架，通过学习伪影感知文本嵌入并利用其引导视觉编码器关注低层伪影，在资源高效的条件下显著优于现有异常检测与篡改检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法严重偏向全局失真（如噪声、模糊），忽略了鬼影、镜头光晕、摩尔纹等局部感知伪影，尽管伪影去除领域取得了显著进展，但自动伪影检测这一基本问题仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 本文提出了IPAD-CLIP框架，基于CLIP架构，核心思想在于利用局部伪影与特定语义上下文的强相关性，学习伪影感知的文本嵌入，显式建模物体-伪影关系，从而在文本空间和视觉空间中增强伪影判别能力；这些文本嵌入作为锚点，引导视觉编码器将注意力从高层语义转移到细微的低层伪影上。
AI.result: 在包含520张真实拍摄和3,000张合成图像（含三种代表性伪影类别及像素级掩码）的基准数据集上，IPAD-CLIP在资源高效条件下显著优于先进的图像异常检测和篡改检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文是首个从数据集和模型角度系统解决多类局部感知伪影检测问题的研究，其核心见解在于局部伪影往往与特定语义上下文密切相关，利用这一特性可以有效提升检测性能。

title: Evolving Knowledge Distillation for Lightweight Neural Machine Translation
summary: Recent advancements in Neural Machine Translation (NMT) have significantly improved translation quality. However, the increasing size and complexity of state-of-the-art models present significant challenges for deployment on resource-limited devices. Knowledge distillation (KD) is a promising approach for compressing models, but its effectiveness diminishes when there is a large capacity gap between teacher and student models. To address this issue, we propose Evolving Knowledge Distillation (EKD), a progressive training framework in which the student model learns from a sequence of teachers with gradually increasing capacities. Experiments on IWSLT-14, WMT-17, and WMT-23 benchmarks show that EKD leads to consistent improvements at each stage. On IWSLT-14, the final student achieves a BLEU score of 34.24, narrowing the gap to the strongest teacher (34.32 BLEU) to just 0.08 BLEU. Similar trends are observed on other datasets. These results demonstrate that EKD effectively bridges the capacity gap, enabling compact models to achieve performance close to that of much larger teacher models.Code and models are available at https://github.com/agi-content-generation/EKD.

AI.tldr: 提出渐进式知识蒸馏框架EKD，通过让学生模型依次从一系列容量逐渐增大的教师模型学习，有效弥合师生模型间的能力差距，使紧凑模型在IWSLT-14等基准上达到接近大模型的翻译性能。
AI.motivation: 神经机器翻译模型日益增大，在资源受限设备上部署面临挑战；知识蒸馏虽能压缩模型，但当教师与学生模型之间存在较大容量差距时，蒸馏效果显著下降。
AI.method: 提出Evolving Knowledge Distillation (EKD)渐进式训练框架，让学生模型依次从一系列容量逐渐增大的教师模型学习，通过多阶段逐步提升学生模型容量，弥合单一蒸馏中师生模型间的能力鸿沟。
AI.result: 在IWSLT-14、WMT-17和WMT-23基准上，EKD在各阶段均取得持续改进；在IWSLT-14上最终学生模型BLEU达34.24，与最强教师模型(34.32 BLEU)的差距缩小至仅0.08 BLEU。
AI.conclusion: EKD有效弥合了知识蒸馏中的师生能力差距，使紧凑模型性能接近大模型，为资源受限场景下部署高性能NMT模型提供了可行方案。

title: Self-ReSET: Learning to Self-Recover from Unsafe Reasoning Trajectories
summary: Large Reasoning Models possess remarkable capabilities for self-correction in general domain; however, they frequently struggle to recover from unsafe reasoning trajectories under adversarial attacks. Existing alignment methods attempt to mitigate this vulnerability by fine-tuning the model on expert data including reflection traces or adversarial prefixes. Crucially, these approaches are often hindered by static training data which inevitably deviate from model's dynamic, on-policy reasoning traces, resulting in model hardly covering its vast generation space and learning to recover from its own failures. To bridge this gap, we propose Self-ReSET, a pure reinforcement learning framework designed to equip LRMs with the intrinsic capacity to recover from their own safety error trajectories, which are subsequently reused as an initial state for reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments across various LRMs and benchmarks demonstrate that Self-ReSET significantly enhances robustness against adversarial attacks especially out-of-distribution (OOD) jailbreak prompts while maintaining general utility, along with efficient data utilization. Further analysis reveals that our method effectively fosters self-recovery patterns, enabling models to better identify and recover from unsafe intermediate error states back to benign paths. Our codes and data are available at https://github.com/Ing1024/Self-ReSET.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Self-ReSET，一种纯强化学习框架，使大推理模型能够从自身安全错误轨迹中自我恢复，显著提升对对抗性攻击（尤其是OOD越狱提示）的鲁棒性，同时保持通用能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法通过静态专家数据（如反思轨迹或对抗前缀）微调模型，但静态数据与模型动态的、在策略的推理轨迹存在分布偏移，导致模型难以覆盖其庞大的生成空间并从自身失败中学习恢复，从而在对抗攻击下容易产生不安全推理。
AI.method: Self-ReSET采用纯强化学习框架，首先让模型生成自身的安全错误轨迹，随后将这些轨迹作为强化学习的初始状态进行重用，使模型在学习过程中直面自身的失败案例，从而内在地学会从错误轨迹中恢复至安全路径。
AI.result: 在多种大推理模型和基准上的实验表明，Self-ReSET显著增强了对对抗性攻击（尤其是OOD越狱提示）的鲁棒性，同时保持通用能力不受损，且数据利用效率高；进一步分析显示该方法有效培养了模型的自我恢复模式。
AI.conclusion: Self-ReSET通过让模型从自身错误轨迹中学习恢复，有效弥合了静态训练数据与动态推理分布之间的差距，为提升大推理模型在安全关键场景下的鲁棒对齐提供了新的强化学习范式。

title: Gate-and-Merge: Zero-shot Compositional Personalization of Vision Language Models
summary: This paper tackles compositional personalization of vision-language models (VLMs). In this problem, multiple user-defined concepts must be recognized or described jointly at test time. We introduce Gate-and-Merge, a zero-shot framework that enables compositional personalization without the need for co-occurrence training. During personalization, each concept is learned independently as a lightweight LoRA adapter, paired with a concept token. The base model remains unchanged and concepts are kept disentangled. At inference, we enable composition by merging concept-specific LoRA updates directly in weight space. To suppress irrelevant activations and prevent interference, a gating mechanism is employed to estimate textual and visual cues and select only the modules that contribute to the prediction. We further stabilize composition by combining only the most meaningful and mutually consistent updates, helping preserve each concept's identity. Our quantitative and qualitative analyses show consistent gains in performance across multiple personalization tasks in both single-concept and compositional settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Gate-and-Merge，一种零样本组合个性化框架，通过将每个概念独立学习为轻量级 LoRA 适配器并在推理时基于门控机制在权重空间合并 LoRA 更新，实现无需共现训练的多概念联合识别与描述。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）的个性化方法通常需要为每个概念进行单独微调或依赖共现训练数据，难以在推理时灵活组合多个用户定义的概念，缺乏零样本组合能力。
AI.method: Gate-and-Merge 框架将每个概念独立学习为一个轻量级 LoRA 适配器并关联一个概念 token，基座模型保持不变且概念之间保持解耦。推理时，通过门控机制估计文本和视觉线索以抑制无关激活并选取有用模块，然后在权重空间合并概念专属的 LoRA 更新，只组合最有意义且相互一致的更新以保持每个概念的 identity。
AI.result: 在多个个性化任务上的定量和定性分析表明，Gate-and-Merge 在单概念和组合设定下均取得一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了通过门控权重合并实现零样本概念组合的有效性，为 VLM 的组合个性化提供了一种无需共现训练且保持概念解耦的实用方案。

title: FocuSFT: Bilevel Optimization for Dilution-Aware Long-Context Fine-Tuning
summary: Large language models can now process increasingly long inputs, yet their ability to effectively use information spread across long contexts remains limited. We trace this gap to how attention budget is spent during supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on long sequences: positional biases and attention sinks cause the model to allocate most of its attention to positionally privileged tokens rather than semantically relevant content. This training-time attention dilution (the starvation of content tokens in the attention distribution) weakens the gradient signal, limiting the model's ability to learn robust long-context capabilities. We introduce FocuSFT, a bilevel optimization framework that addresses this problem at training time. An inner loop adapts lightweight fast-weight parameters on the training context to form a parametric memory that concentrates attention on relevant content, and the outer loop performs SFT conditioned on this sharpened representation. Both loops apply bidirectional attention over context tokens while preserving causal masking for responses, reducing the causal asymmetry that gives rise to attention sinks and aligning inner-outer behavior. On BABILong, FocuSFT improves accuracy by up to +14pp across 4K--32K context lengths; on RULER, it raises CWE aggregation from 72.9\% to 81.1\% at 16K; and on GPQA with agentic tool use, it yields a 24\% relative gain in pass@1. Attention analysis shows that FocuSFT reduces attention sink mass by 529$\times$ and triples context engagement during training. Code: https://github.com/JarvisPei/FocuSFT

AI.tldr: FocuSFT提出了一种双层优化框架，通过在SFT训练时引入内循环快速权重参数形成参数化记忆来集中注意力于相关内容，解决长上下文中注意力稀释导致的训练梯度弱化问题，在多个基准上取得显著提升，并将注意力汇聚质量降低529倍。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理长序列输入时，信息有效利用能力受限，论文发现根本原因在于监督微调（SFT）阶段注意力预算分配存在位置偏差和注意力汇聚现象，模型将大部分注意力分配给位置特权令牌而非语义相关内容，导致内容令牌在注意力分布中被稀释，梯度信号被削弱，限制了模型学习鲁棒长上下文能力。
AI.method: FocuSFT采用双层优化框架：内循环在训练上下文上自适应调整轻量级快速权重参数，形成参数化记忆以集中注意力于相关内容；外循环在此锐化后的表示上执行SFT。两个循环均对上下文令牌使用双向注意力，同时对回复保持因果掩码，从而减少导致注意力汇聚的因果不对称性，并使内外行为对齐。
AI.result: 在BABILong上将4K-32K上下文长度上的准确率提升最高达+14pp；在RULER上将16K下的CWE聚合指标从72.9%提升至81.1%；在GPQA结合智能体工具使用场景中，pass@1相对提升24%。注意力分析显示，FocuSFT将注意力汇聚质量降低529倍，并将训练期间上下文参与度提升三倍。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了SFT中注意力稀释是制约模型长上下文能力的关键训练时因素，FocuSFT通过双层优化在训练阶段主动校正注意力分布，有效缓解了位置偏差和注意力汇聚问题，为提升大模型长序列理解能力提供了一种无需修改模型架构或推理过程的训练层面解决方案。

title: Learning to Explore: Scaling Agentic Reasoning via Exploration-Aware Policy Optimization
summary: Recent advancements in agentic test-time scaling allow models to gather environmental feedback before committing to final actions. A key limitation of existing methods is that they typically employ undifferentiated exploration strategies, lacking the ability to adaptively distinguish when exploration is truly required. In this paper, we propose an exploration-aware reinforcement learning framework that enables LLM agents to adaptively explore only when uncertainty is high. Our method introduces a fine-grained reward function via variational inference that explicitly evaluates exploratory actions by estimating their potential to improve future decision-making, together with an exploration-aware grouping mechanism that separates exploratory actions from task-completion actions during optimization. By targeting informational gaps, this design allows agents to explore selectively and transition to execution as soon as the task context is clear. Empirically, we demonstrate that our approach achieves consistent improvements across a range of challenging text-based and GUI-based agent benchmarks. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/HansenHua/EAPO-ICML26} and models are available at https://huggingface.co/hansenhua/EAPO-ICML26.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种探索感知的强化学习框架（EAPO），通过变分推断设计细粒度奖励函数和分组优化机制，使LLM智能体仅在不确定性高时进行自适应探索，在文本和GUI基准任务上取得了一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体测试时缩放方法通常采用无区分性的探索策略，缺乏自适应判断何时真正需要探索的能力，导致探索效率低下且在上下文已清晰时仍进行无效探索。
AI.method: 提出一种探索感知的强化学习框架（EAPO），通过变分推断设计细粒度奖励函数显式评估探索动作对未来决策潜力的提升，并引入探索感知的分组机制，在优化过程中将探索动作与任务完成动作分离，使智能体仅在不确定性高时选择性探索，待任务上下文清晰后立即转为执行。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的文本和GUI智能体基准任务上，该方法相较于现有基线取得了一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对信息缺口进行定向探索，该框架使智能体能够在探索与执行之间实现自适应切换，显著提升了测试时缩放的有效性，代码和模型已开源。

title: UniShield: Unified Face Attack Detection via KG-Informed Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Unified face attack detection (UAD) requires recognizing physical spoofing and digital forgery within a shared decision space, yet existing discriminative or prompt-based methods largely rely on appearance correlations and provide limited evidence-grounded reasoning. We propose UniShield, a knowledge-grounded multimodal reasoning framework for unified face attack defense. UniShield constructs a Face Attack Knowledge Graph (FAKG) that links attack categories to diagnostic visual cues and attack-conditioned relations, and uses it to synthesize 52,025 FAKG-QA examples for Attack-Graph Instruction Tuning (AGIT). To improve rationale consistency, we further introduce Graph-Consistent Reasoning Optimization (GCRO), a GRPO-based objective with a KG-consistency reward that encourages generated rationales to match graph-supported cues while penalizing incompatible claims. Experiments on our multimodal UAD benchmark show that UniShield achieves strong performance across binary, coarse-grained, and fine-grained protocols, with consistently high ACC and low HTER. These results suggest that structured attack knowledge can improve both detection accuracy and reasoning reliability over discriminative baselines and general-purpose MLLMs. Our code will be released at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Unishield-A6A3/.

AI.tldr: UniShield 提出了一个基于知识图谱的多模态推理框架，通过构建人脸攻击知识图谱（FAKG）和攻击图谱指令微调（AGIT）数据集，结合图一致推理优化（GCRO）策略，实现了统一的人脸攻击检测，在多项协议上取得了优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有统一人脸攻击检测方法主要依赖外观相关性的判别式或提示学习方法，缺乏基于证据的推理能力，难以在共享决策空间中同时识别物理伪造和数字伪造攻击。
AI.method: UniShield 构建了人脸攻击知识图谱（FAKG），将攻击类别与诊断性视觉线索及攻击条件关系相链接，并据此合成了 52,025 个 FAKG-QA 样本用于攻击图谱指令微调（AGIT）；同时提出了基于 GRPO 的图一致推理优化（GCRO）目标，通过 KG 一致性奖励鼓励生成与图谱支持线索匹配的推理过程并惩罚矛盾主张。
AI.result: 在多模态 UAD 基准测试中，UniShield 在二分类、粗粒度和细粒度协议上均取得了强性能，表现为持续的高准确率（ACC）和低等错误率（HTER），优于判别式基线和通用多模态大语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 结构化攻击知识能够同时提升检测精度和推理可靠性，表明将领域知识图谱与大模型推理相结合是统一人脸攻击检测的有效方向。

title: TRACER: Verifiable Generative Provenance for Multimodal Tool-Using Agents
summary: Multimodal large language models increasingly solve vision-centric tasks by calling external tools for visual inspection, OCR, retrieval, calculation, and multi-step reasoning. Current tool-using agents usually expose the executed tool trajectory and the final answer, but they rarely specify which tool observation supports each generated claim. We call this missing claim-level dependency structure the provenance gap. The gap makes tool use hard to verify and hard to optimize, because useful evidence, redundant exploration, and unsupported reasoning are mixed in the same trajectory. We introduce TRACER, a framework for verifiable generative provenance in multimodal tool-using agents. Instead of adding citations after generation, TRACER generates each answer sentence together with a structured provenance record that identifies the supporting tool turn, evidence unit, and semantic support relation. Its relation space contains Quotation, Compression, and Inference, covering direct reuse, faithful condensation, and grounded derivation. TRACER verifies each record through schema checking, tool-turn alignment, source authenticity, and relation rationality, and then converts verified provenance into traceability constraints and provenance-derived local credit for reinforcement learning. We further construct TRACE-Bench, a benchmark for sentence-level provenance reconstruction from coarse multimodal tool trajectories. On TRACE-Bench, simply adding tools often introduces noise. With Qwen3-VL-8B, TRACER reaches 78.23% answer accuracy and 95.72% summary accuracy, outperforming the strongest closed-source tool-augmented baseline by 23.80 percentage points. Compared with tool-only supervised fine-tuning, it also reduces total test-set tool calls from 4949 to 3486. These results show that reliable multimodal tool reasoning depends on provenance-aware use of observations, not on more tool calls alone.

AI.tldr: TRACER通过引入结构化溯源记录（包括引用、压缩、推理三种语义关系）和可验证机制，解决了多模态工具增强大语言模型中缺乏声明级依赖结构（溯源缺口）的问题，在TRACE-Bench基准上以Qwen3-VL-8B达到78.23%答案准确率和95.72%摘要准确率，并将工具调用次数减少近30%。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在调用外部工具进行视觉检查、OCR、检索、计算和多步推理时，通常会展示执行轨迹和最终答案，但很少明确指出每个生成声明由哪条工具观测结果支持，这种缺失声明级依赖结构的问题被称为"溯源缺口"，导致工具使用难以验证和优化，因为有效证据、冗余探索和未经支持的推理混杂在同一轨迹中。
AI.method: TRACER框架提出在生成每个答案句子的同时附带结构化溯源记录，标识支持该句的工具回合（tool turn）、证据单元（evidence unit）和语义支持关系，其关系空间包含Quotation（直接引用）、Compression（忠实压缩）和Inference（有根据的推理）三种类型。TRACER通过模式检查、工具回合对齐、来源真实性和关系合理性四个维度验证每条记录，并将已验证的溯源转化为可追溯性约束和溯源导出的局部信用信号用于强化学习；同时构建了TRACE-Bench基准用于从粗粒度多模态工具轨迹重建句子级溯源。
AI.result: 在TRACE-Bench上，单独添加工具往往会引入噪声；基于Qwen3-VL-8B，TRACER实现了78.23%的答案准确率和95.72%的摘要准确率，比最强的闭源工具增强基线高出23.80个百分点；与仅使用工具进行监督微调相比，TRACER将测试集总工具调用次数从4949次减少到3486次。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的多模态工具推理取决于对观测结果的溯源感知使用，而非单纯增加工具调用次数；TRACER通过结构化溯源记录和验证机制，不仅显著提升了答案准确率和摘要准确率，还减少了不必要的工具调用，为工具增强型多模态代理提供了可验证、可优化的新范式。

title: Re$^2$Math: Benchmarking Theorem Retrieval in Research-Level Mathematics
summary: Large language models are increasingly capable at closed-world mathematical reasoning, but research assistance also requires source-grounded use of the literature. When a proof reaches a non-trivial step, a useful assistant should determine whether the needed tool (e.g., a lemma) already exists, identify a suitable scholarly source, and verify that its assumptions align with the current proof context. To rigorously evaluate such capabilities, we introduce Re$^2$Math, a benchmark for tool-grounded retrieval from partial mathematical proofs. Each instance is built from a candidate instrumental citation in the proof of a main theorem, with hierarchical context and an optional leakage-controlled anchor hint. We also make the task source-grounded yet citation-agnostic in that any admissible theorem sufficient for the proof transition is accepted. Evaluation uses a release-frozen retrieval artifact, ensuring reproducibility, while the benchmark itself supports automatic, continual expansion with newly constructed instances. On the current benchmark test set, the best fixed-judge ToolAcc reaches 7.0%, despite substantially higher rates of source grounding, indicating that current systems often retrieve valid statements but fail to establish their applicability to the local proof step. By decoupling citation recall, grounding, and proof-gap sufficiency, Re$^2$Math transforms literature-grounded mathematical tool use into a controlled diagnostic task.

AI.tldr: Re$^2$Math是一个用于评估大语言模型在数学证明中进行文献检索与工具应用能力的基准，通过解耦引文召回、源文定位和证明缺口充分性三个维度，将文献支撑的数学工具使用转化为可控的诊断任务。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在封闭世界数学推理方面表现日益出色，但在研究辅助场景中需要从文献中查找和验证已有结论（如引理）时，现有系统往往能检索到有效陈述却无法确定其对当前证明步骤的适用性，缺乏一个能够解耦评估引文召回、源文定位和证明缺口充分性的标准化诊断基准。
AI.method: 论文构建了Re$^2$Math基准，每个实例从主定理证明中的候选工具性引文出发，提供层次化上下文和可选的泄露控制锚定提示，任务设计为源文定位且与具体引用无关（接受任何足以支撑证明过渡的定理），评估使用冻结发布的检索制品以保证可重复性，并支持自动持续扩展。
AI.result: 在当前基准测试集上，最佳固定评估器（固定判据工具准确率）仅达到7.0%，尽管源文定位率显著更高，表明现有系统通常能检索到正确的数学陈述，但无法判断其对局部证明步骤的充分适用性。
AI.conclusion: Re$^2$Math通过将文献检索、源文定位和证明缺口充分性三个维度解耦，揭示了当前模型在应用数学工具到具体证明上下文时的关键短板，为未来改进提供了清晰的方向和可控的诊断框架。

title: From Articulated Kinematics to Routed Visual Control for Action-Conditioned Surgical Video Generation
summary: Action-conditioned surgical video generation is a critical yet highly challenging problem for robotic surgery. The core difficulty is that low-dimensional control vectors must precisely govern complex image-space evolution. In this work, we propose a kinematic-to-visual lifting paradigm that converts articulated kinematics into a unified set of five image-aligned control modalities. Building on this representation, we introduce a hierarchically routed visual control framework that selectively activates the most relevant control modalities and motion scales. Instead of uniformly applying all control signals, our model performs hierarchical routing to dynamically allocate conditioning capacity. We further design kinematic-prior-guided routing loss functions to ensure physically meaningful, temporally stable, and efficient expert utilization. To improve efficiency, we propose a budgeted training and inference scheme that leverages routing-induced sparsity. By selectively discarding low-significance control pathways during training and execution, our approach enables adaptive computation that is complementary to standard distillation. We additionally construct a new benchmark with curated articulated annotations, obtained through human-in-the-loop semantic labeling and differentiable pose tracking, providing realistic supervision for action-conditioned surgical video generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently improves action faithfulness, visual fidelity, and cross-domain generalization over diverse baselines. Moreover, our efficient variant achieves substantial reductions in latency while maintaining strong control accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种从运动学到视觉的层级路由控制框架，用于动作条件的外科手术视频生成，通过选择性激活对齐的控制模态、预算训练与推理策略以及带标注的新基准，在动作保真度、视觉质量和跨域泛化上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 动作条件的外科手术视频生成面临着低维控制向量必须精确驱动复杂图像空间演化的核心挑战，现有方法缺乏对铰接式运动学信息与图像对齐控制模态的有效表征与选择性调控机制。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种运动学到视觉的升维范式，将铰接式运动学转换为五类图像对齐的统一控制模态；在此基础上构建层级路由视觉控制框架，选择性激活最相关的控制模态与运动尺度，并设计运动学先验引导的路由损失函数以保证物理合理性、时间稳定性与专家高效利用；进一步提出预算训练与推理方案，利用路由诱导的稀疏性在训练和推理中丢弃低显著性控制通路，实现自适应计算。
AI.result: 在包含人工语义标注与可微姿态跟踪的基准测试上，该方法在动作保真度、视觉质量和跨域泛化方面一致优于多种基线方法；高效变体在保持强控制精度的同时大幅降低了延迟。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了层级路由控制与稀疏计算范式在动作条件视频生成中的有效性，揭示了选择性控制模态激活相较于均匀施加全量控制信号的优势，并为手术视频生成领域提供了新的基准与监督范式。

title: Merlin: Deterministic Byte-Exact Deduplication for Lossless Context Optimization in Large Language Model Inference
comment: Preprint. Implementation and open-source community version available at: https://github.com/corbenicai/merlin-community - https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20090991
summary: Data-intensive applications, ranging from large-scale retrieval systems to advanced data pipelines, are increasingly bottlenecked by the processing of highly redundant text corpora. We present Merlin, a local-first, agnostic, high-throughput deduplication and context optimization engine designed to mitigate these inefficiencies. Utilizing a highly optimized, SIMD-friendly open-addressing flat hash set combined with xxHash3-64, Merlin performs rapid, byte-exact deduplication of text passages and data chunks. While broadly applicable to any text-processing workflow, its impact is particularly pronounced in Large Language Model (LLM) ecosystems, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Our empirical evaluations demonstrate an input reduction ranging from 13.9% in low-redundancy datasets to over 71% in high-redundancy pipelines, maintaining absolute data fidelity. Furthermore, we detail the system's integration architecture via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling secure, zero-network-interception deployment across major IDEs and autonomous agents. This paper outlines the core algorithmic design, performance benchmarks, and the architectural principles required to process data at sustained speeds of up to 8.7 GB/s.

AI.tldr: Merlin 是一个本地优先、与数据无关的高吞吐量去重与上下文优化引擎，基于 SIMD 优化的开放寻址哈希集合与 xxHash3-64 实现字节级精确去重，在 LLM 检索增强生成等场景中可实现 13.9% 至 71% 以上的输入缩减，并支持通过模型上下文协议（MCP）实现安全、零网络拦截的集成部署。
AI.motivation: 数据密集型应用（如大规模检索系统和高级数据管道）受限于高度冗余文本语料的处理瓶颈，现有方案在去重效率、吞吐量和部署安全性方面存在不足，亟需一种高吞吐、字节精确且适用于 LLM 生态的去重与上下文优化引擎。
AI.method: Merlin 提出一种基于高度优化的 SIMD 友好型开放寻址扁平哈希集合与 xxHash3-64 哈希函数的字节级精确去重方法，对文本段落和数据块进行快速去重与上下文优化；同时，通过模型上下文协议（MCP）设计安全、零网络拦截的集成架构，支持在主流 IDE 和自主智能体中部署。
AI.result: 实验评估表明，Merlin 在低冗余数据集上实现 13.9% 的输入缩减率，在高冗余管道中缩减率超过 71%，并保持绝对的數據保真度；系统能够以高达 8.7 GB/s 的持续吞吐速度处理数据。
AI.conclusion: Merlin 通过高性能去重和上下文优化有效缓解了文本冗余带来的处理瓶颈，尤其在 LLM 检索增强生成场景中具有显著价值；其基于 MCP 的安全集成架构为数据密集型应用提供了高效、可部署的解决方案，为未来高性能数据处理系统的设计提供了重要实践参考。

title: SearchSkill: Teaching LLMs to Use Search Tools with Evolving Skill Banks
summary: Teaching language models to use search tools is not only a question of whether they search, but also of whether they issue good queries. This is especially important in open-domain question answering, where broad or copied queries often waste retrieval budget and derail later reasoning. We propose \Ours, a framework that makes query planning explicit through reusable search skills. At each step, the model first selects a skill, then generates a search or answer action conditioned on the selected skill card. The skill inventory itself is not fixed: SearchSkill maintains an evolving SkillBank, expands or refines it from recurrent failure patterns, and reconstructs affected trajectories before supervised training. The resulting two-stage SFT recipe aligns training with the inference-time protocol of skill selection followed by skill-grounded execution. Across open-source and closed-source models, SearchSkill improves exact match on knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks and yields better retrieval behavior, including fewer copied first queries, more atomic hop-focused queries, and more correct answers within a small search budget. These results suggest that explicit skill-conditioned query planning is a lightweight alternative to treating search as an undifferentiated action.

AI.tldr: SearchSkill提出了一种显式查询规划框架，通过可复用的搜索技能（Skill）和动态演化的技能库（SkillBank），将搜索工具的使用分解为技能选择与技能驱动执行两个阶段，在知识密集型QA任务上显著提升了查询质量与答案准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注语言模型是否使用搜索工具，却忽略了查询质量本身——宽泛或照搬问题的查询浪费检索预算并干扰后续推理，尤其在开放域问答中问题突出；该研究旨在通过显式的查询规划机制解决这一不足。
AI.method: 提出SearchSkill框架，核心包括可演化的SkillBank和两阶段监督微调策略：推理时模型先选择搜索技能，再根据技能描述生成搜索或回答动作；训练时从反复失败模式中自动扩展或精炼技能库，并重建受影响轨迹，使训练协议与推理协议对齐。
AI.result: 在知识密集型QA基准上，SearchSkill在开源和闭源模型上均提升了精确匹配指标，并改善了检索行为——减少了照搬问题的首次查询，生成了更多原子化、聚焦跳转的查询，在有限检索预算下得到更多正确答案。
AI.conclusion: 显式的技能条件化查询规划是一种轻量级且有效的替代方案，相比将搜索视为无差别的行动，它能更精细地利用搜索工具，提升检索效率与推理质量。

title: EAR: Enhancing Uni-Modal Representations for Weakly Supervised Audio-Visual Video Parsing
summary: Weakly supervised Audio-Visual Video Parsing (AVVP) aims to recognize and temporally localize audio, visual, and audio-visual events in videos using only coarse-grained labels. Faced with the challenging task settings, existing research advances along two main paths: pre-training pseudo-label generators for fine-grained cross-modal semantic guidance, or refining AVVP model architectures to enhance audio-visual fusion. However, since audio and visual signals are typically unaligned, achieving accurate video parsing fundamentally relies on precise perception of uni-modal events. Yet these multi-modal focused strategies excessively emphasize multi-modal fusion while inadequately guiding and preserving uni-modal semantics, resulting in noisy pseudo-labels and sub-optimal video parsing performance. This paper proposes a novel framework that enhances uni-modal representations for both the pseudo-label generator and the AVVP model. Specifically, we introduce a similarity-based label migration approach to annotate pre-training data, thereby enabling the pseudo-label generator to better understand uni-modal events. We also employ a soft-constrained manner to refine modeling of uni-modal features in parallel with multi-modal fusion. These designs enable coordinated attention to both uni-modal and cross-modal representations, thus boosting the localization performance for events. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both pseudo-label and AVVP performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种增强单模态表示的弱监督音视频解析框架，通过相似度标签迁移和软约束单模态特征建模，同时提升伪标签生成器和AVVP模型的单模态感知能力，在伪标签质量和视频解析性能上均超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督音视频解析方法过度关注多模态融合策略，忽视了音频与视觉信号通常未对齐的特性，未能充分引导和保留单模态语义信息，导致生成的伪标签噪声大、视频解析性能次优。
AI.method: 提出一种增强单模态表示的统一框架：一方面引入基于相似度的标签迁移方法对预训练数据进行标注，使伪标签生成器更好地理解单模态事件；另一方面采用软约束方式，在并行于多模态融合的过程中细化单模态特征的建模，实现单模态与跨模态表示的协同关注。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，所提方法在伪标签质量和音视频解析性能两方面均优于当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，在弱监督音视频解析任务中，增强单模态表示能力与多模态融合同等重要，协同关注单模态和跨模态信息能够显著提升事件定位性能，为后续研究提供了在未对齐多模态场景下平衡单模态与多模态学习的新思路。

title: Annotations Mitigate Post-Training Mode Collapse
comment: 21 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables. Accepted at ICML 2026
summary: Post-training (via supervised fine-tuning) improves instruction-following, but often induces semantic mode collapse by biasing models toward low-entropy fine-tuning data at the expense of the high-entropy pretraining distribution. Crucially, we find this trade-off worsens with scale. To close this semantic diversity gap, we propose annotation-anchored training, a principled method that enables models to adopt the preference-following behaviors of post-training without sacrificing the inherent diversity of pretraining. Our approach is simple: we pretrain on documents paired with semantic annotations, inducing a rich annotation distribution that reflects the full breadth of pretraining data, and we preserve this distribution during post-training. This lets us sample diverse annotations at inference time and use them as anchors to guide generation, effectively transferring pretraining's semantic richness into post-trained models. We find that models trained with annotation-anchored training can attain $6 \times$ less diversity collapse than models trained with SFT, and improve with scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为注释锚定训练（annotation-anchored training）的方法，通过在预训练阶段将文档与语义注释配对来保留预训练数据的语义多样性，并在后训练阶段保持该注释分布，从而有效缓解监督微调（SFT）引入的语义模式坍缩问题；实验表明该方法相比SFT将多样性坍缩降低了6倍，且性能随模型规模增长而改善。
AI.motivation: 监督微调（SFT）虽然能提升模型的指令跟随能力，但会使模型偏向低熵的微调数据分布，从而牺牲预训练阶段的高熵语义多样性，导致语义模式坍缩；且这种权衡随模型规模增大而加剧，现有后训练方法缺乏有效手段来弥补这一语义多样性差距。
AI.method: 提出注释锚定训练方法：在预训练阶段将文档与语义注释配对，诱导出一个反映预训练数据全貌的丰富注释分布；在后训练阶段保持该分布不变。推理时，通过采样多样化的注释作为锚点来引导生成过程，从而将预训练的语义丰富性迁移到后训练模型中。
AI.result: 采用注释锚定训练的模型相比标准SFT模型，多样性坍缩程度降低了6倍，并且该方法的性能随模型规模增大而持续改善，表明其具有良好的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 注释锚定训练是一种简洁而有效的原则性方法，能够在保留预训练语义多样性的同时赋予模型后训练带来的偏好跟随行为，且随规模扩展效果更优，为后训练中的语义多样性保护提供了新思路。

title: Token Economics for LLM Agents: A Dual-View Study from Computing and Economics
summary: As LLM agents evolve, tokens have emerged as the core economic primitives of Agentic AI. However, their exponential consumption introduces severe computational, collaborative, and security bottlenecks. Current surveys remain fragmented across system optimization, architecture design, and trust, lacking a unified framework to evaluate the fundamental trade-off between output quality and economic cost. To bridge this gap, this survey presents the first comprehensive survey of Token Economics. By unifying computer science and economics, we conceptualize tokens as production factors, exchange mediums, and units of account. We synthesize existing literature across a four-dimensional taxonomy: (1) Micro-level (Single Agent): Optimizing budget-constrained factor substitution via neoclassical firm theory. (2) Meso-level (Multi-Agent Systems): Minimizing collaboration friction using transaction cost and principal-agent theories. (3) Macro-level (Agent Ecosystems): Addressing congestion externalities and pricing via mechanism design. (4) Security: Internalizing adversarial threats as endogenous economic constraints. Finally, we outline frontier directions, including differentiable token budgets and dynamic markets, to lay the theoretical foundation for scalable next-generation agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文首次从跨学科视角系统性地提出"Token经济学"框架，将令牌（token）概念化为生产要素、交换媒介和记账单位，并从微观、中观、宏观和安全四个维度综述了智能体系统中令牌消耗的经济学权衡。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体系统面临令牌指数级消耗带来的计算、协作与安全瓶颈，现有研究分散在系统优化、架构设计和可信领域，缺乏统一框架来评估输出质量与经济成本之间的根本性权衡。
AI.method: 通过融合计算机科学与经济学理论，本文构建了四维分类法：（1）微观层面，利用新古典企业理论解决单智能体预算约束下的要素替代问题；（2）中观层面，利用交易成本与委托代理理论最小化多智能体系统中的协作摩擦；（3）宏观层面，利用机制设计应对智能体生态系统中的拥塞外部性与定价问题；（4）安全层面，将对抗性威胁内生化视为经济约束。
AI.result: 本文作为综述性研究，系统梳理了现有文献，提出了统一的Token经济学分析框架，并指出了可微分令牌预算和动态市场等前沿方向，为可扩展的下一代智能体系统奠定了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: Token经济学为理解和解决LLM智能体系统中的资源分配、协作效率和安全激励问题提供了统一的理论基础，未来方向包括可微分令牌预算和动态市场机制设计，以推动大规模智能体系统的可持续发展。

title: Control Your View: High-Resolution Global Semantic Manipulation in Learned Image Compression
summary: Learned image compression (LIC) integrates deep neural networks (DNNs) to map high-dimensional images into compact latent representations, reducing redundancy and achieving superior rate-distortion (RD) performance in benign settings. Unfortunately, due to inherent vulnerabilities in DNNs, LIC systems are susceptible to adversarial perturbations that lead to downstream deterioration, compression rate degradation, untargeted distortion, and both local semantic manipulation (LSM) and low-resolution ($3\times28\times28$) global semantic manipulation (GSM). However, high-resolution GSM remains unexplored due to its intractability. Notably, the existing project gradient descent (PGD) method achieves near-perfect white-box attacks for classification, segmentation, and other tasks, yet fails to generalize to high-resolution GSM. Our theoretical and empirical analyses reveal that well-performing GSM drives adversarial examples from the Identity Region to the Amplification Region through the Lazying-Oscillating-Refining stages. General $\ell_{\infty}$-bounded attacks fail on high-resolution GSM because their step-size schedules cannot accommodate both the Oscillating and Refining stages. Based on this, we propose the Periodic Geometric Decay schedule that enables $\ell_{\infty}$-bounded high-resolution GSM. To verify our approach, we integrate it with PGD, yielding a minimal variant, PGD$^{2}$-GSM. Extensive experiments on the Kodak $(3\times768\times512)$ demonstrate that our PGD$^{2}$-GSM is the first to stably achieve high-resolution GSM, thereby exposing a novel threat to LIC systems. Code is available at https://github.com/chinaliangjiaming/PGD2-GSM.

AI.tldr: 本文首次实现高分辨率(3×768×512)全局语义操纵(GSM)攻击学习图像压缩系统，提出周期性几何衰减(PGD)调度策略，结合PGD形成PGD²-GSM方法，揭示了LIC系统在高分辨率GSM下的新安全威胁。
AI.motivation: 现有学习图像压缩系统虽在良性场景下表现优异，但因深度神经网络固有的脆弱性易受对抗攻击。已有攻击涵盖局部语义操纵和低分辨率全局语义操纵，但由于高分辨率全局语义操纵的难解性，该方向尚未被探索；现有PGD等方法在分类任务上表现近乎完美，却无法泛化到高分辨率GSM场景。本文旨在填补这一研究空白，揭示LIC系统在高分辨率GSM下的安全隐患。
AI.method: 本文首先从理论和实证分析揭示高分辨率GSM的成功攻击促使对抗样本经历"惰化-振荡-精炼"三个阶段从Identity Region进入Amplification Region；通用ℓ∞有界攻击因步长调度无法同时适配振荡和精炼阶段而失效。基于此，本文提出周期性几何衰减(Periodic Geometric Decay)调度策略，将其与PGD结合得到最小变体PGD²-GSM，首次实现ℓ∞有界的高分辨率全局语义操纵。
AI.result: 在Kodak数据集(3×768×512)上的大量实验表明，PGD²-GSM是首个能够稳定实现高分辨率全局语义操纵的方法，成功暴露了LIC系统的全新安全威胁。该方法理论上亦可直接推广到基于DNN的图像压缩系统。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了LIC系统在高分辨率GSM攻击下的脆弱性，通过分析攻击阶段特性提出有效的调度策略，为对抗防御研究提供了重要参考。该工作不仅填补了高分辨率GSM的研究空白，也为后续LIC系统安全加固指明了方向。

title: Swarm Skills: A Portable, Self-Evolving Multi-Agent System Specification for Coordination Engineering
summary: As artificial intelligence engineering paradigms shift from single-agent Prompt and Context Engineering toward multi-agent \textbf{Coordination Engineering}, the ability to codify and systematically improve how multiple agents collaborate has emerged as a critical bottleneck. While single-agent skills can now be distributed as portable assets, multi-agent coordination protocols remain locked within framework-internal code or static configurations, preventing them from being shared across systems or autonomously improved over time. We propose \textbf{Swarm Skills}, a portable specification that extends the Anthropic Skills standard with multi-agent semantics. Swarm Skills turns multi-agent workflows into first-class, distributable assets that consist of roles, workflows, execution bounds, and a built-in semantic structure for self-evolution. To operationalize the specification's evolving nature, we present a companion self-evolution algorithm that automatically distills successful execution trajectories into new Swarm Skills and continuously patches existing ones based on multi-dimensional scoring (Effectiveness, Utilization, and Freshness), eliminating the need for human-in-the-loop oversight during the refinement process. Through an architectural compatibility analysis and a comprehensive qualitative case study using the open-source JiuwenSwarm reference implementation, we demonstrate how Swarm Skills achieves zero-adapter cross-agent portability via progressive disclosure, enabling agent teams to self-evolve their coordination strategies without framework lock-in.

AI.tldr: 提出Swarm Skills可移植规范及配套自演化算法，将多智能体协作协议编码为可跨系统共享、自动优化的一等资产，通过渐进式披露实现零适配器跨智能体可移植性，突破多智能体协调工程中框架锁定和人工优化的瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 在AI工程从单智能体提示/上下文工程向多智能体协调工程转变的范式下，单智能体技能已可作为可移植资产分发，但多智能体协调协议仍被锁定在框架内部代码或静态配置中，无法跨系统共享或随时间自主改进，成为系统间协作与持续优化的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出Swarm Skills可移植规范，扩展Anthropic Skills标准以支持多智能体语义，将多智能体工作流编码为包含角色、工作流、执行边界及内置自演化语义结构的一等可分发资产；同时设计配套的自演化算法，基于有效性、利用率、新鲜度等多维评分自动从成功执行轨迹中蒸馏出新Swarm Skills并持续补丁现有技能，消除了人工介入的细化过程。
AI.result: 通过架构兼容性分析和基于开源JiuwenSwarm参考实现的定性案例研究，证明了Swarm Skills通过渐进式披露实现零适配器跨智能体可移植性，使智能体团队能够在无框架锁定条件下自我演化其协调策略。
AI.conclusion: Swarm Skills将多智能体协调协议从框架内部固化转变为可跨系统共享、自动演化的可移植资产，为多智能体系统的协调工程标准化和自主优化提供了可行的规范框架，有望推动AI工程从单智能体能力分发向多智能体协作协议跨系统复用的范式演进。

title: MCP-Cosmos: World Model-Augmented Agents for Complex Task Execution in MCP Environments
summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has unified the interface between Large Language Models (LLMs) and external tools, yet a fundamental gap remains in how agents conceptualize the environments within which they operate. Current paradigms are bifurcated: Task-level planning often ignores execution-time dynamics, while reactive execution lacks long-horizon foresight. We present MCP-Cosmos, a framework that infuses generative World Models (WM) into the MCP ecosystem to enable predictive task automation. By unifying three disparate technologies, namely MCP, World Model, and Agent, we demonstrate that a "Bring Your Own World Model" (BYOWM) strategy allows agents to simulate state transitions and refine plans in a latent space before execution. We conducted experiments using two strategies, namely ReAct and SPIRAL with 2 planning models and 3 representative world models over 20+ MCP-Bench tasks. We observed improvements in Agent's environment interaction KPI such as tool success rate and tool parameter accuracy. The framework also offers new metrics such as Execution Quality to generate new insights about the effectiveness of world models compared to baseline.

AI.tldr: MCP-Cosmos 将生成式世界模型融入 MCP 生态系统，通过"自带世界模型"策略使智能体在潜在空间中模拟状态转移并优化计划，从而在 20 多项 MCP-Bench 任务中提升了工具调用成功率和参数准确性，并引入了执行质量等新评估指标。
AI.motivation: 当前 LLM 智能体在环境交互中存在范式割裂问题：任务级规划忽略执行时动态变化，而反应式执行缺乏长期前瞻能力；MCP 虽统一了 LLM 与外部工具的接口，但缺乏对环境的概念化建模机制。
AI.method: 提出 MCP-Cosmos 框架，将生成式世界模型注入 MCP 生态，采用"Bring Your Own World Model"策略，使智能体在潜在空间中预先模拟状态转移并优化计划后再执行；实验采用 ReAct 和 SPIRAL 两种策略，结合 2 个规划模型和 3 个代表性世界模型，在 20 多项 MCP-Bench 任务上进行评估。
AI.result: 相比基线，该框架显著提升了智能体与环境的交互性能指标，包括工具调用成功率和工具参数准确性；同时提出了执行质量等新评估指标，用于衡量世界模型相对于基线的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 统一 MCP、世界模型与智能体三个技术范式能够实现预测性任务自动化，BYOWM 策略为提升 LLM 智能体在动态环境中的规划与执行能力提供了有效路径，执行质量等新指标有助于更深入地评估世界模型的贡献。

title: CollabVR: Collaborative Video Reasoning with Vision-Language and Video Generation Models
summary: Recent "Thinking with Video" approaches use Video Generation Models (VGMs) for visual reasoning by producing temporally coherent Chain-of-Frames as reasoning artifacts. Even strong VGMs, however, exhibit two recurring failure modes on goal-directed tasks: long-horizon drift on multi-step tasks and mid-clip simulation errors that compound. Both stem from the absence of explicit reasoning built upon the VGM's short-horizon visual prior, a role naturally filled by Vision-Language Models (VLMs), but where to place the VLM is non-trivial: upfront plans commit before any frame is generated and post-hoc critiques over whole videos intervene too late. We propose VLM-VGM Collaborative Video Reasoning (CollabVR), a closed-loop framework that couples the VLM with the VGM at step-level granularity: the VLM plans the immediate next action, inspects the clip the VGM generates, and folds the verifier's diagnosis directly into the next action prompt to repair detected failures. On Gen-ViRe and VBVR-Bench, CollabVR improves both open-source and closed-source VGMs over single-inference, Pass@$k$, and prior test-time scaling baselines at matched compute, with the largest gains on the hardest tasks. It also yields further improvements on top of a reasoning-fine-tuned VGM, indicating that step-level VLM supervision is orthogonal to and stackable with reasoning-oriented fine-tuning. We provide video samples and additional qualitative results at our project page: https://joow0n-kim.github.io/collabvr-project-page.

AI.tldr: CollabVR提出了一种闭环框架，在每一步生成中引入VLM对VGM进行即时规划、检验与修复，从而有效克服视频生成模型在多步任务中的长程漂移和仿真误差问题，在Gen-ViRe和VBVR-Bench上超越单次推理、Pass@k及先测试时缩放基线。
AI.motivation: 现有多步视觉推理任务中，视频生成模型(VGM)存在两种典型失败模式：长程漂移（多步任务中累积偏差）和片段内仿真误差（短时模拟错误）。尽管VLM可弥补VGM缺失的显式推理能力，但现有方案存在根本缺陷——前置规划在帧生成前就做出决策，事后批评则在整个视频生成后才介入，二者均无法在生成过程中及时纠正错误。
AI.method: CollabVR是一个闭环协作框架，以单步粒度耦合VLM与VGM：VLM规划下一步即时动作，VGM根据动作生成对应视频片段，VLM检验生成的片段并直接将验证器的诊断信息融入下一步动作提示中，从而实现错误的即时检测与修复。这是一种测试时计算扩增策略，在推理阶段通过VLM的逐步监督来引导VGM的生成过程。
AI.result: 在Gen-ViRe和VBVR-Bench基准上，CollabVR在匹配计算量的条件下，一致性地提升了开源和闭源VGM的性能，超越了单次推理、Pass@k以及先前的测试时缩放基线，且在最难任务上提升幅度最大。CollabVR还能在经推理微调后的VGM基础上进一步带来性能提升，表明逐步VLM监督与面向推理的微调是正交且可叠加的。
AI.conclusion: 逐步级别的VLM监督是一种有效的测试时计算扩增策略，与推理导向的微调正交且可堆叠，为结合生成模型和语言模型进行复杂视觉推理提供了新的范式。

title: NyayaAI: An AI-Powered Legal Assistant Using Multi-Agent Architecture and Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Legal information in India remains largely inaccessible due to the complexity of legal language and the sheer volume of legal documentation involved in research and case analysis. This paper presents NyayaAI, an AI-powered legal assistant that automates and simplifies legal workflows for lawyers, law students, and general users. The system combines Large Language Models with a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline grounded in a curated Indian legal knowledge base comprising constitutional provisions, statutes, case laws, and judicial precedents. A multi-agent architecture orchestrated through the Mastra TypeScript framework coordinates a main agent with specialized sub-agents handling legal research, document summarization, case law retrieval, and drafting assistance. A compliance module validates all responses before delivery. Domain classification achieved 70\% precision across test samples, with RAG retrieval precision at 74\% and overall response accuracy at 72\%, demonstrating that structured multi-agent LLM systems can meaningfully improve legal accessibility and workflow efficiency. The code\footnote{https://github.com/B97784/NyayaAI} is made publicly available for the benefit of the research community.

AI.tldr: NyayaAI 提出一种结合大语言模型与检索增强生成的多智能体法律助手系统，通过 Mastra TypeScript 框架协调主智能体与专门子智能体，在印度法律知识库上实现法律研究、文档摘要、判例检索和起草辅助，系统在域分类、RAG 检索和整体响应准确率上分别达到 70%、74% 和 72%，验证了结构化多智能体 LLM 系统对提升法律可及性和工作流效率的有效性。
AI.motivation: 印度法律信息因法律语言的复杂性和法律文档的庞大体量而普遍难以获取，律师、法律学生和普通用户在法律研究与案例分析中面临严重的效率障碍，亟需自动化工具来简化法律工作流程。
AI.method: 该系统将大语言模型与基于策展的印度法律知识库（涵盖宪法条文、法规、判例法和司法先例）的检索增强生成流水线相结合；通过 Mastra TypeScript 框架实现多智能体架构，由一个主智能体协调负责法律研究、文档摘要、判例检索和起草辅助的专门子智能体，并引入合规模块对所有响应进行输出前验证。
AI.result: 域分类在测试样本上达到 70% 精确率，RAG 检索精确率达 74%，整体响应准确率为 72%，表明该多智能体系统能够有效提升法律可及性与工作流效率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了结构化多智能体 LLM 系统在提升法律领域可访问性和工作流效率方面的实际可行性，为法律 AI 辅助系统的设计提供了参考，同时通过公开代码促进社区进一步研究与开发。

title: CIVeX: Causal Intervention Verification for Language Agents
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures. Includes Causal-ToolBench, IHDP, ZOZO Open Bandit, and LaLonde NSW evaluations
summary:
A valid tool call is not necessarily a valid intervention. Tool-using language agents are guarded by schema validators, policy filters, provenance checks, state predictors, and self-verification, yet such safeguards do not certify that a state-changing action has an identifiable causal effect. In confounded workflows, the action that looks optimal in observational logs can reduce utility when executed.
  We introduce CIVeX, a causal intervention verifier that maps proposed actions to structural causal queries over a committed action-state graph, checks identifiability, and returns one of four auditable verdicts: EXECUTE, REJECT, EXPERIMENT, or ABSTAIN. Execution requires an assumption-scoped causal certificate carrying graph commitments, an identification argument, a one-sided lower confidence bound (LCB), provenance, and risk limits.
  On Causal-ToolBench (1,890 instances, 7 seeds), CIVeX yields zero observed false executions across moderate and adversarial confounding. Under adversarial confounding it reaches 84.9% accuracy and 81.1% of oracle utility (+2.23 vs +2.76) and is the only non-oracle method whose constrained utility under a zero-false-execution constraint exceeds the AlwaysAbstain floor. On IHDP and ZOZO Open Bandit (real production logs with uniform-random ground truth), CIVeX matches Oracle correct-execution within 0.1pp and cuts per-execute false-execution by >=50x over naive baselines. A chain-of-thought LLM verifier (Claude Opus, Sonnet) cuts false-execution by an order of magnitude over a terse baseline, yet under adversarial confounding Opus's utility falls to 74% of CIVeX's. Intervention identifiability, not action validity, is the missing primitive for reliable tool use.

AI.tldr: CIVeX提出了一种因果干预验证框架，将工具调用中的动作映射为结构因果查询，通过识别因果效应而非仅验证动作合法性来防止混淆工作流中的错误执行，实验表明该方法在零假执行约束下显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有工具调用语言代理虽配备模式验证器、策略过滤器、状态预测器和自验证等安全机制，但这些防护手段无法保证一个改变状态的动作具有可识别的因果效应，在混淆工作流中，观测日志中看似最优的动作可能在实际执行后降低效用。
AI.method: CIVeX将候选动作映射为在承诺的动作-状态图上的结构因果查询，检查可识别性，并返回四种可审计的判定：EXECUTE、REJECT、EXPERIMENT或ABSTAIN；执行需要一份带有假设范围的因果证书，包含图承诺、识别论证、单侧下置信界、来源证据和风险限制。
AI.result: 在Causal-ToolBench（1,890实例，7种子）上，CIVeX在中等和对抗性混淆下均实现零假执行；对抗混淆下达到84.9%准确率和81.1%的Oracle效用（+2.23 vs +2.76），且是唯一在零假执行约束下效用超过AlwaysAbstain基线的非Oracle方法；在IHDP和ZOZO Open Bandit真实日志上，CIVeX的Oracle正确执行率差距在0.1pp以内，每次执行的假执行率较朴素基线降低至少50倍；链式思维LLM验证器将假执行降低一个数量级，但对抗混淆下Opus效用仅为CIVeX的74%。
AI.conclusion: 动作的干预可识别性（而非动作合法性）才是实现可靠工具使用的缺失原语，CIVeX通过因果验证框架从根本上解决了工具调用中因混淆导致的错误执行问题。

title: Lost in Volume: The CT-SpatialVQA Benchmark for Evaluating Semantic-Spatial Understanding of 3D Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: Recent advances in 3D medical vision-language models have enabled joint reasoning over volumetric images and text, showing strong performance in medical visual question-answering (VQA) and report generation. Despite this progress, it remains unclear whether these models learn spatially grounded anatomy from 3D volumes or rely primarily on learned priors and language correlations. This uncertainty stems from the lack of systematic evaluation of semantic-spatial reasoning in volumetric medical VLMs for clinically reliable decision support. To address this gap, we introduce CT-SpatialVQA, a benchmark designed to evaluate semantic-spatial reasoning in 3D CT data. The benchmark comprises 9077 clinically grounded question-answer (QA) pairs derived directly from 1601 radiology reports and CT volumes, which are validated via a robust LLM-assisted pipeline with a 95% human consensus agreement rate. Our dataset requires explicit anatomical localization, laterality awareness, structural comparison, and 3D inter-structure relational reasoning. We also introduce a standardized evaluation protocol and benchmark eight 3D medical VLMs, finding severe degradation on semantic-spatial reasoning tasks, averaging 34% accuracy and often below random, highlighting the need for deeper integration of volumetric evidence for trustworthy clinical use.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CT-SpatialVQA基准，用于系统评估3D医学视觉语言模型在CT数据上的语义-空间推理能力，发现现有8个模型在该任务上平均准确率仅34%，揭示了当前模型缺乏真实的体积证据推理而依赖先验和语言关联的严重局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管3D医学视觉语言模型在VQA和报告生成等任务上表现强劲，但尚不清楚这些模型是否真正从3D体积中学习到了空间定位的解剖知识，还是主要依赖先验知识和语言相关性；缺乏对体积医学VLM在语义-空间推理能力上的系统评估，阻碍了其在临床决策支持中的可靠性验证。
AI.method: 论文构建了CT-SpatialVQA基准，包含9077个临床驱动的问答对，源自1601份放射学报告和CT体积数据，通过鲁棒的LLM辅助验证流程（人类共识一致率达95%）确保质量；数据集要求模型进行显式解剖定位、左右侧意识、结构比较和3D跨结构关系推理，并设计了标准化评估协议来评测8种3D医学VLM。
AI.result: 在CT-SpatialVQA上评估的8个3D医学VLM在语义-空间推理任务中平均准确率仅为34%，部分任务表现甚至低于随机猜测基线，表明当前模型在整合体积证据进行空间推理方面存在严重不足。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了现有3D医学VLM在语义-空间推理上的严重退化，强调了为实现可信赖的临床使用，需要更深入地将体积证据集成到模型推理过程中；CT-SpatialVQA为未来研究提供了标准化的评估工具和基准。

title: When Reviews Disagree: Fine-Grained Contradiction Analysis in Scientific Peer Reviews
summary: Scientific peer reviews frequently contain conflicting expert judgments, and the increasing scale of conference submissions makes it challenging for Area Chairs and editors to reliably identify and interpret such disagreements. Existing approaches typically frame reviewer disagreement as binary contradiction detection over isolated sentence pairs, abstracting away the review-level context and obscuring differences in the severity of evaluative conflict. In this work, we introduce a fine-grained formulation of reviewer contradiction analysis that operates over full peer reviews by explicitly identifying contradiction evidence spans and assigning graded disagreement intensity scores. To support this task, we present RevCI, an expert-annotated benchmark of peer-review pairs with evidence-level contradiction annotations with graded intensity labels. We further propose IMPACT, a structured multi-agent framework that integrates aspect-conditioned evidence extraction, deliberative reasoning, and adjudication to model reviewer contradictions and their intensity. To support efficient deployment, we distill IMPACT into TIDE, a small language model that predicts contradiction evidence and intensity in a single forward pass. Experimental results show that IMPACT substantially outperforms strong single-agent and generic multi-agent baselines in both evidence identification and intensity agreement, while TIDE achieves competitive performance at significantly lower inference cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个细粒度的审稿人矛盾分析任务，构建了专家标注的RevCI基准，并提出了IMPACT多智能体框架和其蒸馏版本TIDE小模型，在证据定位和矛盾强度判定上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有学术同行评审中的矛盾检测方法通常将审稿人分歧简化为孤立的句子级别二元矛盾检测，忽略了整篇评审的上下文信息，也无法区分矛盾严重程度的差异。
AI.method: 本文提出IMPACT，一个结构化多智能体框架，包含方面条件化证据提取、 deliberative 推理和裁决三个模块，用于建模评审矛盾及其强度；同时通过知识蒸馏得到TIDE小模型，可在单次前向传播中同时预测矛盾证据和强度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，IMPACT在证据识别和强度一致性上显著优于强单智能体和通用多智能体基线方法；TIDE在大幅降低推理成本的同时取得了与IMPACT竞争的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了细粒度、分级的审稿矛盾分析比传统二元检测更有效，多智能体结构化推理和蒸馏小模型的结合为实现高质量且高效的矛盾分析提供了可行路径。

title: Agentic MIP Research: Accelerated Constraint Handler Generation
summary: Mixed-integer programming (MIP) research is both mathematically sophisticated and engineering-intensive: testing an algorithmic hypothesis within a branch-and-cut solver requires substantial implementation, debugging, tuning, and large-scale benchmarking. We propose an agentic MIP research framework that shortens this feedback loop by embedding LLM agents into a solver-aware harness for generating, verifying, and evaluating plugins for the open-source solver SCIP. Propagation methods play a central role in accelerating MIP solving by exploiting global constraints. We instantiate our framework on the semantic lifting of MIP formulations into global constraints and the automatic construction of propagation-only SCIP constraint handlers. On the MIPLIB 2017 benchmark set, the framework successfully recovers global constraint structures from constraint programming and generates executable constraint detectors and propagation-only constraint handlers. Furthermore, the framework naturally extends to in-context learning within a sandboxed environment, enabling agents not only to tune and debug generated constraint handlers on real instances, but also to explore global constraint patterns in MIP problems and discover novel propagation strategies not yet implemented in SCIP. This framework allows us to systematically distinguish meaningful algorithmic improvements from low-value or overly costly candidates: the novel propagation methods successfully solved five additional instances within the explored benchmark. Overall, this framework demonstrates that LLM agents can autonomously navigate the complex MIP research loop, paving the way for a more automated solver development process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于LLM智能体的MIP研究框架，将其嵌入求解器感知的SCIP环境，自动完成传播插件的生成、验证与评估，成功恢复了全局约束结构、构造了可执行约束处理器，并发现了新的传播策略，额外解决了五个MIPLIB 2017实例。
AI.motivation: 混合整数规划（MIP）研究兼具数学复杂性与工程密集性，在分支切割求解器中测试算法假设需要大量的实现、调试、调优和大规模基准测试，反馈循环冗长，亟需一种自动化框架来缩短这一过程。
AI.method: 提出一个智能体MIP研究框架，将LLM智能体嵌入求解器感知的SCIP开源求解器环境中，自动完成传播插件的生成、验证与评估；框架实例化为将MIP公式语义提升为全局约束，并自动构建仅使用传播的SCIP约束处理器，同时支持沙盒环境中的上下文学习。
AI.result: 在MIPLIB 2017基准集上，该框架成功从约束编程中恢复全局约束结构，生成可执行的约束检测器和仅传播约束处理器；新的传播方法在探索的基准内额外解决了五个实例，并有效区分了有意义的算法改进与低价值或高成本的候选方案。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体能够自主导航复杂的MIP研究循环，系统性地识别有效传播策略并排除低效方案，为更自动化的求解器开发流程铺平了道路。

title: PPU-Bench:Real World Benchmark for Personalized Partial Unlearning in Vision Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) may memorize sensitive cross-modal information during pretraining. However, existing MLLM unlearning benchmarks rely on synthetic knowledge injection or complete subject-level deletion, which fail to capture realistic, personalized deletion requests that require fine-grained factual control. In this paper, we introduce PPU-Bench, a real-world and fine-tuning-free benchmark for personalized partial unlearning in MLLMs. PPU-Bench contains 24K multimodal and unimodal samples derived from pre-existing knowledge of 500 public figures under three progressively challenging settings: Complete, Selective, and Personalized unlearning. The benchmark evaluates whether methods can remove target knowledge while preserving non-target facts, model utility, and cross-modal consistency. Extensive experiments show that Complete Unlearning often suppresses visual identity rather than factual knowledge, while Selective and Personalized Unlearning expose significant forget--retain trade-offs and challenges in intra-subject factual boundaries. Robustness analysis under cross-image and prompt-based attacks reveals distinct vulnerabilities across different unlearning settings. Motivated by these findings, we propose Boundary-Aware Optimization (BAO), which explicitly models intra-subject forget-retain boundaries. Experimental results on two representative methods demonstrate that BAO can effectively enforce intra-subject factual boundaries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PPU-Bench，一个面向多模态大语言模型的细粒度个性化部分遗忘基准，包含24K样本和三种渐进式遗忘设置，并进一步提出边界感知优化（BAO）方法，通过显式建模主体内遗忘-保留边界来改进选择性遗忘与个性化遗忘中的事实边界控制。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型遗忘基准依赖合成知识注入或完整的主体级别删除，无法捕捉真实场景中需要细粒度事实控制的个性化删除请求，缺乏对跨模态信息中部分遗忘的评估能力。
AI.method: PPU-Bench基于500位公众人物的预存知识构建了24K多模态与单模态样本，设计了Complete、Selective和Personalized三种渐进式遗忘设置，评估方法在移除目标知识的同时保留非目标事实、模型效用及跨模态一致性的能力。此外，提出Boundary-Aware Optimization（BAO），通过显式建模主体内遗忘-保留边界来增强遗忘方法的细粒度事实控制。
AI.result: 实验表明，Complete Unlearning往往抑制视觉身份而非事实知识；Selective与Personalized Unlearning则暴露了显著的遗忘-保留权衡以及主体内事实边界的挑战。鲁棒性分析揭示不同遗忘设置下存在不同的攻击脆弱性。BAO在两种代表性方法上均能有效强制执行主体内事实边界。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了现有MLLM遗忘方法在细粒度事实控制上的不足，并提供了系统性基准与优化策略，为未来个性化遗忘的评估与算法设计提供了重要参考。

title: How Should LLMs Listen While Speaking? A Study of User-Stream Routing in Full-Duplex Spoken Dialogue
summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue requires a model to keep listening while generating its own spoken response. This is challenging for large language models (LLMs), which are designed to extend a single coherent sequence and do not naturally support user input arriving during generation. We argue that how the user stream is routed into the LLM is therefore a key architectural question for full-duplex modeling. To study this question, we extend a text-only LLM into a unified full-duplex spoken dialogue system and compare two routing strategies under a shared training pipeline: (i) channel fusion, which injects the user stream directly into the LLM input, and (ii) cross-attention routing, which keeps the user stream as external memory accessed through cross-attention adapters. Experiments on spoken question answering and full-duplex interaction benchmarks reveal a clear tradeoff. Channel fusion yields stronger semantic grounding and consistently better question-answering performance. However, under semantically overlapping conditions such as user interruptions, it is more vulnerable to context corruption: if the model fails to stop in time, the overlapping user stream can interfere with ongoing generation and lead to semantically incoherent continuations. Cross-attention routing underperforms on question answering, but better preserves the LLM generation context and is more robust to this failure mode. These results establish user-stream routing as a central design axis in full-duplex spoken dialogue and offer practical guidance on the tradeoff between semantic integration and context robustness. We provide a demo page for qualitative inspection.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了全双工口语对话系统中用户输入流路由策略的核心设计问题，比较了通道融合与交叉注意力路由两种方案，揭示了语义理解与上下文鲁棒性之间的关键权衡。
AI.motivation: 全双工口语对话要求模型在生成自身语音响应的同时持续监听用户输入，但大型语言模型（LLM）被设计为生成单一连贯序列，天然不支持生成过程中用户输入的到达。如何将用户流路由注入LLM成为全双工建模的核心架构问题，而现有研究对此缺乏系统性比较。
AI.method: 本文将文本LLM扩展为统一的全双工口语对话系统，在共享训练流程下比较两种路由策略：(i) 通道融合——将用户流直接注入LLM输入；(ii) 交叉注意力路由——将用户流作为外部记忆，通过交叉注意力适配器访问。实验在口语问答和全双工交互基准上进行评估。
AI.result: 通道融合在语义接地和问答性能上持续更优，但在用户打断等语义重叠条件下更易受到上下文损坏，若模型未能及时停止，重叠的用户流会干扰生成导致语义不连贯。交叉注意力路由在问答任务上表现较弱，但能更好地保持LLM生成上下文，对该失效模式更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 研究将用户流路由确立为全双工口语对话的中心设计轴，揭示了语义集成与上下文鲁棒性之间的明确权衡，为实际系统设计提供了实践指导。

title: How Much is Brain Data Worth for Machine Learning?
comment: 9 pages main text, 5 figures, 34 pages of appendix with detailed proofs
summary: If a person can solve a task, can measuring their brain make it easier to train a model to solve that task too? Recent NeuroAI work suggests that supplementing task training with neural recordings can modestly improve model performance and robustness. However, it is unclear when there should be a benefit from using neural data and how much benefit to expect. We formulate this question mathematically, and begin to address it theoretically using a simple, analytically tractable linear gaussian model of task targets and neural recordings. For a multimodal estimator trained on both brain data and task labels, we derive scaling laws for how performance scales with the numbers of brain and task samples. From these laws we derive relative value and exchange rates between brain samples and task samples, quantifying how much extra task samples neural data is worth as a function of task-brain alignment, neural and task noise, latent dimension, and brain data sample size. We also analyze test distribution shift, to identify conditions where brain-regularized learning can produce substantial robustness gains through learned invariances. Finally, under a fixed collection budget, we characterize the regimes in which brain data is worth collecting. Our results provide a foundation for understanding how valuable brain data could be for improving machine learning.

AI.tldr: 本文通过一个可解析的线性高斯模型，从理论上推导了神经数据与任务标签在多模态估计中的标度律，量化了神经数据相对于任务样本的边际价值、交换率及其对模型鲁棒性的影响，为理解神经数据在机器学习中的价值提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有NeuroAI研究表明神经记录数据可以适度提升任务模型的性能与鲁棒性，但何时以及多大程度上能从神经数据中获益仍不清楚，缺乏理论层面上的量化分析框架来解释神经数据与任务数据之间的互补关系及其价值边界。
AI.method: 作者将问题形式化为一个简单且可解析的线性高斯模型，该模型联合建模任务目标和神经记录数据；在此基础上分析了一个同时基于脑数据和任务标签训练的多模态估计器，推导出模型性能随脑样本数和任务样本数变化的标度律（scaling laws），并进一步定义了任务-脑对齐度、神经噪声与任务噪声、潜在维度等参数下的相对价值与交换率。
AI.result: 推导出了神经样本与任务样本之间的量化交换率，揭示了任务-脑对齐度、噪声水平、潜在维度及脑样本量如何影响神经数据的边际价值；同时分析了测试分布偏移场景下神经数据正则化学习带来的鲁棒性增益条件，并在固定采集预算下刻画了值得收集神经数据的参数区间。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解神经数据在提升机器学习模型中的价值提供了理论基石，明确指出只有当任务-脑对齐度足够高且数据采集预算合理时，神经数据才能带来显著的性能增益与鲁棒性改善。

title: From pre-training to downstream performance: Does domain-specific pre-training make sense?
summary: Deep learning techniques have revolutionised medical imaging, improving diagnostic accuracy and enabling both more accurate and earlier disease detection. However, the relationship between pre-training strategies and downstream performance in medical imaging models requires further exploration. Here, we systematically compare convolutional neural networks and transformers, examining various pre-training approaches, including supervised and self-supervised learning, as well as different initialisations and data modalities. Models are evaluated on natural images, chest X-rays, chest CT and retina OCT images, considering the effects of matching pre-training data with target modalities. Our findings indicate that only pre-training on data closely matching the target modality significantly improves downstream performance. While self-supervised learning can outperform supervised methods, its effectiveness varies with context. The study underscores the importance of pre-training strategies to enhance the reliability and effectiveness of deep learning models in medical imaging. By addressing these key factors, our research aims to contribute to the development of more accurate and dependable diagnostic tools, ultimately improving patient outcomes in clinical settings.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了CNN和Transformer在医学影像中的预训练策略（监督与自监督学习、不同初始化与数据模态），发现仅当预训练数据与目标模态高度匹配时才能显著提升下游性能；自监督学习可优于监督学习但其效果因场景而异。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学影像中取得了显著进展，但预训练策略（包括监督与自监督学习、初始化方式及数据模态）与下游任务性能之间的关系尚未得到充分探索，亟需系统性的比较研究。
AI.method: 系统比较了卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer在多种预训练方法下的表现，涵盖监督学习和自监督学习、不同初始化策略及数据模态，并在自然图像、胸部X光、胸部CT和视网膜OCT图像上评估了预训练数据与目标模态匹配的影响。
AI.result: 仅当预训练数据与目标模态高度匹配时才能显著提升下游性能；自监督学习在特定场景下可优于监督学习，但其有效性因上下文而异。
AI.conclusion: 预训练策略的选择对医学影像深度学习模型的可靠性和有效性至关重要，研究强调了预训练数据与目标模态匹配以及自监督学习潜力的重要性，为开发更准确、更可靠的临床诊断工具提供了指导。

title: Relative Score Policy Optimization for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer a promising route to parallel and efficient text generation, but improving their reasoning ability requires effective post-training. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a natural choice for this purpose, yet its application to dLLMs is hindered by the absence of tractable sequence-level log-ratios, which are central to standard policy optimization. The lack of tractable sequence-level log-ratios forces existing methods to rely on high-variance ELBO-based approximations, where high verifier rewards can amplify inaccurate score estimates and destabilize RL training. To overcome this issue, we propose \textbf{R}elative \textbf{S}core \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization (RSPO), a simple RLVR method that uses verifiable rewards to calibrate noisy likelihood estimates in dLLMs. The core of our algorithm relies on a key observation: a reward advantage can be interpreted not only as an update direction, but also as a target for the relative log-ratio between the current and reference policies. Accordingly, RSPO calibrates this noisy relative log-ratio estimate by comparing its reward advantage with the reward-implied target relative log-ratio, updating the policy according to the gap between the current estimate and the target rather than the raw advantage alone. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and planning benchmarks show that RSPO yields especially strong gains on planning tasks and competitive mathematical-reasoning performance.

AI.tldr: 提出相对得分策略优化（RSPO），一种针对扩散大语言模型（dLLM）的强化学习后训练方法，通过将奖励优势解释为相对对数比的目标来校准噪声似然估计，在数学推理和规划任务上取得竞争性表现。
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLM）在并行高效文本生成方面具有潜力，但其推理能力的提升需要有效的后训练。强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）是自然选择，但由于dLLM缺乏可处理的序列级对数比，现有方法依赖高方差的ELBO近似，导致高验证者奖励可能放大不准确的得分估计并 destabilize 强化学习训练。
AI.method: 提出相对得分策略优化（RSPO），其核心是将奖励优势不仅解释为更新方向，还将其作为当前策略与参考策略之间相对对数比的目标。RSPO通过比较当前奖励优势与奖励隐含的目标相对对数比，根据当前估计与目标之间的差距来更新策略，从而校准噪声相对对数比估计，而非直接使用原始优势。
AI.result: 在数学推理和规划基准上的实验表明，RSPO在规划任务上取得尤为显著的提升，并在数学推理任务上达到具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: RSPO通过将奖励优势重新解释为相对对数比的目标，有效解决了dLLM中RLVR训练面临的噪声对数比估计问题，为扩散模型基于可验证奖励的强化学习后训练提供了一种简单而有效的替代方案。

title: EquiMem: Calibrating Shared Memory in Multi-Agent Debate via Game-Theoretic Equilibrium
summary: Multi-agent debate (MAD) systems increasingly rely on shared memory to support long-horizon reasoning, but this convenience opens a critical vulnerability: a single corrupted entry can contaminate the downstream memory-augmented reasoning, and debate alone fails to filter such errors. Existing safeguards filter entries via heuristics or LLM-based validation, yet they rely on AI judgments that share the same failure modes and overlook the cross-agent dynamics of MAD. We address this gap by formulating memory updating in MAD as a zero-trust memory game, in which no agent is assumed honest and the game's equilibrium serves as an indicator of optimal memory trust. Guided by this equilibrium, we propose EquiMem, an inference-time calibration mechanism that quantifies each update algorithmically against the shared memory state, using agents' existing retrieval queries and traversal paths as evidence rather than soliciting any LLM judgment. EquiMem instantiates calibration for both embedding- and graph-based memory, and across diverse benchmarks, MAD frameworks, and memory architectures, it consistently outperforms existing safeguards, remains robust under adversarial agents, and incurs negligible inference overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出EquiMem，一种基于零信任记忆博弈均衡的推理时校准机制，用于多智能体辩论系统中检测并过滤被污染的共享记忆条目，无需依赖LLM判断即可实现鲁棒的记忆信任评估。
AI.motivation: 多智能体辩论系统依赖共享记忆支持长程推理，但单个被污染的条目会污染下游推理，而辩论本身无法过滤此类错误；现有基于启发式或LLM验证的防护方法仍共享LLM的失效模式，且忽略了跨智能体动力学，亟需一种不依赖AI判断且能利用MAD固有交互信息的记忆安全机制。
AI.method: 将MAD中的记忆更新形式化为零信任记忆博弈，其中不假设任何智能体诚实，博弈均衡作为最优记忆信任的指标；基于该均衡提出EquiMem，一种推理时校准机制，无需LLM判断，而是利用智能体已有的检索查询和遍历路径作为证据，对每个更新条目进行算法化量化校准；EquiMem分别实现了面向嵌入式和基于图的记忆的校准实例。
AI.result: 在多种基准、MAD框架和记忆架构上，EquiMem一致优于现有防护方法；在对抗性智能体存在时保持鲁棒；引入的推理开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 通过将记忆安全建模为博弈均衡问题并利用MAD系统固有的检索线索，可在不引入额外LLM判断的情况下有效检测污染记忆，这为构建可信多智能体协作系统提供了新的理论视角和实用方案。

title: VECTOR-Drive: Tightly Coupled Vision-Language and Trajectory Expert Routing for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving requires models to understand traffic scenes, infer driving intent, and generate executable motion plans. Recent vision-language-action (VLA) models inherit semantic priors from large-scale vision-language pretraining, yet still face a coupling trade-off: fully shared backbones preserve multimodal interaction but may entangle language reasoning and trajectory prediction, whereas decou pled reasoning-action pipelines reduce task conflict but weaken semantic-motion coupling. We propose VECTOR-DRIVE, a tightly coupled VLA framework built on Qwen2.5-VL-3B. VECTOR-DRIVE keeps all tokens coupled through shared self attention and routes feed-forward computation according to token semantics. Vision and language tokens are processed by a Vision-Language Expert to preserve semantic priors, while target-point, ego-state, and noisy action tokens are routed to a Trajectory Expert for motion-specific computation. On the action-token pathway, a flow-matching planner refines noisy action tokens into future waypoints and speed profiles. This design couples semantic reasoning and motion planning within a single multimodal Transformer while separating task-specific FFN computation. On Bench2Drive, VECTOR-DRIVE achieves 88.91 Driving Score and outperforms representative end-to end and VLA-based baselines. Qualitative results and ablations further validate the benefits of shared attention, semantic-aware expert routing, progressive training, and flow-based action de coding.

AI.tldr: VECTOR-DRIVE 提出了一种紧耦合的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）框架，通过在共享自注意力下根据 token 语义路由前馈计算，将语言推理与轨迹预测统一在单一多模态 Transformer 中，在 Bench2Drive 上达到 88.91 的驾驶评分并超越多种端到端与 VLA 基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端自动驾驶 VLA 模型面临耦合权衡问题：完全共享的骨干网络保留多模态交互但可能使语言推理与轨迹预测相互纠缠，而解耦的推理-动作管线虽然减少任务冲突却削弱了语义与运动之间的耦合，因此需要在保持语义-运动紧密关联的同时避免任务干扰。
AI.method: VECTOR-DRIVE 基于 Qwen2.5-VL-3B 构建，所有 token 通过共享自注意力保持耦合，但根据 token 语义将前馈计算路由到不同专家：视觉与语言 token 由视觉-语言专家处理以保留语义先验，目标点、自车状态和噪声动作 token 被路由到轨迹专家进行运动特定计算；在动作 token 路径上，流匹配规划器将噪声动作 token 细化为未来路径点与速度曲线。
AI.result: 在 Bench2Drive 基准上，VECTOR-DRIVE 取得了 88.91 的驾驶评分，显著优于代表性端到端方法及 VLA 基线；消融实验验证了共享注意力、语义感知专家路由、渐进式训练和基于流的动作解码的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了在单一多模态 Transformer 中通过语义感知的专家路由实现语言推理与运动规划的紧耦合是可行的，为 VLA 自动驾驶模型的设计提供了有效范式，同时也揭示了共享注意力与任务特定前馈分离的关键作用。

title: Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium Technical Report
summary: We introduce Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium, a 123B-parameter natively multimodal and multilingual foundation model, adapted to regional languages and the Singapore context. Developed as a sovereign AI asset, it demonstrates that deep domain adaptation can be achieved with minimal degradation to broad-spectrum intelligence and alignment. Continued pretraining was performed on Mistral Medium 3.1 using a localized 1-trillion tokens multimodal corpus, followed by a 250-billion tokens long-context extension phase. Subsequent post-training incorporated a novel human-annotated Singapore multimodal dataset and curated textual corpus on Singapore culture, knowledge, and legislation, totaling 22-billion tokens. An additional 5 billion tokens of model alignment was performed through Online Direct Preference Optimization. Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium achieves state-of-the-art performance for its size on Singapore multimodal, legal, and government policy benchmarks while remaining globally competitive on general multimodal intelligence, multilingual, and STEM benchmarks. We also introduce a novel evaluation suite encompassing localized knowledge benchmarks and an institutionally aligned model behavior and safety framework. We report the data curation principles, training methodology, and highlight benchmark and inference performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium，一个123B参数的原生多模态多语言基础模型，通过持续预训练和后训练在保持广泛智能和安全性指标的基础上，在区域语言和新加坡本地化多模态基准上达到最优性能，验证了深度区域自适应能以最小全局退化实现。
AI.motivation: 现有的大规模多模态基础模型在通用能力上表现优异，但在特定区域语言、本地化知识和法规等领域缺乏深度适应性，且现有的主权AI资产往往以牺牲通用智能为代价换取领域定制化，因此需要一种能同时兼顾区域深度自适应与全局通用智能的模型。
AI.method: 模型基于Mistral Medium 3.1进行持续预训练，使用1万亿token本地化多模态语料和2500亿token长上下文扩展；后训练阶段引入220亿token的新加坡多模态数据集和文本语料（涵盖文化、知识和立法），并通过5 billion token的在线直接偏好优化进行对齐。
AI.result: Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium在新加坡多模态、法律和政府政策基准上达到该规模下的最优性能，同时在通用多模态智能、多语言和STEM基准上保持全球竞争力；还引入了一个包含本地化知识基准和机构对齐的行为与安全框架的评估套件。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，通过精心设计的数据语料和分阶段训练策略，可以实现对区域语言和知识的深度领域自适应，同时对广泛智能和对齐的退化极小，为构建主权AI资产提供了可行的技术路径和数据标注与安全评估框架。

title: A Prompt-Aware Structuring Framework for Reliable Reuse of AI-Generated Content in the Agentic Web
summary: The evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) and the software agents built on them (AI agents) marks a turning point in the transition from a human-centric Web to an ``Agentic Web'' driven by AI agents. However, for AI-Generated Content (AIGC), which is expected to dominate the Web, there is currently no mechanism for agents to verify its reliability, reproducibility, or license compliance during generation. This lack of transparency risks causing chained hallucinations and compliance violations through the reuse of AIGC. Consequently, a framework to manage the provenance and generation conditions of AIGC is essential. In this paper, we present a framework that automatically attaches structured metadata to AIGC at generation time, including modularized prompts, contexts, thoughts, model information, hyperparameters, and confidence. The metadata is enveloped together with verifiable credentials to support the reliable assessment and reuse of AIGC. This framework enables efficient curation of structured AIGC and facilitates its safe use for applications such as fine-tuning and knowledge distillation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个框架，在AI生成内容（AIGC）生成时自动附加包含模块化提示、上下文、思维链、模型信息、超参数和置信度在内的结构化元数据，并通过可验证凭证封装，以支持AIGC的可靠性评估、溯源验证和合规复用，从而应对从人类中心Web向Agentic Web过渡中缺乏内容可信机制的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型和AI代理的快速发展，Web正从人类中心向AI代理驱动的Agentic Web过渡，AI生成内容（AIGC）预计将主导Web内容。然而，现有机制无法让代理在AIGC生成过程中验证其可靠性、可复现性及许可证合规性，导致AIGC在复用过程中可能引发链式幻觉和合规违规，迫切需要一种能够管理AIGC来源和生成条件的框架。
AI.method: 本文提出一个在AIGC生成时自动附加结构化元数据的框架，元数据包含模块化提示、上下文、思维链、模型信息、超参数和置信度等信息，并通过可验证凭证进行封装，从而支持对AIGC的可靠评估和安全复用，实现对结构化AIGC的高效筛选，并促进其在微调和知识蒸馏等场景中的安全使用。
AI.result: 论文提出的框架实现了在生成时自动为AIGC附加结构化元数据并通过可验证凭证封装，能够支持AIGC的可靠性评估与合规性验证，并有效促进AIGC在微调和知识蒸馏等下游任务中的安全复用，从而缓解AIGC复用过程中潜在的链式幻觉和合规风险。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为Agentic Web中AIGC的可信管理和安全复用提供了一种系统化解决方案，通过在生成源头嵌入可验证的元数据，打通了AIGC从生成到复用的可信链路，对未来AI代理生态中的内容治理、合规监管和模型优化具有重要的支撑作用。

title: Cross-Sample Relational Fusion: Unifying Domain Generalization and Class-Incremental Learning
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM 2026). Code is available at https://github.com/LAMDA-CL/TMM26-CORF
summary: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) requires a learning system to learn new classes while retaining previously learned knowledge. However, in real-world scenarios such as autonomous driving, a system trained on urban roads in sunny weather may later need to operate in rural or highway environments with different traffic patterns and weather conditions. This requires the model not only to overcome catastrophic forgetting, but also to effectively handle domain shifts. In this paper, we propose CrOss-sample Relational Fusion (CORF), a unified framework to address domain shift and catastrophic forgetting simultaneously. To enhance generalizability, we perform selective refinement of training samples by leveraging spatial contribution maps to highlight semantically informative regions. Furthermore, we incorporate predictive confidence to adaptively weigh samples, thereby facilitating the learning of domain-agnostic representations. To alleviate forgetting, we propose a cascaded distillation framework that captures cross-sample relational dependencies across multiple feature hierarchies, enabling multi-grained knowledge transfer from previous tasks. CORF can be seamlessly integrated into existing CIL algorithms to enhance their generalizability, achieving competitive performance across various benchmark datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/LAMDA-CL/TMM26-CORF .

AI.tldr: 提出跨样本关系融合框架CORF，统一克服类别增量学习中的灾难性遗忘与域偏移问题，通过空间贡献图选择性精炼训练样本、自适应置信加权学习域无关表示，并引入级联蒸馏框架实现多层级跨样本关系知识迁移，可无缝集成至现有CIL算法中提升泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有类别增量学习方法主要关注克服灾难性遗忘，但在真实场景（如自动驾驶）中，模型还需应对训练与部署环境之间的域偏移（如从城市晴朗天气迁移至农村或高速公路不同交通模式与天气条件），缺乏一种能够同时处理灾难性遗忘和域偏移的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出CrOss-sample Relational Fusion (CORF)框架，包含三部分：1）利用空间贡献图对训练样本进行选择性精炼，突出语义信息丰富区域以增强泛化性；2）引入预测置信度自适应加权样本，促进域无关表示的学习；3）提出级联蒸馏框架，在多个特征层级上捕获跨样本关系依赖，实现从先前任务的多粒度知识迁移。
AI.result: CORF可无缝集成至现有CIL算法中，显著增强其泛化能力，在多个基准数据集上取得具有竞争力的性能表现，有效同时缓解了灾难性遗忘与域偏移问题。
AI.conclusion: CORF通过统一建模跨样本关系融合与多层级知识蒸馏，为类别增量学习中的域偏移问题提供了通用解决方案，且具有良好的即插即用特性，能够增强现有CIL算法的泛化性能，未来可推广至更多真实场景。

title: Towards On-Policy Data Evolution for Visual-Native Multimodal Deep Search Agents
summary: Multimodal deep search requires an agent to solve open-world problems by chaining search, tool use, and visual reasoning over evolving textual and visual context. Two bottlenecks limit current systems. First, existing tool-use harnesses treat images returned by search, browsing, or transformation as transient outputs, so intermediate visual evidence cannot be re-consumed by later tools. Second, training data is usually built by fixed curation recipes that cannot track the target agent's evolving capability. To address these challenges, we first introduce a visual-native agent harness centered on an image bank reference protocol, which registers every tool-returned image as an addressable reference and makes intermediate visual evidence reusable by later tools. On top of this harness, On-policy Data Evolution (ODE) runs a closed-loop data generator that refines itself across rounds from rollouts of the policy being trained. This per-round refinement makes each round's data target what the current policy still needs to learn. The same framework supports both diverse supervised fine-tuning data and policy-aware reinforcement learning data curation, covering the full training lifecycle of the target agent. Across 8 multimodal deep search benchmarks, ODE improves the Qwen3-VL-8B agent from 24.9% to 39.0% on average, surpassing Gemini-2.5 Pro in standard agent-workflow setting (37.9%). At 30B, ODE raises the average score from 30.6% to 41.5%. Further analyses validate the effectiveness of image-bank reuse, especially on complex tasks requiring iterative visual refinement, while rollout-feedback evolution yields more grounded SFT traces and better policy-matched RL tasks than static synthesis.

AI.tldr: 提出基于图像银行引用协议的视觉原生智能体框架，以及面向策略的闭环数据进化方法ODE，在多模态深度搜索任务上显著提升Qwen3-VL-8B和30B模型性能，超越Gemini-2.5 Pro。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在多模态深度搜索中面临两大瓶颈：一是工具使用框架将搜索、浏览或变换返回的图像视为瞬态输出，中间视觉证据无法被后续工具重新消费；二是训练数据通常由固定的数据策展配方构建，无法追踪目标智能体不断演化的能力，导致数据与当前策略的学习需求不匹配。
