AI.method: 提出视觉原生智能体框架，核心是图像银行引用协议（image bank reference protocol），将每个工具返回的图像注册为可寻址引用，使中间视觉证据可被后续工具复用。在此基础上提出On-policy Data Evolution (ODE)，构建闭环数据生成器，依据当前训练策略的 rollout 结果逐轮自我优化，使每轮数据精准针对当前策略仍需学习的内容，同时支持有监督微调和强化学习数据的自适应策展，覆盖智能体完整训练生命周期。
AI.result: 在8个多模态深度搜索基准上，ODE将Qwen3-VL-8B智能体从24.9%提升至39.0%的平均得分，超越Gemini-2.5 Pro在标准智能体工作流设置下的37.9%；在30B尺度上，平均得分从30.6%提升至41.5%。进一步分析验证了图像银行复用在需要迭代视觉精化的复杂任务上的有效性，且 rollout 反馈进化相比静态合成生成了更精准的SFT轨迹和更匹配策略的RL任务。
AI.conclusion: 视觉原生智能体框架通过图像银行引用协议解决了多模态深度搜集中视觉证据链断裂的核心问题；ODE通过策略感知的闭环数据进化机制实现了训练数据与智能体能力的动态对齐，显著提升了模型在复杂多模态推理任务上的表现，为训练更强大的多模态智能体提供了有效范式。

title: Beyond ESG Scores: Learning Dynamic Constraints for Sequential Portfolio Optimization
summary: ESG-aware portfolio optimization is increasingly important for sustainable capital allocation, yet most learning-based methods still operationalize ESG by appending static scores to the policy observation or reward. This creates a mismatch for sequential control: ESG scores are noisy, provider-dependent, low-frequency, and temporally misaligned with sequential portfolio decisions, while financial evidence suggests that ESG is better treated as a portfolio preference, risk-exposure, or hedge dimension than as a robust alpha factor. We propose to impose ESG constraints without modifying the financial policy's observation or reward, using a Multimodal Action-Conditioned Constraint Field (MACF) that learns mechanism-specific ESG costs from point-in-time multimodal evidence and contemplated portfolio transitions. We then introduce MACF-X, a family of optimizer-specific adapters that converts MACF costs and uncertainties into native constrained-optimization interfaces through a shared slack- and uncertainty-aware pressure layer. Across multiple constraint-integration interfaces, MACF-X reduces tail ESG budget pressure while maintaining competitive financial performance. Ablations show that this improvement depends on dynamic evidence inputs and three-head decomposition, while static ESG-score proxies are nearly indistinguishable from score-shuffled noise baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出多模态动作条件约束场(MACF)及其优化器适配器MACF-X，在不修改金融策略观察或奖励的情况下，从多模态时点证据中学习机制特定的ESG成本，以改进ESG约束型投资组合优化的时点对齐性和约束满足效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的ESG投资组合优化方法通常将静态ESG分数附加到策略观测或奖励中，但ESG分数存在噪声大、依赖提供商、频率低、与序贯投资决策时间错位等问题，且金融证据表明ESG更适合作为组合偏好、风险暴露或对冲维度而非稳健的alpha因子，因此需要一种不修改金融策略观察或奖励的ESG约束施加方法。
AI.method: 提出多模态动作条件约束场(MACF)，从点位的多模态证据和拟议的组合转移中学习机制特定的ESG成本；进一步提出MACF-X，这是一族优化器特定适配器，通过共享的松弛与不确定性感知压力层将MACF成本和不确定性转换为原生的约束优化接口。
AI.result: 在多种约束集成接口上，MACF-X在保持竞争性金融表现的同时降低了尾部ESG预算压力；消融实验表明该改进依赖于动态证据输入和三头分解结构，而静态ESG分数代理与分数打乱后的噪声基线几乎无法区分。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明动态多模态证据比静态ESG评分更有效，三头分解机制对性能贡献显著，静态ESG代理缺乏信息增益，未来应探索基于证据驱动的ESG约束方法以替代传统的分数嵌入策略。

title: Illusion-Aware Visual Preprocessing and Anti-Illusion Prompting for Classic Illusion Understanding in Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Workshop on 5th DataCV Challenge
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit systematic bias toward visual illusions, recalling memorized facts rather than perceiving actual visual differences. This paper presents a training-free framework for the 5th DataCV Challenge Task 1 at CVPR 2026, addressing this perception-versus-memory conflict through three complementary strategies:(1) illusion-aware image preprocessing that weakens illusion-inducing context via type-specific transformations (edge extraction, color isolation, morphological processing, and reference-line overlay), (2) anti-illusion prompt engineering guiding VLMs toward qualitative visual comparison, and (3) multi-vote ensemble that further improves robustness. Our method achieves 90.48% accuracy on the official 630-image test set using Claude (claude-opus-4-6) with 5-vote majority ensemble, and 98.41% on a human-verified subset. The approach requires no finetuning, relying solely on visual manipulation and prompt design. Our solution secured 2nd place in the challenge, only 0.47% behind the 1st-place solution. Code is available at https://github.com/jasminezz/sf-illusion-aware-vlm.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个无需微调的三策略框架（幻觉感知图像预处理、反幻觉提示工程、多投票集成），用于解决视觉语言模型在面对视觉错觉时偏好记忆而非实际视觉感知的感知-记忆冲突问题，在DataCV Challenge中取得90.48%准确率和第2名的成绩。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在面对视觉错觉图像时存在系统性偏差，倾向于依据记忆中的先验知识而非实际的视觉差异进行判断，导致感知与记忆之间的冲突问题。现有方法难以在不重新训练模型的前提下有效缓解这一偏差。
AI.method: 提出一个无需微调的三策略框架：(1) 欺骗感知图像预处理，通过类型特定的变换（边缘提取、颜色分离、形态学处理、参考线叠加）削弱诱导错觉的上下文信息；(2) 反幻觉提示工程，引导VLM进行定性视觉比较；(3) 多投票集成，通过多数投票增强鲁棒性。方法完全依赖视觉操作和提示设计，无需任何模型微调。
AI.result: 在官方630张测试图像上，使用Claude（claude-opus-4-6）结合5投票多数集成达到90.48%的准确率，在人工验证子集上达到98.41%。该方法在DataCV Challenge中获得第2名，仅落后第1名0.47%。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，通过纯视觉层面的预处理和提示设计即可显著缓解VLM的视觉错觉偏差，无需模型微调；多投票集成进一步提升了方法的鲁棒性，证明了记忆-感知冲突可通过外部干预有效缓解。

title: Learning More from Less: Exploiting Counterfactuals for Data-Efficient Chart Understanding
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in chart understanding, largely driven by supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on increasingly large synthetic datasets. However, scaling SFT data alone is inefficient and overlooks a key property of charts: charts are programmatically generated visual artifacts, where small, code-controlled visual changes can induce drastic shifts in semantics and correct answers. Learning this counterfactual sensitivity requires VLMs to discriminate fine-grained visual differences, yet standard SFT treats training instances independently and provides limited supervision to enforce this behavior. To address this, we introduce ChartCF, a data-efficient training framework designed to enhance counterfactual sensitivity. ChartCF consists of: (1) a counterfactual data synthesis pipeline via code modification, (2) a chart similarity-based data selection strategy that filters overly difficult samples for improved training efficiency, and (3) multimodal preference optimization across both textual and visual modalities. Experiments on five benchmarks show that ChartCF achieves superior or comparable performance to strong chart-specific VLMs while using significantly less training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChartCF，一个数据高效的训练框架，通过反事实数据合成、图表相似性数据选择和跨模态偏好优化，增强视觉语言模型对图表中反事实敏感性的判别能力，在显著减少训练数据的情况下达到或超越现有图表专用VLM的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在图表理解任务上依赖大规模合成数据的监督微调，但该方法忽视了图表的一个关键特性：图表由程序代码生成，代码控制的微小视觉变化可能导致语义和正确答案发生剧烈变化。标准SFT将训练实例独立处理，无法提供足够的监督来强制模型学习这种反事实敏感性，即区分细粒度视觉差异的能力。
AI.method: ChartCF框架包含三个核心组件：(1) 通过代码修改实现反事实数据合成管道，生成具有细粒度视觉差异的图表样本对；(2) 基于图表相似性的数据选择策略，过滤过难样本以提升训练效率；(3) 跨文本和视觉模态的多模态偏好优化，增强模型对反事实差异的敏感性。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上的实验表明，ChartCF在使用显著更少训练数据的情况下，取得了与强图表专用VLM相当或更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了仅靠扩大SFT数据量对于图表理解任务效率低下，而通过引入反事实学习机制可以有效提升模型对细粒度视觉差异的判别能力。ChartCF证明了数据效率与模型性能可以兼得，为图表理解领域提供了一种更高效且可解释的训练范式。

title: Do Self-Evolving Agents Forget? Capability Degradation and Preservation in Lifelong LLM Agent Adaptation
summary:
Recent advances in LLM agents enable systems that autonomously refine workflows, accumulate reusable skills, self-train their underlying models, and maintain persistent memory. However, we show that such self-evolution is often non-monotonic: adapting to new task distributions can progressively degrade previously acquired capabilities across all major evolution channels.
  We identify this phenomenon as \emph{capability erosion under self-evolution} and show that it consistently emerges across workflow, skill, model, and memory evolution. To mitigate this issue, we propose \emph{Capability-Preserving Evolution} (CPE), a general stabilization principle that constrains destructive capability drift during continual adaptation. Across all four evolution dimensions, CPE consistently improves retained capability stability while preserving adaptation performance. For example, in workflow evolution, CPE improves retained simple-task performance from 41.8\% to 52.8\% under GPT-5.1 optimization while simultaneously achieving stronger complex-task adaptation.
  Our findings suggest that stable long-horizon self-evolving agents require not only acquiring new capabilities, but also explicitly preserving previously learned ones during continual adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了LLM智能体在自我进化过程中普遍存在的“能力侵蚀”现象，即适应新任务分布时先前获得的能力会逐步退化；并提出能力保持进化（CPE）原则，通过约束破坏性能力漂移来稳定持续适应过程，在四个进化维度上均实现了保留能力稳定性与适应性能的双重提升。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM智能体已能在工作流优化、技能积累、模型自训练和持久记忆等维度上实现自主自我进化，但这种进化往往是非单调的——适应新任务分布时，先前获得的能力会逐渐退化。现有研究缺乏对这一系统性退化问题的认识与应对策略。
AI.method: 本文系统识别了“能力侵蚀”现象，该现象一致地出现在工作流、技能、模型和记忆四个进化通道中。为解决此问题，提出了能力保持进化（CPE）这一通用稳定化原则，通过在持续适应过程中约束破坏性的能力漂移来缓解退化。
AI.result: 在四个进化维度上，CPE均能在保持适应性能的同时显著提升保留能力的稳定性。以工作流进化为例，在GPT-5.1优化下，CPE将保留的简单任务性能从41.8%提升至52.8%，同时实现了更强的复杂任务适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 稳定的长周期自我进化智能体不仅需要获取新能力，还需要在持续适应过程中明确地保留先前习得的能力。这一发现对设计长效自主进化的AI系统具有重要指导意义。

title: Semantic Alignment in Hyperbolic Space for Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
comment: Accepted to the PVUW Workshop at CVPR 2026. Project page: https://tmhoanggg.github.io/HyRo/
summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation requires adapting image-level vision-language models such as CLIP to dense pixel-level prediction, which is challenging due to the mismatch between hierarchical structure and semantic alignment in the embedding space. While recent works leverage hyperbolic geometry to model hierarchical relationships, they align embeddings across hierarchical levels but overlook semantic misalignment among embeddings within the same level. In this work, we propose HyRo, a hyperbolic fine-tuning framework that decouples hierarchical and semantic alignment in the Poincaré ball model. HyRo aligns hierarchical levels by adjusting the hyperbolic radius and refines semantic relationships through angular alignment using an orthogonal transformation that theoretically preserves the hyperbolic radius. Experiments on standard open-vocabulary semantic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that HyRo achieves state-of-the-art performance over prior methods.

AI.tldr: HyRo是一个基于双曲几何的微调框架，通过解耦层次对齐与语义对齐，在庞加莱球模型中使用径向调整对齐层次结构、通过正交变换进行角向对齐以保持语义一致性，在开放词汇语义分割任务上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割方法利用双曲几何对层次关系进行建模时，虽然能够对齐不同层次间的嵌入表示，但忽略了同一层次内嵌入之间的语义错位问题，导致层次对齐与语义对齐之间存在耦合且未充分优化。
AI.method: 提出HyRo框架，在庞加莱球模型中解耦层次对齐与语义对齐：通过调整双曲半径来实现层次之间的对齐，同时利用正交变换进行角度对齐以精细化语义关系，并且该正交变换在理论上保证不会改变双曲半径，从而确保两种对齐机制互不干扰。
AI.result: 在标准开放词汇语义分割基准数据集上，HyRo取得了优于先前方法的性能，达到了最先进的水平。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，在双曲空间中对层次结构与语义关系进行解耦对齐是提升开放词汇语义分割性能的有效路径，正交变换保证半径不变的性质为保持层次结构提供了理论保障，未来可进一步探索双曲几何在更广泛视觉-语言任务中的应用。

title: Grounded or Guessing? LVLM Confidence Estimation via Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking
summary: Large vision-language models suffer from visual ungroundedness: they can produce a fluent, confident, and even correct response driven entirely by language priors, with the image contributing nothing to the prediction. Existing confidence estimation methods cannot detect this, as they observe model behavior under normal inference with no mechanism to determine whether a prediction was shaped by the image or by text alone. We introduce BICR (Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking), a model-agnostic confidence estimation framework that makes this contrast explicit during training by extracting hidden states from a frozen LVLM twice: once with the real image-question pair, and once with the image blacked out while the question is held fixed. A lightweight probe is trained on the real-image hidden state and regularized by a ranking loss that penalizes higher confidence on the blacked-out view, teaching it to treat visual grounding as a signal of reliability at zero additional inference cost. Evaluated across five modern LVLMs and seven baselines on a benchmark covering visual question answering, object hallucination detection, medical imaging, and financial document understanding, BICR achieves the best cross-LVLM average on both calibration and discrimination simultaneously, with statistically significant discrimination gains robust to cluster-aware analysis at 4-18x fewer parameters than the strongest probing baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为BICR（盲图对比排序）的置信度估计框架，通过对比真实图像与黑化图像下的LVLM隐藏状态，利用轻量级探针和排序损失检测视觉接地程度，在五个LVLM和七种基线方法上实现了校准和区分度的最优平衡。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型存在视觉非接地性问题，即模型可能完全依赖语言先验生成流畅且看似正确的回答，而图像对预测毫无贡献；现有置信度估计方法无法检测这一问题，因为它们仅观察正常推理下的模型行为，缺乏判断预测是由图像驱动还是纯文本驱动的机制。
AI.method: BICR是一个与模型无关的置信度估计框架，核心创新在于通过对比实验显式建模视觉接地性：对冻结的LVLM提取两次隐藏状态，一次使用真实图像-问题对，另一次将图像黑化并保持问题不变；然后训练一个轻量级探针，利用真实图像下的隐藏状态进行预测，并通过排序损失正则化，惩罚在黑化视图上给出高置信度，使模型学会将视觉接地作为可靠性信号；整个框架在推理时无额外计算开销。
AI.result: 在五个现代LVLM和七种基线方法上，覆盖视觉问答、物体幻觉检测、医学影像和金融文档理解等任务，BICR在跨LVLM平均上同时达到了最优的校准性能和区分度；其区分度增益具有统计显著性，在聚类感知分析下依然稳健，且所需参数量仅为最强探针基线的4-18分之一。
AI.conclusion: BICR表明，通过显式的有无图像对比可以有效地将视觉接地性转化为置信度信号，从而检测LVLM中的非接地性幻觉；该方法轻量、通用且无额外推理开销，为视觉语言模型的可靠性评估提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

title: Dsat: A Native SAT Solver for Discrete Logic
comment: To Appear at The International Conferences on Theory and Applications of Satisfiability Testing (SAT), 2026
summary: Discrete variables are common in many applications, such as probabilistic reasoning, planning and explainable AI. When symbolic reasoning techniques are brought in to bear on these applications, a standard technique for handling discrete variables is to binarize them into Boolean variables to allow the use of Boolean computational machinery such as SAT solvers. This technique can face both computational and semantical challenges though. In this work, we develop a native SAT solver for discrete logic, which is a direct extension of Boolean logic in which variables can take arbitrary values. Our proposed solver has a similar design to Boolean SAT solvers, with ingredients such as unit resolution and clause learning but ones that operate natively on discrete variables. We illustrate the merits of the developed SAT solver by comparing it empirically to CSP solvers applied to discrete CNFs, to Boolean SAT solver applied to binarized CNFs, and to some hybrid solvers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种原生离散逻辑SAT求解器，直接将布尔SAT求解器的单元传播和子句学习等核心机制扩展到离散变量域，避免了离散变量二值化带来的计算和语义问题，实验表明其在离散CNF问题上优于传统CSP求解器、二值化布尔SAT求解器及混合求解器。
AI.motivation: 在许多概率推理、规划与可解释AI应用中，离散变量普遍存在，但现有方法通常通过二值化将离散变量转换为布尔变量以利用布尔SAT求解器，这一做法既带来了计算效率上的挑战，也引发了语义上的问题，因此亟需一种能够原生处理离散变量的SAT求解方法。
AI.method: 本文开发了一种原生离散逻辑SAT求解器，将布尔逻辑直接扩展为离散逻辑，其中变量可取任意值；求解器在设计上借鉴了布尔SAT求解器的核心组件，包括单元分辨率（unit resolution）和子句学习（clause learning），但这些组件均以原生方式在离散变量上操作，而非通过二值化转换。
AI.result: 通过实验将所提出的离散SAT求解器与CSP求解器（直接求解离散CNF）、布尔SAT求解器（处理二值化CNF）以及若干混合求解器进行对比，实验结果验证了该求解器在离散CNF问题上的性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，为离散逻辑设计原生SAT求解器是可行且有效的，能够同时解决二值化方法带来的计算与语义困境，为处理离散变量的推理任务提供了一种更直接且高效的替代方案。

title: When Style Similarity Scores Fail: Diagnosing Raw CSD Cosine in Artist-Style Evaluation
summary: Raw cosine in the 768-dimensional output space of the Contrastive Style Descriptor (CSD) is now widely read as an absolute, calibrated style-fidelity score for text-to-image and style-imitation evaluation. We introduce the discrimination gap, a corpus-internal, prototype-free and threshold-free diagnostic that tests whether contrastive style cosines admit an absolute same-versus-different interpretation on a candidate artist corpus. On a 1799-artwork, 91-artist public-domain corpus, raw CSD cosine yields negative point-estimate gaps for $23/91$ artists at the pairwise level ($2/91$ robust under bootstrap) and for $15/91$ in the aggregated-pool scoring regime style-fidelity evaluations typically use. CSLS readout on the frozen backbone reduces the aggregated negative-gap count to $4/91$; combined with positional-embedding interpolation to $336$ pixels it raises unsupervised pair-verification AUC from $0.883$ to $0.905$ across $25$ artist-disjoint splits. We refer to this diagnostic-driven readout protocol on the frozen backbone (CSLS as default, pos-interp $336$ as the stronger optional setting) as CSD+, not a new encoder.A cross-backbone check on CLIP-ViT-L/14, SigLIP-large and DINOv2-Large reproduces the same shared-tradition failure pattern, providing evidence that the residual reflects a shared limitation of the four backbones we tested rather than a CSD-specific artefact. Practical implication: before reporting CSD cosine as an absolute style-fidelity score, run the diagnostic on the candidate corpus; CSLS is the minimal correction when it fails.

AI.tldr: 本文提出判别间隙（discrimination gap）诊断方法，揭示对比风格描述子（CSD）的原始余弦相似度并非绝对风格保真度分数；在此基础上提出CSD+协议（默认CSLS读取，可选位置嵌入插值至336像素），在冻结骨干网络上显著改善风格匹配评估的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前CSD在768维输出空间中的原始余弦被广泛视为绝对、校准的风格保真度分数，用于文生图和风格模仿评估，但该解释是否在候选艺术家语料库上具有真正的同-异判别有效性尚未被诊断，存在将对比风格余弦绝对化的研究空白和潜在风险。
AI.method: 引入判别间隙作为语料库内部且无需原型和阈值的诊断方法，用于检验对比风格余弦是否支持绝对的同-异解读；在此基础上提出CSD+协议，即在冻结骨干网络上采用CSLS（对比学习相似性搜索）作为默认读取方式，可选增强为位置嵌入插值至336像素，不引入新编码器。跨骨干网络（CLIP-ViT-L/14、SigLIP-large、DINOv2-Large）验证诊断结果的一致性。
AI.result: 在1799件作品、91位艺术家的公共领域语料库上，原始CSD余弦在成对级别对23/91位艺术家产生负点估计间隙（其中2/91经bootstrap稳健），在聚合池化评分机制下对15/91位艺术家为负。CSLS读取将聚合负间隙计数降至4/91；结合位置嵌入插值至336像素，在25次艺术家划分的无监督成对验证AUC从0.883提升至0.905。跨骨干网络复现了相同的共享传统失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 原始CSD余弦不可直接视为绝对风格保真度分数，需在候选语料库上运行判别间隙诊断；CSLS是最小修正方案，CSD+协议（CSLS+可选位置插值）提供了更可靠的风格匹配评估手段。残余失败模式源于骨干网络共享的局限性而非CSD特定伪影。

title: RubricEM: Meta-RL with Rubric-guided Policy Decomposition beyond Verifiable Rewards
summary: Training deep research agents, namely systems that plan, search, evaluate evidence, and synthesize long-form reports, pushes reinforcement learning beyond the regime of verifiable rewards. Their outputs lack ground-truth answers, their trajectories span many tool-augmented decisions, and standard post-training offers little mechanism for turning past attempts into reusable experience. In this work, we argue that rubrics should serve not merely as final-answer evaluators, but as the shared interface that structures policy execution, judge feedback, and agent memory. Based on this view, we introduce RubricEM, a rubric-guided reinforcement learning framework that combines stagewise policy decomposition with reflection-based meta-policy evolution. RubricEM first makes research trajectories stage-aware by conditioning planning, evidence gathering, review, and synthesis on self-generated rubrics. It then assigns credit with Stage-Structured GRPO, which uses stagewise rubric judgments to provide denser semantic feedback for long-horizon optimization. In parallel, RubricEM trains a shared-backbone reflection meta-policy that distills judged trajectories into reusable rubric-grounded guidance for future attempts. The resulting RubricEM-8B achieves strong performance across four long-form research benchmarks, outperforming comparable open models and approaching proprietary deep-research systems. Beyond final performance, we perform thorough analyses to understand the key ingredients of RubricEM.

AI.tldr: RubricEM 提出将评分标准作为策略执行、裁判反馈和智能体记忆的统一接口，通过阶段化策略分解和基于反思的元策略进化框架，使 8B 参数模型在长格式研究报告生成任务上超越同类开源模型并接近闭源系统。
AI.motivation: 训练深度研究智能体面临可验证奖励缺失的困境：其长格式输出缺乏标准答案，轨迹涉及大量工具增强决策，且标准后训练方法无法将过往经验转化为可复用的知识，现有强化学习框架难以有效支持该场景下的长程优化。
AI.method: RubricEM 提出评分引导的强化学习框架，包含两个核心机制：一是阶段化策略分解，将研究轨迹按规划、证据收集、评审和综合等阶段进行拆分，每个阶段依据自生成的评分标准进行条件化执行；二是基于反思的元策略进化，通过共享主干网络的反思元策略将经裁判评估的轨迹蒸馏为可复用的评分标准导向的指导信息，同时采用阶段结构化 GRPO 算法利用阶段级评分判断提供更密集的语义反馈以优化长程奖励。
AI.result: 基于 8B 参数的 RubricEM 在四个长格式研究基准上达到强性能，超越同类开源模型，性能接近专有深度研究系统，且论文对框架的关键组件进行了深入消融分析以理解其贡献。
AI.conclusion: 评分标准不应仅作为最终答案的评估工具，而应成为连接策略执行、裁判反馈和智能体记忆的共享接口，RubricEM 通过这一设计有效解决了深度研究智能体中可验证奖励缺失下的强化学习难题，为长程、多步骤推理智能体的训练提供了新范式。

title: Towards a Virtual Neuroscientist: Autonomous Neuroimaging Analysis via Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Transforming neuroimaging data into clinically actionable biomarkers is a knowledge-intensive and labor-intensive process. Standardized workflows such as fMRIPrep have improved robustness and efficiency, but they are statically configured and cannot reason about downstream objectives, deliberate over alternative strategies, or close the loop between intermediate evidence and subsequent decisions in the way a human researcher would. This lack of closed-loop adaptation often leaves domain experts trapped in a cycle of manual trial-and-error to tune parameters and remediate pipeline failures, severely constraining the scalability of clinical biomarker development. To bridge this gap, we introduce NIAgent, a multi-agent system for autonomous end-to-end neuroimaging analysis. Unlike conventional flat tool-calling agents, NIAgent adopts a code-centric execution paradigm where specialist agents collaboratively synthesize and optimize executable programs over composable domain-specific primitives. This design enables robust, long-horizon workflow construction that adapts dynamically to runtime observations. Furthermore, we propose a hierarchical verification framework for autonomous quality control, integrating cohort-level metric screening with agentic visual inspection to drive evidence-grounded workflow remediation. Experiments on ADHD-200 and ADNI demonstrate that NIAgent outperforms standard workflow-based baselines in predictive performance while exhibiting sophisticated agentic behaviors, including strategy exploration and adaptive refinement.

AI.tldr: NIAgent是一个面向端到端神经影像分析的多智能体系统，采用代码中心执行范式和分层验证框架，能够自适应地构建和优化可执行工作流，在ADHD-200和ADNI数据集上超越传统工作流基线，展现出策略探索与自适应优化等高级智能体行为。
AI.motivation: 现有标准化神经影像分析工作流（如fMRIPrep）虽提升了鲁棒性和效率，但本质上是静态配置的，无法根据下游目标进行推理、无法权衡替代策略、也无法像人类研究者那样在中间证据与后续决策之间形成闭环，导致领域专家不得不反复进行手动试错调参和故障修复，严重制约了临床生物标志物开发的可扩展性。
AI.method: NIAgent采用多智能体架构，核心创新包括两点：一是代码中心执行范式，由多个专家智能体基于可组合的领域专用原语协同编写和优化可执行程序，实现鲁棒的、长时序的自适应工作流构建；二是分层验证框架，将队列级指标筛选与智能体驱动的视觉检查相结合，实现基于证据的工作流自动修复和质量控制。
AI.result: 在ADHD-200和ADNI数据集上的实验表明，NIAgent在预测性能上超越了基于标准工作流的基线方法，并展现出策略探索和自适应优化等复杂的智能体行为，验证了其在实际神经影像分析中的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: NIAgent通过将闭环自适应能力引入神经影像分析，有效解决了传统静态工作流缺乏推理和自适应调节能力的根本局限，为大规模临床生物标志物开发提供了可行的自动化方案，其代码中心范式和分层验证机制为复杂科学分析任务的自主智能体系统设计提供了新范式。

title: LCGNav: Local Candidate-Aware Geometric Enhancement for General Topological Planning in Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Online topological planning has become an effective paradigm for Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE), but existing methods still suffer from two limitations: redundant local depth information and weakened focus on current frontier candidates as the topological graph grows. To address this, we propose LCGNav, a modular local geometric enhancement framework for topological VLN. LCGNav explicitly converts candidate depth views into 3D point clouds and applies physical truncation based on the agent's reachable range, enabling more compact local geometric modeling. It further introduces a dimension-preserving local fusion strategy with transient state degradation, so that geometric enhancement is applied only to the currently relevant ghost nodes without changing the original planner interface. Experiments on R2R-CE and RxR-CE show that LCGNav serves as an effective cross-architecture enhancement module, consistently improving multiple key metrics of representative online topological baselines with low additional training cost. When integrated with ETP-R1, LCGNav achieves the best performance among the compared online topological methods on the val-unseen splits of the R2R-CE and RxR-CE benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/shannanshouyin/LCGNav.

AI.tldr: LCGNav是一个面向连续环境视觉-语言导航的模块化局部几何增强框架，通过将候选深度视图转换为三维点云并引入物理截断与维度保持的局部融合策略，有效解决了拓扑规划中局部深度信息冗余和当前前沿候选关注度弱化的问题，在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准上显著提升了多个在线拓扑基线的关键指标。
AI.motivation: 现有在线拓扑规划方法在连续环境视觉-语言导航中存在两个关键局限：一是局部深度信息冗余，导致计算和表示效率低下；二是随着拓扑图规模增长，模型对当前前沿候选节点的关注度逐渐弱化，影响导航决策质量。
AI.method: LCGNav提出模块化局部几何增强框架，首先将候选深度视图显式转换为三维点云，并基于智能体可达范围进行物理截断，实现更紧凑的局部几何建模；其次引入维度保持的局部融合策略与瞬态状态退化机制，使得几何增强仅作用于当前相关的鬼影节点而不改变原始规划器接口，保持框架的即插即用性。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准上的实验结果表明，LCGNav作为跨架构增强模块，能够以较低的额外训练成本一致性地提升多个代表性在线拓扑基线的关键指标；当与ETP-R1集成时，在R2R-CE和RxR-CE的val-unseen分割上取得了所比较在线拓扑方法中的最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: LCGNav验证了显式几何建模与瞬态局部增强策略在拓扑VLN中的有效性，表明通过模块化增强而非重构规划器的方式能高效提升导航性能，为在线拓扑规划方法提供了兼具兼容性与性能优势的改进方向。

title: WildClawBench: A Benchmark for Real-World, Long-Horizon Agent Evaluation
summary: Large language and vision-language models increasingly power agents that act on a user's behalf through command-line interface (CLI) harnesses. However, most agent benchmarks still rely on synthetic sandboxes, short-horizon tasks, mock-service APIs, and final-answer checks, leaving open whether agents can complete realistic long-horizon work in the runtimes where they are deployed. This work presents WildClawBench, a native-runtime benchmark of 60 human-authored, bilingual, multimodal tasks spanning six thematic categories. Each task averages roughly 8 minutes of wall-clock time and over 20 tool calls, and runs inside a reproducible Docker container hosting an actual CLI agent harness (OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, or Hermes Agent) with access to real tools rather than mock services. Grading is hybrid, combining deterministic rule-based checks, environment-state auditing of side effects, and an LLM/VLM judge for semantic verification. Across 19 frontier models, the best, Claude Opus 4.7, reaches only 62.2% overall under OpenClaw, while every other model stays below 60%, and switching harness alone shifts a single model by up to 18 points. These results show that long-horizon, native-runtime agent evaluation remains a far-from-resolved task for current frontier models. We release the tasks, code, and containerized tooling to support reproducible evaluation.

AI.tldr: WildClawBench是一个包含60个双语多模态长时域任务的本地运行时智能体基准测试，平均任务耗时约8分钟、需要20余次工具调用，在真实CLI环境中评估前沿模型的表现；最佳模型Claude Opus 4.7仅达62.2%准确率，表明长时域本地运行时智能体评估仍是尚未解决的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准测试大多依赖合成沙箱、短时域任务、模拟服务API和最终答案检查，无法评估智能体在真实部署运行时中完成长时域实际工作的能力，存在评估生态与部署场景之间的显著差距。
AI.method: WildClawBench设计了60个人工编写的双语多模态任务，涵盖六个主题类别，每个任务平均耗时约8分钟、需20余次工具调用，在可复现的Docker容器中运行真实CLI智能体框架（OpenClaw、Claude Code、Codex或Hermes Agent），并使用真实工具而非模拟服务；评分采用混合机制，结合确定性规则检查、环境状态副作用审计和LLM/VLM评判器进行语义验证。
AI.result: 在19个前沿模型中，最佳模型Claude Opus 4.7在OpenClaw框架下仅达62.2%总体准确率，其余模型均低于60%；更换智能体框架可使同一模型性能波动高达18个百分点，表明框架选择对评估结果有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 长时域本地运行时智能体评估对当前前沿模型仍是远未解决的问题，现有模型在真实运行时环境中的表现远未饱和，且智能体框架的选择对模型性能有决定性影响，该基准为可复现评估提供了任务、代码和容器化工具支持。

title: NEXUS: Continual Learning of Symbolic Constraints for Safe and Robust Embodied Planning
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have catalyzed progress in embodied intelligence, a fundamental gap between their inherent probabilistic uncertainty and the strict determinism and verifiable safety required in the physical world. To mitigate this gap, this paper introduces NEXUS, a modular framework designed for continual learning in embodied agents. Different from prior works that treat symbolic artifacts merely as static interfaces, NEXUS leverages them for symbolic grounding and knowledge evolution. The framework explicitly decouples physical feasibility from safety specifications: capability of agents is improved through closed-loop execution feedback, while probabilistic risk assessments are grounded into deterministic hard constraints to establish a rigorous pre-action defense. Experiments on SafeAgentBench demonstrate that NEXUS achieves superior task success rates while effectively refusing unsafe instructions, exhibiting robust defense against adversarial attacks, and progressively improving planning efficiency through knowledge accumulation.

AI.tldr: NEXUS是一个面向具身智能体的模块化持续学习框架，通过将概率性风险评估转化为确定性硬约束、利用符号工件进行符号落地与知识演化，弥合了大语言模型概率不确定性与物理世界严格确定性安全要求之间的鸿沟，在SafeAgentBench上实现了更高的任务成功率与更强的安全拒止能力。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在具身智能领域取得进展，但其固有的概率不确定性与物理世界所需的严格确定性、可验证安全性之间存在根本性差距，现有方法将符号工件仅视为静态接口，未能有效解决安全与持续学习问题。
AI.method: NEXUS提出模块化持续学习框架，将物理可行性与安全规格显式解耦：通过闭环执行反馈提升智能体能力，同时将概率性风险评估转化为确定性硬约束，构建严格的行动前防御机制；利用符号工件进行符号落地与知识演化，实现持续学习。
AI.result: 在SafeAgentBench上的实验表明，NEXUS在实现更优任务成功率的同时，能够有效拒绝不安全指令，展现出对对抗性攻击的鲁棒防御能力，并通过知识积累逐步提升规划效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了将概率不确定性锚定为确定性安全约束、结合符号落地与持续学习的模块化设计，是弥合LLM与物理世界安全性鸿沟的有效路径，为具身智能体的安全部署与持续能力提升提供了框架性解决方案。

title: Reducing Annotation Burden for Femoral Cartilage Segmentation in Knee MRI via Cross-Sequence Transfer Learning
summary: Purpose: To develop and evaluate cross-sequence transfer learning for automatic femoral cartilage segmentation, testing bidirectional transfer between dual-echo steady-state (DESS) and sagittal proton density-weighted 3D fast spin-echo (Cube) sequences. Materials and Methods: We optimized a modified 2D U-Net on 507 DESS images from the Osteoarthritis Initiative (OAI). We then established same-sequence baselines using subject-level cross-validation on a subset of 44 OAI DESS images and 44 Cube images acquired at the Istituto Ortopedico Rizzoli, Bologna, Italy. Each subset included 22 non-lesioned and 22 lesioned subjects. Finally, we performed transfer learning across sequences by fine-tuning the pretrained models on the target sequence with increasing training set sizes to study convergence, while keeping validation and test sets fixed. Segmentations were evaluated using Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and average surface distance (ASD). Lesion effects were assessed with two-sided Mann-Whitney U tests with Bonferroni correction. Results: Same-sequence training yielded higher accuracy on DESS than Cube (DSC, $0.900$ vs $0.830$; $P < .001$). Cube-to-DESS transfer matched DESS performance (DSC, $0.903 \pm 0.032$ vs $0.900 \pm 0.027$), reaching a performance plateau at 9 training subjects. DESS-to-Cube yielded a lower combined DSC ($0.802 \pm 0.049$ vs $0.830 \pm 0.042$), reaching a plateau at 24 training subjects. Lesions did not affect DESS ($P \ge .39$) but reduced Cube accuracy (DSC, $0.805$ vs $0.856$; $P < .001$). Conclusion: Transfer learning across sequences can substantially reduce target-sequence annotation requirements for femoral cartilage segmentation, but performance is direction- and sequence-dependent, and the effects of lesions on segmentation may vary across MRI sequences.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于跨序列迁移学习的股骨软骨自动分割方法，实验表明Cube到DESS的迁移可完全匹配同序列训练性能（DSC 0.903），而DESS到Cube的迁移效果略低（DSC 0.802），显著减少了目标序列的标注需求，但迁移方向和序列特性及病变影响相关。
AI.motivation: 现有股骨软骨分割模型通常针对单一MRI序列训练，不同序列间的图像特性差异导致在新序列上需要大量重新标注和训练，缺乏跨序列迁移学习的系统性评估，且病变对分割精度的影响在不同序列间尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用改进的2D U-Net，先在507张OAI的DESS图像上预训练，然后通过44张DESS和44张Cube图像分别构建同序列基线（基于受试者级交叉验证），再通过微调预训练模型进行跨序列迁移学习，逐步增加目标序列训练集规模以研究收敛行为，使用Dice相似系数和平均表面距离评估分割精度，并用Mann-Whitney U检验分析病变影响。
AI.result: 同序列训练DESS精度显著高于Cube（DSC 0.900 vs 0.830，P<0.001）；Cube到DESS迁移完全匹配DESS同序列性能（DSC 0.903），仅需9个训练样本即达到性能平台；DESS到Cube迁移的DSC为0.802，低于Cube同序列基线（0.830），需24个训练样本达到平台；病变对DESS无显著影响（P≥0.39），但显著降低Cube精度（DSC 0.805 vs 0.856，P<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 跨序列迁移学习能大幅减少目标序列的标注需求，但迁移效果具有方向依赖性和序列依赖性；不同MRI序列下病变对分割精度的影响存在差异，在应用迁移学习时需考虑序列特性与病变因素的交互作用。

title: Do Linear Probes Generalize Better in Persona Coordinates?
summary: It is becoming increasingly necessary to have monitors check for harmful behaviors during language model interactions, but text-only monitoring has not been sufficient. This is because models sometimes exhibit strategic deception and sandbagging, changing their behavior during evaluation. This motivates the use of white-box monitors like linear probes, which can read the model internals directly. Currently, such probes can fail under distribution shift, limiting their usefulness in real settings. We study whether there exists a low-dimensional subspace of the model internals that captures harmful behaviors more robustly, while leaving out spuriously correlative features. Inspired by the Assistant Axis and Persona Selection Model, we construct persona axes for deception and sycophancy using contrastive persona prompts. The first principal components, obtained by unsupervised PCA of the persona-specific vectors, cleanly separate harmful and harmless personas. Across 10 evaluation datasets, we show that persona-derived directions transfer non-trivially and probes trained on persona-PC projections generalize better than probes trained on raw activations. We also find that a unified axis consisting of multiple harmful and harmless behaviors improves generalization across behaviors and datasets. Overall, persona vectors provide a useful inductive bias for building more transferable behavior probes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于对比人格提示构建人格轴（persona axes），并通过无监督PCA提取主成分来捕获模型内部有害行为的低维子空间，从而训练出在分布偏移下更具迁移性的白盒监控探针。
AI.motivation: 现有文本监控难以应对语言模型在评估中可能出现的策略性欺骗和沙袋行为，而白盒探针虽能直接读取模型内部状态，但在分布偏移下容易失效，需要构建更鲁棒且可迁移的有害行为表征。
AI.method: 借鉴Assistant Axis和Persona Selection Model的思路，通过对比人格提示（deception和sycophancy）构建人格向量；对人格特定向量进行无监督PCA，取其第一主成分作为分离有害与无害行为的低维方向；在该人格-PC投影上训练线性探针，并进一步构建包含多种有害与无害行为的统一轴以提升跨行为和跨数据集的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在10个评估数据集上，基于人格-PC投影训练的探针相比基于原始激活训练的探针具有显著更好的迁移性能；统一轴方法进一步提升了跨行为和数据集的泛化效果。
AI.conclusion: 人格向量为构建更具迁移性的行为探针提供了有效的归纳偏置，表明模型内部存在捕获有害行为的稳健低维子空间，可用于更可靠的AI安全监控。

title: Field-Localized Forgery Detection for Digital Identity Documents
summary: Digital identity verification systems used in remote onboarding rely on document images to authenticate users, making them vulnerable to localized manipulations of key identity fields such as facial photographs and textual information. Existing forgery detection methods, developed primarily for natural-image forensics, show limited transferability to structured identity documents. We propose FLiD, a lightweight field-localized framework that targets critical identity regions rather than processing full-document images. A fine-tuned object detector first localizes face and text fields; a frozen MobileNetV3-Small backbone then extracts compact field-level embeddings, which are classified by lightweight neural network with only 191K trainable parameters. FLiD achieves AUC scores of 0.880 (face), 0.954 (text), and 0.923 (both-field attacks), with corresponding EERs of 18.05%, 11.61%, and 15.16%, representing absolute reductions of 29-35 percentage points over a full-document baseline trained from scratch. FLiD also consistently outperforms general-purpose manipulation detectors (TruFor, MMFusion, UniVAD) across all attack scenarios while requiring 13x fewer parameters and 21x fewer FLOPs

AI.tldr: FLiD是一个轻量级字段局部化框架，通过目标检测定位身份文档中的关键区域（人脸和文本字段），并使用冻结的MobileNetV3-Small骨干提取紧凑嵌入后进行轻量级分类，在多个攻击场景下显著优于全文档基线和通用篡改检测方法，同时参数量和计算量分别降低13倍和21倍。
AI.motivation: 远程身份验证系统依赖文档图像进行用户认证，但关键身份字段（如人脸照片和文本信息）容易受到局部篡改攻击。现有针对自然图像设计的篡改检测方法难以有效迁移到结构化身份文档领域，因为身份文档具有高度结构化的布局和字段级别的局部篡改特性，需要专门针对这类场景的轻量级伪造检测方案。
AI.method: FLiD框架首先使用经过微调的目标检测器定位身份文档中的关键区域（人脸和文本字段）；然后利用冻结的MobileNetV3-Small骨干网络提取紧凑的字段级嵌入表示；最后通过仅含191K可训练参数的轻量级神经网络对这些嵌入进行分类，判断字段是否被篡改。该框架仅处理局部化的关键身份区域，而非整个文档图像。
AI.result: FLiD在三个攻击场景下取得了AUC分数：人脸字段0.880、文本字段0.954、双字段联合攻击0.923，对应等错误率（EER）分别为18.05%、11.61%和15.16%，相比从头训练的全文档基线实现了29-35个百分点的绝对EER降低。在与通用篡改检测器（TruFor、MMFusion、UniVAD）的对比中，FLiD在所有攻击场景下均持续优于这些方法，同时参数量减少13倍、计算量（FLOPs）减少21倍。
AI.conclusion: FLiD证明了针对身份文档结构特点设计字段局部化伪造检测框架的有效性和高效性，通过聚焦关键身份区域而非全局图像处理，在显著降低模型复杂度的同时获得了更优的检测性能。该工作为远程身份验证中的文档伪造检测提供了新的轻量级解决方案方向。

title: Empowering VLMs for Few-Shot Multimodal Time Series Classification via Tailored Agentic Reasoning
summary: In this paper, we propose the first VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning framework for few-$\underline{\textbf{s}}$hot multimodal $\underline{\textbf{T}}$ime $\underline{\textbf{S}}$eries $\underline{\textbf{C}}$lassification ($\textbf{MarsTSC}$), which introduces a self-evolving knowledge bank as a dynamic context iteratively refined via reflective agentic reasoning. The framework comprises three collaborative roles: i) Generator conducts reliable classification via reasoning; ii) Reflector diagnoses the root causes of reasoning errors to yield discriminative insights targeting the temporal features overlooked by Generator; iii) Modifier applies verified updates to the knowledge bank to prevent context collapse. We further introduce a test-time update strategy to enable cautious, continuous knowledge bank refinement to mitigate few-shot bias and distribution shift. Extensive experiments across 12 mainstream time series benchmarks demonstrate that $\textbf{MarsTSC}$ delivers substantial and consistent performance gains across 6 VLM backbones, outperforming both classical and foundation model-based time series baselines under few-shot conditions, while producing interpretable rationales that ground each classification decision in human-readable feature evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个用于小样本多变量时间序列分类的视觉语言多智能体推理框架MarsTSC，通过自演化知识库与反射式智能体推理机制，在12个基准数据集上显著优于现有经典模型和基础模型方法，并生成可解释的分类依据。
AI.motivation: 现有小样本时间序列分类方法在利用视觉语言模型（VLM）时缺乏有效的多智能体协作推理机制，难以动态捕获被忽视的时间特征，且面临少样本偏差和分布偏移问题，导致分类性能受限且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: MarsTSC框架引入自演化知识库作为动态上下文，通过反射式智能体推理进行迭代优化；框架包含三个协作角色：生成器（Generator）负责基于推理的可靠分类，反射器（Reflector）诊断推理错误根源并提取被忽略的时间特征判别性信息，修改器（Modifier）对知识库进行验证更新以防止上下文崩溃；同时引入测试时更新策略，实现谨慎持续的知库精炼，缓解少样本偏差和分布偏移。
AI.result: 在12个主流时间序列基准数据集上的大量实验表明，MarsTSC在6种VLM骨干网络上均取得显著且一致的性能提升，在小样本条件下超越经典模型和基于基础模型的时间序列基线方法，同时生成的分类决策依据具有可解释性，包含人类可读的特征证据。
AI.conclusion: MarsTSC通过多智能体反射式推理与自演化知识库机制，有效提升了小样本多变量时间序列分类的性能与可解释性，为VLM在时间序列分析中的应用提供了新范式，未来可推广至更复杂的时间序列任务。

title: Investigating Anisotropy in Visual Grounding under Controlled Counterfactual Perturbations
comment: To be published in the proceedings of the 5th Explainable AI for Computer Vision (XAI4CV) Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary:
Visual Grounding benchmarks assume that the object described by a referring expression is always present in the image, and grounding models are therefore rarely evaluated under semantically mismatched captions. In such cases, models frequently exhibit approximation behavior, producing a plausible bounding box that satisfies only part of the expression (\eg, preserving the original object while ignoring modified contextual cues). Because mismatched captions represent realistic edge cases, this behavior compromises reliability and raises concerns from an explainability perspective. Identifying its underlying causes is thus essential for improving model faithfulness and interpretability.
  Adopting a mechanistic interpretability viewpoint, this work examines whether embedding anisotropy contributes to counterfactual failures. A similarity-controlled counterfactual caption generation protocol is introduced to systematically perturb object or contextual components within predefined embedding similarity intervals, enabling a fine-grained analysis of grounding behavior as a function of alignment. Experiments on two Transformer-based models with markedly different embedding geometries (BERT-based TransVG and CLIP-based SwimVG) reveal no meaningful correlation between cosine similarity and approximation. These findings suggest that anisotropy alone does not account for counterfactual errors, and that robustness requires investigating finer-grained geometric properties of the embedding space.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉定位模型在语义不匹配描述下的近似行为，通过机制可解释性视角分析嵌入各向异性是否导致反事实失败，提出相似度控制的反事实描述生成协议，实验表明余弦相似度与近似行为无显著相关性，嵌入各向异性不是主要原因。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位基准假设描述对象必然存在于图像中，模型在语义不匹配描述下会产生近似行为（如仅保留原始对象而忽略修改后的上下文线索），这种不可靠行为在现实边缘场景中影响模型可信度和可解释性，因此需要探究其根本原因以提升模型忠实度。
AI.method: 采用机制可解释性视角，提出一种相似度控制的反事实描述生成协议，系统性地在预定义的嵌入相似度区间内扰动对象或上下文组件，从而实现对齐程度对定位行为影响的细粒度分析；实验选取两种嵌入几何结构显著不同的Transformer模型（基于BERT的TransVG和基于CLIP的SwinVG）进行比较研究。
AI.result: 在BERT-based TransVG和CLIP-based SwinVG两种模型上的实验表明，余弦相似度与模型近似行为之间不存在有意义的相关性，嵌入各向异性不能解释反事实错误的发生。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入各向异性本身不是导致视觉定位模型反事实失败的主要原因，提升模型鲁棒性需要进一步研究嵌入空间中更细粒度的几何性质。

title: Strategic commitments shape collective cybersecurity under AI inequality
summary: The growing integration of AI into cybersecurity is reshaping the balance between attackers and defenders. When access to advanced AI-enabled defence tools is uneven, resource-limited defenders may be unable to adopt effective protection, creating persistent system vulnerabilities. We study the impact of differential AI access using an evolutionary game-theoretic model in a finite population. We first show that when high-capability defence is costly, the population is driven toward low-cost, weak-defence behaviour, sustaining attacks and weakening long-run security. To address this problem, we introduce differential access to AI defence tools by allowing defenders to choose between low- and high-capability protection based on their resources. We then examine the role of a small group of committed defenders who always adopt strong defence and influence others through social learning. Although commitment increases the prevalence of strong defence, it alone cannot stabilise secure outcomes due to high defence costs. We therefore incorporate a targeted subsidy to remove the cost disadvantage from committed defenders. Our analysis shows that subsidised commitment significantly increases strong defence adoption, suppresses successful attacks, and improves overall system resilience. Simulations across a broad parameter space confirm that subsidies consistently outperform commitment alone. In addition, social-welfare analysis shows improved defender outcomes while keeping attacker gains low. These findings suggest that targeted support for key defenders can be an effective mechanism for stabilising cybersecurity in AI-driven environments and provide a theoretical bridge between cybersecurity policy, AI governance, and strategic allocation of defensive AI capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文利用进化博弈论模型研究AI防御工具差异化获取对网络安全的影响，发现当高能力防御成本高昂时，种群趋向弱防御行为，而通过对承诺型防御者提供定向补贴可以显著提升强防御采纳率、压制攻击成功率并增强系统整体韧性。
AI.motivation: AI在网络安全中的整合正在改变攻防平衡，但先进AI防御工具的获取不均使得资源有限的防御者无法采用有效保护，导致系统持续存在漏洞。现有研究缺乏对差异化AI访问如何影响长期安全结果的正式理论分析。
AI.method: 采用有限种群进化博弈论模型，允许防御者根据自身资源在低能力与高能力保护之间选择；引入始终采用强防御的承诺型防御者小群体，并通过社会学习影响其他个体；进一步设计定向补贴机制以消除承诺型防御者的成本劣势。
AI.result: 当高能力防御成本高昂时，种群被驱动向低成本弱防御行为收敛，维持攻击并削弱长期安全；仅靠承诺无法稳定安全结果；加入定向补贴后，强防御采纳率显著提升，成功攻击被压制，系统韧性全面提升。跨广泛参数空间的仿真表明补贴始终优于仅承诺策略，社会福利分析显示防御者收益改善而攻击者收益保持低位。
AI.conclusion: 定向补贴关键防御者是AI驱动环境下稳定网络安全的有效机制，为网络安全政策、AI治理与防御性AI能力战略分配提供了理论桥梁。

title: KEPIL: Knowledge-Enhanced Prompt-Image Learning for Prompt-Robust Disease Detection
summary: Vision--language models (VLMs) show promise for clinical decision support in radiology because they enable joint reasoning over radiological images and clinical text, thereby leveraging complementary clinical information. However, radiological findings are long-tailed in practice, leaving some conditions underrepresented and making zero-shot inference essential. Yet current CLIP-style medical VLMs are sensitive to prompt variations and often lack trustworthy external knowledge at inference time, which hinders reliable clinical deployment. We present \textit{KEPIL}, a prompt-robust framework that integrates curated medical knowledge to stabilize zero-shot generalization. KEPIL comprises: (i) \emph{dynamic prompt enrichment} using ontologies with LLM assistance, (ii) a \emph{semantic-aware contrastive loss} aligning embeddings of equivalent prompt variants via a dual-embedding objective, and (iii) \emph{entity-centric report standardization} to yield ontology-aligned representations. Across seven benchmarks, KEPIL achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot inference performance; under prompt-variation tests, it improves AUC by \(6.37\%\) on \textit{CheXpert} and by \(4.11\%\) on average. These results suggest that structured knowledge and robust prompt design are key to clinically reliable radiology-facing VLMs. Code will be released at https://github.com/Roypic/KEPIL.

AI.tldr: KEPIL 提出一种融合结构化医学知识与提示鲁棒性设计的框架，通过动态提示增强、语义感知对比损失和实体中心报告标准化，在多个放射学基准上实现了零样本推理的最新性能，显著提升了视觉-语言模型在临床部署中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有 CLIP 风格的医学视觉-语言模型在零样本推理中对提示变化高度敏感，且缺乏可靠的先验外部知识，导致在长尾分布的放射学发现场景下难以实现稳定的临床部署。
AI.method: KEPIL 框架包含三个核心组件：(i) 动态提示增强，利用本体论和 LLM 辅助构建稳健的提示模板；(ii) 语义感知对比损失，通过双嵌入目标对齐等价提示变体的语义表示；(iii) 实体中心报告标准化，将放射学报告转换成本体对齐的结构化表示。
AI.result: 在七个基准数据集上，KEPIL 取得了零样本推理的最新最优性能；在提示变化稳定性测试中，在 CheXpert 上 AUC 提升 6.37%，平均提升 4.11%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化领域知识与鲁棒的提示设计是实现临床可靠的放射学视觉-语言模型的关键，KEPIL 为医学 VLM 的可信零样本部署提供了有效范式。

title: SimWorld Studio: Automatic Environment Generation with Evolving Coding Agent for Embodied Agent Learning
summary: LLM/VLM-based digital agents have advanced rapidly thanks to scalable sandboxes for coding, web navigation, and computer use, which provide rich interactive training grounds. In contrast, embodied agents still lack abundant, diverse, and automatically generated 3D environments for interactive learning. Existing embodied simulators rely on manually crafted scenes or procedural templates, while recent LLM-based 3D generation systems mainly produce static scenes rather than deployable environments with verifiable tasks and standard learning interfaces. We introduce SimWorld Studio, an open-source platform built on Unreal Engine 5 for generating evolving embodied learning environments. At its core is SimCoder, a tool/skill-augmented coding agent that writes and executes engine-level code to construct physically grounded 3D worlds from language/image instructions. SimCoder self-evolves by using verifier feedback (e.g., compilation errors, physics checks, VLM critiques) to revise environments and autonomously add reusable tools and skills to its library. Generated worlds are exported as Gym-style environments for embodied agent learning. SimWorld Studio further enables co-evolution between environment generation and embodied learning: agent performance feedback guides SimCoder to generate adaptive curricula near the learner's capability frontier, so that environments become increasingly challenging as the embodied agent improves. Three case studies on embodied navigation show that self-evolution improves generation reliability, generated environments substantially improve embodied agent performance that generalizes to unseen benchmarks, and co-evolution yields an 18-point success-rate gain over fixed-environment learning and a 40-point gain over an untrained agent.

AI.tldr: SimWorld Studio是一个基于Unreal Engine 5的开源平台，通过SimCoder编码智能体自动从语言/图像指令生成可部署的3D具身学习环境，并支持环境生成与具身学习的协同演化，在具身导航任务中相较固定环境学习取得18个百分点的成功率提升。
AI.motivation: 具身智能体缺乏充足、多样且可自动生成的3D交互环境用于学习，现有具身模拟器依赖人工构建场景或程序化模板，而基于LLM的3D生成系统主要产生静态场景，无法提供可部署、含可验证任务及标准学习接口的环境。
AI.method: SimWorld Studio的核心是SimCoder，一个工具/技能增强的编码智能体，它能够编写并执行引擎级代码以从语言或图像指令构建物理真实的3D世界；SimCoder通过验证器反馈（如编译错误、物理检查、VLM批评）自我进化以修正环境并自主添加可复用的工具和技能；生成的场景被导出为Gym风格的环境用于具身智能体学习；平台进一步支持环境生成与具身学习的协同演化——智能体性能反馈引导SimCoder在学习者能力边界附近生成自适应课程。
AI.result: 三项具身导航案例研究显示：自我进化提升了环境生成的可靠性；生成的环境显著提升了具身智能体的性能并可泛化到未见过的基准测试；协同演化相比固定环境学习取得18个百分点的成功率提升，相比未训练智能体取得40个百分点的提升。
AI.conclusion: SimWorld Studio证明了通过编码智能体自动生成可部署的3D交互环境并使其与具身学习协同演化是可行的，能够有效提升环境生成可靠性和具身智能体性能，为突破具身智能领域的环境瓶颈提供了系统性解决方案。

title: MultiMedVision: Multi-Modal Medical Vision Framework
summary: Multi-modal medical imaging enables comprehensive diagnostics, yet current foundation models process 2D (e.g. X-ray) and 3D (e.g. CT) data with separate, dimensionality-specific architectures. We present MultiMedVision, a unified framework for joint 2D/3D representation learning built on a Sparse Vision Transformer. Our model uses 3D Rotary Positional Embeddings and variable-length sequence packing to process mixed-modality batches natively within a shared latent space, without modality-specific adapters or treating 3D volumes as 2D slice sequences. Trained with a self-supervised objective on chest X-rays (MIMIC-CXR) and CT scans (CT-RATE), and using a single shared encoder with 5x less data, MultiMedVision achieves competitive performance on both 2D benchmarks (Macro AUROC 0.82 on MIMIC, 0.84 on CheXpert) and 3D tasks (0.85 on CT-RATE). Analysis of the learned representations reveals coexisting modality-specific and shared feature subspaces, demonstrating that unified cross-dimensional representation learning is feasible without sacrificing modality-specific performance.

AI.tldr: MultiMedVision提出一个基于稀疏视觉Transformer的统一框架，通过3D旋转位置编码和变长序列打包，在共享潜空间中原生联合处理2D和3D医学影像，无需模态专用适配器，以5倍数据量在2D和3D任务上均取得有竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前医学影像基础模型对2D（如X光）和3D（如CT）数据采用分离的维度专用架构，缺乏能够同时在两种维度上统一学习的框架，限制了跨模态表示学习的效率和泛化能力。
AI.method: MultiMedVision基于稀疏视觉Transformer架构，引入3D旋转位置编码以编码三维空间位置信息，并采用变长序列打包技术，使混合维度数据批次能在共享潜空间中直接处理，无需模态专用适配器或将3D体素视为2D切片序列。模型使用自监督学习目标，在胸部X光（MIMIC-CXR）和CT扫描（CT-RATE）数据集上联合训练一个共享编码器。
AI.result: 在仅使用5倍更少数据量的条件下，MultiMedVision在2D基准上达到MIMIC数据集Macro AUROC 0.82、CheXpert数据集0.84，在3D任务CT-RATE上达到0.85，取得了与专用架构相竞争的性能。表示分析揭示模型同时学习了模态特定和共享的特征子空间。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，在不牺牲模态专用性能的前提下，实现跨维度统一表示学习是可行的，为多模态医学影像基础模型的设计提供了新思路。模型学到的表示中模态特定与共享特征子空间并存，说明共享编码器能有效捕捉跨维度的共性知识和模态特有的差异性信息。

title: Don't Click That: Teaching Web Agents to Resist Deceptive Interfaces
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference. 23 pages, 8 figures, 19 tables
summary: Vision-language model (VLM) based web agents demonstrate impressive autonomous GUI interaction but remain vulnerable to deceptive interface elements. Existing approaches either detect deception without task integration or document attacks without proposing defenses. We formalize deception-aware web agent defense and propose DUDE (Deceptive UI Detector & Evaluator), a two-stage framework combining hybrid-reward learning with asymmetric penalties and experience summarization to distill failure patterns into transferable guidance. We introduce RUC (Real UI Clickboxes), a benchmark of 1,407 scenarios spanning four domains and deception categories. Experiments show DUDE reduces deception susceptibility by 53.8% while maintaining task performance, establishing an effective foundation for robust web agent deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出 DUDE 框架，通过混合奖励学习、非对称惩罚和经验总结将失败模式转化为可迁移指导，在 RUC 基准上使网络代理对欺骗性 UI 的易感性降低 53.8%，同时保持任务性能。
AI.motivation: 基于 VLM 的网络代理在自主 GUI 交互中易受欺骗性界面元素攻击，现有方法要么仅检测欺骗而未与任务集成，要么仅记录攻击而未提出防御，缺乏将欺骗感知能力融入代理决策的完整防御框架。
AI.method: 提出 DUDE 框架，采用两阶段架构：首先通过混合奖励学习与非对称惩罚训练欺骗检测器，然后利用经验总结将失败模式蒸馏为可迁移的指导信号，使代理在任务执行中感知并规避欺骗性界面元素。
AI.result: 在包含 1,407 个场景、覆盖四个领域和多种欺骗类别的 RUC 基准上，DUDE 将网络代理的欺骗易感性降低 53.8%，同时不损害任务完成性能，验证了欺骗感知防御的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DUDE 为鲁棒网络代理部署建立了有效基础，表明将欺骗检测与任务执行相结合的防御框架可显著提升代理在对抗性 GUI 环境中的安全性，为后续可信任自主代理研究提供了方向。

title: Attention Sinks in Diffusion Transformers: A Causal Analysis
summary: Attention sinks -- tokens that receive disproportionate attention mass -- are assumed to be functionally important in autoregressive language models, but their role in diffusion transformers remains unclear. We present a causal analysis in text-to-image diffusion, dynamically identifying dominant attention recipients per timestep and suppressing them via paired, training-free interventions on the score and value paths. Across 553 GenEval prompts on Stable Diffusion~3 (with SDXL corroboration), removing these sinks does not degrade text-image alignment (CLIP-T) or preference proxies (ImageReward, HPS-v2) at $k{=}1$; only under stronger interventions ($k\!\geq\!10$) does HPS-v2 exhibit a metric-dependent boundary, while CLIP-T remains robust throughout. The perceptual shifts induced by suppression are nonetheless \emph{sink-specific} -- $\sim\!6\times$ larger than equal-budget random masking -- revealing an empirical dissociation between trajectory-level perturbation and \emph{semantic alignment} in diffusion transformers. \footnote{Code available at https://github.com/wfz666/ICML26-attention-sink.}

AI.tldr: 本文通过因果分析发现，文本到图像扩散Transformer中的注意力沉 odstranění（抑制）在弱干预下不会损害语义对齐指标（CLIP-T、ImageReward、HPS-v2），仅在强干预下HPS-v2出现指标依赖边界，且感知偏移是沉点特异的（约为随机掩码的6倍），揭示了轨迹级扰动与语义对齐之间的经验性解耦。
AI.motivation: 注意力沉点（attention sinks）在自回归语言模型中被认为具有功能性重要角色，但其在扩散Transformer中的作用尚不清楚，本文旨在填补这一研究空白，通过因果分析探究文本到图像扩散模型中注意力沉点的功能意义。
AI.method: 本文在文本到图像扩散模型中提出动态识别每个时间步的注意力沉点（dominant attention recipients），并通过在分数路径（score path）和值路径（value path）上施加配对的无训练干预（training-free interventions）来抑制这些沉点，从而实现因果分析。
AI.result: 在553个GenEval提示词上对Stable Diffusion 3（辅以SDXL验证）进行实验，结果表明：k=1时，移除注意力沉点不会降低CLIP-T（文本-图像对齐）或偏好代理指标（ImageReward, HPS-v2）；仅在更强干预（k≥10）下HPS-v2表现出指标依赖边界，而CLIP-T始终保持鲁棒。沉点抑制导致的感知偏移是沉点特异的，其幅度约为等预算随机掩码的6倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文发现注意力沉点在扩散Transformer中并非语义对齐所必需，揭示了轨迹级扰动与语义对齐之间的经验性解耦，表明沉点主要影响感知层面的生成轨迹而非高层语义一致性，为理解注意力机制在扩散模型中的作用提供了新视角。

title: The Gordian Knot for VLMs: Diagrammatic Knot Reasoning as a Hard Benchmark
summary: A vision-language model can look at a knot diagram and report what it sees, yet fail to act on that structure. KnotBench pairs an 858,318-image corpus from 1,951 prime-knot prototypes (crossing numbers 3 to 19) with a protocol whose answers are checked against Regina's canonical knot signature. Its 14 tasks span four families, equivalence judgment, move prediction, identification, and cross-modal grounding; an image-versus-symbol split locates failures along the perception-operation gap. We score Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5, each with and without thinking, under a 64K output-token budget matched on both vendors. Across 56 (task, model) cases, 15 sit at or below a random baseline and 8 of 14 tasks have a best score under 1.5x random. On diagram-to-symbol transcription, no model produces a strictly correct string, and permissive Regina decoding recovers the knot in 0 to 4 of 100 items. Thinking-mode reasoning lifts overall accuracy by 1.65 points for Claude and 9.25 points for GPT-5, narrowing the gap only modestly. Read together, the four families suggest current vision-language models hold features of a diagram but lack apparatus to simulate moves on those features.

AI.tldr: KnotBench是一个包含858,318张图像、覆盖1,951种素结原型的基准测试集，用于评估视觉-语言模型在结理论中的符号推理能力；实验表明当前最先进的VLM（Claude Opus 4.7和GPT-5）在14项任务中多数表现接近随机基线，无法完成严格的图到符转录，揭示了模型具备特征检测能力但缺乏模拟操作机制的感知-操作鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）能够"看"到一个结图并描述其所见，但无法基于该结构执行有意义的符号操作和推理；本文旨在揭示和量化这种感知与操作之间的鸿沟，通过系统评估VLM在结理论这一结构化视觉推理任务上的局限性。
AI.method: 构建KnotBench基准，包含从1,951种素结原型（交叉数3至19）生成的858,318张图像数据集，设计14项任务分为四个任务族（等价判断、移动预测、识别、跨模态对齐），采用图像与符号分离的评估策略；使用Regina正则结签名验证答案正确性，在64K输出token预算下评估Claude Opus 4.7和GPT-5（各含和不含思考模式）的性能。
AI.result: 在56个（任务，模型）组合中，15个组合得分等于或低于随机基线，14项任务中有8项的最佳得分低于1.5倍随机基线；在结图到符号转录任务中，没有任何模型能生成严格正确的字符串，即使采用宽松的Regina解码，每100个样本中也仅能正确恢复0至4个；思考模式分别提升Claude和GPT-5的整体准确率1.65和9.25个百分点，但差距缩小幅度有限。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉-语言模型能够提取结图的某些特征（感知能力），但缺乏对这些特征进行移动模拟和符号操作的核心机制（操作能力），即存在明显的感知-操作鸿沟；这一发现对评估和提升VLM在结构化视觉推理任务中的能力具有重要意义。

title: EpiGraph: A Knowledge Graph and Benchmark for Evidence-Intensive Reasoning in Epilepsy
summary: Epilepsy diagnosis and treatment require evidence-intensive reasoning across heterogeneous clinical knowledge, including biosignal patterns, genetic mechanisms, pharmacogenomics, treatment strategies, and patient outcomes. In this work, we present \textsc{EpiGraph}, a large-scale epilepsy knowledge graph and benchmark for evaluating knowledge-augmented clinical reasoning. \textsc{EpiGraph} integrates 48,166 peer-reviewed papers and seven clinical resources into a heterogeneous graph containing 24,324 entities and 32,009 evidence-grounded triplets across five clinical layers. Built upon this graph, \textsc{EpiBench} defines five clinically motivated tasks spanning clinical decision-making, EEG report generation, pharmacogenomic precision medicine, treatment recommendation, and deep research planning. We evaluate six LLMs under both standard and Graph-RAG settings. Results show that integrating \textsc{EpiGraph} consistently improves performance across all tasks, with the largest gains observed in pharmacogenomic reasoning (+30--41\%). Our findings demonstrate that structured epilepsy knowledge substantially enhances evidence-grounded clinical reasoning and provides a practical benchmark framework for evaluating knowledge-augmented LLMs in real-world neurological settings. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LabRAI/EEG-KG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EpiGraph大规模癫痫知识图谱和EpiBench基准测试，通过整合48,166篇论文和七种临床资源构建异构图谱，在五个临床推理任务上评估六种LLM，结果表明知识图谱增强显著提升了模型性能，尤其在药物基因组推理任务上提升达30-41%。
AI.motivation: 癫痫诊断与治疗需要跨异构临床知识（包括生物信号模式、遗传机制、药物基因组学、治疗策略和患者预后）进行证据密集型推理，现有大语言模型缺乏结构化的领域知识增强机制，无法充分支持此类复杂临床推理任务。
AI.method: 本文构建了EpiGraph大规模癫痫知识图谱，整合48,166篇同行评审论文和七种临床资源，形成包含24,324个实体和32,009个证据三元组的异构图谱，覆盖五个临床层次；在此基础上提出EpiBench基准测试，定义五项临床推理任务（临床决策、脑电图报告生成、药物基因组精准医学、治疗推荐和深度研究规划），并采用标准LLM和Graph-RAG两种设置评估六种大语言模型。
AI.result: 在五个临床推理任务上，知识图谱增强的Graph-RAG设置相比标准LLM设置均取得一致性性能提升，其中药物基因组推理任务提升最为显著（30-41%），验证了结构化癫痫知识对增强证据驱动临床推理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，结构化癫痫知识图谱能够显著增强大语言模型的证据驱动临床推理能力，EpiGraph与EpiBench为评估知识增强型LLM在真实神经科临床场景中的表现提供了实用的基准框架。

title: PGID: Progressive Guided Inversion and Denoising for Robust Watermark Detection
summary: With the proliferation of AI-generated images, digital watermarking has become an essential safeguard for protecting intellectual property and mitigating malicious exploitation. Recent works on semantic watermarking have enabled efficient copyright protection for diffusion models. However, the dependence of semantic watermarking on diffusion inversion for watermark detection creates a critical vulnerability. Imprint removal and forgery attacks exploit this weakness to produce deceptive results. Our analysis reveals that these attacks succeed by displacing watermarked latents into the unwatermarked region, while guiding unwatermarked latents into the watermarked region. Based on that, we propose Progressive Guided Inversion and Denoising (PGID), the first plug-and-play, training-free noise extraction framework designed to defend against both attack strategies. PGID effectively defends by projecting perturbed latents back to the region where they originally belong. The projection is achieved by eliminating intermediate latent deflections and mitigating adversarial perturbations through progressive inversion-denoising cycles. Comprehensive evaluations across multiple schemes demonstrate that PGID successfully restores detection reliability by recovering removed watermarks and identifying forged instances.

AI.tldr: 提出渐进式引导反转与去噪（PGID）框架，这是首个即插即用、无需训练的抗攻击噪声提取方法，通过将扰动潜变量投影回原始区域，有效防御针对语义水印的印记移除攻击和伪造攻击，恢复检测可靠性。
AI.motivation: 语义水印依赖于扩散反演进行水印检测，但这一机制存在关键漏洞——印记移除攻击和伪造攻击通过将水印潜变量位移至无水印区域或将无水印潜变量引导至水印区域来欺骗检测器，现有方法缺乏针对这两种攻击策略的有效防御手段。
AI.method: 提出渐进式引导反转与去噪（PGID）框架，这是一种即插即用、无需训练的噪声提取方法。其核心思想是通过渐进式反转-去噪循环消除中间潜变量的偏转并缓解对抗性扰动，将受攻击扰动的潜变量重新投影回其原本所属的区域，从而同时防御印记移除和伪造两种攻击策略。
AI.result: 在多种语义水印方案上的综合评估表明，PGID能够成功恢复被移除的水印并识别伪造实例，有效恢复检测可靠性，证明该方法对两类攻击均具有防御能力。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了语义水印攻击成功的本质机制——潜变量在加噪/去噪空间中的区域位移，并据此设计了无需重新训练即可集成到现有系统的防御框架，为扩散模型水印的安全性提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

title: V-ABS: Action-Observer Driven Beam Search for Dynamic Visual Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general perception, yet complex multi-step visual reasoning remains a persistent challenge. Although recent agentic approaches incorporate tool use, they often neglect critical execution feedback. Consequently, they suffer from the imagination-action-observer (IAO) bias, a misalignment between prior imagination and observer feedback that undermines reasoning stability and optimality. To bridge this gap, we introduce V-ABS, an action-observer driven beam search framework that enables deliberate reasoning through thinker-actor-observer iterations. We also propose an entropy-based adaptive weighting algorithm to mitigate the IAO bias by dynamically balancing the confidence scores between the policy priors and the observational feedback. Moreover, we construct a large-scale supervised fine-tuning (SFT) dataset comprising over 80k samples to guide the model to assign higher prior confidence to correct action paths. Extensive experiments across eight diverse benchmarks show that V-ABS achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering an average improvement of 19.7% on the Qwen3-VL-8B baseline and consistent gains across both open-source and proprietary models.

AI.tldr: V-ABS提出了一个动作-观测器驱动的波束搜索框架，通过思考者-行动者-观测者迭代和基于熵的自适应加权算法来缓解多模态大模型在多步视觉推理中的想象-动作-观测偏差，在八个基准上平均提升19.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在复杂多步视觉推理中表现不佳，尽管最近的智能体方法引入了工具使用，但它们忽略了关键的执行反馈，导致想象-动作-观测（IAO）偏差——即先验想象与观测反馈之间的错位，损害了推理的稳定性和最优性。
AI.method: V-ABS框架通过思考者-行动者-观测者（thinker-actor-observer）迭代实现审慎推理，并引入基于熵的自适应加权算法，通过动态平衡策略先验与观测反馈之间的置信度分数来缓解IAO偏差；此外，团队构建了包含超过8万样本的大规模监督微调数据集，引导模型对正确动作路径赋予更高的先验置信度。
AI.result: 在八个不同基准上的大量实验表明，V-ABS达到了最先进的性能，在Qwen3-VL-8B基线上平均提升19.7%，并在开源和闭源模型上均保持一致的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: V-ABS通过显式建模执行反馈并动态平衡先验与观测，有效解决了多步视觉推理中的IAO偏差问题，为构建更稳定的多模态推理智能体提供了可行范式，并在多个模型上展现出良好的通用性和可迁移性。

title: Workspace Optimization: How to Train Your Agent
summary: Modern agents built on frontier language models often cannot adapt their weights. What, then, remains trainable? We argue it is the agent's \emph{workspace}, the structured external substrate it reads, writes, and tests; we call its evolution workspace optimization. Workspace optimization targets hard multi-turn environments where a frontier model has strong priors but cannot solve the task in a single shot, so the agent must learn through interaction. We propose a principled way to evolve the workspace, mirroring the structure of weight-space training: artifacts in place of parameters, evidence in place of data, counterexamples in place of losses, and textual feedback in place of gradients. We instantiate the idea in DreamTeam, a multi-agent harness for ARC-AGI-3 whose roles build an executable world model, plan, hypothesize, probe, strategize, and route failures. On the current 25-game ARC-AGI-3 public set under the official scoring protocol and averaged over two independent runs, DreamTeam improves the SOTA protocol-matched agent's score from 36% to 38.4%, while using 31% fewer environment actions per game.

AI.tldr: 本文提出工作空间优化（workspace optimization）范式，将权重空间训练的结构迁移至智能体的外部工作空间，并基于该思想构建多智能体框架DreamTeam，在ARC-AGI-3基准上以更少的交互次数实现了超越当前最优协议匹配智能体的性能。
AI.motivation: 现代基于前沿语言模型的智能体通常无法直接调整其内部权重，因此需要探索除权重训练之外的可学习组件；论文致力于解决在硬多轮交互环境中，前沿模型虽具备强大先验但无法单步解决任务时，智能体如何通过交互进行学习的问题。
AI.method: 论文提出工作空间优化（workspace optimization）方法，将权重空间训练的结构类比映射到智能体的外部工作空间：以工件对应参数、证据对应数据、反例对应损失、文本反馈对应梯度；具体实现为DreamTeam多智能体框架，其各角色负责构建可执行世界模型、规划、假设、探测、制定策略及路由失败案例，从而在ARC-AGI-3任务中协同演化工作空间。
AI.result: 在ARC-AGI-3官方协议下的25道公开题目中，DreamTeam将当前最优协议匹配智能体的得分从36%提升至38.4%，同时每局游戏的环境动作使用量减少了31%，结果基于两次独立运行的平均值。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了在无法更新模型权重的情况下，通过结构化外部工作空间的演化即可实现智能体学习，为构建可交互学习且计算高效的智能体系统提供了新的范式。

title: LiteMedCoT-VL: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation for Medical Visual Question Answering
summary: The reasoning gap between large and compact vision-language models (VLMs) limits the deployment of medical AI on portable clinical devices. Compact VLMs of 2--4B parameters can run on resource-constrained hardware but lack the multi-step reasoning capacity needed for interpretable clinical decision support. Existing knowledge distillation methods transfer answers without the reasoning process behind them. Medical visual question answering (VQA) serves as a testbed for this problem, as it requires models to integrate visual evidence with clinical knowledge through structured reasoning chains. We introduce LiteMedCoT-VL, a pipeline that transfers chain-of-thought reasoning from a 235B teacher model to 2B student models through LoRA-based fine-tuning on explanation-enriched training data. All inference is conducted without image captions by default, simulating the clinical scenario in which a physician interprets a medical image directly without an accompanying radiology report. On the PMC-VQA benchmark, LiteMedCoT-VL achieves 64.9% accuracy, exceeding the zero-shot Qwen3-VL-4B baseline of 53.9% by 11.0 percentage points and outperforming all published baselines. This result indicates that a 2B model with reasoning distillation can match or exceed models with twice the parameters. Visual grounding analysis shows that the model relies on image content rather than exploiting textual priors. Our code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LiteMedCoT-VL.

AI.tldr: 提出LiteMedCoT-VL流水线，通过LoRA微调将235B教师模型的链式思维推理蒸馏到2B学生模型，在无图像标注的临床场景下，PMC-VQA基准达到64.9%准确率，比零样本Qwen3-VL-4B基线高出11个百分点，证明推理蒸馏可使小模型匹配或超越两倍参数量的模型。
AI.motivation: 大型与小体积视觉语言模型（VLM）之间的推理能力差距限制了医疗AI在便携式临床设备上的部署，2-4B参数的紧凑型VLM虽可在资源受限硬件上运行，但缺乏临床可解释决策支持所需的多步推理能力；现有知识蒸馏方法仅迁移答案而不包含推理过程，无法弥合这一推理鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出LiteMedCoT-VL流水线，通过LoRA（低秩适应）微调，将235B参数教师模型的链式思维（Chain-of-Thought）推理迁移至2B参数的学生模型；训练数据为经过解释增强的数据，所有推理默认在无图像标注条件下进行，模拟医生直接解读医学影像而无放射学报告的临床场景。
AI.result: 在PMC-VQA基准上，LiteMedCoT-VL达到64.9%准确率，超过零样本Qwen3-VL-4B基线（53.9%）11.0个百分点，并超越所有已发表基线；2B模型经推理蒸馏后可匹配或超过两倍参数量的模型；视觉归因分析表明模型依赖于图像内容而非利用文本先验。
AI.conclusion: 推理蒸馏是提升紧凑型VLM在医疗领域多步推理能力的有效策略，使得小模型在资源受限的便携设备上也能实现可解释的临床决策支持；该方法无需放射学报告标注，更贴合真实临床实践场景。

title: How Mobile World Model Guides GUI Agents?
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models have enabled mobile GUI agents to perceive visual interfaces and execute user instructions, but reliable prediction of action consequences remains critical for long-horizon and high-risk interactions. Existing mobile world models provide either text-based or image-based future states, yet it remains unclear which representation is useful, whether generated rollouts can replace real environments, and how test-time guidance helps agents of different strengths. To answer the above questions, we filter and annotate mobile world-model data, then train world models across four modalities: delta text, full text, diffusion-based images, and renderable code. These models achieve SoTA performance on both MobileWorldBench and Code2WorldBench. Furthermore, by evaluating their downstream utility on AITZ, AndroidControl, and AndroidWorld, we obtain three findings. First, renderable code reconstruction achieves high in-distribution fidelity and provides effective multimodal supervision for data construction, while text-based feedback is more robust for online out-of-distribution (OOD) execution. Second, world-model-generated trajectories can provide transferable interaction experience in the training process and improve agents' end-to-end task performance, although these data do not preserve the original distribution. Last, for overconfident mobile agents with low action entropy, posterior self-reflection provides limited gains, suggesting that world models are more effective as prior perception or training supervision than as universal post-hoc verifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文通过训练多种模态（delta文本、全文本、扩散图像、可渲染代码）的移动世界模型并评估其下游效用，发现可渲染代码重建在分布内保真度高、文本反馈在分布外执行更鲁棒，世界模型生成的轨迹可提升智能体任务性能，但对高置信度智能体作为事后验证器效果有限。
AI.motivation: 现有移动GUI智能体依赖视觉语言模型感知界面并执行指令，但面对长程及高风险交互时，对动作后果的可靠预测仍不足；现有移动世界模型可提供文本或图像形式的未来状态，但不同表征形式的下游效用、生成轨迹能否替代真实环境、以及测试时引导对不同强度智能体的影响尚不清楚。
AI.method: 研究首先筛选并标注移动世界模型数据，训练四种模态的世界模型：delta文本、全文本、基于扩散的图像以及可渲染代码；这些模型在MobileWorldBench和Code2WorldBench上达到SoTA性能，并在AITZ、AndroidControl和AndroidWorld三个基准上评估其下游效用。
AI.result: 可渲染代码重建在分布内保真度高，并为数据构建提供有效的多模态监督，而文本反馈在在线分布外执行中更鲁棒；世界模型生成的轨迹可为训练过程提供可迁移的交互经验并提升智能体端到端任务性能，尽管这些数据未保持原始分布；对于动作熵低的高置信度移动智能体，事后自我反思带来的收益有限。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明世界模型作为先验感知或训练监督比作为通用事后验证器更有效，不同模态的世界模型在不同场景下各有优劣，为移动GUI世界模型的设计和应用提供了重要指导。

title: CodeClinic: Evaluating Automation of Coding Skills for Clinical Reasoning Agents
summary: Clinical reasoning agents based on large language models (LLMs) aim to automate tasks such as intensive care unit (ICU) monitoring and patient state tracking from electronic health records (EHRs). Existing systems typically rely on manually curated clinical tools or skills for concepts such as sepsis detection and organ failure assessment. However, maintaining these tool libraries requires substantial expert effort, while zero-shot querying or code generation often produces inefficient and unreliable reasoning chains, especially under institution-specific clinical policies. We introduce CodeClinic, a benchmark built on MIMIC-IV for evaluating whether LLM agents can synthesize and compose reusable clinical skills instead of relying on fixed toolboxes. The benchmark contains two complementary tasks: longitudinal ICU surveillance and compositional information seeking. The longitudinal setting simulates monitoring patient trajectories with structured decisions every four hours across 25 findings and eight clinical families, while the compositional setting spans 63k instances across 259 tasks in nine domains and is stratified by compositional dependency depth to evaluate increasingly complex multi-step reasoning. We further propose an offline autoformalization pipeline that converts natural-language clinical guidelines into reusable and verified Python skill libraries through iterative LLM refinement. Compared with zero-shot code generation, the resulting libraries improve consistency while reducing per-query token usage by up to 40%.

AI.tldr: CodeClinic 是一个基于 MIMIC-IV 构建的基准测试，用于评估大语言模型智能体通过自动形式化管线将临床指南编译为可复用的 Python 技能库，而非依赖固定工具箱的能力；实验表明该方法在保持推理一致性的同时将每查询 token 使用量降低了 40%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的临床推理智能体通常依赖人工维护的临床工具库（如脓毒症检测、器官衰竭评估等），维护工作耗费大量专家精力；而零样本查询或代码生成方式在机构特定临床策略下往往产生低效且不可靠的推理链。因此，需要一种能自动合成与组合可复用临床技能的方法，以减少对固定工具箱的依赖。
AI.method: 论文提出 CodeClinic 基准测试，包含纵向 ICU 监测与组合式信息检索两个互补任务；纵向设置以四小时为间隔模拟患者轨迹监控，涵盖 25 个发现和 8 个临床家族，组合式设置包含 9 个领域的 259 个任务共 6.3 万实例，并按组合依赖深度分层以评估多步推理复杂度。同时提出一种离线自动形式化管线，通过迭代式大语言模型精练将自然语言临床指南转换为可复用且可验证的 Python 技能库。
AI.result: 与零样本代码生成相比，通过自动形式化管线生成的技能库在提升推理一致性的同时，将每查询 token 使用量降低了 40%。CodeClinic 基准为评估大语言模型智能体在临床环境下合成与组合可复用技能的能力提供了系统化评测框架。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作表明，离线自动形式化方法能够有效将临床指南转化为可复用的 Python 技能库，在保证推理一致性的前提下显著降低计算开销，为构建更高效、更可靠的临床推理智能体提供了可行路径；CodeClinic 基准也为后续研究提供了标准化的评估平台。

title: Relational Retrieval: Leveraging Known-Novel Interactions for Generalized Category Discovery
comment: Accepted by ICMR 2026. Generalized category discovery, semi-supervised learning, contrastive learning
summary: In this study, we tackle Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) via a Relational Retrieval perspective, explicitly coupling labeled and unlabeled data through bidirectional knowledge transfer. While existing methods treat these sources separately, missing valuable interaction opportunities, we propose Relational Pattern Consistency (RPC) that enables mutual enhancement. RPC employs One-vs-All classifiers for soft ID/OOD decomposition, then introduces two mechanisms: (i) for known-class preservation, we transfer semantic behavioral alignment; (ii) for category discovery, we leverage the insight that samples from the same category maintain invariant relationships with known-class prototypes, transforming unreliable pseudo-labeling into well-defined relational pattern matching. This bidirectional design allows labeled data to guide unlabeled learning while discovering novel categories through their collective relational signatures. Extensive experiments demonstrate RPC achieves state-of-the-art performance on both generic and fine-grained benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于关系模式一致性（RPC）的广义类别发现方法，通过One-vs-All分类器实现软ID/OOD分解，并引入语义行为对齐和关系模式匹配两种机制，在标记与未标记数据间建立双向知识迁移，在通用和细粒度基准上均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有广义类别发现（GCD）方法将标记数据和未标记数据分开处理，忽略了二者之间有价值的交互机会，导致已知类别知识无法有效指导未知类别的发现，同时也缺乏从未标记数据中提取集体关系信号来增强已知类别学习的能力。
AI.method: 本文提出关系模式一致性（RPC）框架，采用One-vs-All分类器对样本进行软ID/OOD分解；对于已知类别，通过语义行为对齐传递知识以保持旧类判别能力；对于新类别发现，利用同一类别样本与已知类别原型之间保持关系不变性这一洞察，将不可靠的伪标签转化为定义明确的关系模式匹配问题，实现标记与未标记数据的双向知识迁移。
AI.result: 在通用和细粒度图像分类基准上，RPC方法均取得了最先进的性能表现，实验验证了双向知识迁移和关系模式匹配在广义类别发现任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了在GCD任务中标记与未标记数据双向交互的重要性，证明了通过软ID/OOD分解和关系模式匹配替代传统伪标签策略的可行性，为广义类别发现提供了一种新的关系检索视角。

title: Reasoning Is Not Free: Robust Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing for LLM-as-a-Judge
summary: Reasoning-capable large language models (LLMs) have recently been adopted as automated judges, but their benefits and costs in LLM-as-a-Judge settings remain unclear. Through controlled comparisons between reasoning and non-reasoning judges, we show that explicit reasoning substantially improves judgment accuracy on tasks requiring structured verification (e.g., math and coding), while offering limited or even negative gains on simpler evaluations and incurring significantly higher computational cost. These findings motivate that reasoning should be used selectively rather than universally, with awareness of possible distribution shift. We propose a Robust Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing (RACER), which dynamically selects between reasoning and non-reasoning judges under a fixed budget by formulating routing as a constrained distributionally robust optimization problem. RACER explicitly accounts for distribution shift via a KL-divergence uncertainty set, admits an efficient primal--dual algorithm, and enjoys theoretical guarantees including uniqueness of the optimal policy and linear convergence. Extensive experiments show that RACER achieves superior accuracy--cost trade-offs under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比实验发现推理型LLM法官仅在结构化验证任务中显著提升准确性，但在简单评估中收益有限且计算成本高昂，据此提出鲁棒自适应成本高效路由（RACER），通过将路由建模为约束分布鲁棒优化问题，在固定预算下动态选择推理型与非推理型法官，在分布偏移下实现了优异的准确率-成本权衡。
AI.motivation: 尽管推理能力强大的大语言模型（LLM）已被越来越多地用作自动裁判（LLM-as-a-Judge），但其在不同评估任务中的实际收益与成本尚不明确，缺乏对何时应使用推理型法官的系统性理解，同时现有路由方法未充分考虑评估过程中可能出现的分布偏移问题。
AI.method: 通过可控实验对比推理型与非推理型法官在不同任务上的表现，提出RACER框架，将路由问题建模为带KL散度不确定集的约束分布鲁棒优化问题，并设计高效的原对偶算法求解，该算法具有策略唯一性和线性收敛的理论保证。
AI.result: 实验表明，推理型法官在数学和代码等需要结构化验证的任务上显著提升了判断准确性，但在简单评估任务上收益有限甚至出现负收益，同时计算成本显著更高；RACER在分布偏移条件下实现了优于对比方法的准确率-成本权衡。
AI.conclusion: 推理应选择性使用而非普遍适用，需警惕分布偏移带来的风险；RACER为在固定预算下动态路由不同能力级别的法官以兼顾准确性与成本提供了理论上有保障且实践有效的解决方案。

title: Unpredictability dissociates from structured control in language agents
summary: Unpredictable behavior is often taken as evidence of control, yet stochastic dispersion and structured action control need not coincide. This paper tests whether stochastic sampling can substitute for structured mechanisms that couple reasons, memory, self-state and inhibition to action selection in a language-agent implementation whose control components can be selectively disabled. In a seven-dataset baseline lesion matrix comprising 74,352 calls, the high-stochasticity comparator was more unpredictable than the structured-control variant in 7/7 datasets, whereas targeted reason and veto lesions reduced the expected structured-control profiles in 7/7 datasets each. In a matched-interface control spanning 26,946 generations, the structured agent maintained stronger action-field coupling than all stochastic, post-hoc, scrambled and verbosity controls across every dataset. The primary behavioral test removed free-form trace wording from the evaluation: 57,816 scored records showed the structured-control variant exceeding the high-stochasticity comparator or the reason/veto lesions in 7/7 datasets for all predefined behavioral components. Later open-weight runs extended the no-context controls to Qwen2.5 7B, 14B and 32B and to an independent Mistral-7B family across 20 task families and three agent scaffolds; no-fields, scrambled-context and distribution-matched controls failed to recover structured action control. A three-annotator blinded audit over 1,200 overlap items preserved high agreement. Strict entropy matching, strict token/compute matching and a formal counterfactual-flip stress test did not meet their gates and are treated as limitations. Stochastic unpredictability did not reproduce structured, action-coupled control in this implemented agent family.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过大规模消融实验和对照测试证明，随机随机采样无法替代结构化机制（理由、记忆、自状态和抑制）在语言智能体动作选择中实现耦合控制，结构化控制变体在7/7数据集中均显著优于高随机性比较器。
AI.motivation: 现有研究常将不可预测行为视为智能体具备控制能力的证据，但随机性扩散与结构化动作控制本质上并不等价。该论文旨在检验随机采样能否替代将理由、记忆、自状态和抑制等结构化机制与动作选择相耦合的语言智能体实现方案，填补了随机性是否足以产生受控行为这一关键空白。
AI.method: 论文在一个包含74352次调用的七数据集基线病变矩阵上，采用选择性禁用控制组件的方法，对比高随机性比较器与结构化控制变体；在26946次生成的匹配接口控制中测试动作场耦合强度；通过57816条评分记录去除自由形式痕迹评估；并在20个任务族和三种智能体框架上扩展至Qwen2.5 7B/14B/32B和Mistral-7B系列，执行无字段、乱序上下文和分布匹配对照实验，辅以1200项重叠的三注释者盲审。
AI.result: 高随机性比较器在7/7数据集中比结构化控制变体更不可预测，而理由和抑制病变在7/7数据集中均降低了预期的结构化控制曲线；结构化智能体在所有数据集上的动作场耦合均强于随机、事后、乱序和冗长对照；结构化控制变体在7/7数据集的全部预定义行为组件上均优于高随机性比较器及病变变体；所有无字段、乱序上下文和分布匹配对照均未能恢复结构化动作控制；三注释者盲审保持高度一致性；严格的熵匹配、令牌/计算匹配和反事实翻转压力测试未通过设定门限。
AI.conclusion: 随机不可预测性无法再现该智能体家族中实现的结构化、动作耦合的控制。该研究强调了结构化机制在语言智能体动作选择中的不可替代性，并揭示了将随机性与控制能力混同的风险，同时指出了严格熵匹配和计算匹配等实验条件的局限性作为未来工作方向。

title: Evading Visual Aphasia: Contrastive Adaptive Semantic Token Pruning for Vision-Language Models
summary: Are low-attention visual tokens truly redundant in vision-language reasoning? Existing pruning methods often assume so, ranking visual tokens by shallow text-to-image attention and discarding low-scoring patches to accelerate LVLM inference. We show that this scalar criterion is unreliable for compositional reasoning: tokens ignored in early layers can later become essential for resolving secondary objects, spatial relations, and contextual cues. Premature pruning can therefore induce Visual Aphasia, a failure mode in which the model loses visual grounding and falls back on language priors. We introduce COAST (COntrastive Adaptive Semantic Token Pruning), a training-free pruning framework that casts compression as adaptive semantic routing. COAST uses native cross-modal attention to identify query-specific anchors and estimate contextual dispersion via attention entropy, then adapts the retention trade-off between semantic evidence and spatial context. It further uses a contrastive routing score to preserve both anchor-aligned evidence and complementary spatial context. Across seven benchmarks, COAST reduces visual tokens by 77.8% and achieves a 2.15x latency speedup while retaining 98.64% of the original average performance. Beyond a single backbone or compression setting, COAST consistently outperforms strong pruning baselines across token budgets and generalizes across multiple LVLM families, showing that adaptive semantic routing is a robust alternative to one-shot scalar pruning

AI.tldr: COAST提出了一种无需训练的对比式自适应语义令牌剪枝框架，通过跨模态注意力和注意力熵实现自适应语义路由，在减少77.8%视觉令牌的同时保持98.64%的平均性能，并实现了2.15倍的推理加速，解决了现有剪枝方法因过早丢弃低注意力令牌而导致视觉失语症的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉令牌剪枝方法通常基于浅层文本-图像注意力对令牌进行排序并丢弃低分令牌以加速LVLM推理，但这种标量准则在组合推理任务中不可靠——早期被忽略的令牌可能在后几层对解析次要物体、空间关系和上下文线索至关重要，过早剪枝会导致视觉失语症，即模型失去视觉基础而退化为依赖语言先验。
AI.method: COAST是一个无需训练的剪枝框架，将压缩建模为自适应语义路由：利用原生跨模态注意力识别查询特定锚点，通过注意力熵估计上下文分散程度，在语义证据与空间上下文之间自适应调整保留权衡；进一步采用对比式路由分数同时保留与锚点对齐的证据和互补的空间上下文信息。
AI.result: 在七个基准测试上，COAST减少了77.8%的视觉令牌，实现了2.15倍延迟加速，同时保留了原始平均性能的98.64%；在多种令牌预算下均优于强剪枝基线，并泛化到多个LVLM家族。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明自适应语义路由是一种比一次性标量剪枝更稳健的替代方案，通过保留语义证据与空间上下文的平衡，COAST有效避免了视觉失语症，证明了在视觉-语言推理中低注意力视觉令牌并非真正冗余。

title: Ambig-DS: A Benchmark for Task-Framing Ambiguity in Data-Science Agents
summary: As data-science agents shift from co-pilots to auto-pilots, silent misframing becomes a critical failure mode. Agents quietly commit to plausible but unintended task framings, producing clean, executable artifacts that hide their incorrect assessment of the task. Existing benchmarks score whether the pipeline runs, ignoring whether the agent recognized the task was underspecified. We introduce Ambig-DS, two diagnostic suites: one for prediction-target ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Target, 51 tasks built on DSBench, a tabular modeling benchmark) and one for evaluation-objective ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Objective, 61 tasks built on MLE-bench, a Kaggle-style ML competition benchmark), constructed so that scoring uses each source benchmark's original evaluator. For every task we pair the original, fully specified version with an ambiguous variant produced by controlled edits; a human-and-LLM verification pipeline confirms each variant admits multiple plausible interpretations with decision-relevant consequences. The suites are analyzed independently and ambiguity lowers performance in both. Across five agents spanning efficient to frontier-class models, we find in our controlled diagnostic setting: (i) failures are silent commitments: wrong-target submissions on Target, wrong-metric or non-committal baseline submissions on Objective, rather than execution errors; (ii) allowing the agent to ask one clarifying question recovers much of the loss under idealized conditions, suggesting missing framing information drives a substantial part of the observed degradation; but (iii) agents cannot reliably tell when to use it: permissive prompts induce over-asking on clear tasks, while conservative prompts induce silent defaulting on ambiguous ones. Recognizing target and objective underspecification, not pipeline execution, is the bottleneck missing from standard DS-agent evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Ambig-DS 诊断套件，用于评估数据科学智能体在任务目标与评估指标不明确时的沉默错误框架问题，发现智能体性能下降的主因并非执行错误，而是无法识别任务规定不足，且当前基准测试忽略这一瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有数据科学智能体基准测试仅关注管道能否成功运行，忽略了智能体在任务规定不足时可能悄无声息地采用错误但看似合理的任务框架（silent misframing），从而产生干净可执行的工件却掩盖了对任务的错误理解，这一关键失败模式尚未被系统性地诊断和量化。
AI.method: 作者构建了两个诊断套件：Ambig-DS-Target（基于 DSBench 的 51 个预测目标歧义任务）和 Ambig-DS-Objective（基于 MLE-bench 的 61 个评估目标歧义任务）。每个任务包含原始完整版本和通过受控编辑生成的歧义变体，并经人机协同验证确保每个变体存在多个具有决策后果的合理解释，同时沿用源基准的原始评估器进行评分。
AI.result: 在五种智能体上的实验表明：歧义导致性能显著下降，失败模式是静默承诺（错误目标提交或错误指标选择）而非执行错误；允许智能体提出一个澄清问题在理想条件下可恢复大部分性能损失，但智能体无法可靠判断何时使用该机制——过于宽松的提示导致在明确任务上过度提问，而保守的提示则导致在歧义任务上默认定型。
AI.conclusion: 识别目标与评估指标的规定不足而非管道执行能力，才是当前数据科学智能体评估中缺失的关键瓶颈；未来的评估框架应将歧义检测与澄清能力作为核心维度纳入考量。

title: When Few Steps Are Enough: Training-Free Acceleration of Identity-Preserved Generation
summary: Identity-preserved image generation is typically built on many-step diffusion backbones, making personalized generation expensive at deployment time. We show that this cost is often unnecessary for identity-conditioned FLUX generation. A frozen InfuseNet identity adapter trained with dev transfers directly to the distilled schnell backbone without retraining.
