This two-line replacement -- changing the backbone path and disabling classifier-free guidance -- reduces latency by 5.9x while improving ArcFace identity similarity by +0.028 and lpips by -0.016 over the standard 28-step dev baseline. To explain why this works, we analyze the denoising trajectory and find that identity fidelity enters an early effective regime, often within 4-8 steps, while later steps primarily refine visual detail, sharpness, and contrast. Adapter ablations confirm that identity formation depends on the identity adapter, while attention-stream norm probes suggest that the relative conditioning contribution decreases as sampling proceeds. Preliminary style-adapter and object-adapter sweeps on SDXL and SD1.5 show similar diminishing returns after intermediate steps. These results position distilled backbone replacement as a simple, training-free strategy for improving the efficiency-fidelity tradeoff of identity-preserved generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过直接替换蒸馏版FLUX骨干网络并禁用无分类器引导，无需重新训练即可将身份保持的图像生成延迟降低5.9倍，同时提升身份相似度与感知质量，揭示了早期去噪步骤已足以决定身份保真度的现象。
AI.motivation: 现有的身份保持图像生成通常依赖多步扩散骨干网络，导致个性化生成在部署时计算成本高昂，亟需一种无需额外训练或复杂适配的高效替代方案以改善效率与保真度之间的权衡。
AI.method: 采用冻结的InfuseNet身份适配器，该适配器在FLUX dev骨干上训练后可直接迁移至蒸馏版schnell骨干，仅需更换骨干路径并禁用无分类器引导；通过分析去噪轨迹、适配器消融实验以及注意力流范数探针来揭示身份形成机制，并在SDXL和SD1.5上对风格与物体适配器进行初步验证。
AI.result: 蒸馏骨干替换相比标准28步dev基线实现5.9倍延迟降低，ArcFace身份相似度提升0.028，LPIPS降低0.016；分析表明身份保真度在4-8步内已进入有效区间，后续步骤主要优化视觉细节与对比度，适配器消融证实身份信息依赖身份适配器，而注意力流范数探针显示条件贡献随采样过程递减。
AI.conclusion: 蒸馏骨干替换是一种简单、无需训练的高效策略，能显著改善身份保持生成的效率-保真度权衡；身份形成主要在早期去噪阶段完成，为设计更高效的个性化生成流程提供了理论依据，且该现象在风格与物体适配器上具有初步泛化性。

title: UTS at PsyDefDetect: Multi-Agent Councils and Absence-Based Reasoning for Defense Mechanism Classification
summary: This paper describes our system for classifying psychological defense mechanisms in emotional support dialogues using the Defense Mechanism Rating Scales (DMRS), placing second (F1 0.406) among 64 teams.1 A central insight is that defense mechanisms are defined by what is absent: missing affect, blocked cognition, denied reality. We encode this as an affect-cognition integration spectrum in prompt-level clinical rules, which account for the largest single gain (+11.4pp F1). Our architecture is a multi-phase deliberative council of Gemini 2.5 agents where class-specific advocates rate evidence strength rather than voting, achieving F1 0.382 with no fine-tuning - a top-5 result on its own. We find, however, that the council is confidently wrong about minority classes: 59-80% of stable minority predictions are incorrect, driven by a systematic "L7 attractor" in which emotional content defaults to the majority class. A targeted override ensemble from three fine-tuned Qwen3.5 models applies 16 overrides (+2.4pp), selected by a structured multi-agent system (builder, critic, regression guard) that produced a larger F1 gain in one iteration than 8 prior attempts combined.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于多阶段协商委员会架构的心理学防御机制分类系统，利用Gemini 2.5代理和情感-认知整合光谱的提示级临床规则，结合来自三个微调Qwen3.5模型的目标覆盖集成，在DMRS任务中以F1 0.406排名第二，并揭示了多数类吸引子导致少数类预测系统性错误的问题。
AI.motivation: 防御机制分类在情感支持对话中具有重要临床价值，但其核心挑战在于防御机制往往通过缺失（缺失情感、阻断认知、否认现实）来定义，这使得传统分类方法难以捕捉此类隐性特征。
AI.method: 系统采用多阶段协商委员会架构，以Gemini 2.5代理作为类别特定评估者，对证据强度进行评分而非简单投票；将临床领域知识编码为情感-认知整合光谱的提示级规则；并构建了一个由构建者、批评者和回归卫士组成的目标覆盖集成系统，从三个微调Qwen3.5模型中选择16个覆盖规则进行校正。
AI.result: 系统在64支队伍中以F1 0.406排名第二，其中提示级临床规则贡献了最大的单次提升（+11.4pp F1）；无需微调的委员会架构单独达到F1 0.382（前五名）；目标覆盖集成额外带来+2.4pp F1提升，单次迭代的增益超过此前8次尝试的总和；但发现委员会对少数类预测59-80%是错误的，源于一种系统性"L7吸引子"现象。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了基于代理的多阶段协商架构在心理学分类任务中的潜力，同时暴露了多数类吸引子导致的少数类预测偏差问题，表明需结合结构化覆盖机制来缓解系统性的置信错误。

title: PermuQuant: Lowering Per-Group Quantization Error by Reordering Channels for Diffusion Models
summary: Large-scale visual generative models have achieved remarkable performance. However, their high computational and memory costs make deployment challenging in resource-constrained scenarios, such as interactive applications and personal single-GPU usage. Post-training quantization (PTQ) offers a practical solution by compressing pretrained models without expensive retraining. However, existing PTQ methods still suffer from severe quality degradation under extremely low-bit settings. In this paper, we identify channel ordering as an important but underexplored factor in per-group quantization. In this setting, each contiguous group shares one quantization scale. When channels with very different statistics are placed in the same group, the scale can be dominated by outliers and cause large quantization errors. Based on this observation, we propose PermuQuant, a simple and effective PTQ framework for low-bit diffusion models. PermuQuant sorts channels by a joint second-moment criterion before per-group quantization, placing channels with similar activation and weight statistics into the same group. It further uses a calibration-based acceptance rule to apply reordering only when the selected permutation reduces quantization error on calibration data. The selected permutations are absorbed into adjacent modules or applied to weights offline, avoiding explicit runtime permutation operations. Extensive experiments on multiple large diffusion models show that PermuQuant consistently reduces quantization error and outperforms existing PTQ baselines. On FLUX.1-dev with an RTX 5090, PermuQuant achieves up to a 1.8$\times$ single step speedup and reduces the DiT memory footprint by 3.5$\times$ under W4A4 NVFP4 quantization. Code will be available at https://github.com/yscheng04/PermuQuant.

AI.tldr: PermuQuant提出了一种基于通道排序的后训练量化框架，通过联合二阶矩准则对通道进行重新排序，将统计特性相似的通道分组以减少量化误差，在极低比特设置下显著提升了扩散模型的量化性能，并在FLUX.1-dev上实现了最高1.8倍单步加速和3.5倍DiT显存缩减。
AI.motivation: 大规模视觉生成模型（如扩散模型）在资源受限场景（如交互应用和单GPU部署）中面临高计算和内存成本的挑战，后训练量化（PTQ）虽然提供了一种无需重训练的压缩方案，但现有方法在极低比特设定下仍存在严重的质量退化问题，论文发现每组分组的量化中通道排序是一个被忽视的关键因素，当统计特性差异很大的通道被分入同一组时，量化尺度会被异常值主导导致较大量化误差。
AI.method: 论文提出PermuQuant框架，采用联合二阶矩准则对通道进行排序，使激活和权重统计特性相似的通道被分入同一组；进一步引入基于校准数据的接受规则，仅在所选排列能降低校准数据量化误差时才应用重排序；选定的排列通过吸收到相邻模块或离线应用到权重中的方式避免显式的运行时排列操作。
AI.result: 在多个大型扩散模型上的大量实验表明，PermuQuant一致地降低了量化误差并超越了现有PTQ基线；在FLUX.1-dev模型上配合RTX 5090，PermuQuant在W4A4 NVFP4量化下实现了最高1.8倍单步加速，并将DiT模型的内存占用减少了3.5倍。
AI.conclusion: PermuQuant通过识别并解决通道排序这一被忽视的量化关键因素，提供了一种简单有效的低比特扩散模型PTQ方案，其无需运行时排列开销的设计使其在推理效率上具有实际优势，为资源受限场景下视觉生成模型的高效部署提供了可行路径。

title: EnactToM: An Evolving Benchmark for Functional Theory of Mind in Embodied Agents
summary: Theory of Mind (ToM), the ability to track others epistemic state, makes humans efficient collaborators. AI agents need the same capacity in multi agent settings, yet existing benchmarks mostly test literal ToM by asking direct belief questions. The ability act optimally on implicit beliefs in embodied environments, called functional ToM, remains largely untested. We introduce EnactToM, an evolving benchmark of 300 embodied multi-agent tasks set in a 3D household with partial observability, private information, and constrained communication. Each task is formally verified for solvability and required epistemic depth, and new tasks are generated increase difficulty as models improve. On the hard split, all seven evaluated frontier models score 0.0% Pass^3 on functional task completion, while averaging 45.0% on literal belief probes. Manual analysis traces 93% of sampled failures to epistemic coordination breakdowns such as withheld information, ignored partner constraints, and misallocated messages, providing a concrete target for future work.

AI.tldr: EnactToM是一个包含300个具身多智能体任务的演化基准，用于评估功能性心智理论（在部分可观察3D环境中基于隐式信念的最优行动），现有前沿模型在困难分片上的任务完成率为0.0%，而字面信念探测平均正确率45.0%，失败主要源于认知协调崩溃。
AI.motivation: 现有心智理论（ToM）基准主要测试字面ToM（直接询问信念问题），而智能体在具身环境中基于隐式信念做出最优行动的功能性ToM能力尚未得到充分测试，这在多智能体协作场景中尤为关键。
AI.method: EnactToM构建了300个具身多智能体任务，设置于3D家庭环境中，具有部分可观察性、私有信息和受限通信；每个任务通过形式化验证确保可解性和所需认知深度，并设计任务演化机制随模型能力提升自动生成更困难任务。
AI.result: 在困难分片上，所有7个评估的前沿模型在功能性任务完成指标Pass^3上均为0.0%，而在字面信念探测上平均为45.0%；手动分析表明93%的失败样本源于认知协调崩溃，包括信息隐瞒、忽视伙伴约束和消息分配错误。
AI.conclusion: 当前最强AI模型在功能性ToM方面严重不足，即使能回答字面信念问题也无法在实际协作中利用隐式信念；认知协调崩溃是主要失败模式，为未来研究提供了明确改进方向。

title: QueST: Persistent Queries as Semantic Monitors for Drift Suppression in Long-Horizon Tracking
summary: Tracking points in videos is typically formulated as frame-to-frame correspondence, where each point is matched locally to the next frame. While this works over short horizons, errors accumulate under articulation, occlusion, and viewpoint change, leading to silent semantic drift that existing trackers cannot detect or correct. In this work, we revisit long-horizon tracking from a monitoring perspective and introduce QueST, a monitoring-by-design framework that treats interaction-relevant entities as persistent semantic queries rather than transient point tracks. Instead of local propagation, each query attends globally over spatio-temporal video features at every time-step, providing a stable semantic anchor across time. We further constrain query trajectories with lightweight 3D physical grounding, using geometric plausibility to suppress unbounded drift under occlusion. We evaluate QueST on long-horizon articulated sequences from PartNet-Mobility in SAPIEN and compare against RAFT-3D, CoTracker, and TAP-Net. QueST substantially reduces terminal drift achieving a 67.7% Absolute Point Error (APE) improvement over TAP-Net while better preserving identity over extended horizons. Our results show that embedding semantic monitoring directly into perception enables more reliable long-horizon tracking under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: QueST将视频长时点跟踪重新定义为基于语义查询的监控问题，通过全局时空注意力与轻量级3D物理约束，在PartNet-Mobility序列上将终点漂移误差相比TAP-Net降低67.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有视频点跟踪方法采用逐帧局部匹配策略，在短时场景下有效，但在处理遮挡、关节运动和视角变化时，误差随跟踪时长累积并产生无声语义漂移，且现有跟踪器无法检测或纠正此类漂移，限制了长时跟踪的可靠性。
AI.method: QueST提出了一种监控内置（monitoring-by-design）框架，将交互相关的实体视为持久性语义查询而非瞬态点轨迹；每个查询在每个时间步对时空视频特征进行全局注意力操作，提供跨时间的稳定语义锚点；同时引入轻量级3D物理约束，利用几何合理性抑制遮挡下的无界漂移。
AI.result: 在SAPIEN环境中PartNet-Mobility数据集的长时关节运动序列上，QueST与RAFT-3D、CoTracker和TAP-Net进行比较，在终点漂移指标上相比TAP-Net实现了67.7%的绝对点误差（APE）改进，并在更长时间跨度上更好地保持了身份一致性。
AI.conclusion: 将语义监控直接嵌入视觉感知过程，能够在分布偏移下实现更可靠的长时点跟踪，表明监控范式相比局部传播策略在长时对应任务中具有显著优势。

title: When to Re-Commit: Temporal Abstraction Discovery for Long-Horizon Vision-Language Reasoning
summary: Long-horizon reasoning requires deciding not only what actions to take, but how deeply to commit before the next observation. We formalize this as \emph{commitment depth}: the number of primitive actions executed open-loop between replans. Commitment depth induces a trade-off between replanning cost and compounding execution error, yet most existing long-horizon systems fix it as a hand-designed scalar. In this work, we instead treat commitment depth as a learnable, state-conditioned variable of the policy itself. We instantiate this within a model-native vision--language policy that jointly predicts both what to execute and for how long. Across Sliding Puzzle and Sokoban, the resulting adaptive policy Pareto-dominates every non-degenerate fixed-depth baseline, achieving up to 12.5 percentage points higher solve rate while using approximately 25\% fewer primitive actions per episode. Despite using a 7B backbone, our method outperforms GPT-5.5 and Claude Sonnet on both tasks, while every tested open-weight vision--language model achieves 0\% zero-shot success. We further present a theoretical analysis showing that, under the standard commitment-depth surrogate, state-conditioned commitment strictly dominates any fixed depth whenever the locally optimal depth varies across states.

AI.tldr: 提出将"承诺深度"（commitment depth）作为可学习的、状态条件的策略变量，使视觉-语言策略能够自适应地决定在每次重规划前执行多少个原始动作，在滑动拼图和推箱子任务上以更少动作数超越固定深度基线和GPT-5.5等闭源模型，并从理论上证明状态条件承诺严格优于固定深度。
AI.motivation: 现有长程推理系统在处理长时间尺度决策时，通常将承诺深度（即两次重规划之间执行的原始动作数量）固定为人工设计的标量，这无法在重规划成本与累积执行误差之间实现最优权衡，且忽略了不同状态下最优承诺深度的差异性。
AI.method: 将承诺深度建模为策略本身的一个可学习的状态条件变量，嵌入到一个模型原生的视觉-语言策略中，使该策略联合预测当前状态下应执行什么动作以及应执行多久（即承诺深度），从而实现自适应地动态调整开环执行步数。
AI.result: 在滑动拼图和推箱子任务上，所提出的自适应策略帕累托支配所有非退化固定深度基线，求解率最高提升12.5个百分点，同时每个回合使用的原始动作数减少约25%；使用7B骨干网络的方法在两项任务上均超越GPT-5.5和Claude Sonnet，而所有开放性权重的视觉-语言模型零样本成功率为0%。
AI.conclusion: 本文从理论和实验两方面证明，当局部最优承诺深度在不同状态间存在变化时，状态条件承诺严格支配任何固定深度策略；为长程推理中的重规划时机选择提供了一个端到端可学习的全新范式。

title: SoccerLens: Grounded Soccer Video Understanding Beyond Accuracy
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have recently shown strong potential in soccer video understanding. However, given the high complexity of soccer videos due to large viewpoint variations, rapid shot transitions, and cluttered scenes, it remains unclear on whether VLMs rely on meaningful visual evidence or exploit spurious correlations and shortcut learning. Existing evaluation protocols focus primarily on classification accuracy and do not assess visual grounding. To address this limitation, we introduce SoccerLens, a benchmark for grounded soccer video understanding. The benchmark contains annotated video segments spanning $13$ common soccer events, with structured visual cues organized into three levels of semantic relevance. We further extend the attribution method of Chefer [arXiv:2103.15679] to jointly model spatial and temporal attention, and introduce evaluation metrics that measure whether model attention aligns with annotated cues or drifts toward spurious regions. Our evaluation of state-of-the-art soccer VLMs shows that, despite strong classification accuracy, current models fail to exceed $50\%$ grounding performance even under the loosest cue definitions and consistently underutilize temporal information. These results reveal a substantial gap between predictive performance and true visual grounding, highlighting the need for grounded evaluation in complex spatio-temporal domains such as soccer.

AI.tldr: 提出SoccerLens基准测试，用于评估视觉语言模型在足球视频理解中的视觉接地能力，揭示了当前先进模型在分类准确率高但视觉接地性能不足50%的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有足球视频理解评估仅关注分类准确率，无法判断视觉语言模型是基于有意义的视觉证据还是依赖虚假相关性和捷径学习进行预测，缺乏对模型视觉接地能力的系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建SoccerLens基准，包含13种足球事件的带注释视频片段，视觉线索按语义相关性分为三个层次；扩展Chefer的归因方法以联合建模空间和时间注意力，并引入评估指标衡量模型注意力是否与标注线索对齐。
AI.result: 对当前最先进的足球视觉语言模型评估显示，即使在最宽松的线索定义下，模型的视觉接地性能均未超过50%，且系统性地未能充分利用时间信息。
AI.conclusion: 预测性能与真实视觉接地之间存在显著差距，表明复杂时空域（如足球视频）需要基于接地能力的评估，仅依靠分类准确率无法反映模型的真实理解水平。

title: Cross-Family Universality of Behavioral Axes via Anchor-Projected Representations
summary: Large language models from different families use different hidden dimensions, tokenizers, and training procedures, making behavioral directions difficult to compare or transfer across models. We introduce an anchor-projection framework that maps hidden representations from each model into a shared anchor coordinate space (ACS). Behavioral directions extracted from source models are projected into ACS and averaged into a canonical direction. For a new model, the canonical direction is reconstructed into its native hidden space using only anchor activations, without fine-tuning or target-specific direction extraction. We evaluate five instruction-tuned model families and ten behavioral axes. We find that same-axis directions align tightly across the Llama-Qwen-Mistral-Phi (LQMP) cluster in ACS. This shared structure transfers to downstream tasks. For the aligned LQMP cluster, held-out targets achieve (0.83) ten-way detection accuracy and (0.95) mean binary AUROC, while canonical steering induces refusal-rate shifts of up to +0.46% under distribution shift. Sensitivity analyses show that two source models and small anchor pools already suffice to approximate transferable directions. Overall, ACS provides a novel perspective on cross-family interpretability, revealing that representation-level transfer remains robust across model families.

AI.tldr: 提出锚点投影框架（ACS），将不同大语言模型的隐空间映射到共享锚点坐标空间，实现跨模型家族的行为方向迁移与解释，无需微调即可在新模型上重构规范方向。
AI.motivation: 不同大语言模型家族使用不同的隐藏维度、分词器和训练流程，导致行为方向难以跨模型比较或迁移，缺乏统一的跨家族可解释性框架。
AI.method: 提出锚点投影框架，将各模型的隐层表征映射到共享锚点坐标空间（ACS），在ACS中对源模型提取的行为方向进行平均得到规范方向，再通过仅使用锚点激活值将规范方向重构回目标模型的原始隐空间，无需微调或针对目标模型提取方向。
AI.result: 在五个指令微调模型家族和十个行为轴上的实验表明，Llama-Qwen-Mistral-Phi（LQMP）簇内的同轴方向在ACS中对齐紧密；留出目标模型的十路检测准确率达0.83，平均二元AUROC达0.95，规范方向引导下拒绝率变化最高达+0.46%；敏感性分析显示两个源模型和小规模锚点池即可逼近可迁移方向。
AI.conclusion: ACS为跨家族模型可解释性提供了新视角，表明表征层面的方向迁移在模型家族间具有鲁棒性，可作为跨架构统一的行为分析和干预工具。

title: DAP: Doppler-aware Point Network for Heterogeneous mmWave Action Recognition
summary: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar provides privacy-preserving sensing and is valuable for human action recognition (HAR). Existing mmWave point cloud datasets are limited in scale and mostly collected under homogeneous single-source settings, preventing current methods from handling real-world distribution shifts caused by heterogeneous radar sources, such as different devices and frequency bands. To address this, we introduce UniMM-HAR, the largest and first mmWave point cloud HAR dataset for heterogeneous multi-source scenarios, standardizing three distinct radar configurations to realistically evaluate cross-source generalization. We further propose the Doppler-aware Point Cloud Network (DAP-Net) to tackle heterogeneity challenges. DAP-Net enhances intra-modal representations and performs cross-modal alignment to learn source-invariant action semantics. Leveraging action-consistent spatio-temporal Doppler patterns as anchors, the Dual-space Doppler Reparameterization (D2R) module performs sample-adaptive geometric densification and Doppler-guided feature recalibration, while the Text Alignment Module (TAM) provides stable semantic anchors via a pretrained textual space. Experiments show that DAP-Net significantly outperforms existing methods under heterogeneous radar settings, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy and strong cross-source robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了UniMM-HAR，目前最大且首个面向异构多源毫米波雷达点云的人体动作识别数据集，并设计了DAP-Net网络，通过双空间多普勒重参数化和文本对齐模块实现跨源不变的动作语义学习，显著提升了异构雷达场景下的识别精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有毫米波雷达点云人体动作识别数据集规模有限且大多在单一同质源设置下采集，导致模型无法应对由不同设备、频段等异构雷达源引起的真实世界分布偏移，缺乏针对跨源泛化能力的基准评估和方法支持。
AI.method: 提出Doppler感知点云网络（DAP-Net），包含双空间多普勒重参数化（D2R）模块和文本对齐模块（TAM）。D2R利用动作一致的时空多普勒模式作为锚点，进行样本自适应的几何稠密化和多普勒引导的特征重校准；TAM通过预训练文本空间提供稳定的语义锚点，实现跨模态对齐以学习源不变的动作语义。
AI.result: 在UniMM-HAR数据集上的实验表明，DAP-Net在异构雷达设置下显著优于现有方法，取得了最佳识别精度，并展现出强大的跨源鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过构建大规模异构多源雷达数据集和设计感知多普勒信息的对齐网络，有效解决了毫米波雷达人体动作识别中的跨源分布偏移问题，为异构雷达场景下的隐私保护感知提供了新的基准和方法路径。

title: Reflection Anchors for Propagation-Aware Visual Retention in Long-Chain Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves large vision--language models, but visual information often fades during generation, limiting long-horizon multimodal reasoning. Existing methods either re-inject vision at inference or train policies for stronger grounding, but where to intervene relies on perception heuristics rather than principled gain analysis, and how local visual influence propagates remains implicit. We study this problem from an information-theoretic standpoint and derive a lower bound on the downstream visual gain of a one-step intervention, which suggests two factors: local branching room (token entropy) and downstream visual propagation potential (suffix divergence from a vision-marginalized reference). Guided by this analysis, we propose reflection-anchor policy optimization (RAPO), a GRPO-based policy optimization method that selects high-entropy reflection anchors and optimizes a chain-masked finite-window KL surrogate for downstream visual dependence. Experiments on reasoning-intensive and general-domain benchmarks show that RAPO delivers substantial gains over strong baselines across multiple LVLM backbones. Mechanism analyses further indicate that reflection anchors are enriched for visually sensitive decision points and that RAPO increases contrastive visual-dependence signals along generated trajectories.

AI.tldr: 本文从信息论角度推导了视觉干预下游增益的下界，提出基于GRPO的反射锚点策略优化方法（RAPO），通过选择高熵反射锚点并优化链式掩码有限窗口KL散度来增强长链多模态推理中的视觉依赖性，在多个基准上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 长链思维推理中视觉信息随生成过程逐渐衰减，限制了视觉语言模型的长程多模态推理能力；现有方法依赖感知启发式规则而非理论原则来决定何处注入视觉信息，且局部视觉影响的传播机制仍不明确。
AI.method: 从信息论角度推导单步视觉干预下游增益的下界，揭示两个关键因素：局部分支空间（token熵）和下游视觉传播潜力（与视觉边缘化参考之间的后缀散度）；据此提出RAPO方法，基于GRPO进行策略优化，选择高熵反射锚点并优化链式掩码有限窗口KL散度以增强下游视觉依赖性。
AI.result: 在推理密集型及通用基准测试上，RAPO在多个视觉语言模型骨干上均显著超越强基线方法；机制分析表明反射锚点富集了视觉敏感决策点，且RAPO沿生成轨迹增强了对比性视觉依赖信号。
AI.conclusion: 基于信息论的理论分析可有效指导多模态推理中视觉干预策略的设计，RAPO通过优化反射锚点位置和视觉依赖传播实现了更鲁棒的长链多模态推理，为视觉语言模型的推理增强提供了理论驱动的优化框架。

title: RADAR: Redundancy-Aware Diffusion for Multi-Agent Communication Structure Generation
summary: Compared with individual agents, large language model based multi-agent systems have shown great capabilities consistently across diverse tasks, including code generation, mathematical reasoning, and planning, etc. Despite their impressive performance, the effectiveness and robustness of these systems heavily rely on their communication topology, which is often fixed or generated in a single step. This restricts fine-grained structural exploration and flexible composition, resulting in excessive token utilization on simple tasks while limiting capability on complicated tasks. To mitigate this challenge, we introduce RADAR, a redundancy-aware and query-adaptive generative framework that actively reduce communication overhead. Motivated by recent progress in conditional discrete graph diffusion models, we formulate communication topology design as a step-by-step generation process, guided by the effective size of the graph. Comprehensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate that RADAR consistently outperforms recent baselines, achieving higher accuracy, lower token consumption, and greater robustness across diverse scenarios. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/cszhangzhen/RADAR.

AI.tldr: RADAR是一个基于条件离散图扩散模型的多智能体通信拓扑生成框架，通过冗余感知和查询自适应机制动态优化通信结构，在多个基准上实现了更高精度、更低token消耗和更强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多智能体系统通常采用固定或单步生成的通信拓扑，这限制了细粒度的结构探索和灵活组合，导致简单任务上过度消耗token而复杂任务上能力受限，缺乏对通信开销的有效控制。
AI.method: RADAR提出了一种冗余感知且查询自适应的生成框架，利用条件离散图扩散模型将通信拓扑设计转化为逐步生成过程，并以图的有效尺寸作为生成引导信号，从而动态减少通信开销。
AI.result: 在六个基准上的综合实验表明，RADAR在准确率、token消耗和鲁棒性方面均一致优于近期基线方法，展现了跨场景的稳定优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了通过逐步扩散生成来动态优化多智能体通信拓扑的有效性，为构建高效、可扩展的多智能体协作系统提供了新思路，并开源了代码与数据以促进后续研究。

title: Any2Any 3D Diffusion Models with Knowledge Transfer: A Radiotherapy Planning Study
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026 main conference. Compare to CVPR version, minor updates here are included (e.g., combine main text and appendix; clarify the timing scenario in appendix)
summary: Voxel-wise dose prediction is a critical yet challenging task in practical radiotherapy (RT) planning, as bespoke models trained from scratch often struggle to generalize across diverse clinical settings. Meanwhile, generative models trained on billion-scale datasets from vision domains have achieved impressive performance. Herein, we propose DiffKT3D, a unified Any2Any 3D diffusion framework that leverages prior knowledge from pretrained video diffusion models for efficient and clinically meaningful dose prediction. To enable flexible conditioning across multiple clinical modalities (CT, anatomical structures, body, beam settings, etc.), we introduce an Any2Any conditional paradigm utilizing modality-specific embeddings without cross-attention overhead. Further, we design a novel reinforcement learning (RL) post-training mechanism guided by a clinically-informed Scorecard explicitly tailored to institutional treatment preferences. Compared with winner of GDP-HMM challenge, DiffKT3D sets a new state-of-the-art in dose prediction by reducing voxel-level MAE from 2.07 to 1.93. In addition, DiffKT3D achieves superior image quality and preference match. These results demonstrate that transferring diffusion priors via modality-aware conditioning and clinically aligned RL post-training can provide a robust and generalizable solution for RT planning across various clinical scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 DiffKT3D，一种统一的 Any2Any 3D 扩散框架，通过利用预训练视频扩散模型的先验知识、Any2Any 条件范式以及基于临床评分卡的强化学习后训练机制，在放疗剂量预测任务中实现新的最先进性能，将体素级 MAE 从 2.07 降至 1.93。
AI.motivation: 传统的放疗剂量预测模型通常从零开始训练，难以在不同临床场景中泛化，而视觉领域大规模预训练生成模型尚未被有效迁移至放疗计划任务，因此需要一种能够利用跨模态先验知识且具备灵活条件机制的通用剂量预测框架。
AI.method: 提出 DiffKT3D 框架，首先利用预训练视频扩散模型中的先验知识实现三维剂量预测；其次设计 Any2Any 条件范式，通过模态特定嵌入实现跨多个临床模态（CT、解剖结构、体轮廓、射束设置等）的灵活条件控制，避免交叉注意力开销；最后引入基于临床评分卡的强化学习后训练机制，显式地将机构治疗偏好对齐到剂量预测结果中。
AI.result: 在 GDP-HMM 挑战赛基准上，DiffKT3D 将体素级 MAE 从 2.07 降低至 1.93，超越了该挑战赛优胜者，达到新的最先进水平。同时，该方法在图像质量和偏好匹配方面也表现更优，证明了其在多样化临床场景中的鲁棒性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过模态感知的条件机制和临床对齐的强化学习后训练来迁移视频扩散先验，能够为放疗计划提供鲁棒且可泛化的解决方案，为预训练扩散模型在医学图像生成领域的应用提供了有效范式。

title: Learning the Interaction Prior for Protein-Protein Interaction Prediction: A Model-Agnostic Approach
summary: Protein-protein interactions (PPIs) are fundamental to cellular function and disease mechanisms. Current learning-based PPI predictors focus on learning powerful protein representations but neglect designing specialized classification heads. They mainly rely on generic aggregating methods like concatenation or dot products, which lack biological insight. Motivated by the biological "L3 rule", where multiple length-3 paths between a pair of proteins indicate their interaction likelihood, our study addresses this gap by designing a biologically informed PPI classifier. In this paper, we provide empirical evidence that popular PPI datasets strongly support the L3 rule. We propose an L3-path-regularized graph prompt learning method called L3-PPI, which can generate a prompt graph with virtual L3 paths based on protein representations and controls the number of paths. L3-PPI reformulates the classification of protein embedding pairs into a graph-level classification task over the generated prompt graph. This lightweight module seamlessly integrates with PPI predictors as a plug-and-play component, injecting the interaction prior of complementarity to enhance performance. Extensive experiments show that L3-PPI achieves superior performance enhancements over advanced competitors.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为L3-PPI的生物学启发式图提示学习方法，通过L3路径正则化将蛋白质对分类转化为图级别分类任务，作为即插即用模块提升PPI预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用（PPI）预测器专注于学习强大的蛋白质表示，却忽视了设计具有生物学洞察力的专用分类头，而是依赖缺乏生物学意义的通用聚合方法（如拼接或点积）。本文受生物学"L3规则"启发（一对蛋白质之间多条长度为3的路径指示其相互作用可能性），旨在设计一种生物学信息化的PPI分类器来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 本文首先通过经验证据验证了主流PPI数据集强烈支持L3规则。在此基础上，提出L3-PPI方法——一种L3路径正则化的图提示学习方法，能够基于蛋白质表示生成带有虚拟L3路径的提示图并控制路径数量。该方法将蛋白质嵌入对的分类问题重新表述为对生成的提示图进行图级别分类任务，作为一个轻量级即插即用模块，通过注入互补性相互作用先验来提升现有PPI预测器的性能。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，L3-PPI在性能提升上优于先进的现有竞争者，验证了其作为即插即用模块的有效性以及生物学先验知识对PPI预测性能的增强作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了将生物学规则（如L3规则）作为先验注入到模型结构中能够显著提升PPI预测性能，为设计更具生物学意义的深度学习PPI预测方法提供了新思路，且L3-PPI的轻量级即插即用特性使其易于集成到现有框架中。

title: BEA-GS: BEyond RAdiance Supervision in 3DGS for Precise Object Extraction
summary: Most Gaussian Splatting techniques that provide a 3D semantic representation of the scene do not optimize the underlying 3D geometry, making object-level editing or asset extraction challenging. Recent methods, such as COBGS, Trace3D, ObjectGS, acknowledge this limitation and propose approaches that modify the scene's geometry to represent the underlying semantics. We advance this concept further by proposing a novel solution that provides near perfect boundaries in object extraction. We do so by introducing two new losses in the optimization that take care of: 1) a loss that modifies the geometry of visible Gaussians to respect semantic boundaries, and 2) a loss that adjusts the geometry of non-visible Gaussians that appear once the object is extracted. Our first loss propagates gradients directly through the rasterization, allowing for seamless integration within the optimization of the Gaussian parameters. The second loss also propagates gradients to Gaussian parameters but does so without passing through the rasterization, enabling modification of the scene's geometry even when little transmittance reaches a Gaussian (partial or non-visible). Exhaustive comparisons with 12 state of the art methods across 4 datasets, using six metrics, demonstrate that our approach produces overall the best boundary segmentation to date.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的3D高斯泼溅优化方法，通过引入两个新型损失函数——一个直接通过光栅化传播梯度以修正可见高斯体的几何边界，另一个绕过光栅化调整非可见高斯体的几何结构——在物体提取中实现了近乎完美的边界分割。
AI.motivation: 现有的大多数高斯泼溅技术在提供场景的3D语义表示时，并未优化底层3D几何结构，这使得物体级别的编辑或资产提取变得困难。尽管COBGS、Trace3D、ObjectGS等方法尝试通过修改场景几何来表征语义，但现有方法在物体提取的边界质量上仍有不足。
AI.method: 本文提出一种新的优化方案，引入两个新损失函数：第一个损失函数直接通过光栅化传播梯度，优化可见高斯体的几何形状以符合语义边界，无缝集成在高斯参数优化过程中；第二个损失函数不经过光栅化，直接传播梯度到高斯参数，用于调整在物体提取后才会显现的非可见（部分可见或不可见）高斯体的几何结构，从而允许在透射率极低的情况下仍能修改场景几何。
AI.result: 在4个数据集上与12种最先进方法进行对比，使用6种评估指标的详尽实验表明，该方法在边界分割任务上取得了整体最优效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明，通过分别针对可见与非可见高斯体设计不同的几何优化损失，可以显著提升3D高斯泼溅中物体提取的边界质量，为基于语义的3D场景编辑和资产提取提供了更精确的几何基础。

title: From Single-Step Edit Response to Multi-Step Molecular Optimization
summary: Conditional molecular optimization aims to edit a molecule to realize a specified property shift. In practice, structurally similar molecule data is scarce, while decisions are inherently action-level: at each step, the system must select one local structural edit from a candidate set that is strictly filtered by chemical feasibility rules. This level mismatch between supervision and decision makes oracle-in-the-loop search unstable in molecular optimization. Regressing on property differences between molecule pairs improves data efficiency but relies on oracle-in-the-loop search, entangling transformation effects with global context and providing limited guidance for selecting the next feasible edit, often resorting to oracle-in-the-loop search. For this reason, we propose a response-oriented discrete edit optimization approach comprising two tightly coupled components: a single-step molecular edit response predictor (SMER) and a multi-step planner that composes local predictions into optimization trajectories via guided tree search (SMER-Opt). The approach learns a directional evaluation model over edit actions to support constraint-aware planning. It mines weakly related molecule pairs and decomposes their structural differences into minimal edit units, turning endpoint property annotations into process-level supervision and yielding reusable, transferable action primitives. A directional edit evaluator then scores feasible candidate edits by their likelihood of moving the molecule toward the desired property change, substantially reducing dependence on external evaluator queries at decision time. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SMER.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种响应导向的离散编辑优化方法SMER，通过单步分子编辑响应预测器与多步引导树搜索规划器，将端点属性标注转化为过程级监督，从而在条件分子优化中减少对外部评估器查询的依赖，提升数据效率和搜索稳定性。
AI.motivation: 条件分子优化面临监督信号与决策层级不匹配的问题：现有方法依赖基于属性差异的回归来提升数据效率，但仍需oracle-in-the-loop搜索进行决策，不仅将变换效果与全局上下文纠缠，而且对下一步可行编辑的选择指导有限，导致搜索不稳定。
AI.method: 提出SMER方法，包含两个紧密耦合的组件：单步分子编辑响应预测器（SMER）用于学习编辑动作的方向性评估模型，以及基于引导树搜索的多步规划器（SMER-Opt）将局部预测组合为优化轨迹。方法通过挖掘弱相关分子对并分解其结构差异为最小编辑单元，将端点属性标注转化为过程级监督，获得可复用、可迁移的动作基元；方向性编辑评估器据此对候选可行编辑进行评分，预测其推动分子朝向目标属性变化的可能性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SMER方法在条件分子优化任务中显著降低了决策时对外部评估器查询的依赖，同时提升了搜索稳定性和数据效率，在多种属性优化设定下取得了优于基线方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将端点监督转化为过程级动作监督并引入方向性编辑评估器，SMER有效解决了分子优化中监督与决策层级不匹配的问题，为约束感知下的分子编辑优化提供了一种可扩展、可迁移的新范式。

title: DeepTumorVQA: A Hierarchical 3D CT Benchmark for Stage-Wise Evaluation of Medical VLMs and Tool-Augmented Agents
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) and AI agents have made significant progress in learning to analyze and reason about clinical images. However, existing medical visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks collapse model capabilities into a single accuracy score, obscuring where and why models fail. We propose DeepTumorVQA, a hierarchical benchmark that follows the multi-stage evidence chain in tumor diagnosis and decomposes 3D CT reasoning into four stages: recognition, measurement, visual reasoning, and medical reasoning. Higher-level questions remain independently scorable, while their ground-truth evidence chains are defined over lower-level primitives. The benchmark contains 476K questions across 42 clinical subtypes on 9,262 3D CT volumes. In addition to a direct reasoning mode for VLMs, DeepTumorVQA provides tool-interaction environments for agent evaluation, where a model can call external tools, including segmentation models, measurement programs, and medical knowledge modules, before answering the question. Evaluating over 30 model configurations, we find that reliable quantitative measurement is the primary bottleneck, making later-stage visual and medical reasoning harder for VLMs, while tool augmentation substantially mitigates this issue. When tools are available, leveraging medical knowledge and tools to reason about medical images becomes a new challenge. We further show that ground-truth step-by-step tool-use traces from DeepTumorVQA can supervise agents and reduce tool-use and reasoning failures. This stage-wise progression from recognition to measurement to visual and medical reasoning provides a concrete roadmap for future medical VLM and AI agent studies. All data and code are released at https://github.com/Schuture/DeepTumorVQA.

AI.tldr: 提出DeepTumorVQA，一个分层医学VQA基准，将3D CT肿瘤诊断推理分解为识别、测量、视觉推理和医学推理四个阶段，包含476K问题，支持直接推理和工具交互两种评估模式，发现定量测量是主要瓶颈，工具增强可有效缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学VQA基准将模型能力简化为单一准确率分数，无法揭示模型在何处以及为何失败，缺乏对肿瘤诊断中多阶段证据链的细粒度评估能力。
AI.method: 提出分层基准DeepTumorVQA，将3D CT肿瘤推理分解为识别、测量、视觉推理和医学推理四个递进阶段，高级问题保持独立可评分，其真实证据链定义于低级原语之上；基准包含476K问题，覆盖42个临床亚型，基于9,262个3D CT体积；提供直接推理模式和工具交互环境（支持分割模型、测量程序、医学知识模块等外部工具调用）两种评估模式。
AI.result: 在超过30种模型配置上评估发现，可靠的定量测量是主要瓶颈，使得后续阶段的视觉和医学推理对VLM更加困难，而工具增强显著缓解了该问题；当工具可用时，利用医学知识和工具进行医学图像推理成为新的挑战；来自DeepTumorVQA的真实逐步工具使用轨迹可监督智能体，减少工具使用和推理失败。
AI.conclusion: 从识别到测量再到视觉和医学推理的阶段性进展为未来医学VLM和AI智能体研究提供了具体路线图，揭示了当前模型在定量测量环节的薄弱性以及工具增强的有效性。

title: TimeClaw: A Time-Series AI Agent with Exploratory Execution Learning
summary: Time series analysis underpins forecasting, monitoring, and decision making in domains such as finance and weather, where solving a task often requires both numerical accuracy and contextual reasoning. Recent progress has moved from specialized neural predictors to approaches built on LLMs and foundation models that can reason over time series inputs and use external tools. However, most such systems remain execution-centric: they focus on solving the current instance but learn little from exploratory execution. This is especially limiting in verifiable numeric settings, where multiple candidate executions and tool-use procedures may all be task-valid yet differ sharply in quantitative quality, and where early success can trigger tool-prior collapse that suppresses further exploration. To address this limitation, we present TimeClaw, an exploratory execution learning framework that turns exploratory execution into reusable hierarchical distilled experience through a four-stage loop: Explore, Compare, Distill, and Reinject. TimeClaw combines metric-supervised exploratory execution learning, task-aware tool dropout, and hierarchical distilled experience for inference-time reinjection, while keeping the base model frozen and avoiding online test-time adaptation. In an MTBench-aligned evaluation with 17 tasks that span finance and weather prediction and reasoning tasks, TimeClaw delivers consistent gains over the baselines. These results suggest that, for scientific systems, the bottleneck is not only execution-time capability, but how exploratory experience is compared, distilled, and reused.

AI.tldr: TimeClaw提出了一种探索性执行学习框架，通过“探索-比较-蒸馏-重注入”四阶段循环将探索性执行转化为可复用的分层蒸馏经验，在不冻结基模型且避免在线测试时适应的前提下，显著提升金融与天气预测及推理任务的数值精度与推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的时间序列分析方法大多以执行为中心，仅关注解决当前实例而缺乏从探索性执行中学习的能力；尤其在可验证的数值场景中，多个候选执行方案在定量质量上差异显著，且早期成功易引发“工具偏好崩塌”，抑制进一步探索，导致模型无法系统性地利用探索经验来提升性能。
AI.method: TimeClaw是一个探索性执行学习框架，核心包含四阶段循环：Explore（生成多个候选执行轨迹）、Compare（基于度量标准对比优劣）、Distill（将优质经验提炼为分层蒸馏经验）、Reinject（在推理时将经验重新注入模型）。框架还引入了度量监督的探索性执行学习、任务感知的工具丢弃（task-aware tool dropout）以及分层蒸馏经验用于推理时重注入，保持基模型冻结且避免在线测试时适应。
AI.result: 在基于MTBench对齐的评估中，涵盖金融与天气预测及推理的17个任务上，TimeClaw在所有基线方法上取得了一致的性能提升，验证了其在数值精度和上下文推理能力方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，对于科学计算系统而言，瓶颈不仅在于执行时的能力，更在于如何对探索性经验进行比较、蒸馏和复用；TimeClaw提供了一种将探索经验系统化转化为可复用知识的新范式。

title: Do multimodal models imagine electric sheep?
summary: Yes. We find that large multimodal models develop mental imagery when solving spatial puzzles, and they do imagine sheep when solving sheep puzzles. We fine-tune a Qwen3.5 VLM to solve twelve diverse visual reasoning tasks -- including tangram, jigsaw, sokoban, 3D mental rotation, and rush hour -- that require understanding geometry, spatial relationships, and the consequences of actions. By supervising the model to predict the open-loop sequence of actions to solve a puzzle from an initial state, we show that the model's activations after each action encode meaningful visual information about the intermediate state. This finding suggests that an imperfect visual world model begins to form as a byproduct of learning to select correct actions, in the absence of any explicit visual supervision. Building on this observation, we propose two ways to sharpen and use the mental images formed by the model. We find that integrating as few as sixteen visual tokens per step into the chain of thought improves the average solve rate from 83% to 89%, with particularly strong gains on reasoning-heavy tasks such as jigsaw and 3D mental rotation.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大语言模型在求解空间谜题时会自发形成视觉世界模型（心理意象），并提出通过在每个推理步骤中引入少量（16个）视觉token来锐化该心理图像，将平均求解率从83%提升至89%。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型通常依赖显式的视觉监督或人工标注的中间状态来学习空间推理，但人类在解决空间问题时往往依赖内隐的心理意象。本文旨在探索大语言模型是否能在没有显式视觉监督的情况下，仅通过学习选择正确动作而自发形成内部的视觉世界模型，并进一步利用该心理图像提升推理性能。
AI.method: 研究者对Qwen3.5视觉语言模型进行微调，使其在12种视觉推理任务（包括七巧板、拼图、推箱子、3D心理旋转、 rush hour等）中从初始状态预测开环动作序列。通过监督模型仅学习动作选择，分析模型在各步骤后的激活状态，发现其中编码了有意义的中间状态视觉信息。基于此观察，提出两种锐化心理图像的方法：在链式推理中每步集成固定数量的视觉token（最少16个）来显式表征中间状态。
AI.result: 模型激活分析表明，在没有显式视觉监督的条件下，模型的动作选择学习过程会自发形成编码中间状态视觉信息的内部表征。将每步16个视觉token集成到推理链中后，平均求解率从83%提升至89%，其中在推理密集型任务（如拼图和3D心理旋转）上提升尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，视觉语言模型可以通过学习动作选择这一间接目标，自发生成有效的内部视觉世界模型（心理意象），而无需显式的中间状态视觉监督。通过少量视觉token显式化该心理图像能够显著提升复杂空间推理任务的性能，为构建更高效、更类人的视觉推理系统提供了新思路。

title: Route by State, Recover from Trace: STAR with Failure-Aware Markov Routing for Multi-Agent Spatiotemporal Reasoning
summary: Compositional spatiotemporal reasoning often requires a system to invoke multiple heterogeneous specialists, such as geometric, temporal, topological, and trajectory agents. A central question is how such a system should route among specialists when execution does not simply succeed or fail, but fails in qualitatively different ways. Existing tool-augmented and multi-agent LLM systems typically leave this routing decision implicit in language generation, making recovery ad hoc, difficult to interpret, and hard to optimize. This paper presents STAR (Spatio-Temporal Agent Router), a failure-aware routing framework that externalizes inter-agent control as a state-conditioned transition policy over the current agent, task type, and typed execution status. At the center of STARis an agent routing matrix that combines expert-specified nominal routes with recovery transitions learned from execution traces. Because the matrix conditions on distinct failure states, the router can respond differently to malformed outputs, missing dependencies, and tool--query mismatches, rather than collapsing them into a generic retry signal. Specialists execute through a tool-grounded extract--compute--deposit protocol and write intermediate results to a shared blackboard for downstream fusion. Results prove that retaining unsuccessful traces during training enlarges the support of the routing policy on error states, enabling recovery transitions that success-only training cannot represent. Across three spatiotemporal benchmarks and eight backbone LLMs, STAR improves over multiple baselines with the clearest gains on queries whose execution deviates from the nominal routing path. Router-specific ablations and recovery analyses further show that typed failure-aware routing, rather than specialist composition alone, is a key factor for these improvements.

AI.tldr: STAR是一个故障感知的路由框架，通过类型化的执行状态条件转换策略外部化智能体间控制，显著提升了组合时空推理中多专业Agent的协同效果。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强和多智能体LLM系统在进行组合时空推理时，通常将路由决策隐式地置于语言生成中，导致恢复机制临时、难以解释且不易优化；当多个异构专业Agent的执行以不同方式失败时，系统缺乏能够区分类别化失败状态并针对性路由的显式控制机制。
AI.method: STAR提出一个故障感知路由框架，核心是智能体路由矩阵，该矩阵结合专家指定的名义路由和从执行轨迹中学习的恢复转换；路由策略基于当前Agent、任务类型和类型化执行状态（如格式异常、依赖缺失、工具-查询不匹配）进行状态条件化决策；专业Agent通过工具驱动的抽取-计算-存放协议执行，并将中间结果写入共享黑板供下游融合；训练阶段保留失败轨迹以扩展路由策略在错误状态上的支持域。
AI.result: 在三个时空推理基准和八个骨干大语言模型上，STAR优于多个基线方法，在偏离名义路由路径的查询上提升最为显著；消融实验和恢复分析表明，类型化故障感知路由而非专业Agent组合本身是性能提升的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，将失败轨迹纳入训练可以学习到成功训练无法表示的恢复转换，从而显著增强路由策略对错误状态的覆盖能力；外部化、类型化的路由控制是提升组合时空推理系统鲁棒性和可解释性的有效途径。

title: DriveFuture: Future-Aware Latent World Models for Autonomous Driving
summary: Existing latent world models for autonomous driving have opened a promising path toward future-aware driving intelligence. However, they typically treat future latent states as prediction targets or auxiliary signals, rather than directly conditioning trajectory planning. This can entangle current and future features in latent space. In this work, we propose DriveFuture, a future-aware latent world modeling framework for autonomous driving that explicitly learns planning-oriented foresight by conditioning the current latent state modeling process on future world states. Specifically, during training, the model first predicts future latent world states from the current latent state and ego action, and then refines the prediction against the ground-truth future latent state via cross-attention. The resulting future-aware latent serves as an explicit condition for a diffusion-based trajectory planner. During inference, DriveFuture conditions on the predicted future latent state instead of the ground-truth future state. DriveFuture achieves SOTA performance on the public NAVSIM benchmarks, reaching \textbf{55.5} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}, \textbf{89.9} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, and \textbf{90.7} PDMS on NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, respectively. These results suggest that the key to latent world modeling lies not merely in simulating future states, but more importantly in conditioning current decision-making on future states. Notably, as of April 2026, DriveFuture ranks \textbf{1st} on the \href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/AGC2025/e2e-driving-navhard}{NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}} leaderboard and achieves SOTA performance on \href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/AGC2024-P/e2e-driving-navtest}{NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}}.

AI.tldr: DriveFuture提出一种面向规划的潜在世界模型框架，通过将当前潜状态建模显式条件化于未来世界状态，实现规划导向的前瞻性，在NAVSIM基准上取得SOTA结果，表明潜在世界建模的关键在于利用未来状态指导当前决策。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶潜在世界模型通常将未来潜状态仅作为预测目标或辅助信号，而非直接用于条件化轨迹规划，导致当前特征与未来特征在隐空间中出现纠缠，限制了模型对规划任务的直接支持。
AI.method: DriveFuture在训练阶段先由当前潜状态和自车动作预测未来潜世界状态，再通过交叉注意力机制将其与真实未来潜状态进行精炼，得到显式的未来感知潜变量作为扩散轨迹规划器的条件；推理时则使用预测的未来潜状态而非真实状态来条件化规划过程。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM-v2 navhard上达到55.5 EPDMS，在NAVSIM-v2 navtest上达到89.9 EPDMS，在NAVSIM-v1 navtest上达到90.7 PDMS，均取得SOTA性能，且截至2026年4月位居NAVSIM-v2 navhard排行榜首位。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明潜在世界建模的关键不在于单纯模拟未来状态，而在于将未来状态显式地条件化当前决策过程，这一洞察为构建前瞻性自动驾驶智能系统提供了新方向。

title: Strategic Exploitation in LLM Agent Markets: A Simulation Framework for E-Commerce Trust
summary: Agent-based modeling (ABM) has long been used in economics to study human behavior, and large language model (LLM) agents now enable new forms of social and economic simulation. While prior work has discovered strategic deception by LLM agents in financial trading and auction markets, e-commerce remains underexplored despite its distinctive information asymmetry: sellers privately observe product quality, whereas buyers rely on advertised claims and reputation signals. We introduce TruthMarketTwin, a controlled simulation framework for studying LLM-agent behavior in e-commerce markets. The framework is one of the first to model bilateral trade under asymmetric information sharing, where agents make strategic listing, purchasing, rating, and recourse-related decisions to optimize seller profit and buyer utility. We find that LLM agents released into traditional markets autonomously exploit weaknesses in reputation-based governance, while warrant enforcement reduces deception and reshapes strategic reasoning. Our results position LLM-agent simulation as a tool for studying institution-governed autonomous markets.

AI.tldr: 提出TruthMarketTwin框架，研究LLM代理在电子商务市场中信息不对称下的策略行为，发现代理会自主利用声誉机制漏洞进行欺骗，而保证书执行可以有效减少欺骗行为。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究发现LLM代理在金融交易和拍卖市场中存在策略性欺骗行为，但电子商务领域因独特的信息不对称性（卖方私有产品质量信息，买方依赖广告宣称和声誉信号）而尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 提出TruthMarketTwin，一个受控模拟框架，用于研究LLM代理在电子商务市场中的行为，该框架是首批在非对称信息共享下建模双边贸易的框架之一，代理需做出策略性上架、购买、评分和维权决策以优化卖方利润和买方效用。
AI.result: LLM代理在传统市场中会自主利用基于声誉的治理机制的弱点，而引入保证书执行（warrant enforcement）能够有效减少欺骗行为并重塑代理的策略推理过程。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明LLM代理模拟可作为研究制度治理下的自主市场的有效工具，揭示了声誉治理机制的脆弱性以及制度约束在抑制策略性欺骗中的关键作用。

title: MOTOR-Bench: A Real-world Dataset and Multi-agent Framework for Zero-shot Human Mental State Understanding
summary: Understanding human mental states from natural behavior is crucial for intelligent systems in the real world. However, most current research focuses on predicting isolated mental state labels, lacking structured annotations of complex interpersonal interactions. To support structured analysis, we introduce MOTOR-Bench, a carefully-designed benchmark with a real-world dataset MOTOR-dataset, containing 1,440 multimodal video clips in collaborative learning scenarios, reflecting key real-world data challenges including natural class imbalance, visual noise, and domain-specific language. Each sample is labeled by educational experts based on self-regulated learning theory. We further evaluate several state-of-the-art multimodal large language models and multi-agent systems in a zero-shot setting on our MOTOR-Bench. However, their performance on this task remains limited, suggesting that existing methods still struggle with structured reasoning from observable behavior to deeper mental states. To address this challenge, we propose a reasoning multi-agent framework, named MOTOR-MAS. It coordinates multiple agents through a structured agent coordination mechanism to infer explicit behaviors, internal cognitions, and psychological emotions. Experimental results show that our MOTOR-MAS outperforms the best single-model benchmark by 15.93 points in Macro-F1 scores for the three labels of behavior, cognition, and emotion, and outperforms the general multi-agent benchmark by 10.2 points in internal cognition prediction.

AI.tldr: MOTOR-Bench 是一个面向协作学习场景的多模态心理状态结构化推理基准，包含 1,440 个真实视频片段；提出的 MOTOR-MAS 多智能体推理框架在行为、认知、情感三类标签的 Macro-F1 上超越最佳单模型 15.93 分，在内部认知预测上超越通用多智能体基准 10.2 分。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于预测孤立心理状态标签，缺乏对复杂人际交互的结构化标注与推理能力，真实场景中的数据不平衡、视觉噪声和领域特定语言等挑战也未被充分应对。
AI.method: 构建了 MOTOR-dataset 包含 1,440 个多模态视频片段，基于自我调节学习理论由教育专家标注行为、认知、情感三类标签；提出 MOTOR-MAS 推理多智能体框架，通过结构化智能体协调机制协同推理外显行为、内部认知与心理情感。
AI.result: 在零样本设置下，现有 SOTA 多模态大模型与多智能体系统在 MOTOR-Bench 上表现有限；MOTOR-MAS 在三个标签的 Macro-F1 上超越最佳单模型 15.93 分，在内部认知预测上超越通用多智能体基准 10.2 分。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法在从可观察行为到深层心理状态的结构化推理上仍存在明显不足，MOTOR-MAS 通过结构化多智能体协作有效提升了这一能力，为智能系统理解人类心理状态提供了可行方向。

title: MAGE: Multi-Agent Self-Evolution with Co-Evolutionary Knowledge Graphs
summary: Self-evolving language-model agents must decide what to learn next and how to preserve what they have learned across iterations. Existing systems typically carry this cross-iteration knowledge as natural-language feedback, flat episodic memory, or implicit reinforcement signals, none of which cleanly supports a frozen weak backbone at inference time. This paper introduces MAGE (Multi-Agent Graph-guided Evolution), a framework that externalizes self-knowledge into a four-subgraph co-evolutionary knowledge graph. Its experience subgraph stores both teacher-written failure corrections and the learner's own past correct reasoning traces, which are retrieved as task-conditioned guidance for a frozen execution model. During evolution, the graph, a task-level search bandit, and a skill-level routing bandit are updated from the same reward stream, while the learner's backbone remains unchanged. We further provide structural analysis showing how append-only memory growth, bounded curriculum coverage, and task-filtered retrieval together support stable improvement of the retrieval substrate for frozen-learner evolution. Across nine benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, multi-hop and open-domain question answering, spatio-temporal analysis, financial numerical reasoning, medical multiple-choice, an open-world survival game, and web navigation, MAGE achieves strong performance against prompt-based frozen-backbone baselines. Ablations show that self-harvested success traces and teacher-written corrections are complementary, with success memories contributing most on reasoning-template-heavy tasks and corrective memories supporting harder composition and interaction settings.

AI.tldr: MAGE 提出多智能体图引导进化框架，通过四子图协同知识图谱将自我知识外部化，使冻结的弱推理模型在迭代进化中保持稳定改进，在九类基准上超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自进化语言智能体在跨迭代知识保持上依赖自然语言反馈、平面情景记忆或隐式强化信号，这些方式无法在推理时支持冻结的弱骨干模型，且难以实现稳定的迭代改进。
AI.method: MAGE 将自我知识外部化为一个四子图协同进化的知识图谱，包括经验子图存储教师修正和智能体自身成功推理轨迹，作为任务条件化指导供冻结的执行模型检索；同时引入任务级搜索臂和技能级路由臂，与图谱从同一奖励流中共同更新，而学习器骨干保持不变；并设计了仅追加式记忆增长、有界课程覆盖和任务过滤检索等机制支撑检索底物的稳定进化。
AI.result: 在数学推理、多跳问答、开放域问答、时空分析、金融数值推理、医学选择题、开放世界生存游戏和网页导航等九类基准上，MAGE 相对于基于提示的冻结骨干基线取得显著性能提升；消融实验表明自我采集的成功轨迹与教师修正互补，成功记忆在推理模板密集型任务中贡献最大，修正记忆则支撑更难的组合和交互场景。
AI.conclusion: MAGE 证明了通过外部化知识图谱和协同多臂更新机制，可以在不改变学习器骨干的前提下实现稳定的自进化，为构建长期自适应智能体提供了新的范式；不同类型经验的互补性为设计混合记忆机制的研究指明了方向。

title: Distilling 3D Spatial Reasoning into a Lightweight Vision-Language Model with CoT
summary: Large-scale 3D vision-language models (VLMs) like LLaVA-3D offer strong spatial reasoning but are difficult to deploy due to high computational costs. We propose a knowledge distillation framework that transfers spatial reasoning from a 7B teacher to a 2.29B student model. Our approach achieves 8.7x lower inference latency and a 3x reduction in model size while retaining 54-72% of the teacher's performance. The framework utilizes VGGT as the vision encoder and a multi-task distillation pipeline with uncertainty-aware loss weighting. To improve reasoning without chain-of-thought (CoT) data, we introduce "Hidden CoT": learnable latent tokens that serve as an internal scratchpad before answer generation. This is the first use of latent scratchpad reasoning in distilled 3D VLMs. The student model jointly performs spatial description, depth estimation, and object detection. Experiments on ScanNet and 3D-FRONT show strong spatial understanding, reaching 68-72% accuracy on proximity and contact tasks. Our framework enables efficient 3D scene QA on resource-constrained platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向3D视觉-语言模型的知识蒸馏框架，将7B教师模型的空域推理能力压缩至2.29B学生模型，推理延迟降低8.7倍、模型体积缩小3倍，并引入隐式思维链（Hidden CoT）可学习潜变量作为内部草稿板，首次将潜变量推理应用于蒸馏式3D VLM中。
AI.motivation: 大规模3D视觉-语言模型（如LLaVA-3D）具备强大的空域推理能力，但由于计算成本高昂难以在资源受限平台部署，现有研究缺乏针对3D VLM的高效压缩方案。
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏框架将7B参数教师模型的空域推理能力迁移至2.29B学生模型；使用VGGT作为视觉编码器，设计多任务蒸馏流水线并引入不确定性感知的损失加权机制；提出隐式思维链（Hidden CoT），通过可学习潜变量token在答案生成前充当内部草稿板以提升推理能力而不依赖链式思维训练数据。
AI.result: 学生模型在ScanNet和3D-FRONT数据集上达到教师模型54-72%的性能，在邻近度与接触任务上准确率达68-72%；推理延迟降低8.7倍，模型体积压缩至原来的约三分之一（从7B到2.29B）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次将潜变量推理（Hidden CoT）引入蒸馏式3D VLM，证明了通过知识蒸馏与隐式思维链可显著压缩3D VLM规模并保持较强空域理解能力，为3D场景问答在资源受限平台的高效部署提供了可行方案。

title: Benchmarking Safety Risks of Knowledge-Intensive Reasoning under Malicious Knowledge Editing
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly rely on knowledge editing to support knowledge-intensive reasoning, but this flexibility also introduces critical safety risks: adversaries can inject malicious or misleading knowledge that corrupts downstream reasoning and leads to harmful outcomes. Existing knowledge editing benchmarks primarily focus on editing efficacy and lack a unified framework for systematically evaluating the safety implications of edited knowledge on reasoning behavior. To address this gap, we present EditRisk-Bench, a benchmark for systematically evaluating safety risks of knowledge-intensive reasoning under malicious knowledge editing. Unlike prior benchmarks that mainly emphasize edit success, generalization, and locality, EditRisk-Bench focuses on how injected knowledge affects downstream reasoning behavior and reliability. It integrates diverse malicious scenarios, including misinformation, bias, and safety violations, together with multi-level knowledge-intensive reasoning tasks and representative editing strategies within a unified evaluation framework measuring attack effectiveness, reasoning correctness, and side effects. Extensive experiments on both open-source and closed-source LLMs show that malicious knowledge editing can reliably induce incorrect or unsafe reasoning while largely preserving general capabilities, making such risks difficult to detect. We further identify several key factors influencing these risks, including edit scale, knowledge characteristics, and reasoning complexity. EditRisk-Bench provides an extensible testbed for understanding and mitigating safety risks in knowledge editing for LLMs.

AI.tldr: EditRisk-Bench 是一个系统性评估大型语言模型在恶意知识编辑下知识密集型推理安全风险的基准，实验表明恶意编辑能可靠地诱导错误或不安全推理且难以被检测。
AI.motivation: 现有知识编辑基准主要关注编辑效力（如成功率、泛化性和局部性），缺乏统一框架来系统评估被编辑知识对推理行为的安全性影响，尤其是恶意编辑可能引入的错误信息、偏见和安全违规等风险。
AI.method: EditRisk-Bench 整合了多种恶意场景（错误信息、偏见、安全违规）和多层次知识密集型推理任务，结合代表性编辑策略，构建统一的评估框架以衡量攻击有效性、推理正确性和副作用。
AI.result: 在开源和闭源 LLM 上的大量实验表明，恶意知识编辑能可靠地导致错误或不安全推理，同时模型通用能力基本保持，使得此类风险难以检测；编辑规模、知识特性和推理复杂度是影响风险的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: EditRisk-Bench 提供了一个可扩展的测试平台，用于理解和缓解 LLM 知识编辑中的安全风险，揭示了恶意编辑对推理行为的隐蔽性威胁，并为后续防御研究奠定了基础。

title: Fetal Brain Imaging: A Composite Neural Network Approach for Keyframe Detection in Ultrasound Videos
summary:
This article presents a novel approach to keyframe detection in ultrasound videos, with a particular focus on fetal brain imaging. The proposed model is a composite neural network architecture that combines a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN). The CNN extracts spatial features from individual video frames, while the RNN captures temporal dependencies between consecutive frames within each video sequence.
  The proposed model may improve the efficiency and accuracy of fetal brain ultrasound analysis, thereby supporting earlier detection, diagnosis, and treatment planning for selected fetal brain conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合CNN与RNN的复合神经网络架构用于超声视频关键帧检测，专门应用于胎儿脑部成像，通过同时提取空间特征和时序依赖关系提升分析效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 胎儿脑部超声视频分析中关键帧检测的准确性和效率仍有提升空间，现有方法未能充分利用视频帧之间的时序依赖关系，影响早期检测、诊断和治疗规划的效果。
AI.method: 提出一种复合神经网络架构，由卷积神经网络（CNN）提取视频帧的空间特征，再由循环神经网络（RNN）捕获连续帧之间的时序依赖关系，从而在超声视频中检测关键帧。
AI.result: 该模型有潜力提升胎儿脑部超声分析中的关键帧检测效率与准确率，但文中未提供具体的定量实验结果或基准性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 该复合架构可能为胎儿脑部疾病的早期检测、诊断和治疗规划提供支持，但尚需进一步的实验验证和基准测试来确认其实际性能优势。

title: Towards Autonomous Railway Operations: A Semi-Hierarchical Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach to the Vehicle Rescheduling Problem
summary: Managing disruptions in railway traffic management is a major challenge. Rising traffic density and infrastructure limits increase complexity, making the Vehicle Routing and Scheduling Problem (VRSP) difficult to solve reliably and in real time. While Operational Research (OR) methods are widely used, most dispatching still relies on human expertise due to the problem's exponential combinatorial complexity. Reinforcement Learning (RL) has gained attention for its potential in multi-agent coordination, but existing RL approaches often underperform OR methods and struggle to scale in dense rail networks. This paper addresses this gap from a machine learning perspective by introducing a semi-hierarchical RL formulation tailored to operational railway constraints. The method separates dispatching from routing through dedicated action and observation spaces, enabling policies to specialise in distinct decision scopes and addressing the imbalance between rare dispatch decisions and frequent routing updates. The approach is evaluated on the Flatland-RL simulator across five difficulty levels and 50 random seeds, with 7 to 80 trains. Results show substantially improved coordination, resource utilisation, and robustness compared with heuristic baselines and monolithic RL, nearly doubling the number of trains reaching their destinations, while keeping deadlock rates below 5% and adaptively sequencing, delaying, or cancelling trains under heavy congestion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半分层强化学习（RL）框架，将调度与路径规划分离，专门用于解决铁路交通管理中车辆路径与调度问题（VRSP），在Flatland-RL仿真器中相比启发式基线和单层RL方法显著提升了列车到达率、降低了死锁率。
AI.motivation: 铁路交通管理中的车辆路径与调度问题（VRSP）因交通密度上升和基础设施限制而变得极其复杂，传统运筹学（OR）方法虽广泛使用，但实际调度仍多依赖人工经验；现有强化学习（RL）方法在多智能体协调中表现常不如OR方法，且在密集铁路网中难以扩展，存在调度决策与路径更新频率失衡的问题。
AI.method: 本文从机器学习角度提出一种半分层强化学习（RL）方法，通过设计专用的动作空间和观测空间将调度（dispatching）与路径规划（routing）分离，使策略能够专精于不同的决策范围，从而解决罕见调度决策与频繁路径更新之间的不平衡问题；方法在Flatland-RL仿真器上，覆盖5个难度级别、50个随机种子，列车数量从7到80列不等进行评估。
AI.result: 与启发式基线和单层强化学习（monolithic RL）方法相比，所提方法在协调性、资源利用率和鲁棒性方面显著提升，到达目的地的列车数量几乎翻倍，在高拥挤度下死锁率控制在5%以下，并能够自适应地对列车进行排序、延迟或取消操作。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，通过合理分解决策空间（调度与路径分离），RL方法能够在复杂铁路调度任务中大幅超越传统启发式方法和单层RL，为解决多智能体协调中的扩展性问题提供了有效思路，并为实际铁路运营中的实时调度决策支持提供了可行方案。

title: DRIVE-C: A Controlled Corruption Dataset for Autonomous Driving
summary: DRIVE-C is a controlled corruption dataset designed to evaluate visual perception robustness in autonomous driving systems. It is built from real-world forward-facing driving videos collected across daytime, nighttime, urban, rural, freeway, and parking environments. Clean clips are anonymized via localized face and license plate blurring, then transformed with physics-inspired synthetic degradations. The dataset contains 10 clean clips and 600 corrupted clips spanning 12 camera degradation types across five severity levels, with per-clip metadata and Global Sensor Health Index (GSHI) annotations. DRIVE-C supports robustness benchmarking, degradation-aware modeling, uncertainty estimation, out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, and sensor health monitoring for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). By providing pixel-aligned clean and degraded video clips with fully reproducible corruption parameters, DRIVE-C offers a structured testbed for studying perception reliability under controlled camera degradation.

AI.tldr: DRIVE-C是一个面向自动驾驶视觉感知鲁棒性评估的受控退化视频数据集，包含600段覆盖12种相机退化类型和5种严重等级的退化视频片段，并提供全局传感器健康指数（GSHI）注释，支持鲁棒性基准测试、退化感知建模和传感器健康监测等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶感知评测数据集缺乏对相机退化（如模糊、噪声、遮挡等）的受控、可复现的系统性评估，导致感知模型在真实退化场景下的鲁棒性研究缺乏标准化测试平台。
AI.method: 从真实前视驾驶视频中收集清洁片段，对局部人脸和车牌进行匿名化模糊处理，然后应用物理启发的合成退化技术，生成覆盖12种相机退化类型、5种严重等级的600段退化视频，并提供逐片段元数据和全局传感器健康指数（GSHI）注释。
AI.result: 数据集包含10段清洁视频和600段退化视频，涵盖白天、夜晚、城市、乡村、高速公路和停车场等多种环境，所有清洁与退化视频片段实现像素级对齐，退化参数完全可复现。
AI.conclusion: DRIVE-C为自动驾驶领域提供了一个结构化、可复现的受控退化测试平台，可用于鲁棒性基准测试、退化感知建模、不确定性估计、分布外检测和传感器健康监测，有助于系统研究自动驾驶视觉感知在受控相机退化条件下的可靠性。

title: AgentRx: A Benchmark Study of LLM Agents for Multimodal Clinical Prediction Tasks
comment: Accepted at the AHLI Conference on Health, Inference, and Learning 2026
summary: Building effective clinical decision support systems requires the synthesis of complex heterogeneous multimodal data. Such modalities include temporal electronic health records data, medical images, radiology reports, and clinical notes. Large language model (LLM)-based agents have shown impressive performance in various healthcare tasks, especially those involving textual modalities. Considering the fragmentation of healthcare data across hospital systems, collaborative agent frameworks present a promising direction to mitigate data sharing challenges. However, the effectiveness of LLM agents for multimodal clinical risk prediction remains largely unexamined. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of LLM-based agents for clinical prediction tasks using large-scale real-world data. We assess performance in unimodal and multimodal settings and quantify performance gaps between single agent and multi-agent systems. Our findings highlight that single agent frameworks outperform naive multi-agent systems, are better at handling multimodal data, and are better calibrated. This underscores a critical need for improving multi-agent collaboration to better handle heterogeneous inputs. By open-sourcing our code and evaluation framework, this work offers a new benchmark to support future developments relating to agentic systems in healthcare.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了基于LLM的智能体在临床风险预测任务中的表现，发现单智能体框架在多模态数据处理和校准方面优于简单多智能体系统，揭示了多智能体协作机制亟需改进的关键问题。
AI.motivation: 构建有效的临床决策支持系统需要综合复杂的异构多模态数据（如时序电子健康记录、医学影像、放射报告和临床笔记），尽管LLM智能体在医疗文本任务中表现优异，且多智能体协作框架有望缓解医疗数据分散带来的数据共享挑战，但LLM智能体在多模态临床风险预测中的有效性尚未得到系统验证。
AI.method: 利用大规模真实世界数据，对基于LLM的智能体在临床预测任务中进行系统性评估，分别在单模态和多模态设置下测试性能，并量化单智能体系统与多智能体系统之间的性能差距。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，单智能体框架在整体性能上优于简单的多智能体系统，能够更好地处理多模态数据，且具有良好的校准能力。这揭示了简单多智能体系统在处理异构输入方面存在明显的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 该研究强调了改进多智能体协作机制以更好处理异构数据输入的必要性，并通过开源代码和评估框架为未来医疗智能体系统的研究提供了新的基准。

title: CrossVL: Complexity-Aware Feature Routing and Paired Curriculum for Cross-View Vision-Language Detection
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Code available at https://github.com/1nyourlife/Crossvl_cvpr2026
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) enable text-guided object detection but degrade severely under cross-view scenarios where ground and aerial viewpoints differ in altitude, scale, and spatial layout. These geometric changes introduce systematic complexity variations between viewpoints, e.g., ground view images contain dense and highly occluded structures, while aerial images are sparse and globally organized. Fixed VLM fusion mechanisms cannot handle this discrepancy. We propose CrossVL, a framework combining Complexity-Aware Pathway Aggregation (CPA) and Paired Curriculum Learning (PCL) for enhanced cross-view detection for VLM. CPA estimates scene complexity from multimodal statistics and routes visual features through multiple pathways to obtain view-specific representations. PCL leverages semantic consistency of synchronized ground-aerial pairs to provide stable early supervision and then gradually shifts toward randomized sampling. On MAVREC, CrossVL improves Florence-2's aerial mAP from 58.66% to 61.03% and reduces the ground-aerial performance gap from 8.63pp to 6.65pp, while also achieving a 3.3x reduction in variance across random seeds. CPA provides stable complexity-aware feature aggregation, and PCL enhances optimization dynamics. Together, they demonstrate that coordinated architectural and training adaptations are crucial for robust cross-view VLM detection.

AI.tldr: CrossVL 提出结合复杂度感知路径聚合（CPA）与配对课程学习（PCL）的框架，通过多模态复杂度估计引导视图特定特征表示和语义一致的渐进训练策略，显著提升视觉语言模型在跨视角（地面-航拍）场景下的目标检测性能，并降低视角间性能差距与训练方差。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在文本引导的目标检测中表现优异，但在地面与航拍视角之间存在高度、尺度和空间布局差异的跨视角场景下性能严重下降，因为固定融合机制无法处理地面密集遮挡结构与航拍稀疏全局排列之间的系统性复杂度差异。
AI.method: CrossVL 框架包含两个核心模块：复杂度感知路径聚合（CPA）通过多模态统计估计场景复杂度，并将视觉特征路由到多条处理路径以获得视图特定表示；配对课程学习（PCL）利用同步地面-航拍对的语义一致性提供稳定早期监督，并逐步过渡到随机采样策略。
AI.result: 在 MAVREC 数据集上，CrossVL 将 Florence-2 的航拍 mAP 从 58.66% 提升至 61.03%，将地面-航拍性能差距从 8.63 个百分点缩小至 6.65 个百分点，同时将随机种子的训练方差降低了 3.3 倍。
AI.conclusion: CPA 提供稳定的复杂度感知特征聚合，PCL 增强优化动力学，两者协同表明架构与训练策略的协调适应是实现鲁棒跨视角 VLM 检测的关键。

title: Verifiable Process Rewards for Agentic Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has improved the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs), but most existing approaches rely on sparse outcome-level feedback. This sparsity creates a credit assignment challenge in long-horizon agentic reasoning: a trajectory may fail despite containing many correct intermediate decisions, or succeed despite containing flawed ones. In this work, we study a class of densely-verifiable agentic reasoning problems, where intermediate actions can be objectively checked by symbolic or algorithmic oracles. We propose Verifiable Process Rewards (VPR), a framework that converts such oracles into dense turn-level supervision for reinforcement learning, and instantiate it in three representative settings: search-based verification for dynamic deduction, constraint-based verification for logical reasoning, and posterior-based verification for probabilistic inference. We further provide a theoretical analysis showing that dense verifier-grounded rewards can improve long-horizon credit assignment by providing more localized learning signals, with the benefit depending on the reliability of the verifier. Empirically, VPR outperforms outcome-level reward and rollout-based process reward baselines across controlled environments, and more importantly, transfers to both general and agentic reasoning benchmarks, suggesting that verifiable process supervision can foster general reasoning skills applicable beyond the training environments. Our results indicate that VPR is a promising approach for enhancing LLM agents whenever reliable intermediate verification is available, while also highlighting its dependence on oracle quality and the open challenge of extending VPR to less structured, open-ended environments.

AI.tldr: 提出可验证过程奖励（VPR）框架，将符号或算法预言机转化为密集的回合级监督信号用于强化学习，在长程智能体推理中显著优于稀疏结果级奖励和基于rollout的过程奖励基线，并展现出向通用推理基准的迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法主要依赖稀疏的结果级反馈，这在长程智能体推理中导致严重的信用分配问题：一条轨迹可能因中间步骤正确但最终失败而受到惩罚，或反之。该方法无法为中间决策提供细粒度的学习信号，限制了LLM在复杂多步推理任务中的训练效果。
AI.method: 提出可验证过程奖励（VPR）框架，利用符号或算法预言机将中间动作的客观可验证性转化为密集的回合级监督信号用于强化学习。在三个代表性场景中实例化：基于搜索验证的动态演绎、基于约束验证的逻辑推理和基于后验验证的概率推理，并给出理论分析证明密集验证器奖励通过提供更局部化的学习信号改善长程信用分配。
AI.result: 实验表明VPR在受控环境中优于结果级奖励和基于rollout的过程奖励基线，更重要的是，VPR训练的模型能够迁移到通用推理和智能体推理基准上，表明可验证过程监督可以培养超出训练环境的通用推理技能。
AI.conclusion: VPR是增强LLM智能体推理能力的有效方法，前提是存在可靠的中间步骤可验证机制；其效果依赖于预言机质量，且如何将VPR扩展到缺乏结构化验证的开放环境仍是一个待解决的挑战。

title: Fashion Florence: Fine-Tuning Florence-2 for Structured Fashion Attribute Extraction
summary: We present Fashion Florence, a Florence-2 vision-language model fine-tuned with LoRA to extract structured fashion attributes from clothing images. Given a single photograph, the model generates a JSON object containing category, color, material, style tags, and occasion tags, structured output suitable for direct programmatic consumption by downstream recommendation and retrieval systems. Fine-tuning data is derived from the iMaterialist Fashion dataset (228 labels), where we collapse fine-grained annotations into a compact 6-category, 16-color, 19-style schema via rule-based label engineering. We apply LoRA (r=16, alpha=32) to all decoder linear layers, training for 3 epochs on 3,688 examples. On a held-out test set of 461 images, Fashion Florence achieves 94.6% category accuracy and 63.0% material accuracy, compared to 89.3% / 43.3% for GPT-4o-mini and 87.4% for Gemini 2.5 Flash. Fashion Florence produces valid JSON in 99.8% of outputs while running at 0.77B parameters on a single GPU at zero marginal inference cost. Style tag F1 reaches 0.753 vs. 0.612 (Gemini) and 0.398 (GPT-4o-mini). The model is deployed as a Hugging Face Space and integrated into Loom, an open-source outfit recommendation system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Fashion Florence，一个基于 Florence-2 并结合 LoRA 微调的多模态视觉语言模型，能够从单张服装图像中提取结构化的时尚属性（类别、颜色、材质、风格、场合）并以 JSON 格式输出，在参数量仅 0.77B 的情况下，在各项指标上全面超越 GPT-4o-mini 和 Gemini 2.5 Flash。
AI.motivation: 现有通用视觉语言模型在细粒度时尚属性提取任务上准确率不足，且输出格式不便于下游推荐与检索系统的程序化消费；同时，全参数微调大规模模型计算成本高，亟需一种参数高效、输出结构化的轻量级解决方案。
AI.method: 基于 Florence-2 视觉语言模型，采用 LoRA（秩 r=16，alpha=32）对所有解码器线性层进行微调；从 iMaterialist Fashion 数据集的 228 个细粒度标签出发，通过规则驱动标签工程将其压缩为 6 类别、16 颜色、19 风格的紧凑模式，训练集规模为 3,688 张图像，训练 3 个 epoch；模型直接输出结构化 JSON 对象。
AI.result: 在 461 张图像的测试集上，Fashion Florence 在类别准确率（94.6% vs. 89.3% / 87.4%）和材质准确率（63.0% vs. 43.3%）上显著优于 GPT-4o-mini 和 Gemini 2.5 Flash；风格标签 F1 得分为 0.753，远超 Gemini（0.612）和 GPT-4o-mini（0.398）；JSON 有效输出率达 99.8%，模型参数量仅 0.77B，可在单 GPU 上零边际成本推理。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，结合 LoRA 参数高效微调的小规模专用视觉语言模型在结构化时尚属性提取任务上能够显著超越通用大模型，兼具高精度、低成本、输出规整等优势，可有效部署于实际推荐系统；该模型已作为 Hugging Face Space 发布并集成至开源服装推荐系统 Loom 中。

title: CORTEG: Foundation Models Enable Cross-Modality Representation Transfer from Scalp to Intracranial Brain Recordings
summary: Intracranial electrocorticography (ECoG) offers high-signal-to-noise access to cortical activity for brain-computer interfaces, yet limited per-patient data has led most prior work to rely on small, subject-specific decoders that neglect information shared across patients. We investigate whether large pretrained scalp-EEG foundation models (EEG FMs) can be adapted to ECoG, enabling cross-patient learning and competitive decoding performance while calibrating to a held-out patient in 10-30 minutes on a single GPU. We introduce CORTEG, a cross-modality transfer framework that combines a pretrained EEG FM backbone, an electrode-aware KNNSoftFourier spatial adapter, a dual-stream tokenizer for low-frequency and high-gamma activity, and a leave-one-subject-out fine-tuning strategy. We evaluate CORTEG on two challenging regression tasks: public finger trajectory regression (n=9) and private audio envelope regression (n=16). CORTEG matches or exceeds the strongest task-specific baselines on both tasks: it reaches the highest mean correlation among compared methods on the public finger benchmark (gain not statistically significant on n=9 subjects), with larger and statistically significant gains on the audio task and in low-data per-patient calibration. Feature analyses align with neurophysiology, and latent manifolds capture low-dimensional finger-movement structure. CORTEG provides systematic evidence that scalp-EEG pretraining can be repurposed for ECoG decoding, enabling data-efficient intracranial BCIs that can adapt to new patients.

AI.tldr: CORTEG通过跨模态迁移框架将预训练的头皮脑电图基础模型适配到颅内脑电图解码，在手指运动和音频包络回归任务上匹配或超越任务专用基线，实现10-30分钟快速跨患者校准，证明头皮脑电图预训练可有效复用于数据高效的颅内脑机接口。
AI.motivation: 颅内脑电图（ECoG）为脑机接口提供了高信噪比的皮层活动访问，但有限的单患者数据导致以往方法大多依赖忽略跨患者共享信息的小型、个体专用解码器。本研究旨在探究大规模预训练头皮脑电图基础模型（EEG FMs）能否适配到ECoG，从而实现跨患者学习并在单GPU上10-30分钟内校准至新患者。
AI.method: 本文提出CORTEG跨模态迁移框架，包含预训练EEG FM主干网络、电极感知的KNNSoftFourier空间适配器、用于低频和高伽马活动的双流分词器，以及留一患者微调策略。该方法将预训练的头皮脑电图模型适配到ECoG信号上，实现跨患者信息利用。
AI.result: 在公共手指轨迹回归任务（n=9）和私有人工包络回归任务（n=16）上，CORTEG匹配或超越了最强的任务专用基线模型。在手指标杆上达到所有对比方法中的最高平均相关系数（在n=9受试者上统计不显著），在音频任务和低数据单患者校准场景下取得更大且统计显著的增益。特征分析符合神经生理学，潜在流形捕捉了低维手指运动结构。
AI.conclusion: CORTEG系统性地证明了头皮脑电图预训练可以重新用于ECoG解码，从而实现数据高效的颅内脑机接口，能够快速适配新患者。该工作为跨模态迁移学习在神经解码中的应用提供了重要范例。

title: Clip-level Uncertainty and Temporal-aware Active Learning for End-to-End Multi-Object Tracking
comment: Accepted to 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP). Copyright 2026 IEEE. Published in 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP), scheduled for 13-17 September 2026 in Tampere, Finland
summary: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) in dynamic environments relies on robust temporal reasoning to maintain consistent object identities over time. Transformer-based end-to-end MOT models achieve strong performance by explicitly modeling temporal dependencies, yet training them requires extensive bounding-box and identity annotations. Given the high labeling cost and strong redundancy in videos, Active Learning (AL) is an effective approach to improve annotation efficiency. However, existing AL methods for MOT primarily operate at the frame level, which is structurally misaligned with modern end-to-end trackers whose inference and training rely on multi-frame clips. To bridge this gap, we formulate clip-level active learning and propose Clip-level Uncertainty and Temporal-aware Active Learning (CUTAL). In contrast to frame-based approaches, CUTAL scores each clip using uncertainty metrics derived from multi-frame predictions to capture inter-frame correspondence ambiguities, while enforcing temporal diversity to select an informative and non-redundant subset. Experiments show that CUTAL achieves stronger overall performance than baselines at the same label budgets across MeMOTR and SambaMOTR. Notably, CUTAL achieves performance comparable to full supervision for MeMOTR on both datasets using only 50% of the labeled training data.

AI.tldr: 提出面向端到端多目标跟踪的片段级主动学习框架CUTAL，通过片段级不确定性度量和时序多样性采样，在仅使用50%标注数据的情况下达到与全监督相当的跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: Transformer端到端MOT模型依赖多帧片段进行推理和训练，而现有主动学习方法仅在帧级别进行采样，与模型的结构不匹配，导致标注效率低下且无法捕捉帧间对应关系的不确定性。
AI.method: CUTAL将主动学习单元从帧提升至片段级别，提出基于多帧预测的片段级不确定性度量以捕捉帧间对应歧义，同时引入时序多样性约束确保所选片段的信息性和非冗余性。
AI.result: 在MeMOTR和SambaMOTR上的实验表明，在相同标签预算下CUTAL性能优于基线方法；特别地，在仅使用50%标注数据时，MeMOTR在两个数据集上均达到与全监督相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 片段级主动学习与端到端MOT模型结构天然对齐，能显著提升标注效率；CUTAL证明了通过合理的片段级不确定性采样和时序多样性策略，可以大幅降低MOT对密集标注的依赖。

title: TMAS: Scaling Test-Time Compute via Multi-Agent Synergy
summary: Test-time scaling has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models by allocating additional computation during inference. Recent structured approaches have further advanced this paradigm by organizing inference across multiple trajectories, refinement rounds, and verification-based feedback. However, existing structured test-time scaling methods either weakly coordinate parallel reasoning trajectories or rely on noisy historical information without explicitly deciding what should be retained and reused, limiting their ability to balance exploration and exploitation. In this work, we propose TMAS, a framework for scaling test-time compute via multi-agent synergy. TMAS organizes inference as a collaborative process among specialized agents, enabling structured information flow across agents, trajectories, and refinement iterations. To support effective cross-trajectory collaboration, TMAS introduces hierarchical memories: the experience bank reuses low-level reliable intermediate conclusions and local feedback, while the guideline bank records previously explored high-level strategies to steer subsequent rollouts away from redundant reasoning patterns. Furthermore, we design a hybrid reward reinforcement learning scheme tailored to TMAS, which jointly preserves basic reasoning capability, enhances experience utilization, and encourages exploration beyond previously attempted solution strategies. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TMAS achieves stronger iterative scaling than existing test-time scaling baselines, while hybrid reward training further improves scaling effectiveness and stability across iterations. Code and data are available at https://github.com/george-QF/TMAS-code.

AI.tldr: TMAS 是一种通过多智能体协同实现测试时计算扩展的框架，它利用层次化记忆（经验库和指导库）来组织推理轨迹间的信息流，并采用混合奖励强化学习方案，从而在复杂推理基准上取得了优于现有测试时扩展方法的迭代扩展效果。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化测试时扩展方法要么弱协调并行推理轨迹，要么依赖有噪声的历史信息而未明确决定保留和重用哪些内容，限制了它们在探索与利用之间取得平衡的能力，亟需一种能够有效协调跨轨迹信息并实现结构化信息流动的测试时计算扩展框架。
AI.method: TMAS 将推理组织为多个专门化智能体间的协作过程，通过引入层次化记忆实现跨轨迹协作：经验库负责重用低层可靠中间结论和局部反馈，指导库记录高层探索策略以规避冗余推理模式；同时设计了混合奖励强化学习方案，联合保持基础推理能力、增强经验利用并鼓励探索未尝试的求解策略。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的推理基准上的大量实验表明，TMAS 比现有测试时扩展基线实现了更强的迭代扩展能力，而混合奖励训练进一步提升了跨迭代的扩展有效性和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: TMAS 通过多智能体协同和层次化记忆机制有效平衡了推理过程中的探索与利用，为结构化测试时计算扩展提供了新的思路，其混合奖励训练方案在提升扩展稳定性方面具有重要价值。

title: Hyperbolic Distillation: Geometry-Guided Cross-Modal Transfer for Robust 3D Object Detection
comment: Current version has been subbmitted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia. Now, this manuscript's status is Under Review
summary: Cross-modal knowledge distillation has emerged as an effective strategy for integrating point cloud and image features in 3D perception tasks. However, the modality heterogeneity, spatial misalignment, and the representation crisis of multiple modalities often limit the efficient of these cross-modal distillation methods. To address these limitations in existing approaches, we propose a hyperbolic constrained cross-modal distillation method for multimodal 3D object detection (HGC-Det). The proposed HGC-Det framework includes an image branch and a point cloud branch to extract semantic features from two different modalities. The point cloud branch comprises three core components: a 2D semantic-guided voxel optimization component (SGVO), a hyperbolic geometry constrained cross-modal feature transfer component (HFT), and a feature aggregation-based geometry optimization component (FAGO). Specifically, the SGVO component adaptively refines the spatial representation of the 3D branch by leveraging semantic cues from the image branch, thereby mitigating the issue of inadequate representation fusion. The HFT component exploits the intrinsic geometric properties of hyperbolic space to alleviate semantic loss during the fusion of high-dimensional image features and low-dimensional point cloud features. Finally, the FAGO compensates for potential spatial feature degradation introduced by the 2D semantic-guided voxel optimization component. Extensive experiments on indoor datasets (SUN RGB-D, ARKitScenes) and outdoor datasets (KITTI, nuScenes) demonstrate that our method achieves a better trade-off between detection accuracy and computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出基于双曲空间的跨模态知识蒸馏框架HGC-Det，通过语义引导体素优化、双曲几何约束特征迁移和特征聚合几何优化三个组件，有效解决多模态3D检测中的模态异质、空间错位与表示危机问题，在室内外数据集上实现检测精度与计算成本的更好权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态知识蒸馏方法在3D感知任务中受限于模态异质性、空间错位以及多模态表示危机，导致点云与图像特征融合效率低下，检测精度与计算开销之间难以取得良好平衡。
AI.method: 提出HGC-Det框架，包含图像分支与点云分支；点云分支由三个核心组件构成：2D语义引导体素优化组件(SGVO)利用图像语义提示自适应优化3D分支的空间表示，双曲几何约束跨模态特征迁移组件(HFT)利用双曲空间的几何性质缓解高维图像特征与低维点云特征融合中的语义损失，特征聚合几何优化组件(FAGO)补偿SGVO引入的空间特征退化。
AI.result: 在室内数据集SUN RGB-D、ARKitScenes和室外数据集KITTI、nuScenes上的大量实验表明，该方法在检测精度与计算成本之间取得了更优的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间的几何约束能够有效缓解跨模态特征融合中的语义损失问题，语义引导与几何优化相结合的策略为实现高效的多模态3D检测提供了新思路，在多种场景下均具有较好的泛化能力。

title: Adversarial Attacks Against MLLMs via Progressive Resolution Processing and Adaptive Feature Alignment
summary: Adversarial perturbations can mislead Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) recognize a benign image as a specific target object, posing serious risks in safety-critical scenarios such as autonomous driving and medical diagnosis. This makes transfer-based targeted attacks crucial for understanding and improving black-box MLLM robustness. Existing transfer-based targeted attack methods typically rely on the final global features of the surrogate encoder and anchor optimization to original-resolution target crops, leading to their limited transferability and robustness. To address these challenges, we propose Progressive Resolution Processing and Adaptive Feature Alignment (PRAF-Attack), a targeted transfer-based attack framework that integrates multi-scale global semantic guidance with robust intermediate-layer local alignment. Unlike prior methods that align only the surrogate encoder's final layer, we design an adaptive feature alignment strategy that leverages intermediate representations to enhance transferability. Specifically, we introduce an adaptive intermediate layer selection mechanism to identify transferable hierarchical features across surrogate ensembles via gradient consistency, along with an adaptive patch-level optimization strategy that preserves highly correlated local regions through efficient patch filtering. To overcome the reliance on fixed original-resolution target crops, we propose a progressive resolution processing strategy that gradually refines optimization from coarse to fine, enabling the attack to better exploit target information at multiple scales and achieve stronger transferability. We evaluate PRAF-Attack on a diverse suite of black-box MLLMs, including six open-source models and six closed-source commercial APIs. Compared with seven state-of-the-art targeted attack baselines, the proposed PRAF-Attack consistently achieves superior transferability.

AI.tldr: 提出了PRAF-Attack框架，通过多尺度全局语义引导和鲁棒的中间层局部对齐，解决了现有转移性目标攻击方法在黑盒多模态大模型上可迁移性差的问题，在多个开源和闭源模型上取得了优于SOTA的攻击性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于转移性的目标攻击方法通常依赖替代编码器的最终全局特征和对原始分辨率目标裁剪的锚点优化，导致在黑盒多模态大模型上的可迁移性和鲁棒性有限，无法有效应对安全关键场景下的对抗威胁。
AI.method: 提出PRAF-Attack框架，包含两个核心策略：一是自适应特征对齐策略，通过梯度一致性从替代集成模型中识别可迁移的层次化中间层特征，并采用自适应补丁级优化通过高效补丁过滤保留高相关局部区域；二是渐进式分辨率处理策略，从粗到细逐步优化目标信息的多尺度利用，摆脱对固定原始分辨率目标裁剪的依赖。
AI.result: 在6个开源和6个闭源商业API黑盒多模态大模型上进行了评估，与7种最先进的定向攻击基线方法相比，PRAF-Attack在可迁移性上持续取得了更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 利用中间层表征进行自适应特征对齐以及多尺度渐进式分辨率优化，能够显著提升针对黑盒MLLM的定向对抗攻击的可迁移性，为理解和提升MLLM鲁棒性提供了新的视角和方法。

title: Agent-ValueBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Agent Values
summary: Autonomous agents have rapidly matured as task executors and seen widespread deployment via harnesses such as OpenClaw. Safety concerns have rightly drawn growing research attention, and beneath them lie the values silently steering agent behavior. Existing value benchmarks, however, remain confined to LLMs, leaving agent values largely uncharted.
