From intuitive, empirical, and theoretical vantage points, we show that an agent's values diverge from those of its underlying LLM, and the agentic modality further introduces dataset-, evaluation-, and system-level challenges absent from text-only protocols. We close this gap with Agent-ValueBench, the first benchmark dedicated to agent values. It features 394 executable environments across 16 domains, offering 4,335 value-conflict tasks that cover 28 value systems and 332 dimensions. Every instance is co-synthesized through our purpose-built end-to-end pipeline and curated per-instance by professional psychologists. Each task ships with two pole-aligned golden trajectories whose checkpoints anchor a trajectory-level rubric-based judge. Benchmarking 14 frontier proprietary and open-weights models across 4 mainstream harnesses, we uncover three concerted findings. Agent values first manifest as a Value Tide of cross-model homogeneity beneath interpretable counter-currents. This tide bends non-additively under harness pull, and yet more decisively under deliberate steering via embedded skills. Together these results signal that the agent-alignment lever is shifting from classical model alignment and prompt steering toward harness alignment and skill steering.

AI.tldr: 提出Agent-ValueBench，首个专用于智能体价值观的基准测试，揭示智能体价值观与其底层LLM存在系统性偏离，发现价值观在不同模型中呈现潮汐式同质性，且智能体对齐的杠杆正从模型对齐与提示工程转向框架对齐与技能引导。
AI.motivation: 现有价值观基准仅局限于LLM层面，忽视了智能体作为任务执行者时其价值观可能与其底层LLM产生偏离；同时，智能体模态引入了数据集构建、评估方法和系统层面上的新挑战，这些在纯文本协议中并不存在，因此亟需一个专门针对智能体价值观的基准测试来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建Agent-ValueBench基准，包含394个可执行环境、16个领域、4,335个价值观冲突任务，覆盖28种价值体系与332个维度；采用端到端流水线协同合成实例，并由专业心理学家逐实例筛选；每个任务附带两条极对齐黄金轨迹，其检查点锚定基于轨迹级别的评测量表法官。基于14个前沿模型和4个主流智能体框架进行评测。
AI.result: 实验揭示三个系统性发现：智能体价值观呈现跨模型同质性的"价值潮汐"现象，其下方存在可解释的逆流；该潮汐在框架牵引下呈非加性弯曲；通过内嵌技能进行有意引导可更决定性地改变价值观方向。智能体价值观与其底层LLM价值观存在显著偏离。
AI.conclusion: 智能体对齐的杠杆正在从经典的模型对齐与提示工程转向框架对齐与技能引导；智能体价值观的偏离现象表明，仅依靠底层LLM的对齐不足以确保智能体行为的价值观一致性，需要从智能体模态特有的交互层面进行系统性把控。

title: Frequency Adapter with SAM for Generalized Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation is a critical task in computer-aided diagnosis and treatment planning. However, deep learning models often struggle to generalize across datasets due to domain shifts arising from variations in imaging protocols, scanner types, and patient populations. Traditional domain generalization (DG) methods utilize causal feature learning, adversarial consistency, and style augmentation to improve segmentation robustness. While effective, these approaches rely on explicit feature alignment, adversarial objectives, or handcrafted augmentations, which may not fully exploit the capabilities of foundation models. Recently, the Segment Anything Model (SAM) has demonstrated strong generalization capabilities in segmentation tasks. SAM-based DG methods attempt to improve medical image segmentation. However, these approaches primarily operate in the spatial domain and overlook frequency-based discrepancies that significantly affect model robustness. In this work, we propose Frequency-based Domain Generalization with SAM (FSAM), a novel framework that integrates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for efficient fine-tuning and a frequency adapter to incorporate frequency-domain representations for single-source domain generalization. FSAM enhances SAM's segmentation robustness by extracting domain-invariant high-frequency features, mitigating frequency-related domain shifts. Experimental results on fundus and prostate datasets demonstrate that FSAM outperforms existing traditional DG and SAM-based DG approaches in domain generalization. Codes and pre-trained models will be made available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FSAM框架，通过将低秩适配（LoRA）和频率适配器集成到Segment Anything Model（SAM）中，引入频域表示以实现单源域泛化的医学图像分割，在眼底和前列腺数据集上显著优于传统域泛化方法和基于SAM的域泛化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有域泛化方法依赖显式特征对齐、对抗目标或手工增强，未能充分利用基础模型的潜力；而基于SAM的域泛化方法主要在空间域操作，忽略了影响模型鲁棒性的频域差异。
AI.method: 提出FSAM框架，将低秩适配（LoRA）用于高效微调，并设计频率适配器以引入频域表征，使其能够提取域不变的高频特征，从而缓解频域相关的域偏移，实现单源域泛化。
AI.result: 在眼底和前列腺数据集上的实验表明，FSAM在域泛化性能上全面超过传统域泛化方法以及现有基于SAM的域泛化方法。
AI.conclusion: 频域信息对提升分割模型在域偏移下的鲁棒性具有关键作用，结合基础模型与频域适配可有效实现医学图像分割的域泛化。

title: Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects: From Passive Assertions to Active Knowledge
summary: Scientific knowledge on the Web is published as passive assertions and cannot decide when to validate evidence, reconcile contradictions, or update confidence as findings accumulate. Curation depends on centralised middleware and institutional continuity, but when registries close, active stewardship stops even when data remain online. We advance the concept of Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects (aFDOs) from an abstract idea to an operational model, to offer a route from passive scientific publication toward accountable, standards-aligned automation that can outlive its publishing institutions. aFDO augments FDOs with three capabilities anchored in Semantic Web standards, namely 1) a policy layer over RDF-star aligned with PROV-O, SHACL, and ODRL for portable condition-action rules, 2) an announcement layer over ActivityStreams 2.0 that bounds per-announcement evaluation cost, and 3) an agreement layer that resolves multi-source contradictions through reputation and confidence weighted agreement under a bounded adversarial model. We provide a formal definition that distinguishes policy specifications, event handlers, and communication interfaces. We evaluate an open reference implementation on 4,305 FDOs grounded in rare-disease ontologies, namely ClinVar, HPO, and Orphanet, combined with controlled synthetic observations. The consensus mechanism resolves 56.3% of 3,914 naturally occurring ClinVar conflicts where multiple submitters disagree and an expert panel has subsequently adjudicated. Under Sybil, collusion, and poisoning attacks, the mechanism degrades gracefully within its design Byzantine-tolerance bound (f < n/5), and fails as predicted beyond that bound.

AI.tldr: 提出自主FAIR数字对象（aFDO）概念并将其从抽象理念发展为可操作模型，通过基于语义网标准的策略层、公告层和协议层，赋予科学出版物超越出版机构的主动维护能力，在罕见疾病本体数据集上共识机制可解决56.3%的自然冲突，并在设计的拜占庭容错边界内优雅退化。
AI.motivation: 当前Web上的科学知识以被动断言形式发布，无法主动验证证据、调和矛盾或随证据积累更新置信度，而数据策展依赖中心化中间件和机构持续性，一旦注册中心关闭，即使数据仍在线上，主动维护也会停止。
AI.method: aFDO通过三个基于语义网标准的层次扩展FDO：1) 基于RDF-star并兼容PROV-O、SHACL和ODRL的策略层，提供可移植的条件-动作规则；2) 基于ActivityStreams 2.0的公告层，约束每次公告的评估成本；3) 基于声誉和置信度加权共识的协议层，在有界对抗模型下解决多源矛盾。研究提供了区分策略规范、事件处理器和通信接口的形式化定义，并在开放参考实现上基于罕见病本体（ClinVar、HPO、Orphanet）及受控合成观测数据进行了评估。
AI.result: 在4,305个FDO上的评估中，共识机制解决了3,914个ClinVar自然冲突中的56.3%（这些冲突涉及多个提交者意见分歧且专家小组已作出裁决）。在Sybil攻击、共谋攻击和投毒攻击下，该机制在设计拜占庭容错界限内（f < n/5）优雅退化，超出界限后按预期失效。
AI.conclusion: aFDO为从被动科学出版走向可问责、符合标准且能够超越出版机构存续期的自动化提供了可行路径，其共识机制在真实生物医学数据上展现了有效的冲突解决能力，并在有界对抗模型下保持了鲁棒的容错特性。

title: Learning to Perceive "Where": Spatial Pretext Tasks for Robust Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods primarily learn object-invariant representations but often neglect the spatial structure and relationships among object parts. To address this limitation, we introduce Spatial Prediction (SP), a spatially aware pretext regression task that predicts the relative position and scale between a pair of disentangled local views from the same image. By modeling part-to-part relationships in a continuous geometric space, SP encourages representations to capture fine-grained spatial dependencies beyond invariant categorical semantics, thereby learning the compositional structure of visual scenes. SP is implemented as a decoupled plug-in and can be seamlessly integrated into diverse SSL frameworks. Extensive experiments show consistent improvements across image recognition, fine-grained classification, semantic segmentation, and depth estimation, as well as substantial gains in out-of-distribution robustness for object recognition. To evaluate spatial reasoning, we introduce (1) a position and scale prediction task on image patch pairs and (2) a jigsaw understanding task requiring patch reordering and recognition after reconstruction. Strong performance on these tasks indicates improved spatial structure and geometric awareness. Overall, explicitly modeling spatial information provides an effective inductive bias for SSL, leading to more structured representations and better generalization. Code and models will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出空间预测（SP）自监督回归任务，通过预测同一图像中解耦局部视图间的相对位置与尺度，显式建模部分间空间关系，从而学习视觉场景的组合结构，在多项视觉任务及分布外鲁棒性上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法主要学习与对象类别无关的全局不变表征，忽视了目标各部分之间的空间结构与几何关系，导致模型缺乏对场景组合结构的细粒度理解能力。
AI.method: 本文提出空间预测（SP）任务，作为一种空间感知的预文本回归任务，通过预测同一图像中一对解耦局部视图之间的相对位置与缩放尺度，在连续几何空间中建模部分到部分的依赖关系；SP作为解耦插件可无缝集成到多种自监督学习框架中；此外，构建了两个评估空间推理能力的基准任务：位置与尺度预测任务及拼图理解任务。
AI.result: 在图像识别、细粒度分类、语义分割和深度估计任务上均取得一致性能提升，并在目标识别的分布外鲁棒性上获得显著增益；在提出的位置尺度预测与拼图理解任务上表现优异，验证了模型空间结构与几何感知能力的改善。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模空间信息为自监督学习提供了有效的归纳偏置，能够学习更具结构化的表征并提升泛化能力；空间关系的显式建模是超越不变性语义表征、学习组合视觉结构的关键方向。

title: SLASH the Sink: Sharpening Structural Attention Inside LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) show remarkable semantic understanding but often struggle with structural understanding when processing graph topologies in a serialized format. Existing solutions rely on training external graph-based adapters or fine-tuning, which incur high costs and lost generalizability. In this work, we investigate the internal mechanisms of LLMs and present a critical finding: LLMs spontaneously reconstruct the graph's topology internally, evidenced by a distinct "sawtooth" pattern in their attention maps that structurally aligns with the "token-level adjacency matrix". However, this intrinsic structural understanding is diluted by the attention sink. We theoretically formalize this dilution as a representation bottleneck, stemming from a fundamental conflict: the model's anisotropic bias, essential for language tasks, suppresses the topology-aware local aggregation required for graph reasoning. To address this, we propose a training-free solution, named StructuraL Attention SHarpening (Slash), which amplifies this internal structural understanding via a plug-and-play attention redistribution. Experiments on pure graph tasks and molecular prediction validate Slash delivers significant and consistent performance gains across diverse LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LLM在序列化处理图结构时会内部重构图的拓扑信息，表现为注意力图中的"锯齿"模式（即token级邻接矩阵），但该能力被注意力沉降稀释；为此提出训练无关的StructuraL Attention Sharpening (Slash)方法，通过注意力重分配放大内在结构理解，在纯图任务和分子预测中显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: LLM在处理序列化图拓扑时虽具备语义理解能力但结构理解不足，现有方法依赖外部图适配器或微调，存在高计算成本和泛化性损失的问题，亟需一种低成本且保持泛化性的方案来释放LLM内在的图结构推理潜力。
AI.method: 本文首先从理论层面形式化了注意力沉降对图结构理解造成的表征瓶颈，指出语言任务所需的各向异性偏置与图推理所需的拓扑感知局部聚合之间存在根本性冲突；在此基础上提出Slash（StructuraL Attention Sharpening），一种无需训练的即插即用注意力重分配方法，通过放大注意力图中已存在的"锯齿"模式（即token级邻接矩阵）来增强LLM对图拓扑的内部重构能力。
AI.result: 在纯图任务和分子预测任务上的实验验证表明，Slash能够在多种不同的LLM架构上实现一致且显著的性能提升，证明其有效释放了LLM内在但被稀释的结构理解能力，且无需任何额外训练或参数更新。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了LLM在处理序列化图时内部自发重建拓扑结构的关键机制，并理论化解释了该能力被注意力沉降削弱的根本原因；提出的Slash方法验证了通过轻量级注意力干预即可在不牺牲泛化性的前提下显著提升LLM的图推理能力，为LLM在图学习领域的应用提供了新的思路。

title: OZ-TAL: Online Zero-Shot Temporal Action Localization
summary: Online Temporal Action Localization (On-TAL) aims to detect the occurrence time and category of actions in untrimmed streaming videos immediately upon their completion. Recent advancements in this field focus on developing more sophisticated frameworks, shifting from Online Action Detection (OAD)-based aggregation paradigm to instance-level understanding. However, existing approaches are typically trained on specific domains and often exhibit limited generalization capabilities when applied to arbitrary videos, particularly in the presence of previously unseen actions. In this paper, we introduce a new task called Online Zero-shot Temporal Action Localization (OZ-TAL), which aims to detect previously unseen actions in an online fashion. Furthermore, we propose a training-free framework that leverages off-the-shelf Vision-Language Models (VLMs) while introducing additional mechanisms to enhance visual representations and mitigate their inherent biases. We establish new benchmarks and representative baselines for OZ-TAL on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet-1.3, and extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches under both offline and online zero-shot settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了在线零样本时序动作定位（OZ-TAL）新任务，并设计了一个无需训练的框架，利用现成的视觉-语言模型并引入额外机制来增强视觉表示和缓解模型固有偏差，在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-1.3基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有在线时序动作定位（On-TAL）方法通常针对特定领域训练，泛化能力有限，难以处理任意视频中前所未见的动作类别。为此，本文引入在线零样本时序动作定位（OZ-TAL）这一新任务，旨在实现在线方式下对未见动作的检测。
AI.method: 提出一个无需训练的框架，利用现成的视觉-语言模型（VLMs）作为核心组件，并引入额外机制以增强视觉表示质量并缓解VLM固有的偏差，从而在不进行领域特定训练的情况下实现零样本在线动作定位。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-1.3上建立了OZ-TAL的基准和代表性基线，大量实验表明，所提方法在离线零样本和在线零样本设置下均显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次定义并探索了在线零样本时序动作定位任务，证明了基于现成VLM的无需训练框架在跨域未见动作检测中的有效性，为在线视频理解中的零样本泛化提供了新的研究方向。

title: Agent-First Tool API: A Semantic Interface Paradigm for Enterprise AI Agent Systems
summary: As AI agents transition from research prototypes to enterprise production systems, the tool interfaces they consume remain rooted in human-oriented CRUD paradigms. This paper identifies five fundamental architectural mismatches between conventional APIs and autonomous agent requirements: exact-identifier dependence, rendering-oriented responses, single-shot interaction assumptions, user-equivalent authorization, and opaque error semantics. We propose the Agent-First Tool API paradigm, comprising three integrated mechanisms: (1) a Six-Verb Semantic Protocol that decomposes tool interactions into search, resolve, preview, execute, verify, and recover phases; (2) a Normalized Tool Contract (NTC) providing structured decision-support metadata including confidence scores, evidence chains, and suggested next actions; and (3) a dual-layer governance pipeline combining static capability policies with dynamic risk escalation. The paradigm is implemented and validated in a production multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 85 registered tools across 6 business domains. Comparative experiments on 50 real operational tasks demonstrate that Agent-First APIs achieve 88% end-to-end task success rate versus 64% for optimized CRUD baselines (+37.5%), while reducing required human interventions by 72.7% and improving autonomous error recovery by 5.8x. We establish that the paradigm is orthogonal and complementary to transport-layer standards such as MCP, operating as the semantic application layer above existing tool discovery and invocation protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向自主智能体的Agent-First Tool API范式，通过六动词语义协议、标准化工具契约和双层治理管道解决传统CRUD API与AI Agent之间的五大架构不匹配问题，在85个注册工具的工业平台上将任务成功率从64%提升至88%，并减少72.7%的人工干预。
AI.motivation: 现有AI Agent在生产系统中使用的工具接口仍然根植于面向人类的CRUD设计范式，导致与自主Agent需求之间存在五大根本性架构不匹配：精确标识符依赖、面向渲染的响应格式、单次交互假设、用户等价授权以及不透明错误语义。这些不匹配严重制约了Agent系统的任务完成率、自主性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 本文提出Agent-First Tool API范式，包含三个集成机制：(1) 六动词语义协议，将工具交互分解为搜索(search)、解析(resolve)、预览(preview)、执行(execute)、验证(verify)和恢复(recover)六个阶段；(2) 标准化工具契约(NTC)，提供包含置信度分数、证据链和建议后续动作的结构化决策支持元数据；(3) 双层治理管道，结合静态能力策略与动态风险升级机制。
AI.result: 在包含85个注册工具、覆盖6个业务领域的多租户SaaS平台上，基于50个真实运营任务的对比实验表明：Agent-First API的端到端任务成功率达88%，比优化后的CRUD基线(64%)提升37.5%；所需人工干预减少72.7%；自主错误恢复能力提升5.8倍。
AI.conclusion: Agent-First API范式作为MCP等传输层标准之上的语义应用层，与现有工具发现和调用协议正交互补，为构建大规模自主Agent系统提供了关键的接口层基础设施，显著提升了任务的自主完成能力和鲁棒性。

title: ERASE: Eliminating Redundant Visual Tokens via Adaptive Two-Stage Token Pruning
summary: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) enable large language models (LLMs) to process high-resolution images, significantly improving real-world multimodal understanding. However, this capability introduces a large number of vision tokens, resulting in substantial computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, various vision token pruning methods have been proposed. Nevertheless, existing approaches predominantly rely on learned semantic features within the model to capture visual redundancy. Moreover, they lack adaptive mechanisms to adjust pruning strategies according to the complexity of the input image. In this paper, we propose ERASE, a two-stage vision token pruning framework that identifies and retains salient tokens through pruning strategies adaptive to image complexity. Experiment results demonstrate that ERASE significantly reduces vision tokens while preserving accuracy. For Qwen2.5-VL-7B, at a token pruning ratio of 85\%, ERASE retains 89.46% of the original model accuracy, whereas the best prior method retains only 78.1%. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tuna-Luna/ERASE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ERASE，一种自适应图像复杂度的两阶段视觉Token剪枝框架，在高达85%的剪枝率下为Qwen2.5-VL-7B保留了89.46%的原始准确率，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在处理高分辨率图像时产生大量视觉Token，导致巨大计算开销；而目前的视觉Token剪枝方法仅依赖模型内部的语义特征来捕捉视觉冗余，且缺乏根据输入图像复杂度自适应调整剪枝策略的机制。
AI.method: ERASE是一种两阶段视觉Token剪枝框架，通过识别并保留显著性Token，并采用与图像复杂度自适应的剪枝策略来减少视觉Token数量，从而在降低计算开销的同时保持模型性能。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型上，当Token剪枝率达到85%时，ERASE保留了原始模型89.46%的准确率，而此前最优方法仅能保留78.1%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: ERASE证明了自适应图像复杂度的两阶段剪枝策略在显著减少视觉Token数量方面的高效性，为高分辨率视觉语言模型的实际部署提供了一条可行路径，代码已开源。

title: Deep Arguing
summary: Deep learning has become the dominant approach for creating high capacity, scalable models across diverse data modalities. However, because these models rely on a large number of learned parameters, tightly couple feature extraction with task objectives, and often lack explicit reasoning mechanisms, it is difficult for humans to understand how they arrive at their predictions. Understanding what representations emerge and why they arise from the training data remains an open challenge. We introduce Deep Arguing, a novel neurosymbolic approach that integrates deep learning with argumentation construction and reasoning for interpretable classification with different data modalities. In our approach deep neural networks construct an argumentation structure wherein data points support their assigned label and attack different ones. Using differentiable argumentation semantics for reasoning, the model is trained end-to-end to jointly learn feature representation and argumentative interactions. This results in argumentation structures providing faithful case-based explanations for predictions. Structure constraints over the argumentation graph guide learning, improving both interpretability and predictive performance. Experiments with tabular and imaging datasets show that Deep Arguing achieves performance competitive with standard baselines whilst offering interpretable argumentative reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Deep Arguing，一种融合深度学习与论证推理的神经符号方法，使神经网络在分类任务中通过构建可微的论证结构生成基于案例的可解释预测，在表格和图像数据集上取得与标准基线相当的性能并提供可解释的论证推理。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽然在多种数据模态上表现出强大的建模能力，但由于其依赖大量学习参数、紧密耦合特征提取与任务目标、以及缺乏显式推理机制，导致模型预测过程难以被人类理解，从训练数据中涌现出何种表征及其成因仍是一个开放挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出Deep Arguing神经符号方法，通过深度神经网络构建论证结构，使数据点支持其被分配标签并攻击其他标签；采用可微的论证语义进行推理，实现端到端训练，联合学习特征表示与论证交互；通过论证图上的结构约束引导学习过程，兼顾可解释性与预测性能。
AI.result: 在表格数据和图像数据集上的实验表明，Deep Arguing在分类性能上与标准基线方法具有竞争力，同时能够提供可解释的基于案例的论证推理，验证了该方法在保持预测精度的前提下实现模型可解释性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Deep Arguing通过将论证构造与深度学习端到端融合，成功弥合了高容量模型的黑箱特性与可解释性需求之间的差距，为跨数据模态的可解释分类提供了一种兼具性能和透明度的新范式，未来可进一步探索更复杂的论证结构和推理机制。

title: Med-StepBench: A Hierarchical Reasoning Framework for Evaluating Hallucinations in Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong performance in medical image understanding, but frequently generate clinically plausible yet incorrect statements, raising significant safety concerns. Existing medical hallucination benchmarks primarily focus on 2D imaging with one-shot diagnostic questions, offering limited insight into whether predictions are grounded in correct localization and abnormality identification, allowing critical reasoning errors to remain hidden behind seemingly correct diagnoses. We introduce Med-StepBench, the first large-scale benchmark for step-wise hallucination detection in 3D oncological PET/CT, comprising over 12,000 images and more than 1,000,000 image-statement pairs across volumetric and multi-view 2D data, which decomposes clinical reasoning into four expert-designed diagnostic stages. Using clinician-verified annotations, we perform the first step-level evaluation of general-purpose and medical VLMs, revealing systematic failure modes obscured by aggregate accuracy metrics. Furthermore, we show that current VLMs are highly susceptible to adversarial yet clinically plausible intermediate explanations, which significantly amplify hallucinations despite contradictory visual evidence. Together, our findings highlight fundamental limitations in grounding multi-step clinical reasoning and establish Med-StepBench as a rigorous benchmark for developing safer and more reliable medical VLMs.

AI.tldr: Med-StepBench是一个针对3D肿瘤PET/CT影像的大规模逐步幻觉检测基准，包含超过12,000张图像和1,000,000个图像-语句对，将临床推理分解为四个专家设计的诊断阶段，揭示现有VLM在多步骤临床推理中系统性失败模式，并发现对抗性中间解释会显著放大幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗幻觉基准主要聚焦于2D影像和一次性诊断问题，无法判断预测是否基于正确的定位和异常识别，使得关键推理错误隐藏在看似正确的诊断背后；此外，缺乏对3D肿瘤影像中多步骤临床推理过程的逐步幻觉检测能力，难以保障医学VLM的安全性。
AI.method: 构建Med-StepBench基准，包含超过12,000张3D PET/CT图像和1,000,000个图像-语句对，覆盖体积数据和多视图2D数据；将临床推理分解为四个专家设计的诊断阶段；采用临床医生验证的标注进行逐步评估；并设计对抗性中间解释测试当前VLM的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 对通用和医学VLM进行首次逐步评估，揭示了被聚合准确率指标掩盖的系统性失败模式；当前VLM高度易受对抗性但临床合理的中间解释影响，这些解释会显著放大幻觉，即使存在矛盾的视觉证据。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明现有VLM在多步骤临床推理的 grounding 方面存在根本性局限，Med-StepBench为开发更安全、更可靠的医学VLM提供了严格的基准，并强调了对抗性中间解释对模型可靠性的严重威胁。

title: The Open-Box Fallacy: Why AI Deployment Needs a Calibrated Verification Regime
summary: AI deployment in sensitive domains such as health care, credit, employment, and criminal justice is often treated as unsafe to authorize until model internals can be explained. This often leads to an excessive reliance on mechanistic interpretability to address a deployment challenge beyond its intended scope. We argue that the gate should instead be calibrated verification: authorization should be domain-scoped, independently checkable, monitored after release, accountable, contestable, and revocable. The reason is twofold. First, model capability is uneven across nearby tasks, so authorization must attach to a specific use rather than to a model in general. Second, societies have long governed opaque expertise through credentials, monitoring, liability, appeal, and revocation rather than mechanism-level explanation. Recent evidence reinforces this distinction between mechanistic understanding and deployment authority: a 53-percentage-point gap between internal representations and output correction shows that understanding may not translate into action, while one scoping review found that only 9.0% of FDA-approved AI/ML device documents contained a prospective post-market surveillance study. We propose Verification Coverage, a six-component reportable standard with a minimum-composition rule, as the metric that should sit beside capability scores in model cards, leaderboards, and regulatory disclosures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出以校准验证（calibrated verification）替代机械可解释性作为AI部署授权的核心标准，并引入Verification Coverage这一六维度可报告指标来规范模型在敏感领域的安全部署。
AI.motivation: 当前AI在医疗、信贷、刑事司法等敏感领域的部署往往要求模型内部机制可解释才能获批，这导致过度依赖机械可解释性来解决超出其适用范围的安全部署问题，且模型能力在相邻任务上不均衡，授权应针对特定用途而非通用模型。
AI.method: 提出校准验证框架：授权应领域限定、可独立检查、发布后持续监控、可问责、可质疑、可撤销；并定义Verification Coverage标准，包含六个可报告组件和一个最小构成规则，作为模型卡、排行榜和监管披露中与能力评分并列的指标。
AI.result: 研究发现内部表征理解与输出纠正之间存在53个百分点的差距，表明理解未必转化为行动；一项范围审查显示仅有9.0%的FDA批准的AI/ML设备文件包含前瞻性上市后监测研究。
AI.conclusion: 社会长期通过资质认证、监控、责任追究、申诉和撤销而非机制级解释来治理不透明专家系统，AI部署授权应借鉴这一经验，以校准验证而非机械可解释性为核心标准。

title: Hystar: Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval via Dynamic SVD Modulation
summary: Query-based image retrieval (QBIR) requires retrieving relevant images given diverse and often stylistically heterogeneous queries, such as sketches, artworks, or low-resolution previews. While large-scale vision--language representation models (VLRMs) like CLIP offer strong zero-shot retrieval performance, they struggle with distribution shifts caused by unseen query styles. In this paper, we propose the Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval (Hystar), a lightweight framework that dynamically adapts model weights to each query's style. Hystar employs a hypernetwork to generate singular-value perturbations ($ΔS$) for attention layers, enabling flexible per-input adaptation, while static singular-value offsets on MLP layers ensure cross-style stability. To better handle semantic confusions across styles, we design StyleNCE as part of Hystar, an optimal-transport-weighted contrastive loss that emphasizes hard cross-style negatives. Extensive experiments on multi-style retrieval and cross-style classification benchmarks demonstrate that Hystar consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance while being parameter-efficient and stable across styles.

AI.tldr: 提出Hystar，一种基于超网络的轻量级框架，通过动态生成注意力层的奇异值扰动和MLP层的静态奇异值偏移实现查询风格自适应，并结合最优传输加权的StyleNCE对比损失，在多风格检索和跨风格分类任务上达到了最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言表征模型（如CLIP）在基于查询的图像检索中虽具备强大的零样本性能，但面对草图、艺术作品、低分辨率预览等多样且风格异构的查询时，因分布偏移导致检索效果显著下降，亟需一种能够适应不同查询风格的轻量级自适应检索方法。
AI.method: 提出Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval (Hystar)框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 一个超网络，为注意力层动态生成奇异值扰动（ΔS），实现逐输入的自适应权重调整；(2) 在MLP层设置静态奇异值偏移以保持跨风格稳定性。同时设计StyleNCE损失函数，一种基于最优传输加权的对比损失，用于强化难负样本（硬跨风格负样本）的区分能力。
AI.result: 在多风格检索和跨风格分类基准测试上，Hystar相较于强基线方法（包括CLIP等）持续取得更优性能，达到最先进水平，同时保持参数高效性并在不同查询风格之间表现出稳定的检索能力。
AI.conclusion: Hystar通过动态风格自适应机制有效解决了查询风格分布偏移问题，验证了超网络在轻量级模型适应中的有效性，以及最优运输加权对比损失在跨风格语义区分中的优势，为鲁棒的跨模态和跨风格检索提供了新的技术路径。

title: PRISM: Generation-Time Detection and Mitigation of Secret Leakage in Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems introduce a security risk in which sensitive information accessed by one agent can propagate through shared context and reappear in downstream outputs, even without explicit adversarial intent. We formalise this phenomenon as propagation amplification, where leakage risk increases across agent boundaries as sensitive content is repeatedly exposed to downstream generators. Existing defences, including prompt-based safeguards, static pattern matching, and LLM-as-judge filtering, are not designed for this setting: they either operate after generation, rely primarily on surface-form patterns, or add substantial latency without modelling the generation process itself. To resolve these issues, we propose PRISM, a real-time defence that treats credential leakage as a sequential risk accumulation problem during generation. At each decoding step, PRISM combines 16 signals spanning lexical, structural, information-theoretic, behavioural, and contextual features into a calibrated risk score, enabling per-token intervention through green, yellow, and red risk zones. Our central observation is that credential reproduction is often preceded by a measurable shift in generation dynamics, characterised by entropy collapse and increasing logit concentration. When combined with text-structural cues such as identifier-pattern detection, these temporal signals provide an early warning of leakage before a secret is fully reconstructed. Across a 2,000-task adversarial benchmark covering 13 attack categories and three pressure levels in a heterogeneous four-agent pipeline, PRISM achieves F1 = 0.832 with precision = 1.000 and recall = 0.712, while producing no observed leakage on our benchmark (0.0% task-level leak rate) and preserving output utility of 0.893. It substantially outperforms the strongest baseline, Span Tagger, which achieves F1 = 0.719 with a 15.0% task-level leak rate.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一种针对多智能体LLM系统中凭证泄露风险的实时防御框架，通过结合16种信号在逐token解码阶段进行风险评分和分区域干预，在2,000任务基准上实现了F1=0.832、零泄露率和0.893的输出效用，显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统中存在一种名为propagation amplification的安全风险，即一个智能体访问的敏感信息会通过共享上下文传播到下游输出中。现有的基于提示的防护、静态模式匹配和LLM-as-judge过滤等防御方法均不适用于该场景，它们要么在生成后才操作，要么主要依赖表面形式模式，要么在未建模生成过程的情况下引入大量延迟。
AI.method: PRISM将凭证泄露视为一个序列风险累积问题，在每一步解码时结合涵盖词汇、结构、信息论、行为和上下文特征的16种信号，计算校准后的风险评分，并通过绿色、黄色和红色三个风险区域实现逐token干预。核心洞察是凭证复现之前通常伴随着生成动态的可测量变化，表现为熵塌缩和对数几率集中度的增加，结合文本结构线索（如标识符模式检测）可在秘密被完全重构前提供早期预警。
AI.result: 在包含13种攻击类别和三种压力水平的2,000任务对抗基准测试中，基于异构四智能体流水线，PRISM实现了F1=0.832、精确率=1.000、召回率=0.712，任务级泄露率为0.0%，输出效用为0.893。最强基线Span Tagger的F1=0.719，任务级泄露率为15.0%。
AI.conclusion: PRISM通过建模生成过程中的时序风险信号，在多智能体场景下实现了无泄露且高实用性的实时防御，表明关注生成动态变化（如熵塌缩）是实现早期泄露检测的关键，为多智能体系统的安全防护提供了新的技术路径。

title: MUSDA: Multi-source Multi-modality Unsupervised Domain Adaptive 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving
summary: With the advancement of autonomous driving, numerous annotated multi-modality datasets have become available. This presents an opportunity to develop domain-adaptive 3D object detectors for new environments without relying on labor-intensive manual annotations. However, traditional domain adaptation methods typically focus on a single source domain or a single modality, limiting their effectiveness in multi-source, multi-modality scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for multi-source, multi-modality unsupervised domain adaptation in 3D object detection for autonomous driving. Given multiple labeled source domains and one unlabeled target domain, our framework first introduces hierarchical spatially-conditioned (HSC) domain classifiers, which jointly align features from both camera and LiDAR modalities at two distinct levels for each source-target domain pair. To effectively leverage information from multiple source domains, we construct a prototype graph between each pair of domains. Based on this, we develop a prototype graph weighted (PGW) multi-source fusion strategy to aggregate predictions from multiple source detection heads. Experimental results on three widely used 3D object detection datasets - Waymo, nuScenes, and Lyft - demonstrate that our proposed framework effectively integrates information across both modalities and source domains, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多源、多模态无监督域适应框架，通过分层空间条件域分类器和原型图加权融合策略，在3D目标检测中有效整合多源多模态信息，在Waymo、nuScenes和Lyft数据集上持续超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶3D目标检测的域适应方法通常局限于单一源域或单一模态，无法有效利用多个标注源域和多种传感器模态（相机与LiDAR）的互补信息，限制了在无标签新环境中的检测性能。
AI.method: 提出一种多源、多模态无监督域适应框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 分层空间条件（HSC）域分类器，在每个源-目标域对中分别在两个不同层级上联合对齐相机和LiDAR特征；(2) 原型图加权（PGW）多源融合策略，通过构建域间原型图并基于图权重聚合多个源检测头的预测结果，从而有效整合来自多个源域的信息。
AI.result: 在Waymo、nuScenes和Lyft三个广泛使用的3D目标检测基准数据集上的实验结果表明，该框架能够有效跨模态和跨源域整合信息，在无监督域适应设置下持续优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了在多源、多模态场景下进行无监督域适应的可行性和有效性，为自动驾驶3D目标检测系统在无标注新环境中的部署提供了实用的解决方案；分层对齐与原型图融合策略是提升跨域泛化能力的关键设计。

title: Hierarchical Causal Abduction: A Foundation Framework for Explainable Model Predictive Control
summary: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used to operate safety-critical infrastructure by predicting future trajectories and optimizing control actions. However, nonlinear dynamics, hard safety constraints, and numerical optimization often render individual control moves opaque to human operators, undermining trust and hindering deployment. This paper presents Hierarchical Causal Abduction (HCA), which combines (i) physics-informed reasoning via domain knowledge graphs, (ii) optimization evidence from Karush--Kuhn--Tucker (KKT) multipliers, and (iii) temporal causal discovery via the PCMCI algorithm to generate faithful, human-interpretable explanations for control actions computed by nonlinear MPC. Across three diverse control applications (greenhouse climate, building HVAC, chemical process engineering) with expert validation, HCA improves explanation accuracy by 53\% over LIME (0.478 vs. 0.311) using a single set of cross-domain parameters without per-domain tuning; domain-specific KKT-threshold calibration over 2--3 days further increases accuracy to 0.88. Ablation studies confirm that each evidence source is essential, with 32--37\% accuracy degradation when any component is removed, and HCA's ranking-and-validation methodology generalizes beyond MPC to other prediction-based decision systems, including learning-based control and trajectory planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分层因果归因（HCA）框架，通过融合物理知识图谱、KKT乘子优化证据和PCMCI时序因果发现，为非线性模型预测控制（MPC）生成可解释的控制决策说明，在三个工业应用中相比LIME提升53%的解释准确性，且无需领域特化调参。
AI.motivation: 非线性MPC因涉及复杂动力学、硬安全约束和数值优化，其控制动作往往对操作人员不透明，导致信任缺失并阻碍实际部署，现有可解释性方法（如LIME）难以在保持忠实性的同时生成易于人类理解的解释。
AI.method: HCA框架由三条证据线组成：(i) 基于物理领域知识图谱的符号推理，(ii) 从KKT最优性条件中提取的拉格朗日乘子作为优化证据，(iii) 采用PCMCI算法从数据中挖掘时间因果结构，三者通过排序与验证流程融合生成忠实且可解释的控制动作说明。
AI.result: 在温室气候、建筑暖通空调和化工过程三个领域中，HCA跨领域默认参数下的解释准确率达0.478，较LIME（0.311）提升53%；经2-3天领域特定KKT阈值校准后准确率升至0.88；消融实验表明任一证据来源缺失导致32-37%的准确率下降。
AI.conclusion: HCA通过多源因果证据融合有效解决了非线性MPC的黑箱问题，其排序与验证方法论具有泛化性，可推广至其他基于预测的决策系统（如学习控制与轨迹规划），为安全关键系统中可解释AI提供了实用框架。

title: SocialDirector: Training-Free Social Interaction Control for Multi-Person Video Generation
summary: Video generation has advanced rapidly, producing photorealistic videos from text or image prompts. Meanwhile, film production and social robotics increasingly demand multi-person videos with rich social interactions, including conversations, gestures, and coordinated actions. However, existing models offer no explicit control over interactions, such as who performs which action, when it occurs, and toward whom it is directed. This often results in wrong person performing unintended actions (actor-action mismatch), disordered social dynamics, and wrong action targets. To address these challenges, we present SocialDirector, a training-free interaction controller that enhances the generation model by modulating cross-attention maps. SocialDirector contains two modules: Social Actor Masking and Directional Reweighting. Social Actor Masking constrains each person's visual tokens to attend only to their own textual descriptions via a spatiotemporal mask, avoiding actor-action mismatch and disordered social dynamics. Directional Reweighting amplifies attention to directional words (e.g., "leftward", "right"), leading each action towards its intended target. To evaluate generated social interactions, we annotate existing datasets with interaction descriptions and build a fully automated evaluation pipeline powered by open-source VLMs. Experiments on different video generation models show that SocialDirector significantly improves interaction fidelity and approaches the upper bound set by real videos.

AI.tldr: SocialDirector提出了一种无需训练的交互控制器，通过调制交叉注意力图来增强视频生成模型中的多人社交互动控制，解决角色-动作不匹配、社交动态混乱和动作目标错误等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽能生成逼真视频，但无法对多人社交互动中的具体元素（如谁执行什么动作、何时发生、动作针对谁）进行显式控制，导致角色-动作不匹配、社交动态混乱以及动作目标错误等问题，限制了在影视制作和社交机器人等领域的应用。
AI.method: SocialDirector包含两个核心模块：Social Actor Masking通过时空掩码限制每个角色的视觉token仅关注其自身的文本描述，避免角色-动作不匹配和社交动态混乱；Directional Reweighting增强对方向性词汇（如"向左""向右"）的注意力，引导每个动作朝向正确的目标。该方法无需训练，直接通过调制预训练模型的交叉注意力图实现控制。
AI.result: 在多种视频生成模型上的实验表明，SocialDirector显著提升了生成视频的社交互动保真度，接近于真实视频的上限。同时，作者通过标注现有数据集并构建基于开源VLM的自动化评估管线，对生成结果进行了系统评估。
AI.conclusion: SocialDirector证明了无需额外训练即可有效控制视频生成中多人社交互动细节的可行性，为影视制作和社交机器人等需要精准交互控制的场景提供了实用方案，未来可推广至更复杂的社交场景生成。

title: MATRA: Modeling the Attack Surface of Agentic AI Systems -- OpenClaw Case Study
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 5th International Workshop on Designing and Measuring Security in Systems with AI (DeMeSSAI 2026), co-located with the 11th IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy (EuroS&P 2026), Lisbon, Portugal, July 10, 2026
summary: LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents with access to tools, databases, and external services, yet practitioners (across different sectors) lack systematic methods to assess how known threat classes translate into concrete risks within a specific agentic deployment. We present MATRA, a pragmatic threat modeling framework for agentic AI systems that adapts established risk assessment methodology to systematically assess how known LLM threats translate into deployment-specific risks. MATRA begins with an asset-based impact assessment and utilizes attack trees to determine the likelihood of these impacts occurring within the system architecture. We demonstrate MATRA on a personal AI agent deployment using OpenClaw, quantifying how architectural controls such as network sandboxing and least-privilege access reduce risk by limiting the blast radius of successful injections.

AI.tldr: MATRA是一个针对智能体AI系统的实用威胁建模框架，它通过资产影响评估和攻击树分析，将已知LLM威胁转化为具体部署场景下的风险量化结果，并在个人AI智能体部署案例中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM被部署为具备工具、数据库和外部服务访问权限的自主智能体，不同领域的实践者缺乏系统性的方法来评估已知威胁类别如何在特定的智能体部署场景中转化为具体风险，现有风险评估方法未能有效桥接通用威胁与部署特定风险之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: MATRA框架首先进行基于资产的影响评估，然后利用攻击树（attack trees）确定这些影响在系统架构内发生的可能性，从而将成熟的风险评估方法论适配到智能体AI系统中，实现对已知LLM威胁向部署特定风险的系统性评估。
AI.result: 在基于OpenClaw的个人AI智能体部署案例中，MATRA量化证明了网络沙箱化和最小权限访问等架构控制措施能够通过限制成功注入的爆炸半径来有效降低风险水平。
AI.conclusion: MATRA为智能体AI系统提供了一种实用的威胁建模方法论，能够系统性地将已知LLM威胁与具体部署场景中的风险评估相结合，并通过架构控制的量化分析展示了其在指导安全部署实践中的价值。

title: TrajPrism: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Language-Grounded Urban Trajectory Understanding
summary: Urban mobility is naturally expressed both as trajectories in space and as natural-language descriptions of travel intent, constraints, and preferences. However, prior work rarely evaluates these two modalities together on the same real-world trajectories: trajectory modeling often stays geometry-centric, while language-centric mobility benchmarks frequently target route planning and tool use rather than fine-grained, verifiable alignment between text and the underlying route. We introduce TrajPrism, a multi-task benchmark for language-trajectory alignment that unifies (i) instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, (ii) language-driven semantic trajectory retrieval, and (iii) trajectory captioning, together with an evaluation protocol that measures trajectory fidelity, retrieval quality, and language groundedness. We construct TrajPrism by pairing real urban trajectories with judge-filtered language annotations generated under a four-dimensional travel-intent taxonomy. The benchmark contains 300K selected trajectories across Porto, San Francisco, and Beijing, yielding 2.1M task instances from three instruction variants, three retrieval queries, and one caption per trajectory. We further develop proof-of-concept models for each task: TrajAnchor for instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, TrajFuse for semantic trajectory retrieval, and TrajRap for trajectory captioning. These models instantiate the proposed tasks and show that geometry-only trajectory baselines leave a large gap on our protocol, especially where language is part of the input-output interface. We release TrajPrism with code and a reproducible annotation pipeline that is designed to be portable across cities, given compatible trajectory inputs and map resources.

AI.tldr: TrajPrism是一个面向语言-轨迹对齐的多任务基准，包含30万条轨迹和210万任务实例，涵盖指令条件轨迹生成、语义轨迹检索和轨迹描述三个任务，并配套了可复现的标注流程和基线模型，实验表明纯几何轨迹方法在涉及语言的任务中表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹建模多集中于几何视角，而语言驱动的移动性基准则聚焦于路径规划和工具使用，缺乏对文本与真实轨迹之间细粒度、可验证的对齐能力的评估；两类模态在真实轨迹数据上从未被统一评测过。
AI.method: 构建TrajPrism基准，通过四维出行意图分类系统对城市真实轨迹进行标注并由裁判模型过滤，覆盖波尔图、旧金山和北京三个城市共30万条轨迹；设计三个任务（指令条件轨迹生成、语义轨迹检索、轨迹描述）及其评估协议，并分别提出基线模型TrajAnchor、TrajFuse和TrajRap；提供可跨城市复现的标注流水线。
AI.result: 基准包含30万条轨迹和210万个任务实例（每轨迹3种指令变体、3种检索查询和1个描述）；实验表明，纯几何轨迹基线在涉及语言输入或输出的任务上存在显著性能差距，证明语言-轨迹对齐具有独立的研究价值。
AI.conclusion: TrajPrism填补了轨迹几何建模与语言理解之间的评测空白，验证了语言-轨迹对齐任务的重要性，并为后续研究提供了可复现的基准和基线模型。

title: DynGhost: Temporally-Modelled Transformer for Dynamic Ghost Imaging with Quantum Detectors
summary: Ghost imaging reconstructs spatial information from a single-pixel bucket detector by correlating structured illumination patterns with scalar intensity measurements. While deep learning approaches have achieved promising results on static scenes, two critical limitations remain unaddressed: existing architectures fail to exploit temporal coherence across frames, leaving dynamic ghost imaging largely unsolved, and they assume additive Gaussian noise models that do not reflect the true Poissonian statistics of real single-photon hardware. We present DynGhost (Dynamic Ghost Imaging Transformer), a transformer architecture that addresses both limitations through alternating spatial and temporal attention blocks. Our quantum-aware training framework, based on physically accurate detector simulations (SNSPDs, SPADs, SiPMs) and Anscombe variance-stabilizing normalization, resolves the distribution shift that causes classical models to fail under realistic hardware constraints. Experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that DynGhost outperforms both traditional reconstruction methods and existing deep learning architectures, with particular gains in dynamic and photon-starved settings.

AI.tldr: DynGhost是一种基于Transformer的架构，通过交替使用空间和时序注意力模块，结合基于真实物理探测器模拟的量子感知训练框架和Anscombe方差稳定归一化，解决了现有深度学习在动态鬼成像中无法利用时序信息以及假设高斯噪声而忽略实际单光子探测泊松统计特性的两大局限，在动态和光子匮乏场景下显著优于传统方法和现有深度学习架构。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在静态鬼成像中取得了较好效果，但仍存在两个关键局限：一是现有架构无法利用帧间时序一致性，导致动态鬼成像问题基本未得到解决；二是它们假设加性高斯噪声模型，无法反映真实单光子硬件（如SNSPD、SPAD、SiPM）中实际的泊松统计特性，导致在真实硬件约束下经典模型失效。
AI.method: 提出DynGhost（Dynamic Ghost Imaging Transformer），一种采用交替空间注意力块与时序注意力块的Transformer架构，以同时捕获帧内空间结构和帧间时序依赖关系。同时设计了一种量子感知训练框架，基于物理精确的探测器模拟（SNSPD、SPAD、SiPM）和Anscombe方差稳定归一化，解决分布偏移问题，使模型能够适应真实硬件下的泊松噪声统计特性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的实验表明，DynGhost在重建质量上优于传统重建方法和现有深度学习架构，特别是在动态场景和光子匮乏（photon-starved）条件下取得了尤为显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了结合时序建模和物理精确的噪声建模对于提升动态鬼成像性能的关键作用，为将深度学习方法部署到真实单光子硬件系统提供了可行的训练框架，并指明了在极低光动态成像场景中的实用前景。

title: ComplexMCP: Evaluation of LLM Agents in Dynamic, Interdependent, and Large-Scale Tool Sandbox
summary:
Current LLM agents are proficient at calling isolated APIs but struggle with the "last mile" of commercial software automation. In real-world scenarios, tools are not independent; they are atomic, interdependent, and prone to environmental noise. We introduce $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$, a benchmark designed to evaluate agents in these rigorous conditions. Built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP), $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$ provides over 300 meticulously tested tools derived from 7 stateful sandboxes, ranging from office suites to financial systems. Unlike existing datasets, our benchmark utilizes a seed-driven architecture to simulate dynamic environment states and unpredictable API failures, ensuring a deterministic yet diverse evaluation.
  We evaluate various LLMs across full-context and RAG paradigms, revealing a stark performance gap: even top-tier models fail to exceed a 60% success rate, far trailing human performance 90%. Granular trajectory analysis identifies three fundamental bottlenecks: (1) $\textbf{tool retrieval saturation}$ as action spaces scale; (2) $\textbf{over-confidence}$, where agents skip essential environment verifications; and (3) $\textbf{strategic defeatism}$, a tendency to rationalize failure rather than pursuing recovery. These findings underscore the insufficiency of current agents for interdependent workflows, positioning $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$ as a critical testbed for the next generation of resilient autonomous systems.

AI.tldr: ComplexMCP是一个基于模型上下文协议(MCP)构建的基准测试，包含300多个经过严格测试的工具和7个有状态沙箱，用于评估LLM智能体在原子化、相互依赖且存在环境噪声的真实商业软件自动化场景中的表现，揭示了顶级模型成功率不超过60%而人类达90%的显著性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在调用独立API方面表现良好，但无法应对商业软件自动化的"最后一公里"挑战——现实场景中的工具是原子化、相互依赖且易受环境噪声干扰的，而现有基准缺乏对这些复杂条件的系统性评估。
AI.method: ComplexMCP基于Model Context Protocol (MCP)构建，提供7个有状态沙箱(涵盖办公套件到金融系统)中精心测试的300多个工具，采用种子驱动架构模拟动态环境状态和不可预测的API故障，确保评估的确定性与多样性，并支持全上下文和RAG两种评估范式。
AI.result: 即使顶级模型在ComplexMCP上的成功率也不超过60%，而人类表现达90%。细粒度轨迹分析识别出三个根本瓶颈：工具检索饱和(动作空间扩展时)、过度自信(智能体跳过必要的环境验证)以及策略性失败主义(倾向于合理化失败而非尝试恢复)。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM智能体在处理相互依赖的工作流方面存在严重不足，ComplexMCP为下一代具有韧性的自主系统提供了关键的测试平台，其揭示的三个瓶颈为未来研究方向提供了明确指引。

title: AdaptSplat: Adapting Vision Foundation Models for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: This work explores a simple yet powerful lightweight adapter design for feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Existing methods typically apply complex, architecture-specific designs on top of the generic pipeline of image feature extraction $\rightarrow$ multi-view interaction $\rightarrow$ feature decoding. However, constrained by the scale bottleneck of 3D training data and the low-pass filtering effect of deep networks, these methods still fall short in cross-domain generalization and high-frequency geometric fidelity. To address these problems, we propose AdaptSplat, which demonstrates that without complex component engineering, introducing a single adapter of only 1.5M parameters into the generic architecture is sufficient to achieve superior performance. Specifically, we design a lightweight Frequency-Preserving Adapter (FPA) that extracts direction-aware high-frequency structural priors from the shallow features of a powerful vision foundation model backbone, and seamlessly integrates them into the generic pipeline via high-frequency positional encodings and adaptive residual modulation. This effectively compensates for the high-frequency attenuation caused by over-smoothing in deep features, improving the fitting accuracy of Gaussian primitives on complex surfaces and sharp boundaries. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AdaptSplat achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward reconstruction performance on multiple standard benchmarks, with stable generalization across domains. Code available at: https://github.com/xmw666/AdaptSplat.

AI.tldr: 提出AdaptSplat，通过在通用前馈3DGS框架中仅插入一个1.5M参数的轻量级频率保持适配器（FPA），在不借助复杂组件工程的情况下实现跨域泛化与高频几何保真度的显著提升，达到多项基准上的最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈3DGS方法在通用流水线（图像特征提取→多视图交互→特征解码）上叠加复杂且架构专用的设计，但由于3D训练数据的规模瓶颈和深度网络的低通滤波效应，仍然面临跨域泛化能力不足和高频几何保真度差的局限。
AI.method: 提出AdaptSplat，其核心是轻量级Frequency-Preserving Adapter (FPA)，仅1.5M参数量。FPA从强大视觉基础模型的浅层特征中提取方向感知的高频结构先验，通过高频位置编码和自适应残差调制将其无缝集成到通用流水线中，从而补偿深度特征过平滑导致的高频衰减，提升高斯原语在复杂表面和尖锐边界上的拟合精度。
AI.result: 在多个标准基准上，AdaptSplat取得了前馈式三维重建的最先进性能，并展现出稳定的跨域泛化能力，验证了单适配器方案在超越复杂组件工程设计上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，对于前馈3DGS任务，无需复杂的组件工程，仅通过一个轻量级适配器引入高频先验即可显著提升性能，为构建简洁高效的通用重建框架提供了新思路。

title: BGG: Bridging the Geometric Gap between Cross-View images by Vision Foundation Model Adaptation for Geo-Localization
summary: Geometric differences between cross-view images, such as drone and satellite views, significantly increase the challenge of Cross-View Geo-Localization (CVGL), which aims to acquire the geolocation of images by image retrieval. To further enhance the CVGL performance, this paper proposes a parameter-efficient adaptation framework for bridging the geometric gap across images based on the vision foundation model (VFM) (e.g., DINOv3), termed BGG. BGG not only effectively leverages the general visual representations of VFM and captures the robust and consistent features from cross-view images, but also utilizes the generalization capabilities of the VFM, significantly improving the CVGL performance. It mainly contains a Multi-granularity Feature Enhancement Adapter (MFEA) and a Frequency-Aware Structural Aggregation (FASA) module. Specifically, MFEA enhances the scale adaptability and viewpoint robustness of features by multi-level dilated convolutions, effectively bridging the cross-view geometric gap with small training costs. Additionally, considering the [CLS] token lacks spatial details for precise image retrieval and localization, the FASA module modulates patch tokens in the frequency domain and performs adaptive aggregation for local structural feature enhancement. Finally, BGG fuses the enhanced local features with the [CLS] token for more accurate CVGL. Extensive experiments on University-1652 and SUES-200 datasets demonstrate that BGG has significant advantages over other methods and achieves state-of-the-art localization performance with low training costs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BGG框架，基于视觉基础模型DINOv3，通过多粒度特征增强适配器和频域感知结构聚合模块，以参数高效方式桥接跨视图几何差异，在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上实现了最先进的跨视图地理定位性能且训练成本低。
AI.motivation: 无人机与卫星视角图像之间的几何差异显著增加了跨视图地理定位的难度，现有方法难以高效且低成本地桥接这一几何鸿沟，亟需一种既能利用视觉基础模型的通用表征能力又能保持小训练开销的适应性框架。
AI.method: 提出BGG参数高效微调框架，基于视觉基础模型DINOv3；包含多粒度特征增强适配器（MFEA）和频域感知结构聚合（FASA）模块；MFEA通过多级空洞卷积增强特征的尺度适应性和视角鲁棒性以桥接几何差异；FASA在频域调制patch token并自适应聚合以增强局部结构特征，最终将增强后的局部特征与[CLS] token融合用于地理定位。
AI.result: 在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上的大量实验表明，BGG在定位性能上显著优于现有方法，达到了最先进水平，且训练成本较低。
AI.conclusion: 基于视觉基础模型的参数高效微调策略能够有效桥接跨视图图像的几何差异，MFEA与FASA的协同设计增强了多尺度特征鲁棒性和局部结构表征能力，证明了在不显著增加训练开销的前提下利用基础模型通用视觉知识提升CVGL性能的可行性。

title: NanoResearch: Co-Evolving Skills, Memory, and Policy for Personalized Research Automation
summary: LLM-powered multi-agent systems can now automate the full research pipeline from ideation to paper writing, but a fundamental question remains: automation for whom? Researchers operate under different resource configurations, hold different methodological preferences, and target different output formats. A system that produces uniform outputs regardless of these differences will systematically under-serve every individual user, making personalization a precondition for research automation to be genuinely usable. However, achieving it requires three capabilities that current systems lack: accumulating reusable procedural knowledge across projects, retaining user-specific experience across sessions, and internalizing implicit preferences that resist explicit formalization. We propose NanoResearch, a multi-agent framework that addresses these gaps through tri-level co-evolution. A skill bank distills recurring operations into compact procedural rules reusable across projects. A memory module maintains user- and project-specific experience that grounds planning decisions in each user's research history. A label-free policy learning converts free-form feedback into persistent parameter updates of the planner, reshaping subsequent coordination. These three layers co-evolve: reliable skills produce richer memory, richer memory informs better planning, and preference internalization continuously realigns the loop to each user. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NanoResearch delivers substantial gains over state-of-the-art AI research systems, and progressively refines itself to produce better research at lower cost over successive cycles.

AI.tldr: NanoResearch 提出了一种三层次协同演化框架，通过技能库、记忆模块和无标签策略学习实现多智能体科研系统的个性化，实验表明其在科研自动化中显著优于现有系统并能持续自我优化。
AI.motivation: 现有的大模型驱动多智能体系统能够自动化从构思到论文撰写的完整科研流程，但缺乏个性化能力，无法适应不同研究者的资源配置、方法论偏好和输出格式需求；用户特定的经验、隐式偏好以及跨项目可复用的程序性知识均未被有效积累和利用，导致系统对所有用户都系统性欠优。
AI.method: NanoResearch 是一个多智能体框架，通过三层次协同演化实现个性化：技能库将重复操作蒸馏为跨项目复用的紧凑程序性规则；记忆模块维护用户和项目特定的经验以指导规划决策；无标签策略学习将自由形式反馈转化为规划器的持久参数更新，从而内化用户的隐式偏好；三个层次相互促进，可靠技能产生更丰富记忆，更丰富记忆指导更优规划，偏好内化持续校准闭环。
AI.result: 广泛实验表明，NanoResearch 在科研自动化任务上显著优于现有最先进的 AI 科研系统，并且能够在连续迭代中逐渐自我优化，以更低的成本生成更好的研究成果。
AI.conclusion: 个性化是科研自动化真正可用的前提条件，NanoResearch 通过协同演化的三层架构有效填补了现有系统在知识积累、经验保留和偏好内化方面的关键空白，为构建面向个体研究者的自适应科研助理提供了可行范式。

title: SleepWalk: A Three-Tier Benchmark for Stress-Testing Instruction-Guided Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced rapidly in multimodal perception and language understanding, yet it remains unclear whether they can reliably ground language into spatially coherent, plausibly executable actions in 3D digital environments. We introduce SleepWalk, a benchmark for evaluating instruction-grounded trajectory prediction in single-scene 3D worlds generated from textual scene descriptions and filtered for navigability. Unlike prior navigation benchmarks centered on long-range exploration across rooms, SleepWalk targets localized, interaction-centric embodied reasoning: given rendered visual observations and a natural-language instruction, a model must predict a trajectory that respects scene geometry, avoids collisions, and terminates at an action-compatible location. The benchmark covers diverse indoor and outdoor environments and organizes tasks into three tiers of spatial and temporal difficulty, enabling fine-grained analysis of grounding under increasing compositional complexity. Using a standardized pointwise judge-based evaluation protocol, we evaluate three frontier VLMs on 2,472 curated 3D environments with nine instructions per scene. Results reveal systematic failures in grounded spatial reasoning, especially under occlusion, interaction constraints, and multi-step instructions: performance drops as the difficulty level of the tasks increase. In general, current VLMs can somewhat produce trajectories that are simultaneously spatially coherent, plausibly executable, and aligned with intended actions. By exposing failures in a controlled yet scalable setting, SleepWalk provides a critical benchmark for advancing grounded multimodal reasoning, embodied planning, vision-language navigation, and action-capable agents in 3D environments.

AI.tldr: SleepWalk 是一个用于评估视觉-语言模型在3D场景中基于指令生成空间连贯且可执行轨迹的基准，实验发现当前主流VLM在遮挡、交互约束和多步指令等复杂条件下存在系统性空间推理失败。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言模型在多模态感知与语言理解方面取得了显著进展，但其能否在3D数字环境中可靠地将语言指令转化为空间连贯、可执行的行动轨迹仍不明确，现有导航基准多聚焦于跨房间的长程探索，缺乏对局部、交互中心化的具身推理能力的细粒度评估。
AI.method: SleepWalk 从文本场景描述生成单场景3D世界并过滤可导航性，基于渲染视觉观察和自然语言指令，要求模型预测一条尊重场景几何、避免碰撞且终止于动作兼容位置的轨迹；基准覆盖多种室内外环境，按空间和时间复杂度划分为三个难度层级，并采用标准化逐点评判评估协议对三个前沿VLM在2472个3D环境中进行测试。
AI.result: 前沿VLM在2472个精心策划的3D环境中针对每个场景9条指令的测试中，表现出系统性的空间推理失败，尤其是在遮挡、交互约束和多步指令条件下，性能随任务难度增加而下降；模型尚能在一定程度上生成同时满足空间连贯性、可执行性和动作对齐的轨迹，但整体可靠性不足。
AI.conclusion: SleepWalk 通过在受控且可扩展的环境中暴露VLM在3D空间推理中的失败模式，为推进多模态推理、具身规划、视觉-语言导航以及3D环境中行动智能体的发展提供了关键基准与评估工具。

title: MaD Physics: Evaluating information seeking under constraints in physical environments
summary: Scientific discovery is fundamentally a resource-constrained process that requires navigating complex trade-offs between the quality and quantity of measurements due to physical and cost constraints. Measurements drive the scientific process by revealing novel phenomena to improve our understanding. Existing benchmarks for evaluating agents for scientific discovery focus on either static knowledge-based reasoning or unconstrained experimental design tasks, and do not capture the ability to make measurements and plan under constraints. To bridge this gap, we propose Measuring and Discovering Physics (MaD Physics), a benchmark to evaluate the ability of agents to make informative measurements and conclusions subject to constraints on the quality and quantity of measurements. The benchmark consists of three environments, each based on a distinct physical law. To mitigate contamination from existing knowledge, MaD Physics includes altered physical laws. In each trial, the agent makes measurements of the system until it exhausts an allotted budget and then the agent has to infer the underlying physical law to make predictions about the state of the system in the future. MaD Physics evaluates two fundamental capabilities of scientific agents: inferring models from data and planning under constraints. We also demonstrate how MaD Physics can be used to evaluate other capabilities such as multimodality and in-context learning. We benchmark agents on MaD Physics using four Gemini models (2.5 Flash Lite, 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Pro, and 3 Flash), identifying shortcomings in their structured exploration and data collection capabilities and highlighting directions to improve their scientific reasoning.

AI.tldr: MaD Physics 是一个评估智能体在资源约束下进行科学发现能力的基准，包含基于物理定律（含修改定律）的三个环境，要求智能体在有限预算内进行测量、推断物理定律并预测系统状态。
AI.motivation: 现有的科学发现智能体评估基准要么专注于静态知识推理，要么针对无约束的实验设计任务，未能捕捉智能体在物理和成本约束下进行测量和规划的能力，存在评估维度缺失的问题。
AI.method: 提出 Measuring and Discovering Physics (MaD Physics) 基准，包含三个基于不同物理定律的环境，并通过引入修改后的物理定律来避免知识污染。每个试验中，智能体在分配预算内进行系统测量，预算耗尽后需推断潜在物理定律并预测未来系统状态，从而评估从数据中推断模型和在约束下规划两种核心能力。
AI.result: 使用四种 Gemini 模型（2.5 Flash Lite、2.5 Flash、2.5 Pro 和 3 Flash）对 MaD Physics 进行基准测试，发现这些模型在结构化探索和数据收集能力方面存在不足。
AI.conclusion: MaD Physics 可有效评估科学智能体的多模态学习和上下文学习等其他能力，识别出现有模型在科学推理中的结构化探索缺陷，为改进智能体的科学推理能力指明了方向。

title: AnomalyClaw: A Universal Visual Anomaly Detection Agent via Tool-Grounded Refutation
comment: We release the agent, the benchmark, and the analysis artifacts at https://github.com/jam-cc/AnomalyClaw
summary: Visual anomaly detection (VAD) is crucial in many real-world fields, such as industrial inspection, medical imaging, infrastructure monitoring, and remote sensing. However, the specific anomaly definitions, data modalities, and annotation standards across different domains make it difficult to transfer single-domain trained VAD models. Vision-language models (VLMs), pre-trained on large-scale cross-domain data, can perform visual perception under task instructions, offering a promising solution for cross-domain VAD. However, single-inference VLM judgments are unreliable, since they rely more on prior knowledge than on normal-sample references or fine-grained feature evidence. We therefore present AnomalyClaw, a training-free VAD agent that turns anomaly judgment into a multi-round refutation process. In each round, the agent proposes candidate anomalies and refutes each against normal-sample references, drawing on a 13-tool library for visual verification, reference parsing, and frozen expert probing. On the CrossDomainVAD-12 benchmark (12 datasets), AnomalyClaw achieves consistent macro-AUROC improvements over single-step direct inference with +6.23 pp on GPT-5.5, +7.93 pp on Seed2.0-lite, and +3.52 pp on Qwen3.5-VL-27B. We further introduce an optional verbalized self-evolution extension. It builds an online rulebook from internal-branch disagreement without oracle labels. On Qwen3.5-VL-27B, it delivers a +2.09 pp mean gain, comparable to a K = 10 oracle-label supervised baseline (+1.99 pp). These results show that agentic refutation improve anomaly understanding and reasoning of VLMs, rather than merely aggregating tool outputs.

AI.tldr: 提出AnomalyClaw，一种免训练的视觉异常检测智能体，通过多轮反驳推理机制将单步VLM判断转化为基于工具库和正常样本参考的迭代验证过程，在跨域基准上显著提升VLMs的异常检测性能，并引入无需标签的在线规则自演化扩展。
AI.motivation: 视觉异常检测在各领域至关重要，但跨域迁移面临异常定义、数据模态和标注标准差异导致的模型泛化困难；预训练视觉语言模型虽具跨域潜力，但单次推理的判断过于依赖先验知识而缺乏对正常样本参考和细粒度特征证据的依赖，导致结果不可靠。
AI.method: 提出AnomalyClaw，一种训练无关的VAD智能体，将异常判定转化为多轮反驳过程：每轮由智能体提出候选异常并基于正常样本参考进行反驳验证，借助包含视觉验证、参考解析和冻结专家探针的13个工具库进行多维度推理；同时引入可选的言语化自演化扩展，通过内部分支分歧构建在线规则库，无需真实标签即可持续优化。
AI.result: 在CrossDomainVAD-12基准（12个数据集）上，AnomalyClaw相比单步直接推理一致提升宏AUROC：GPT-5.5提升+6.23个百分点，Seed2.0-lite提升+7.93个百分点，Qwen3.5-VL-27B提升+3.52个百分点；自演化扩展在Qwen3.5-VL-27B上带来+2.09个百分点的平均增益，接近K=10的有监督基线（+1.99个百分点）。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明智能体式反驳推理能够实质性地增强VLM对异常的理解与推理能力，而非简单聚合工具输出，为跨域视觉异常检测提供了一种高效、无需训练的通用范式。

title: From Controlled to the Wild: Evaluation of Pentesting Agents for the Real-World
summary: AI pentesting agents are increasingly credible as offensive security systems, but current benchmarks still provide limited guidance on which will perform best in real-world targets. Existing evaluation protocols assess and optimize for predefined goals such as capture-the-flag, remote code execution, exploit reproduction, or trajectory similarity, in simplified or narrow settings. These tools are valuable for measuring bounded capabilities, yet they do not adequately capture the complexity, open-ended exploration, and strategic decision-making required in realistic pentesting. In this paper, we present a practical evaluation protocol that shifts assessment from task completion to validated vulnerability discovery, allowing evaluation in sufficiently complex targets spanning multiple attack surfaces and vulnerability classes. The protocol combines structured ground-truth with LLM-based semantic matching to identify vulnerabilities, bipartite resolution to score findings under realistic ambiguity, continuous ground-truth maintenance, repeated and cumulative evaluation of stochastic agents, efficiency metrics, and reduced-suite selection for sustainable experimentation. This protocol extends the state of the art by enabling a more realistic, operationally informative comparison of AI pentesting agents. To enable reproducibility, we also release expert-annotated ground truth and code for the proposed evaluation protocol: https://github.com/jd0965199-oss/ethibench.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向AI渗透测试智能体的实用评估协议，将评估重点从任务完成转向已验证的漏洞发现，结合结构化真实数据与基于LLM的语义匹配、二部图分辨率、持续真实数据维护、重复与累积评估及效率指标，在更复杂、多攻击面的目标上实现更具操作信息量的比较，并开源了标注真实数据与代码。
AI.motivation: 现有AI渗透测试基准主要在简化的狭窄场景中评估智能体在CTF、远程代码执行、漏洞复现或轨迹相似度等预定义目标上的表现，无法充分捕捉真实渗透测试所需的复杂性、开放式探索与战略决策能力，导致难以判断哪些智能体在实际目标中最优。
AI.method: 提出了一种将评估从任务完成转向已验证漏洞发现的协议，核心组件包括：结合结构化真实数据与基于LLM的语义匹配来识别漏洞；采用二部图分辨率对智能体发现结果进行评分以处理真实场景中的歧义；持续维护并更新真实数据；对随机性智能体进行重复和累积评估；引入效率指标；以及通过缩减测试套件选择实现可持续的实验成本。
AI.result: 该协议能够在涵盖多种攻击面与漏洞类别的复杂目标上对AI渗透测试智能体进行更接近实战的评估，通过结构化真实数据与LLM语义匹配实现漏洞发现的自动化验证，并使用二部图分辨率对发现结果进行合理评分，同时公开了专家标注的真实数据与评估代码以供复现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过提出一种更贴近真实渗透测试的评估协议，弥补了现有基准在复杂性与开放性方面的不足，为AI渗透测试智能体的实用化比较提供了操作信息更丰富的评估框架，同时通过开源代码和数据促进了该领域的可复现研究。

title: Position: Life-Logging Video Streams Make the Privacy-Utility Trade-off Inevitable
summary: With the growing prevalence of always-on hardware such as smart glasses, body cameras, and home security systems, life-logging visual sensing is becoming inevitable, forming the backbone of persistent, always-on AI systems. Meanwhile, recent advances in proactive agents and world models signal a fundamental shift from episodic, prompt-driven tools to next-generation AI systems that continuously perceive and react to the physical world. Although life-logging video streams can substantially improve utility of these promising systems, they also introduce significant privacy risks by revealing sensitive information, such as behavioral patterns, emotional states, and social interactions, beyond what isolated images expose. If unresolved, these risks may undermine public trust and hinder the sustainable development of always-on AI technologies. Existing privacy protections are either attack-specific or incur substantial utility loss, and fail to consider the entire data exploitation pipeline. We therefore posit that the privacy-utility trade-off in life-logging video streams is a foundational challenge for next-generation AI systems that demands further investigation. We call for novel pipeline-aware privacy-preserving designs that jointly optimize utility and privacy for long-horizon life-logging visual data. In parallel, formal privacy leakage metrics and standardized benchmarks remain important open directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，随着始终在线AI系统（如智能眼镜、身体摄像头）的普及，生活记录视频流在提升系统效用的同时引入了远超孤立图像的隐私风险；现有隐私保护方法存在攻击特异性或效用损失严重的问题，呼吁面向长时序视觉数据的管道感知型隐私保护设计，并提出正式隐私泄漏度量和标准化基准是未来的重要方向。
AI.motivation: 随着始终在线硬件设备（如智能眼镜、身体摄像头、家庭安防系统）的普及，生活记录视觉感知已成为持续型AI系统的基础，但现有隐私保护方法要么针对特定攻击场景、要么以严重效用损失为代价，未能从整个数据利用管道的角度进行设计，导致隐私与效用的权衡成为下一代AI系统面临的基础性挑战，亟待进一步研究。
AI.method: 本文并未提出具体算法或模型，而是从问题定义层面出发，提出需要设计管道感知型（pipeline-aware）隐私保护方案，在长时序生活记录视觉数据上联合优化效用与隐私；同时指出形式化的隐私泄漏度量指标和标准化基准是未来研究的重要开放方向。
AI.result: 本文是一篇观点与呼吁性质的文章，未提供具体的实验数据、基准评测或定量结果；其主要贡献在于系统性地指出现有隐私保护方法的不足——即攻击特异性或效用损失过大——并明确了生活记录视频流中隐私-效用权衡这一核心问题的紧迫性。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心启示是：生活记录视频流带来的隐私风险远超孤立图像，需要从数据利用的全局管道视角重新设计隐私保护机制；形式化的隐私泄漏度量和标准化基准的建立是推动该领域发展的关键下一步，否则隐私风险将损害公众信任并阻碍始终在线AI技术的可持续发展。

title: Remember the Decision, Not the Description: A Rate-Distortion Framework for Agent Memory
summary: Long-horizon language agents must operate under limited runtime memory, yet existing memory mechanisms often organize experience around descriptive criteria such as relevance, salience, or summary quality. For an agent, however, memory is valuable not because it faithfully describes the past, but because it preserves the distinctions between histories that must remain separated under a fixed budget to support good decisions. We cast this as a decision-centric rate-distortion problem, measuring memory quality by the loss in achievable decision quality induced by compression. This yields an exact forgetting boundary for what can be safely forgotten, and a memory-distortion frontier characterizing the optimal tradeoff between memory budget and decision quality. Motivated by this decision-centric view of memory, we propose DeMem, an online memory learner that refines its partition only when data certify that a shared state would induce decision conflict, and prove near-minimax regret guarantees. On both controlled synthetic diagnostics and long-horizon conversational benchmarks, DeMem yields consistent gains under the same runtime budget, supporting the principle that memory should preserve the distinctions that matter for decisions, not descriptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出决策视角下的记忆压缩框架DeMem，将长时程语言体的记忆问题形式化为决策中心率失真问题，通过在线学习仅保留对决策有区分度的历史状态，在有限记忆预算下实现近似最优的决策质量保障。
AI.motivation: 现有长时程语言体的记忆机制通常基于描述性标准（如相关性、显著性或摘要质量）组织经验，但记忆的价值不在于忠实描述过去，而在于在固定预算下保留对良好决策至关重要的历史区分信息，现有方法缺乏从决策质量视角系统衡量记忆压缩损失的理论框架。
AI.method: 本文将记忆压缩问题形式化为决策中心率失真问题，以压缩导致的决策质量损失衡量记忆质量，推导出可安全遗忘的精确遗忘边界和描述记忆预算与决策质量最优权衡的记忆失真前沿；据此提出DeMem在线记忆学习器，仅在数据验证共享状态会导致决策冲突时才优化其分区，并提供近极小极大遗憾保障的理论证明。
AI.result: 在受控综合诊断任务和长时程对话基准上，DeMem在相同运行时预算下取得一致的性能提升，验证了记忆应保留对决策有区分度的信息而非描述性信息的核心原则。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明记忆压缩应从决策质量出发而非描述忠实度，DeMem通过在线学习实现高效记忆分配，为长时程语言体在有限内存下的智能决策提供了理论指导和实用方法。

title: Progressive Photorealistic Simplification
summary: Existing image simplification techniques often rely on Non-Photorealistic Rendering (NPR), transforming photographs into stylized sketches, cartoons, or paintings. While effective at reducing visual complexity, such approaches typically sacrifice photographic realism. In this work, we explore a complementary direction: simplifying images while preserving their photorealistic appearance. We introduce progressive semantic image simplification, a framework that iteratively reduces scene complexity by removing and inpainting elements in a controlled manner. At each step, the resulting image remains a plausible natural photograph. Our method combines semantic understanding with generative editing, leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to identify and prioritize elements for removal, and a learned verifier to ensure photorealism and coherence throughout the process. This is implemented via an iterative Select-Remove-Verify pipeline that produces high-quality simplification trajectories. To improve efficiency, we further distill this process into an image-to-video generation model that directly predicts coherent simplification sequences from a single input image. Beyond generating cleaner and more focused compositions, our approach enables applications such as content-aware decluttering, semantic layer decomposition, and interactive editing. More broadly, our work suggests that simplification through structured content removal can serve as a practical mechanism for guiding visual interpretation within the photorealistic domain, complementing traditional abstraction methods.

AI.tldr: 提出渐进式语义图像简化框架，通过选择性移除与修补元素在保留照片真实感的同时降低视觉复杂度，并进一步将过程蒸馏为图像到视频生成模型，实现高效的语义简化轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有图像简化技术多依赖非真实感渲染（NPR），虽能降低视觉复杂度但牺牲了照片真实感，缺乏一种在保持摄影真实感前提下实现图像简化的方法。
AI.method: 提出渐进式语义图像简化框架，采用迭代的Select-Remove-Verify流水线：利用视觉语言模型（VLM）识别并排序待移除元素，结合生成式编辑进行语义理解与图像修补，通过学习的验证器确保每一步结果的真实感和连贯性。为进一步提升效率，将该过程蒸馏为图像到视频生成模型，直接从单张输入图像预测连贯的简化序列。
AI.result: 该方法能生成高质量、连贯的简化轨迹，产生更清晰、更具焦点的图像组成；支持内容感知去杂、语义层分解和交互式编辑等应用，在保持照片真实感的同时有效降低场景复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明通过结构化内容移除的简化方式可在照片真实感域内作为引导视觉解释的实用机制，与传统抽象方法形成互补，并为层次化视觉理解提供了新范式。

title: CoWorld-VLA: Thinking in a Multi-Expert World Model for Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing reasoning mechanisms still struggle to provide planning-oriented intermediate representations: textual Chain-of-Thought (CoT) fails to preserve continuous spatiotemporal structure, while latent world reasoning remains difficult to use as a direct condition for action generation. In this paper, we propose CoWorld-VLA, a multi-expert world reasoning framework for autonomous driving, where world representations serve as explicit conditions to guide action planning. CoWorld-VLA extracts complementary world information through multi-source supervision and encodes it into expert tokens within the VLA, thereby providing planner-accessible conditioning signals. Specifically, we construct four types of tokens: semantic interaction, geometric structure, dynamic evolution, and ego trajectory tokens, which respectively model interaction intent, spatial structure, future temporal dynamics, and behavioral goals. During action generation, CoWorld-VLA employs a diffusion-based hierarchical multi-expert fusion planner, which is coupled with scene context throughout the joint denoising process to generate continuous ego trajectories. Experiments show that CoWorld-VLA achieves competitive results in both future scene generation and planning on the NAVSIM v1 benchmark, demonstrating strong performance in collision avoidance and trajectory accuracy. Ablation studies further validate the complementarity of expert tokens and their effectiveness as planning conditions for action generation. Code will be available at https://github.com/potatochip1211/CoWorld-VLA.

AI.tldr: CoWorld-VLA 提出了一种多专家世界推理框架，通过语义交互、几何结构、动态演化和自我轨迹四种专家 tokens 将世界表征作为显式条件，结合扩散分层多专家融合规划器，在 NAVSIM v1 基准上实现了具备强碰撞避免和轨迹精度的端到端自动驾驶规划。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLA 模型中的推理机制难以提供面向规划的中间表征：文本思维链无法保維持连续时空结构，而隐式世界推理难以直接作为动作生成的显式条件，从而限制了端到端自动驾驶中规划模块的可控性与可解释性。
AI.method: CoWorld-VLA 通过多源监督提取互补世界信息并编码为四种专家 tokens（语义交互、几何结构、动态演化、自我轨迹）注入 VLA，分别建模交互意图、空间结构、未来时序动态和行为目标；在动作生成阶段，采用基于扩散的分层多专家融合规划器，在整个联合去噪过程中与场景上下文耦合，生成连续的自我轨迹。
AI.result: CoWorld-VLA 在 NAVSIM v1 基准上的未来场景生成和规划任务中均取得了有竞争力的结果，在碰撞避免和轨迹精度方面表现优异；消融实验验证了四种专家 tokens 之间的互补性及其作为规划条件对动作生成的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了将多源世界表征显式编码为 planner 可访问的条件信号能够有效提升 VLA 自动驾驶规划的连续性与安全性，为可解释、可控的端到端驾驶推理提供了新范式。

title: TIE: Time Interval Encoding for Video Generation over Events
summary: Director-style prompting, robotic action prediction, and interactive video agents demand temporal grounding over concurrent events -- a regime in which 68% of general clips and over 99% of robotics/gameplay clips contain overlapping events, yet existing multi-event generators rest on a single-active-prompt assumption. However, modern video generators, such as Diffusion Transformers (DiT), represent time as discrete points through point-wise positional encodings. This formulation creates a fundamental dimension mismatch: temporally extended intervals and overlapping events are mathematically unrepresentable to the attention mechanism. In this paper, we propose Time Interval Encoding (TIE), a principled, plug-and-play interval-aware generalization of rotary embeddings that elevates time intervals to first-class primitives inside DiT cross-attention. Rather than introducing another heuristic interval embedding, we show that, within RoPE-compatible bilinear attention, TIE is characterized by two basic principles: Temporal Integrability, which requires an event to aggregate positional evidence over its full duration, and Duration Invariance, which removes the trivial bias toward longer intervals. Under a uniform kernel, this characterization yields an efficient closed-form sinc-based solution that preserves the standard attention interface and naturally attenuates boundary noise through interval integration. Empirically, TIE preserves the visual quality of the base DiT model while substantially improving temporal controllability. In our experiments on the OmniEvents dataset, it improves human-verified Temporal Constraint Satisfaction Rate from 77.34% to 96.03% and reduces temporal boundary error from 0.261s to 0.073s, while also improving trajectory-level temporal alignment metrics. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/MatrixTeam-AI/TIE.

AI.tldr: 提出时间区间编码（TIE），一种基于旋转位置嵌入的即插即用区间感知泛化方法，使扩散Transformer能够在注意力机制中原生表示时间区间和重叠事件，在OmniEvents数据集上将时间约束满足率从77.34%提升至96.03%，并将边界误差从0.261秒降至0.073秒。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型（如扩散Transformer）将时间建模为离散点，通过点式位置编码表示，导致时间区间和重叠事件在注意力机制中数学上不可表示，而现实场景中68%的通用视频片段和超过99%的机器人/游戏片段包含重叠事件，存在根本性的维度不匹配问题。
AI.method: 提出时间区间编码（TIE），一种基于旋转位置嵌入（RoPE）的即插即用区间感知泛化方法，将时间区间提升为DiT交叉注意力中的一等公民。TIE满足两个基本原则：时间可积性（事件需聚合其整个持续时间的位证据）和时长不变性（消除对较长区间的平凡偏好）。在均匀核假设下，该方法导出基于sinc函数的闭式解，保持标准注意力接口并通过区间积分自然衰减边界噪声。
AI.result: 在OmniEvents数据集上，TIE将人工验证的时间约束满足率从77.34%提升至96.03%，时间边界误差从0.261秒降至0.073秒，同时提高了轨迹级时间对齐指标，且保持基础DiT模型的视觉质量不受影响。
AI.conclusion: TIE通过将时间区间作为一等公民引入DiT注意力机制，在不牺牲视觉质量的前提下显著提升了时间可控性，为视频生成中重叠事件的时间定位提供了理论化且高效的解决方案，代码和数据集已开源。

title: DeepSight: Long-Horizon World Modeling via Latent States Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving systems are increasingly integrating Vision-Language Model (VLM) architectures, incorporating text reasoning or visual reasoning to enhance the robustness and accuracy of driving decisions. However, the reasoning mechanisms employed in most methods are direct adaptations from general domains, lacking in-depth exploration tailored to autonomous driving scenarios, particularly within visual reasoning modules. In this paper, we propose a driving world model that performs parallel prediction of latent semantic features for consecutive future frames in the bird's-eye-view (BEV) space, thereby enabling long-horizon modeling of future world states. We also introduce an efficient and adaptive text reasoning mechanism that utilizes additional social knowledge and reasoning capabilities to further improve driving performance in challenging long-tail scenarios. We present a novel, efficient, and effective approach that achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on the closed-loop Bench2drive benchmark. Codes are available at: https://github.com/hotdogcheesewhite/DeepSight.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepSight，一种面向端到端自动驾驶的视觉-语言模型方法，通过在BEV空间中对连续未来帧进行并行潜在语义特征预测，实现长时序世界状态建模，并引入高效自适应文本推理机制以提升长尾场景性能，在Bench2drive闭环基准上达到SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统虽已集成视觉-语言模型（VLM）架构，但其推理机制多直接沿用通用领域的方法，缺乏针对自动驾驶场景的深入定制，尤其是在视觉推理模块中缺少对未来世界状态的长时序建模能力，难以有效应对长尾挑战场景。
AI.method: 提出一种驾驶世界模型，在鸟瞰图（BEV）空间中对连续未来帧进行并行潜在语义特征预测，实现长时序未来世界状态建模；同时引入高效自适应的文本推理机制，利用外部社会知识与推理能力进一步提升模型在长尾场景下的决策表现。
AI.result: 该方法在闭环Bench2drive基准测试上取得了最先进（SOTA）的结果，验证了其在端到端自动驾驶任务中的有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: DeepSight表明，在BEV空间中进行并行未来状态预测并结合自适应文本推理，能显著提升自动驾驶系统在复杂长尾场景下的决策鲁棒性，为VLM在自动驾驶中的定制化推理机制设计提供了新方向。

title: SenseBench: A Benchmark for Remote Sensing Low-Level Visual Perception and Description in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Low-level visual perception underpins reliable remote sensing (RS) image analysis, yet current image quality assessment (IQA) methods output uninterpretable scalar scores rather than characterizing physics-driven RS degradations, deviating markedly from the diagnostic needs of RS experts. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) present a compelling alternative by delivering language-grounded IQA, their visual priors are heavily biased toward ground-level natural images. Consequently, whether VLMs can overcome this domain gap to perceive and articulate RS artifacts remains insufficiently studied. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{SenseBench}, the first dedicated diagnostic benchmark for RS low-level visual perception and description. Driven by a physics-based hierarchical taxonomy that unifies both non-reference and reference-based paradigms, SenseBench features over 10K meticulously curated instances across 6 major and 22 fine-grained RS degradation categories. Specifically, two complementary protocols are designed for evaluation: objective low-level visual \textit{perception} and subjective diagnostic \textit{description}. Comprehensive evaluation of 29 state-of-the-art VLMs reveals not only skewed domain priors and multi-distortion collapse, but also \textit{fluency illusion} and a \textit{perception-description inversion} effect. We hope SenseBench provides a robust evaluation testbed and high-quality diagnostic data to advance the development of VLMs in RS low-level perception. Code and datasets are available \href{https://github.com/Zhong-Chenchen/SenseBench}{\textcolor{blue}{here}}.

AI.tldr: 提出SenseBench，首个面向遥感图像退化感知与描述的专用诊断基准，通过物理层次化分类体系和10K+实例评估29个VLM，揭示了领域偏移、多失真坍缩、流畅性幻觉和感知-描述反转等关键问题。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感图像质量评估方法输出无解释性的标量分数，无法满足专家对物理驱动退化诊断的需求；虽然VLM提供了语言化的IQA替代方案，但其视觉先验严重偏向自然图像，能否跨越领域鸿沟来感知和描述遥感伪影尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 构建了SenseBench基准，基于物理层次化分类体系统一无参考和全参考范式，包含10K+实例覆盖6大类22个细粒度遥感退化类别；设计了两个互补评估协议：客观低级视觉感知和主观诊断描述，对29个SOTA VLM进行系统评估。
AI.result: 对29个SOTA VLM的全面评估揭示了：(1) 领域先验存在严重偏差；(2) 多失真坍缩现象；(3) 流畅性幻觉（fluency illusion）；(4) 感知-描述反转效应（perception-description inversion）。
AI.conclusion: SenseBench为遥感低级视觉VLM的发展提供了稳健的评估测试平台和高质量诊断数据，所揭示的领域偏差和幻觉效应等发现为后续改进VLM在遥感退化感知中的表现指明了方向。

title: FrequencyCT: Frequency domain pseudo-label generation for self-supervised low-dose CT denoising
summary: Despite extensive research on computed tomography (CT) denoising, few studies exploit projection-domain data characteristics to mitigate noise correlation. To address this, this work proposes FrequencyCT, the first zero-shot self-supervised method for pseudo-label generation in the frequency domain for low-dose CT denoising. Leveraging the characteristic of the frequency domain that largely isolates noise from clean signals, a regional low-frequency anchoring technique is proposed. Phase-preserving amplitude modulation and mask perturbation in the high-frequency region generate pseudo-label data for self-supervision. The fluctuating noise variance in the projection domain prompts truncation of the generated samples to stabilize the network's optimization gradient. Evaluation results on multiple public and real-world datasets confirm the clinical application potential of this research, which will have a revolutionary impact on the field of denoising. The code can be obtained from https://github.com/yqx7150/FrequencyCT.

AI.tldr: FrequencyCT提出了一种在频域生成伪标签的零样本自监督方法，利用低频锚定和相位保持幅度调制技术实现低剂量CT去噪，在多个数据集上验证了其临床潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有低剂量CT去噪研究大多在图像域或投影域进行，但鲜有利用投影域数据特性来缓解噪声相关性，且传统自监督方法难以有效分离噪声与真实信号，导致去噪性能受限。
AI.method: 提出FrequencyCT，首个在频域进行零样本自监督伪标签生成的低剂量CT去噪方法。利用频域中噪声与干净信号高度分离的特性，设计区域低频锚定技术；通过相位保持幅度调制和高频区域掩码扰动生成自监督伪标签数据；针对投影域噪声方差波动问题，对生成样本进行截断以稳定网络优化梯度。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集和真实临床数据集上的评估结果验证了FrequencyCT的临床应用潜力，表明其在去噪性能上具有革命性影响。
AI.conclusion: FrequencyCT通过频域伪标签生成有效解决了低剂量CT去噪中的噪声相关性问题，零样本自监督范式避免了配对数据的依赖，为临床低剂量CT成像提供了可行且高效的解决方案。

title: Segment Anything with Robust Uncertainty-Accuracy Correlation
summary: Despite strong zero-shot performance, SAM is unreliable under domain shift due to Mask-level Confidence Confusion (MCC), where a single IoU-based mask score fails to reflect pixel-wise reliability near boundaries. Motivated by the contrast between texture-biased shortcuts in neural networks and shape-centric processing in human vision, we model out-of-domain variation as appearance shifts and non-rigid deformations that jointly stress calibration. We propose Segment Anything with Robust Uncertainty-Accuracy Correlation (RUAC) for robust pixel-wise uncertainty estimation under appearance and deformation shifts. RUAC adds a lightweight uncertainty head, trains it with a collaborative style-deformation attack that jointly perturbs texture and geometry, and applies Uncertainty-Accuracy Alignment to ensure uncertainty consistently highlights erroneous pixels even under adversarial perturbations. Across 23 zero-shot domains, RUAC improves segmentation quality and yields more faithful uncertainty with stronger uncertainty-accuracy correlation. Project page: https://github.com/HongyouZhou/ruac.git.

AI.tldr: 提出RUAC框架，通过轻量级不确定性头、协同风格-变形对抗攻击和不确定性-准确性对齐，解决SAM在域偏移下的掩码置信度混淆问题，在23个零样本域中提升了分割质量和不确定性-准确性相关性。
AI.motivation: SAM尽管在零样本场景中表现优异，但在域偏移下可靠性较差，根本原因在于基于IoU的单一掩码评分无法反映像素级的不确定性，特别是在边界附近存在掩码置信度混淆（MCC）问题。现有方法缺乏对纹理偏移和非刚性形变联合作用下的校准机制，而神经网络倾向于纹理偏好的捷径学习，与人眼基于形状的视觉处理存在本质差异。
AI.method: 提出RUAC框架，包含三个核心组件：一是为SAM添加轻量级不确定性头；二是设计协同风格-变形对抗攻击，同时扰动纹理（风格迁移）和几何（非刚性形变）来模拟域偏移；三是应用不确定性-准确性对齐（Uncertainty-Accuracy Alignment）损失，确保不确定性估计即使在对抗扰动下也能一致地高亮错误像素，从而提升不确定性-准确性相关性。
AI.result: 在23个零样本域上的实验表明，RUAC不仅提升了分割质量，还生成了更忠实的不确定性估计，具有更强的不确定性-准确性相关性（uncertainty-accuracy correlation）。论文通过对比实验验证了该方法在域偏移下优于现有不确定性估计方法。
AI.conclusion: RUAC通过显式建模纹理和形变两种域偏移类型，并引入对抗训练与对齐机制，有效解决了SAM在域偏移下的置信度校准问题。该方法证明了视觉模型在零样本迁移时，联合考虑外观与几何变化对不确定性估计的重要性，为提升基础模型在开放环境中的可靠性提供了可行思路。

title: Product-of-Gaussian-Mixture Diffusion Models for Joint Nonlinear MRI Reconstruction
summary: Recently, diffusion models have attracted considerable attention for magnetic resonance image reconstruction due to their high sample quality. However, most existing methods rely on large networks with opaque time-conditioning mechanisms, and require offline coil sensitivity estimation. This results in limited interpretability of the reconstruction process and reduced flexibility in the acquisition setup. To address these limitations, we jointly reconstruct the image and the coil sensitivities by combining the parameter-efficient product-of-Gaussian-mixture diffusion model as an image prior with a classical smoothness prior on the coil sensitivities. The proposed method is fast and robust to both contrast and anatomical distribution shifts as well as changing k-space trajectories.
