Finally, we propose a more expressive parameterization of the image prior which improves results in denoising and magnetic resonance image reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合参数高效的高斯混合乘积扩散模型作为图像先验、并联合重建图像与线圈灵敏度的磁共振图像重建方法，无需离线线圈灵敏度估计和大规模不透明网络，具有高可解释性、快速、鲁棒且支持灵活采集设置。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的磁共振图像重建方法大多依赖大型网络和不透明的时间条件机制，且需要离线估计线圈灵敏度，导致重建过程可解释性差、采集设置灵活性受限。
AI.method: 将参数高效的高斯混合乘积扩散模型作为图像先验，结合线圈灵敏度的经典平滑先验，联合重建图像与线圈灵敏度；同时提出一种更具表达力的图像先验参数化方法以提升去噪和重建性能。
AI.result: 所提方法在去噪和磁共振图像重建任务上均取得改进结果，对对比度变化、解剖分布偏移及不同k空间轨迹均表现出快速且鲁棒的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合重建与参数高效先验设计，该方法在提升可解释性和灵活性的同时，保持了高重建质量和鲁棒性，为扩散模型在MRI重建中的实际应用提供了新思路。

title: LLaVA-CKD: Bottom-Up Cascaded Knowledge Distillation for Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are successful in addressing a multitude of vision-language understanding tasks, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), but their memory and compute requirements remain a concern for practical deployment. A promising class of techniques for mitigating this concern is Knowledge Distillation, where knowledge from a high-capacity Teacher network is transferred to a considerably smaller Student network. However, the capacity gap between the two networks is both a blessing and a curse: the smaller the Student network, the better its efficiency, and the larger the Teacher, the more knowledge it carries; yet, beyond a point, the larger capacity gap between the two leads to worse knowledge transfer. To counter this effect, we propose a bottom-up cascaded knowledge distillation (CKD) framework. Instead of treating knowledge transfer as an activity involving one high-capacity Teacher (or an ensemble of such), inspired by human formal education systems, we introduce one (potentially, more) additional Teacher(s) of intermediate capacity that gradually bring the Student network to the next level, where the next (higher-capacity) Teacher can take over. We provide a theoretical analysis in order to study the effect of cascaded distillation in the generalization performance of the Student. We apply the proposed framework on models build upon the LLaVA methodology and evaluate the derived models on seven standard, publicly available VQA benchmarks, demonstrating their SotA performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自底向上的级联知识蒸馏（CKD）框架，通过引入中等容量的中间教师模型逐步弥合师生网络间的容量差距，在LLaVA架构上的实验表明该方法在多个VQA基准上达到了SotA性能。
AI.motivation: 大容量教师网络与小容量学生网络之间的容量差距在知识蒸馏中既是优势也是瓶颈：差距越大，学生效率越高、教师知识越丰富，但超过临界点后知识迁移效果显著下降。现有方法直接将高容量教师的知识迁移给小容量学生，未能有效解决这一容量差距带来的性能退化问题。
AI.method: 受人类教育体系启发，提出一种自底向上的级联知识蒸馏（CKD）框架，在最高容量教师与学生之间引入一个或多个中等容量的中间教师模型，通过逐步递进的方式将学生网络从低容量阶段逐步引导至高容量阶段，使得下一阶段的高容量教师能够在学生已有能力基础上继续提升。同时提供了理论分析研究级联蒸馏对学生泛化性能的影响。
AI.result: 将所提框架应用于基于LLaVA架构构建的模型，并在七个标准公开VQA基准上进行评估，实验结果表明该方法达到了当前最优（SotA）性能。
AI.conclusion: 级联知识蒸馏框架通过引入中间容量教师模型有效缓解了师生网络间容量差距过大导致的知识迁移困难问题，为VLM的高效部署提供了可行方案，理论分析也为该方法的有效性提供了支持。

title: iPay: Integrated Payment Action Recognition via Multimodal Networks and Adaptive Spatial Prior Learning
summary: Automated transit payment analysis is vital for scalable fare auditing and passenger analytics, yet practice still relies on limited manual inspection. Prior vision- and skeleton-based methods remain brittle under noisy onboard surveillance and often depend on poorly generalizable handcrafted features. Building on the success of graph convolutional networks in human action recognition, we observe that skeleton features excel at modeling global spatiotemporal dependencies but tend to underemphasize the subtle local relative motions that distinguish payment actions. In contrast, RGB features preserve fine-grained spatial details yet often lack reliable temporal continuity in surveillance footage. To bridge both system-level deployment needs and model-level design challenges, we present iPay, an integrated payment action recognition framework for onboard transit surveillance system. iPay adopts a multimodal mixture-of-experts architecture with four tightly coupled streams: (1) an RGB expert stream emphasizing local evidence via region-focused computation; (2) a skeleton expert stream modeling articulated motion with a graph convolutional backbone; (3) a dual-attention fusion stream enabling skeleton-to-RGB temporal transfer and RGB-to-skeleton spatial enhancement; and (4) a prior-driven Spatial Difference Discriminator (SDD) that explicitly models hand-to-anchor relative motion to improve task-specific discriminability. We also collaborate with local transit agencies to collect over 55 hours of real onboard surveillance footage, yielding 500+ payment clips. Experiments show that iPay outperforms prior methods and achieves 83.45\% recognition accuracy with competitive computational efficiency, making it suitable for edge deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/ccoopq/iPay.

AI.tldr: 提出iPay，一个面向车载监控的多模态混合专家支付动作识别框架，通过RGB流、骨架流、双注意力融合流和空间差异判别器协同工作，在真实公交监控数据集上达到83.45%的识别准确率，适用于边缘部署。
AI.motivation: 现有自动支付动作分析方法依赖手工特征或单模态方案，RGB特征缺乏稳定时序连续性，骨架特征虽擅长全局时空建模却忽略区分支付动作所需的细微局部相对运动，且二者在嘈杂车载监控场景下均表现脆弱，亟需一种兼顾系统部署需求与模型设计挑战的统一框架。
AI.method: iPay采用多模态混合专家架构，包含四个紧密耦合的流：RGB专家流通过区域聚焦计算强调局部证据；骨架专家流使用图卷积骨干网络建模关节运动；双注意力融合流实现骨架到RGB的时序迁移和RGB到骨架的空间增强；空间差异判别器显式建模手部与锚定点的相对运动以提升任务判别性。
AI.result: 与当地公交机构合作采集超过55小时真实车载监控视频，构建500+支付片段数据集。实验表明iPay达到83.45%的识别准确率，超越先前方法，并具有竞争性的计算效率，适合边缘端部署。
AI.conclusion: iPay通过多模态协同融合有效弥合了RGB与骨架特征在支付动作识别中的互补优势与各自局限，验证了混合专家架构在资源受限的车载监控场景中的可行性与有效性，为自动化公交支付审计和分析提供实用方案。

title: C-CoT: Counterfactual Chain-of-Thought with Vision-Language Models for Safe Autonomous Driving
summary: Safety-critical planning in complex environments, particularly at urban intersections, remains a fundamental challenge for autonomous driving. Existing methods, whether rule-based or data-driven, frequently struggle to capture complex scene semantics, infer potential risks, and make reliable decisions in rare, high-risk situations. While vision-language models (VLMs) offer promising approaches for safe decision-making in these environments, most current approaches lack reflective and causal reasoning, thereby limiting their overall robustness. To address this, we propose a counterfactual chain-of-thought (C-CoT) framework that leverages VLMs to decompose driving decisions into five sequential stages: scene description, critical object identification, risk prediction, counterfactual risk reasoning, and final action planning. Within the counterfactual reasoning stage, we introduce a structured meta-action evaluation tree to explicitly assess the potential consequences of alternative action combinations. This self-reflective reasoning establishes causal links between action choices and safety outcomes, improving robustness in long-tail and out-of-distribution scenarios. To validate our approach, we construct the DeepAccident-CCoT dataset based on the DeepAccident benchmark and fine-tune a Qwen2.5-VL (7B) model using low-rank adaptation. Our model achieves a risk prediction recall of 81.9%, reduces the collision rate to 3.52%, and lowers L2 error to 1.98 m. Ablation studies further confirm the critical role of counterfactual reasoning and the meta-action evaluation tree in enhancing safety and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于视觉语言模型的反事实思维链（C-CoT）框架，通过五阶段推理与元动作评估树实现可解释的安全决策，在DeepAccident基准上将碰撞率降至3.52%，风险预测召回率达81.9%。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶规划方法（无论是基于规则还是数据驱动）在复杂城市路口等场景中难以捕捉场景语义、推断潜在风险，并对长尾高风险情况做出可靠决策；视觉语言模型虽展现出潜力，但当前方法缺乏反思性和因果推理能力，限制了其鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出了反事实思维链（C-CoT）框架，利用视觉语言模型将驾驶决策分解为五个顺序阶段：场景描述、关键目标识别、风险预测、反事实风险推理和最终动作规划；在反事实推理阶段引入结构化元动作评估树，显式评估替代动作组合的潜在后果，建立动作选择与安全结果之间的因果联系。
AI.result: 基于DeepAccident基准构建DeepAccident-CCoT数据集，采用低秩适配微调Qwen2.5-VL（7B）模型，实现了81.9%的风险预测召回率、3.52%的碰撞率以及1.98米的L2误差；消融实验进一步证实了反事实推理与元动作评估树对提升安全性与可解释性的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 反事实思维链框架通过结构化的因果推理显著提升了自动驾驶在长尾与分布外场景下的安全决策鲁棒性，元动作评估树提供可解释的自我反思机制，为安全关键型自主系统提供了有效范式。

title: TINS: Test-time ID-prototype-separated Negative Semantics Learning for OOD Detection
summary: Vision-language models enable OOD detection by comparing image alignment with ID labels and negative semantics. Existing negative-label-based methods mainly rely on static negative labels constructed before inference, limiting their ability to cover diverse and evolving OOD concepts. Although test-time expansion provides a natural solution, naively learning negative semantics from potential OOD samples may introduce hard ID contamination. To address this issue, we propose a \textbf{T}est-time \textbf{I}D-prototype-separated \textbf{N}egative \textbf{S}emantics learning method, termed \textbf{TINS}. TINS learns sample-specific negative text embeddings via image-to-text modality inversion and introduces ID-prototype-separated regularization to keep them separated from ID semantics. To further stabilize negative semantics expansion, TINS employs group-wise aggregation scoring and a buffer update strategy. Extensive experiments across Four-OOD, OpenOOD, Temporal-shift, and Various ID settings show consistent improvements over strong baselines. Notably, on the Four-OOD benchmark with ImageNet-1K as ID, TINS reduces the average FPR95 from 14.04\% to 6.72\%. Our code is available at https://github.com/zxk1212/tins.

AI.tldr: 提出TINS方法，通过测试时学习ID-原型分离的负语义嵌入，解决静态负标签方法无法覆盖多样OOD概念以及测试时扩展带来的难ID污染问题，在多个基准上取得显著改进。
AI.motivation: 现有基于负标签的OOD检测方法主要依赖推理前构建的静态负标签，限制了其覆盖多样且动态变化的OOD概念的能力；虽然后测试时扩展是自然解决方案，但直接从潜在OOD样本中学习负语义可能引入难ID污染。
AI.method: 提出TINS方法，通过图像到文本的模态逆转为每个测试样本学习样本特定的负语义文本嵌入，并引入ID-原型分离正则化以保持负语义与ID语义的分离；同时采用分组聚合评分和缓冲区更新策略来稳定负语义的扩展过程。
AI.result: 在Four-OOD、OpenOOD、Temporal-shift和多种ID设置下的广泛实验显示TINS持续优于强基线；在ImageNet-1K作为ID的Four-OOD基准上，TINS将平均FPR95从14.04%降至6.72%。
AI.conclusion: TINS通过测试时动态学习分离于ID原型的负语义嵌入，有效解决了静态负标签的覆盖局限性和测试时扩展中的ID污染问题，为视觉-语言模型下的OOD检测提供了一种高效且稳健的改进范式。

title: GridProbe: Posterior-Probing for Adaptive Test-Time Compute in Long-Video VLMs
summary: Long-video understanding in VLMs is bottlenecked by a single monolithic forward pass over thousands of frames at quadratic attention cost. A common mitigation is to first select a small subset of informative frames before the forward pass; common for training-free selectors via auxiliary encoder-space similarities. Such signals are capped by contrastive pretraining, which usually fails on reasoning-heavy queries (negation, cross-frame counting, holistic summarization). We propose GridProbe, an efficient training-free posterior-probing inference paradigm that scores evidence in answer space using a frozen VLM's own reasoning and then selects question-relevant frames adaptively, resulting in sub-quadratic attention cost with little to no accuracy loss. We arrange frames on a $K{\times}K$ grid and run lightweight row R and column C probes, where each probe reads its peak posterior as a query-conditioned confidence. The outer product of R and C yields an interpretable importance map whose skewness and kurtosis drive Shape-Adaptive Selection, a closed-form rule that reliably replaces the fixed frame budget $M$ with a per-question $M_{\mathrm{eff}}$. We show empirically that $M_{\mathrm{eff}}$ tracks intrinsic question difficulty without ever seeing the answer, a sign of test-time adaptive compute. On Video-MME-v2, GridProbe matches the monolithic baseline within $1.6$ pp Avg Acc at $3.36\times$ TFLOPs reduction, while on LongVideoBench it Pareto-dominates the baseline ($+0.9$ pp at $0.35\times$ compute). Because the selector and QA models can be decoupled, pairing a small 2B selector with a stronger 4B or 8B QA is strictly Pareto-dominant over the 2B monolithic baseline (up to $+4.0$ pp at $0.52\times$ compute, on average), with no retraining. Finally, the interpretability of the importance maps opens future avenues for behavioral diagnostics, grounding, and frame-selection distillation.

AI.tldr: GridProbe 提出一种无需训练的后验探测推理范式，通过在答案空间进行轻量级行列探测生成基于 VLM 自身推理的注意力重要性图，并利用 Shape-Adaptive Selection 实现自适应帧数选择，以亚二次注意力代价匹配甚至超越全帧基线，支持解码器分离与测试时自适应计算。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解在视觉语言模型中受限于单个前向传递需处理数千帧带来的二次注意力代价，现有基于辅助编码器相似度的训练无关帧选择方法受限于对比预训练信号，在涉及否定、跨帧计数、整体总结等推理密集型查询时表现不佳。本文旨在设计一种训练无关、高效且与推理复杂度自适应的帧选择机制以克服上述局限。
AI.method: GridProbe 将帧排列为 K×K 网格，分别对行和列进行轻量级后验探测（probe），每个 probe 读取后验峰值作为查询条件置信度；行列探测结果的外积生成可解释的重要性图，利用该图的偏度和峰度通过闭合形式的 Shape-Adaptive Selection 规则将固定帧预算 M 替换为每问题自适应的 M_eff。该范式无需训练，且选择器与大模型可解耦。
AI.result: 在 Video-MME-v2 上，GridProbe 以 3.36 倍 TFLOPs 缩减匹配全帧基线（精度差仅 1.6 pp）；在 LongVideoBench 上以 0.35 倍计算量实现 +0.9 pp 的提升，帕累托主导基线。将 2B 选择器与 4B/8B QA 模型配对，在平均 0.52 倍计算量下比 2B 全帧基线提升高达 +4.0 pp，无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: GridProbe 证明了解耦帧选择器与 QA 模型的有效性，以及通过 VLM 自身推理信号实现测试时自适应计算的可行性。重要性图的天然可解释性为行为诊断、grounding 和帧选择蒸馏等未来方向打开了可能。

title: Break the Brake, Not the Wheel: Untargeted Jailbreak via Entropy Maximization
summary: Recent studies show that gradient-based universal image jailbreaks on vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit little or no cross-model transferability, casting doubt on the feasibility of transferable multimodal jailbreaks. We revisit this conclusion under a strictly untargeted threat model without enforcing a fixed prefix or response pattern. Our preliminary experiment reveals that refusal behavior concentrates at high-entropy tokens during autoregressive decoding, and non-refusal tokens already carry substantial probability mass among the top-ranked candidates before attack. Motivated by this finding, we propose Untargeted Jailbreak via Entropy Maximization(UJEM)-KL, a lightweight attack that maximizes entropy at these decision tokens to flip refusal outcomes, while stabilizing the remaining low-entropy positions to preserve output quality. Across three VLMs and two safety benchmarks, UJEM-KL achieves competitive white-box attack success rates and consistently improves transferability, while remaining effective under representative defenses. Our experimental results indicate that the limited transferability primarily stems from overly constrained optimization objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UJEM-KL，一种基于熵最大化的轻量级对抗攻击方法，通过操纵高熵决策令牌翻转VLM的拒绝行为，在实现高白盒攻击成功率的同时显著提升跨模型可迁移性，并揭示此前认为多模态越狱攻击缺乏可迁移性的结论源于过度约束的优化目标。
AI.motivation: 已有研究表明基于梯度的通用图像越狱攻击在视觉-语言模型（VLM）上几乎不具备跨模型可迁移性，这一结论对多模态越狱攻击的可行性提出了质疑。本文旨在重新审视这一问题，在无固定前缀或响应模式的严格非目标威胁模型下，探索能否实现可迁移的多模态越狱攻击。
AI.method: 本文通过初步实验发现VLM在自回归解码过程中，拒绝行为集中在高熵令牌上，且非拒绝令牌在前候选集中已占有显著概率质量。基于此观察，提出UJEM-KL（Untargeted Jailbreak via Entropy Maximization-KL），一种轻量级攻击方法，通过最大化决策令牌处的熵来翻转拒绝结果，同时稳定低熵位置以保持输出质量。
AI.result: 在三个VLM和两个安全基准上，UJEM-KL在白盒攻击中取得了具有竞争力的攻击成功率，并一致地提升了跨模型可迁移性，同时在代表性防御手段下仍然有效。实验结果表明，此前观察到的有限可迁移性主要源于过度约束的优化目标。
AI.conclusion: 本文的发现挑战了"多模态越狱攻击缺乏可迁移性"的既有结论，指出问题不在于方法本身而在于优化目标的过度约束。UJEM-KL通过熵最大化策略实现了有效的可迁移攻击，为理解VLM安全机制和设计更鲁棒的多模态防御提供了新的视角。

title: Dynamic Cross-Modal Prompt Generation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance through instruction tuning, yet real-world deployment often requires continual capability expansion across sequential tasks. In such scenarios, Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) aims to acquire new capabilities while limiting catastrophic forgetting. Existing methods mainly follow a module-composition paradigm: they maintain task-level prompts or LoRA experts and dynamically route or aggregate a subset of them at inference. However, samples within the same task can still differ substantially in visual scenes, question intents, and reasoning demands. This motivates instance-level adaptation to individual query-image pairs rather than only selecting or combining task-level modules. To this end, we propose DRAPE (Dynamic Cross-Modal Prompt Generation), a prompt-learning framework that synthesizes continuous instance-specific soft prompts for MCIT. Instead of selecting prompts from a fixed pool, DRAPE derives prompt queries from the textual instruction and cross-attends to visual patch features, producing query-image conditioned prompts that are prepended to the frozen LLM. To mitigate forgetting during sequential updates, DRAPE applies null-space gradient projection to the shared projector and uses CLIP-based prototype routing for task-label-free generator selection at inference. Extensive experiments on MCIT benchmarks show that DRAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance among representative prompt-based and LoRA-based continual-learning baselines.

AI.tldr: DRAPE提出了一种动态跨模态提示生成框架，通过为每个查询-图像对合成实例级连续软提示，并结合零空间梯度投影和CLIP原型路由，在多模态持续指令微调中实现了当前最优的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要采用基于任务级模块组合的范式（如任务级提示或LoRA专家），但同一任务内的样本在视觉场景、问题意图和推理需求上存在显著差异，仅靠任务级模块的选取或组合无法捕捉这种细粒度的实例级变化，难以实现真正高效的实例级自适应。
AI.method: DRAPE提出动态跨模态提示生成框架：从文本指令中导出提示查询，并与视觉图像块特征进行交叉注意力，生成条件于查询-图像对的连续软提示，将其预置到冻结的大语言模型中；为缓解持续学习中的遗忘，在共享投影器上应用零空间梯度投影，并在推理时采用CLIP原型路由实现无任务标签的生成器选择。
AI.result: 在多模态持续指令微调基准上的大量实验表明，DRAPE在代表性的基于提示和基于LoRA的持续学习方法中实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了在多模态持续指令微调中从任务级适应走向实例级适应的重要性，证明了动态生成实例特定提示结合遗忘缓解机制（零空间投影和无标签原型路由）是应对连续任务能力扩展的有效范式。

title: Towards a Large Language-Vision Question Answering Model for MSTAR Automatic Target Recognition
comment: Accepted to SPIE Defense + Commercial Sensing, Automatic Target Recognition XXXV
summary: Large language-vision models (LLVM), such as OpenAI's ChatGPT and GPT-4, have gained prominence as powerful tools for analyzing text and imagery. The merging of these data domains represents a significant paradigm shift with far-reaching implications for automatic target recognition (ATR). Recent transformer-based LLVM research has shown substantial improvements for geospatial perception tasks. Our study examines the application of LLVM to remote sensing image captioning and visual question-answering (VQA), with a specific focus on synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imagery. We examine newly published LLVM methods, including CLIP and LLaVA neural network transformer architectures. We have developed a work-in-progress SAR training and evaluation benchmark derived from the MSTAR Public Dataset. This has been extended to include descriptive text captions and question-answer pairs for VQA tasks. This challenge dataset is designed to push the boundaries of an LLVM in identifying nuanced ATR details in SAR imagery. Utilizing parameter-efficient fine-tuning, we train an LLVM method to identify fine-grained target qualities at 98% accuracy. We detail our data setup and experiments, addressing potential pitfalls that could lead to misleading conclusions. Accurately identifying and differentiating military vehicle types in SAR data poses a critical challenge, especially under complex environmental conditions. Mastering this target recognition skill may require a human analyst months of training and years of practice. This research represents a unique effort to apply LLVM to SAR applications, advancing machine-assisted remote sensing ATR for military and intelligence contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统性地将大型语言-视觉模型（LLVM）应用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像分析，通过构建基于MSTAR数据集的描述性文本标注和VQA问答对基准，结合参数高效微调方法，在细粒度军事目标识别任务上达到98%的准确率，推动了机器辅助遥感自动目标识别（ATR）在军事与情报领域的发展。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言-视觉模型（LLVM）在自然图像与文本多模态任务中取得了显著进展，但其在合成孔径雷达（SAR）遥感图像领域的应用尚属空白。SAR图像中军事车辆类型的精确识别与区分在复杂环境条件下极具挑战性，传统方法依赖人类分析师长期训练与经验积累，因此亟需探索LLVM在SAR自动目标识别（ATR）中的潜力与可行性。
AI.method: 研究基于MSTAR公共数据集构建了一个包含描述性文本标注和视觉问答（VQA）问答对的SAR训练与评估基准。采用CLIP和LLaVA等最新基于Transformer的LLVM架构，通过参数高效微调（Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning）方法对模型进行训练，以识别SAR图像中细粒度的目标属性特征，并设计了严谨的数据设置与实验流程以避免误导性结论。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的LLVM方法在SAR图像细粒度目标属性识别任务上达到了98%的准确率，验证了大型语言-视觉模型在遥感SAR领域自动目标识别中的有效性与优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了LLVM显著拓展至SAR遥感图像分析领域的可行性，为机器辅助的军事与情报场景下的自动目标识别提供了新的技术路径。该工作填补了LLVM在SAR应用中研究的空白，同时揭示了多模态大模型在复杂环境条件下提升目标识别能力的重要潜力，并为后续SAR-VQA基准构建和微调策略优化提供了参考方向。

title: PhyGround: Benchmarking Physical Reasoning in Generative World Models
comment: Preprint. 56 pages, 39 figures, 40 tables. Project page: https://phyground.github.io/
summary: Generative world models are increasingly used for video generation, where learned simulators are expected to capture the physical rules that govern real-world dynamics. However, evaluating whether generated videos actually follow these rules remains challenging. Existing physics-focused video benchmarks have made important progress, but they still face three key challenges, including the coarse evaluation frameworks that hide law-specific failures, response biases and fatigue that undermine the validity of annotation judgments, and automated evaluators that are insufficiently physics-aware or difficult to audit. To address those challenges, we introduce PhyGround, a criteria-grounded benchmark for evaluating physical reasoning in video generation. The benchmark contains 250 curated prompts, each augmented with an expected physical outcome, and a taxonomy of 13 physical laws across solid-body mechanics, fluid dynamics, and optics. Each law is operationalized through observable sub-questions to enable per-law diagnostics. We evaluate eight modern video generation models through a large-scale, quality-controlled human study, grounded on social science lab experiment design. A total of 459 annotators provided 5,796 complete annotations and over 37.4K fine-grained labels; after quality control, the retained annotations exhibited high split-half model-ranking correlations (Spearman's rho > 0.90). To support reproducible automated evaluation, we release PhyJudge-9B, an open physics-specialized VLM judge. PhyJudge-9B achieves substantially lower aggregate relative bias than Gemini-3.1-Pro (3.3% vs. 16.6%). We release prompts, human annotations, model checkpoints, and evaluation code on the project page https://phyground.github.io/.

AI.tldr: PhyGround是一个基于物理法则分诊的视频生成物理推理评估基准，包含250个提示、13条物理法则分类体系和459名标注者的大规模人类研究，并发布了开源物理专家VLM裁判PhyJudge-9B，其聚合相对偏差显著低于Gemini-3.1-Pro（3.3% vs 16.6%）。
AI.motivation: 现有物理聚焦的视频基准存在三大挑战：粗粒度的评估框架掩盖了特定物理法则层面的失败模式、人工标注存在响应偏差和疲劳问题损害判断有效性、自动化评估器缺乏物理意识且难以审计，亟需一个细粒度、可诊断、可复现的物理推理评估基准。
AI.method: PhyGround构建了包含250个精心设计的提示的基准，每个提示附带预期物理结果，并建立了涵盖固体力学、流体动力学和光学的13条物理法则分类体系，每条法则通过可观察的子问题实现逐法则诊断。采用社会科学实验设计的大规模质量受控人类研究，共459名标注者提供5,796份完整标注和超过37.4K细粒度标签，并通过质量控制确保高分裂半模型排名相关性（Spearman's rho > 0.90）。同时发布开源物理专家VLM裁判PhyJudge-9B以支持可复现自动化评估。
AI.result: 在质量控制的标注数据上，分裂半模型排名相关性达到Spearman's rho > 0.90，验证了人类评估的高度一致性。PhyJudge-9B作为开源物理专家VLM裁判，其聚合相对偏差（3.3%）显著低于Gemini-3.1-Pro（16.6%），表明其在物理感知评估中具有更低的偏差和更高的可审计性。
AI.conclusion: PhyGround通过细粒度的物理法则分诊框架和大规模人类研究，为视频生成模型的物理推理能力提供了更可靠、可诊断的评估手段；PhyJudge-9B的发布为可复现的自动化物理评估提供了开源解决方案，有助于推动生成世界模型向更真实的物理规则遵守方向发展。

title: MMVIAD: Multi-view Multi-task Video Understanding for Industrial Anomaly Detection
summary: Industrial anomaly detection is critical for manufacturing quality control, yet existing datasets mainly focus on static images or sparse views, which do not fully reflect continuous inspection processes in real industrial scenarios. We introduce MMVIAD (Multi-view Multi-task Video Industrial Anomaly Detection), to the best of our knowledge the first continuous multi-view video dataset for industrial anomaly detection and understanding, together with a benchmark for multi-task evaluation. MMVIAD contains object-centric 2-second inspection clips with approximately 120 degrees of camera motion, covering 48 object categories, 14 environments, and 6 structural anomaly types. It supports anomaly detection, defect classification, object classification, and anomaly visible-time localization. Systematic evaluations on MMVIAD show that current commercial and open-source video MLLMs remain far below human performance, especially for fine-grained defect recognition and temporal grounding. To improve transferable anomaly understanding, we further develop a two-stage post-training pipeline where PS-SFT (Perception-Structured Supervised Fine-Tuning) initializes perception-structured reasoning and VISTA-GRPO (Visibility-grounded Industrial Structured Temporal Anomaly Group Relative Policy Optimization) refines the model with semantic-gated defect reward and visibility-aware temporal reward, producing the final model VISTA. On MMVIAD-Unseen, VISTA improves the base model's average score across the four tasks from 45.0 to 57.5, surpassing GPT-5.4. Source code is available at https://github.com/Georgekeepmoving/MMVIAD.

AI.tldr: MMVIAD是首个用于工业异常检测的多视角多任务视频数据集，覆盖48个物体类别、14种环境和6种异常类型，并提出了VISTA模型，通过两阶段后训练流程（PS-SFT和VISTA-GRPO）显著提升视频多模态大模型在细粒度缺陷识别和时间定位上的性能，在未见类别上平均得分从45.0提升至57.5，超越GPT-5.4。
AI.motivation: 现有工业异常检测数据集主要关注静态图像或稀疏视角，无法反映真实工业场景中连续检测流程的需求，且缺乏能够同时支持异常检测、缺陷分类、物体分类和异常可见时间定位的多任务视频数据集。
AI.method: 构建了MMVIAD数据集，包含物体中心化的2秒检测片段（约120度相机运动），覆盖48类物体、14种环境和6种结构异常类型；提出了VISTA模型，采用两阶段后训练流程：第一阶段PS-SFT初始化感知结构化推理能力，第二阶段VISTA-GRPO通过语义门控缺陷奖励和可见性感知时间奖励对模型进行强化学习优化。
AI.result: 系统评估表明现有商业和开源视频多模态大模型在MMVIAD上远低于人类表现，尤其在细粒度缺陷识别和时间定位方面；VISTA在MMVIAD-Unseen上四个任务的平均得分从基线的45.0提升至57.5，超越GPT-5.4。
AI.conclusion: 当前视频多模态大模型在工业异常检测领域与人类水平仍有显著差距，但通过结构化的感知推理训练和基于可见性引导的强化学习后训练可以大幅提升模型在工业场景中的泛化能力，为工业异常检测提供了新的数据基准和方法论。

title: Verification Mirage: Mapping the Reliability Boundary of Self-Verification in Medical VQA
summary: Self-verification, re-invoking the same vision language model (VLM) in a fresh context to check its own generated answer, is increasingly used as a default safety layer for medical visual question answering (VQA). We argue that this practice is fundamentally unreliable. We introduce [METHOD NAME], a diagnostic framework for mapping the reliability boundary of medical VLM self-verification by decomposing verifier behavior into discrimination capability and agreement bias. Because the verifier and answer generator are capacity-coupled, the verifier can overly agree with the generator, creating a verification mirage: a regime with both high verifier error and high agreement bias, driven by false acceptance of incorrect answers. Evaluating six open-weight VLMs across five medical VQA datasets and seven medical tasks, we find that this boundary is strongly task-conditioned. Knowledge-intensive clinical tasks fall deepest into the mirage, simpler tasks are more resistant, and perceptual tasks lie in between. Verification also fails to provide an independent safety signal: logistic mixed-effects analysis shows that verifier error and agreement bias become more likely when the generator is wrong, while saliency analyses show that verifiers under-attend to image evidence relative to generators, a phenomenon we call the lazy verifier. Cross-verification reduces but does not eliminate the mirage. Moreover, when verification is reused in multi-turn actor-verifier loops, most initially wrong answers become locked in by false verification. Since our experiments use clean benchmarks, the observed reliability boundary likely underestimates failures in real clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文指出医学视觉问答中广泛使用的VLM自验证机制本质上不可靠，并提出诊断框架Verification Mirage Discovery (VMD)来刻画其可靠性边界，发现验证器与生成器之间存在能力耦合导致的"验证幻象"现象，其严重程度高度依赖于任务类型。
AI.motivation: 当前医学VQA系统广泛采用自验证机制，即让同一个VLM在全新的上下文中重新调用以检查自己生成的答案，并将其作为默认安全层；然而该方法尚未经过系统的可靠性评估，其潜在风险与失效边界缺乏清晰的刻画与理解。
AI.method: 本文提出一个名为[METHOD NAME]的诊断框架，通过将验证器行为分解为判别能力与一致性偏差两个维度来映射医学VLM自验证的可靠性边界；研究评估了六个开源VLM在五个医学VQA数据集和七项医学任务上的表现，采用逻辑斯蒂混合效应模型分析验证器错误与一致性偏差与生成器正确性的关联关系，并通过显著性分析对比验证器与生成器对图像证据的注意力差异。
AI.result: 研究发现自验证的可靠性边界高度依赖于任务条件：知识密集型临床任务最容易陷入"验证幻象"（即验证器高错误率与高一致性偏差并存的状态），简单任务相对稳健，感知任务介于中间；验证未能提供独立的安全信号，当生成器错误时验证器错误和一致性偏差更可能发生，且验证器相比生成器对图像证据的关注更弱（称为"懒惰验证器"）；交叉验证可减轻但无法消除幻象，在多轮actor-verifier循环中初始错误答案大多被错误验证锁定。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明医学VLM的自验证机制在关键的知识密集型临床任务中不可靠，且由于实验基于干净基准测试，实际临床部署中的失败可能更为严重；该发现挑战了将自验证作为默认安全层的现有做法，提示需要更谨慎地设计医学VQA系统的验证与安全保障机制。

title: Is Your Driving World Model an All-Around Player?
comment: CVPR 2026 VideoWorldModel Workshop; Project Page at https://worldbench.github.io/worldlens GitHub at https://github.com/worldbench/WorldLens
summary: Today's driving world models can generate remarkably realistic dash-cam videos, yet no single model excels universally. Some generate photorealistic textures but violate basic physics; others maintain geometric consistency but fail when subjected to closed-loop planning. This disconnect exposes a critical gap: the field evaluates how real generated worlds appear, but rarely whether they behave realistically. We introduce WorldLens, a unified benchmark that measures world-model fidelity across the full spectrum, from pixel quality and 4D geometry to closed-loop driving and human perceptual alignment, through five complementary aspects and 24 standardized dimensions. Our evaluation of six representative models reveals that no existing approach dominates across all axes: texture-rich models violate geometry, geometry-aware models lack behavioral fidelity, and even the strongest performers achieve only 2-3 out of 10 on human realism ratings. To bridge algorithmic metrics with human perception, we further contribute WorldLens-26K, a 26,808-entry human-annotated preference dataset pairing numerical scores with textual rationales, and WorldLens-Agent, a vision-language evaluator distilled from these judgments that enables scalable, explainable auto-assessment. Together, the benchmark, dataset, and agent form a unified ecosystem for assessing generated worlds not merely by visual appeal, but by physical and behavioral fidelity.

AI.tldr: WorldLens 提出了一个从像素质量、4D几何、闭环驾驶到人类感知对齐的统一基准，结合人工标注数据集和VLM评估智能体，系统揭示了现有驾驶世界模型在物理与行为保真度上的关键缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶世界模型虽能生成逼真的行车记录仪视频，但各模型各有所长：有的纹理真实却违反物理规律，有的几何一致却无法应对闭环规划，而领域评估主要关注生成画面的视觉真实性，极少考察其物理与行为上的真实感，存在评估维度碎片化且缺乏统一标准的关键空白。
AI.method: WorldLens 构建了一个多维度统一基准，涵盖像素质量、4D几何、闭环驾驶和人类感知对齐五个互补方面及24个标准化评估维度；同时构建了 WorldLens-26K 人工标注偏好数据集（26,808条样本，包含数值评分与文本理由），并在此基础上蒸馏出 WorldLens-Agent，一个可扩展且可解释的视觉-语言自动评估智能体。
AI.result: 对六个代表性模型的评估显示，现有方法无法在所有维度上取得优势：纹理丰富的模型违反几何约束，几何感知的模型缺乏行为保真度，即使是性能最强的模型在人类真实感评分上也仅得2-3分（满分10分），表明生成世界的物理和行为保真度远未达到实用水平。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了当前驾驶世界模型在物理一致性与行为真实性上的严重不足，通过统一基准、偏好数据集和可解释自动评估智能体构建了一个完整评估生态，推动领域从仅关注视觉吸引力转向对物理和行为保真度的系统性评估。

title: CADBench: A Multimodal Benchmark for AI-Assisted CAD Program Generation
summary: Recovering editable CAD programs from images or 3D observations is central to AI-assisted design, but progress is difficult to measure because existing evaluations are fragmented across datasets, modalities, and metrics. We introduce CADBench, a unified benchmark for multimodal CAD program generation. CADBench contains 18,000 evaluation samples spanning six benchmark families derived from DeepCAD, Fusion 360, ABC, MCB, and Objaverse; five input modalities including clean meshes, noisy meshes, single-view renders, photorealistic renders, and multi-view renders; and six metrics covering geometric fidelity, executability, and program compactness. STEP-based families are stratified by B-rep face count and all families are diversity-sampled to support controlled analysis across complexity and object variation. We benchmark eleven CAD-specialized and general-purpose vision-language systems, generating more than 1.4 million CAD programs. Under idealized inputs, specialized mesh-to-CAD models substantially outperform code-generating VLMs, which remain far from reliable CAD program reconstruction. CADBench further reveals three recurring failure modes: reconstruction quality degrades with geometric complexity, CAD-specialized models can be brittle under modality shift, and model rankings change across metrics. Together, these results position CADBench as a diagnostic testbed for measuring progress in editable 3D reconstruction and multimodal CAD understanding. The benchmark is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/DeCoDELab/CADBench.

AI.tldr: CADBench是一个面向多模态CAD程序生成任务的统一基准，包含18,000个样本、五种输入模态和六项评估指标，系统评测了11个CAD专用与通用视觉语言模型，揭示了现有方法在几何复杂度、模态迁移和指标排名方面的关键失效模式。
AI.motivation: 现有的可编辑CAD程序生成研究在数据集、模态和评估指标上高度碎片化，缺乏统一的基准来系统衡量和比较不同方法的进展，导致该领域的进步难以被准确评估。
AI.method: CADBench包含18,000个评估样本，涵盖来自DeepCAD、Fusion 360、ABC、MCB和Objaverse的六个基准族系，支持五种输入模态（干净网格、带噪网格、单视角渲染、逼真渲染、多视角渲染），并使用六项指标（几何保真度、可执行性、程序紧凑性）。STEP族系按B-rep面数分层，所有族系均经多样性采样以控制复杂度与物体变化，共评测了11个CAD专用与通用视觉语言模型，生成了超过140万个CAD程序。
AI.result: 在理想输入条件下，专用网格到CAD模型显著优于代码生成视觉语言模型，后者在CAD程序重建上仍远不可靠。CADBench揭示了三种重复失效模式：重建质量随几何复杂度下降、CAD专用模型在模态迁移下易脆化、模型排名因评估指标不同而变化。
AI.conclusion: CADBench作为可编辑3D重建与多模态CAD理解的诊断性测试平台，能够系统衡量该领域的进展，并为未来方法在鲁棒性、模态泛化能力和指标一致性方面提供了明确改进方向。

title: Count Anything at Any Granularity
summary: Open-world object counting remains brittle: despite rapid advances in vision-language models (VLMs), reliably counting the objects a user intends is far from solved. We argue that a central reason is that counting granularity is left implicit; users may refer to a specific identity, an attribute, an instance type, a category, or an abstract concept, yet most methods treat "what to count" as a single, category-level matching problem. In this work, we redefine open-world counting as multi-grained counting, where visual exemplars specify target appearance and fine-grained text, with optional negative prompts, specifies the intended semantic granularity across five explicit levels. Making granularity explicit, however, exposes a critical data bottleneck: existing counting datasets lack the multi-category scenes, controlled distractors, and instance-level annotations needed to verify fine-grained prompt semantics. To address this, we propose the first fully automatic data-scaling pipeline that integrates controllable 3D synthesis with consistent image editing and VLM-based filtering, and use it to construct KubriCount, the largest and most comprehensively annotated counting dataset to date, supporting both training and multi-grained evaluation. Systematic benchmarking reveals that both multimodal large language models and specialist counting models exhibit severe prompt-following failures under fine-grained distinctions. Motivated by these findings, we train HieraCount, a multi-grained counting model that jointly leverages text and visual exemplars as complementary target specifications. HieraCount substantially improves multi-grained counting accuracy and generalizes robustly to challenging real-world scenarios. The project page is available here: https://verg-avesta.github.io/KubriCount/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多粒度计数新范式，通过显式定义五种语义粒度解决开放世界计数中粒度模糊的问题；构建了首个完全自动化的数据合成流水线并产出大规模数据集KubriCount，揭示了现有模型在细粒度计数中的指令跟随失败问题，并训练了联合利用文本与视觉示例的多粒度计数模型HieraCount，显著提升了多粒度计数精度与真实场景泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有开放世界计数方法将"计数什么"简化为单一类别级匹配问题，忽略了用户意图中隐含的身份、属性、实例类型、类别或抽象概念等多粒度语义层次，导致计数粒度模糊成为可靠计数的核心瓶颈；同时，现有计数数据集缺乏多类别场景、受控干扰物及实例级标注，无法支持细粒度提示语义的验证与模型训练。
AI.method: 论文将开放世界计数重新定义为多粒度计数问题，通过视觉示例指定目标外观、细粒度文本（辅以可选负提示）显式指定五种语义粒度层次；提出首个全自动数据扩展流水线，结合可控3D合成、一致性图像编辑与VLM过滤来生成大规模标注数据；基于此构建KubriCount数据集，并训练HieraCount模型，该模型联合利用文本与视觉示例作为互补的目标规格描述来实现多粒度计数。
AI.result: 系统化基准测试表明，多模态大语言模型和专用计数模型在细粒度区分下均表现出严重的指令跟随失败；HieraCount在多粒度计数准确率上取得显著提升，并在具有挑战性的真实场景中展现出鲁棒的泛化能力。KubriCount是迄今最大且标注最全面的计数数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了粒度显式化对开放世界计数的关键价值，指出当前模型在细粒度语义理解上的根本性不足，并证明联合利用文本与视觉示例作为互补目标规格是提升多粒度计数性能的有效方向；其数据合成流水线为大规模标注数据集的构建提供了可复用的自动化范式。

title: Counterfactual Stress Testing for Image Classification Models
summary: Deep learning models in medical imaging often fail when deployed in new clinical environments due to distribution shifts in demographics, scanner hardware, or acquisition protocols. A central challenge is underspecification, where models with similar validation performance exhibit divergent real-world failure modes. Although stress testing has emerged as a tool to assess this, current methods typically rely on simple, uninformed perturbations (e.g., brightness or contrast changes), which fail to capture clinically realistic variation and can overestimate robustness. In this work, we introduce a counterfactual stress testing framework based on causal generative models that create realistic "what if" images by intervening on attributes such as scanner type and patient sex while preserving anatomical identity, enabling controlled and semantically meaningful evaluation under targeted distribution shifts. Across two imaging modalities (chest X-ray and mammography), three model architectures, and multiple shift scenarios, we show that counterfactual stress tests provide a substantially more accurate proxy for real out-of-distribution performance than classical perturbations, capturing the direction and relative magnitude of performance changes as well as model ranking. These results suggest that causal generative models can serve as practical simulators for robustness assessment, offering a more reliable basis for evaluating medical AI systems prior to deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于因果生成模型的反事实压力测试框架，通过干预扫描仪类型、患者性别等属性生成符合临床实际的"假设"图像，用于评估医学影像AI模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，相比传统扰动方法更准确地预测真实域外性能。
AI.motivation: 医学影像深度学习模型在新临床环境中常因人口统计、硬件或协议的分布偏移而失效，而现有压力测试方法多依赖简单的非信息扰动（如亮度或对比度变化），无法捕捉临床真实的变异，且容易高估模型鲁棒性，亟需一种能生成语义上有意义且保持解剖结构不变的测试方法。
AI.method: 提出基于因果生成模型的反事实压力测试框架，通过干预扫描仪类型、患者性别等属性生成"假设"图像，在保留个体解剖身份的同时实现可控、语义明确的分布偏移评估，并在胸部X光和乳腺摄影两种模态、三种模型架构及多种偏移场景下验证。
AI.result: 反事实压力测试相比经典扰动方法能更准确地代理真实域外性能，准确捕捉性能变化的方向和相对幅度以及模型排名，在两种成像模态、三种模型架构和多种偏移场景下均一致有效。
AI.conclusion: 因果生成模型可作为实用的鲁棒性评估模拟器，为医学AI系统部署前的可靠性评估提供比传统扰动方法更可靠的依据。

title: CapVector: Learning Transferable Capability Vectors in Parametric Space for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: This paper proposes a novel approach to address the challenge that pretrained VLA models often fail to effectively improve performance and reduce adaptation costs during standard supervised finetuning (SFT). Some advanced finetuning methods with auxiliary training objectives can improve performance and reduce the number of convergence steps. However, they typically incur significant computational overhead due to the additional losses from auxiliary objectives. To simultaneously achieve the enhanced capabilities of auxiliary training with the simplicity of standard SFT, we decouple the two objectives of auxiliary-objective SFT within the parameter space, namely, enhancing general capabilities and fitting task-specific action distributions. To deliver the goal, we only need to train the model to converge on a small-scale task set using two distinct training strategies, resulting in two finetuned models. The parameters' difference between the two models can then be interpreted as capability vectors provided by auxiliary objectives. These vectors are then merged with pretrained parameters to form a capability-enhanced meta model. Moreover, when standard SFT is augmented with a lightweight orthogonal regularization loss, the merged model attains performance comparable to auxiliary finetuned baselines with reduced computational overhead. Internal and external experiments demonstrate that our capability vectors (1) are effective and versatile across diverse models, (2) can generalize to novel environments and embodiments out of the box.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将辅助目标SFT的两个目标（增强通用能力与拟合任务特定动作分布）在参数空间解耦的方法，通过训练两个模型并取其参数差作为能力向量，再与预训练参数合并以构建能力增强的元模型，在不引入额外计算开销的同时达到与辅助目标微调相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练的VLA模型在标准监督微调（SFT）中往往难以有效提升性能并降低适应成本，而现有的带有辅助训练目标的微调方法虽然能提升性能并减少收敛步数，但会因辅助目标的额外损失引入显著的计算开销。本文旨在同时实现辅助目标微调的能力提升与标准SFT的简洁高效。
AI.method: 本文将辅助目标SFT的两个目标（增强通用能力与拟合任务特定动作分布）在参数空间解耦：仅需在一个小规模任务集上用两种不同训练策略训练模型至收敛，得到两个微调模型，将二者的参数差解释为辅助目标提供的能力向量；将该向量与预训练参数合并，构建能力增强的元模型；在此基础上，进一步在标准SFT中引入轻量级正交正则化损失，使合并后的模型在不增加计算开销的情况下达到与辅助目标微调基线相当的性能。
AI.result: 内部与外部实验表明，所提能力向量在不同模型上均有效且通用，能够开箱即用地泛化到未见过的环境和具身形态中，且相比辅助目标微调基线显著降低了计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明通过参数空间解耦与能力向量合并的策略，可以在不引入额外计算开销的前提下，同时获得辅助目标微调的性能优势与标准SFT的简洁性，为高效微调预训练VLA模型提供了新思路。
